authors_text: Guillaume Berger,Manik Dhingra,Antoine Mercier,Yashesh Savani,Sunny Panchal,Fatih Porikli
title: QuickSRNet: Plain Single-Image Super-Resolution Architecture for Faster Inference on Mobile Platforms
title_zh: QuickSRNet：简单的单图像超分辨率架构，可在移动平台上实现更快的推理
abstract: In this work, we present QuickSRNet, an efficient super-resolution architecture for real-time applications on mobile platforms. Super-resolution clarifies, sharpens, and upscales an image to higher resolution. Applications such as gaming and video playback along with the ever-improving display capabilities of TVs, smartphones, and VR headsets are driving the need for efficient upscaling solutions. While existing deep learning-based super-resolution approaches achieve impressive results in terms of visual quality, enabling real-time DL-based super-resolution on mobile devices with compute, thermal, and power constraints is challenging. To address these challenges, we propose QuickSRNet, a simple yet effective architecture that provides better accuracy-to-latency trade-offs than existing neural architectures for single-image super resolution. We present training tricks to speed up existing residual-based super-resolution architectures while maintaining robustness to quantization. Our proposed architecture produces 1080p outputs via 2x upscaling in 2.2 ms on a modern smartphone, making it ideal for high-fps real-time applications.
summary: In this work, we present QuickSRNet, an efficient super-resolution architecture for real-time applications on mobile platforms. Super-resolution clarifies, sharpens, and upscales an image to higher resolution. Applications such as gaming and video playback along with the ever-improving display capabilities of TVs, smartphones, and VR headsets are driving the need for efficient upscaling solutions. While existing deep learning-based super-resolution approaches achieve impressive results in terms of visual quality, enabling real-time DL-based super-resolution on mobile devices with compute, thermal, and power constraints is challenging. To address these challenges, we propose QuickSRNet, a simple yet effective architecture that provides better accuracy-to-latency trade-offs than existing neural architectures for single-image super resolution. We present training tricks to speed up existing residual-based super-resolution architectures while maintaining robustness to quantization. Our proposed architecture produces 1080p outputs via 2x upscaling in 2.2 ms on a modern smartphone, making it ideal for high-fps real-time applications.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 QuickSRNet，这是一种适用于移动平台上实时应用程序的高效超分辨率架构。超分辨率可以使图像变得清晰、锐化和升级到更高分辨率。游戏和视频播放等应用以及电视、智能手机和 VR 耳机不断改进的显示功能正在推动对高效升级解决方案的需求。虽然现有的基于深度学习的超分辨率方法在视觉质量方面取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但在计算、热量和功耗限制的移动设备上实现基于深度学习的实时超分辨率仍具有挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 QuickSRNet，这是一种简单而有效的架构，与现有的单图像超分辨率神经架构相比，它提供了更好的准确性与延迟权衡。我们提出了训练技巧，以加速现有的基于残差的超分辨率架构，同时保持量化的鲁棒性。我们提出的架构可在现代智能手机上通过 2 倍放大在 2.2 毫秒内生成 1080p 输出，使其成为高 fps 实时应用的理想选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuickSRNet，一种适用于移动平台的高效单图像超分辨率架构，旨在实现更快的实时超分辨率处理。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习超分辨率方法在移动设备上面临计算、功耗和散热限制，难以满足实时性需求，需更高效的架构设计。
AI.method: 设计轻量化的QuickSRNet架构，并引入训练技巧加速残差网络，同时保持对量化误差的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在现代智能手机上以2.2毫秒生成1080p超分结果，适用于高帧率实时场景。
AI.conclusion: QuickSRNet在保持精度的同时显著降低推理延迟，为移动设备实时超分提供了更优的准确率-延迟权衡方案。

authors_text: Huaqing Wang,Junfeng Jing,Ning Li,Weichuan Zhang,Chao Liu
title: Corner Detection Based on Multi-directional Gabor Filters with Multi-scales
title_zh: 基于多尺度多方向Gabor滤波器的角点检测
abstract: Gabor wavelet is an essential tool for image analysis and computer vision tasks. Local structure tensors with multiple scales are widely used in local feature extraction. Our research indicates that the current corner detection method based on Gabor wavelets can not effectively apply to complex scenes. In this work, the capability of the Gabor function to discriminate the intensity changes of step edges, L-shaped corners, Y-shaped or T-shaped corners, X-shaped corners, and star-shaped corners are investigated. The properties of Gabor wavelets to suppress affine image transformation are investigated and obtained. Many properties for edges and corners were discovered, which prompted us to propose a new corner extraction method. To fully use the structural information from the tuned Gabor filters, a novel multi-directional structure tensor is constructed for corner detection, and a multi-scale corner measurement function is proposed to remove false candidate corners. Furthermore, we compare the proposed method with twelve current state-of-the-art methods, which exhibit optimal performance and practical application to 3D reconstruction with good application potential.
summary: Gabor wavelet is an essential tool for image analysis and computer vision tasks. Local structure tensors with multiple scales are widely used in local feature extraction. Our research indicates that the current corner detection method based on Gabor wavelets can not effectively apply to complex scenes. In this work, the capability of the Gabor function to discriminate the intensity changes of step edges, L-shaped corners, Y-shaped or T-shaped corners, X-shaped corners, and star-shaped corners are investigated. The properties of Gabor wavelets to suppress affine image transformation are investigated and obtained. Many properties for edges and corners were discovered, which prompted us to propose a new corner extraction method. To fully use the structural information from the tuned Gabor filters, a novel multi-directional structure tensor is constructed for corner detection, and a multi-scale corner measurement function is proposed to remove false candidate corners. Furthermore, we compare the proposed method with twelve current state-of-the-art methods, which exhibit optimal performance and practical application to 3D reconstruction with good application potential.
abstract_zh: Gabor 小波是图像分析和计算机视觉任务的重要工具。多尺度局部结构张量广泛应用于局部特征提取。我们的研究表明，当前基于Gabor小波的角点检测方法不能有效地应用于复杂场景。在这项工作中，研究了 Gabor 函数区分阶梯边缘、L 形角、Y 形或 T 形角、X 形角和星形角的强度变化的能力。研究并获得了Gabor小波抑制仿射图像变换的性质。边缘和角点的许多属性被发现，这促使我们提出一种新的角点提取方法。为了充分利用调整后的 Gabor 滤波器的结构信息，构建了一种新颖的多方向结构张量用于角点检测，并提出了多尺度角点测量函数来去除虚假候选角点。此外，我们将所提出的方法与 12 种当前最先进的方法进行了比较，这些方法在 3D 重建中表现出最佳性能和实际应用，具有良好的应用潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多方向Gabor滤波器与多尺度分析的新型角点检测方法，以解决复杂场景下传统方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Gabor小波的角点检测方法在复杂场景中存在识别效果不佳的问题，需改进以提升对多种边缘结构和角点的区分能力。
AI.method: 通过研究Gabor函数对不同边缘结构的响应特性，构建多方向结构张量并设计多尺度角点测量函数，结合多尺度分析消除误检。
AI.result: 新方法在十二种先进算法对比中表现最优，且在三维重建中具有良好的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了复杂场景下的角点检测精度，为三维重建等应用提供了可靠的技术支持。

title: Preference-Aware Delivery Planning for Last-Mile Logistics
title_zh: 最后一英里物流的偏好感知交付计划
comment: Accepted to the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS-23)
comments: Accepted to the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS-23)
abstract: Optimizing delivery routes for last-mile logistics service is challenging and has attracted the attention of many researchers. These problems are usually modeled and solved as variants of vehicle routing problems (VRPs) with challenging real-world constraints (e.g., time windows, precedence). However, despite many decades of solid research on solving these VRP instances, we still see significant gaps between optimized routes and the routes that are actually preferred by the practitioners. Most of these gaps are due to the difference between what's being optimized, and what the practitioners actually care about, which is hard to be defined exactly in many instances. In this paper, we propose a novel hierarchical route optimizer with learnable parameters that combines the strength of both the optimization and machine learning approaches. Our hierarchical router first solves a zone-level Traveling Salesman Problem with learnable weights on various zone-level features; with the zone visit sequence fixed, we then solve the stop-level vehicle routing problem as a Shortest Hamiltonian Path problem. The Bayesian optimization approach is then introduced to allow us to adjust the weights to be assigned to different zone features used in solving the zone-level Traveling Salesman Problem. By using a real-world delivery dataset provided by the Amazon Last Mile Routing Research Challenge, we demonstrate the importance of having both the optimization and the machine learning components. We also demonstrate how we can use route-related features to identify instances that we might have difficulty with. This paves ways to further research on how we can tackle these difficult instances.
summary: Optimizing delivery routes for last-mile logistics service is challenging and has attracted the attention of many researchers. These problems are usually modeled and solved as variants of vehicle routing problems (VRPs) with challenging real-world constraints (e.g., time windows, precedence). However, despite many decades of solid research on solving these VRP instances, we still see significant gaps between optimized routes and the routes that are actually preferred by the practitioners. Most of these gaps are due to the difference between what's being optimized, and what the practitioners actually care about, which is hard to be defined exactly in many instances. In this paper, we propose a novel hierarchical route optimizer with learnable parameters that combines the strength of both the optimization and machine learning approaches. Our hierarchical router first solves a zone-level Traveling Salesman Problem with learnable weights on various zone-level features; with the zone visit sequence fixed, we then solve the stop-level vehicle routing problem as a Shortest Hamiltonian Path problem. The Bayesian optimization approach is then introduced to allow us to adjust the weights to be assigned to different zone features used in solving the zone-level Traveling Salesman Problem. By using a real-world delivery dataset provided by the Amazon Last Mile Routing Research Challenge, we demonstrate the importance of having both the optimization and the machine learning components. We also demonstrate how we can use route-related features to identify instances that we might have difficulty with. This paves ways to further research on how we can tackle these difficult instances.
abstract_zh: 优化最后一英里物流服务的配送路线具有挑战性，并引起了许多研究人员的关注。这些问题通常作为车辆路径问题 (VRP) 的变体进行建模和解决，具有挑战性的现实世界约束（例如时间窗口、优先级）。然而，尽管对解决这些 VRP 实例进行了数十年的扎实研究，我们仍然看到优化路线与从业者实际首选的路线之间存在显着差距。这些差距大部分是由于正在优化的内容与从业者真正关心的内容之间的差异造成的，这在许多情况下很难准确定义。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有可学习参数的新型分层路线优化器，它结合了优化和机器学习方法的优势。我们的分层路由器首先通过各种区域级特征的可学习权重解决区域级旅行商问题；固定区域访问顺序后，我们将停靠级车辆路径问题作为最短哈密顿路径问题来解决。然后引入贝叶斯优化方法，使我们能够调整分配给用于解决区域级旅行商问题的不同区域特征的权重。通过使用亚马逊最后一英里路由研究挑战赛提供的真实世界交付数据集，我们证明了同时拥有优化和机器学习组件的重​​要性。我们还演示了如何使用与路线相关的功能来识别我们可能遇到困难的实例。这为进一步研究如何解决这些困难的情况铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合优化与机器学习的分层路由优化方法，以解决最后一公里物流中实际配送路线与理论优化结果之间的差距问题。
AI.motivation: 传统车辆路径问题（VRP）优化方法未能充分考虑物流从业者实际偏好，导致理论最优路线与实际需求存在显著差异。
AI.method: 设计分层路由优化框架：1) 区域级通过可学习权重解决带特征的旅行商问题（TSP）；2) 停靠点级转化为最短哈密尔顿路径问题；3) 引入贝叶斯优化调整区域特征权重。
AI.result: 在亚马逊真实配送数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明融合优化与机器学习组件可提升路线规划质量，并能识别复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决最后一公里物流中偏好驱动的配送规划提供了新思路，为处理复杂实例的进一步研究奠定基础。

search_text: Preference-Aware Delivery Planning for Last-Mile Logistics 最后一英里物流的偏好感知交付计划 Optimizing delivery routes for last-mile logistics service is challenging and has attracted the attention of many researchers. These problems are usually modeled and solved as variants of vehicle routing problems (VRPs) with challenging real-world constraints (e.g., time windows, precedence). However, despite many decades of solid research on solving these VRP instances, we still see significant gaps between optimized routes and the routes that are actually preferred by the practitioners. Most of these gaps are due to the difference between what's being optimized, and what the practitioners actually care about, which is hard to be defined exactly in many instances. In this paper, we propose a novel hierarchical route optimizer with learnable parameters that combines the strength of both the optimization and machine learning approaches. Our hierarchical router first solves a zone-level Traveling Salesman Problem with learnable weights on various zone-level features; with the zone visit sequence fixed, we then solve the stop-level vehicle routing problem as a Shortest Hamiltonian Path problem. The Bayesian optimization approach is then introduced to allow us to adjust the weights to be assigned to different zone features used in solving the zone-level Traveling Salesman Problem. By using a real-world delivery dataset provided by the Amazon Last Mile Routing Research Challenge, we demonstrate the importance of having both the optimization and the machine learning components. We also demonstrate how we can use route-related features to identify instances that we might have difficulty with. This paves ways to further research on how we can tackle these difficult instances. 优化最后一英里物流服务的配送路线具有挑战性，并引起了许多研究人员的关注。这些问题通常作为车辆路径问题 (VRP) 的变体进行建模和解决，具有挑战性的现实世界约束（例如时间窗口、优先级）。然而，尽管对解决这些 VRP 实例进行了数十年的扎实研究，我们仍然看到优化路线与从业者实际首选的路线之间存在显着差距。这些差距大部分是由于正在优化的内容与从业者真正关心的内容之间的差异造成的，这在许多情况下很难准确定义。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有可学习参数的新型分层路线优化器，它结合了优化和机器学习方法的优势。我们的分层路由器首先通过各种区域级特征的可学习权重解决区域级旅行商问题；固定区域访问顺序后，我们将停靠级车辆路径问题作为最短哈密顿路径问题来解决。然后引入贝叶斯优化方法，使我们能够调整分配给用于解决区域级旅行商问题的不同区域特征的权重。通过使用亚马逊最后一英里路由研究挑战赛提供的真实世界交付数据集，我们证明了同时拥有优化和机器学习组件的重​​要性。我们还演示了如何使用与路线相关的功能来识别我们可能遇到困难的实例。这为进一步研究如何解决这些困难的情况铺平了道路。 本文提出一种结合优化与机器学习的分层路由优化方法，以解决最后一公里物流中实际配送路线与理论优化结果之间的差距问题。 Qian Shao,Shih-Fen Cheng cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

title: Using Memory-Based Learning to Solve Tasks with State-Action Constraints
title_zh: 使用基于记忆的学习来解决具有状态动作约束的任务
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, accepted to the International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, accepted to the International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
abstract: Tasks where the set of possible actions depend discontinuously on the state pose a significant challenge for current reinforcement learning algorithms. For example, a locked door must be first unlocked, and then the handle turned before the door can be opened. The sequential nature of these tasks makes obtaining final rewards difficult, and transferring information between task variants using continuous learned values such as weights rather than discrete symbols can be inefficient. Our key insight is that agents that act and think symbolically are often more effective in dealing with these tasks. We propose a memory-based learning approach that leverages the symbolic nature of constraints and temporal ordering of actions in these tasks to quickly acquire and transfer high-level information. We evaluate the performance of memory-based learning on both real and simulated tasks with approximately discontinuous constraints between states and actions, and show our method learns to solve these tasks an order of magnitude faster than both model-based and model-free deep reinforcement learning methods.
summary: Tasks where the set of possible actions depend discontinuously on the state pose a significant challenge for current reinforcement learning algorithms. For example, a locked door must be first unlocked, and then the handle turned before the door can be opened. The sequential nature of these tasks makes obtaining final rewards difficult, and transferring information between task variants using continuous learned values such as weights rather than discrete symbols can be inefficient. Our key insight is that agents that act and think symbolically are often more effective in dealing with these tasks. We propose a memory-based learning approach that leverages the symbolic nature of constraints and temporal ordering of actions in these tasks to quickly acquire and transfer high-level information. We evaluate the performance of memory-based learning on both real and simulated tasks with approximately discontinuous constraints between states and actions, and show our method learns to solve these tasks an order of magnitude faster than both model-based and model-free deep reinforcement learning methods.
abstract_zh: 一组可能的动作不连续地依赖于状态的任务对当前的强化学习算法提出了重大挑战。例如，锁着的门必须先解锁，然后转动把手才能打开门。这些任务的顺序性质使得获得最终奖励变得困难，并且使用连续学习值（例如权重）而不是离散符号在任务变体之间传输信息可能效率低下。我们的主要见解是，以象征性方式行动和思考的代理人在处理这些任务时通常更有效。我们提出了一种基于记忆的学习方法，该方法利用这些任务中约束的符号性质和动作的时间顺序来快速获取和传输高级信息。我们评估了基于记忆的学习在真实和模拟任务上的性能，状态和动作之间具有近似不连续的约束，并表明我们的方法学习解决这些任务的速度比基于模型和无模型的深度强化学习方法快一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于记忆的学习方法，用于解决具有状态-动作约束的任务，如需要按顺序执行动作的场景。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在处理动作依赖于状态的任务时效率低下，因为不连续的动作约束导致奖励获取困难且信息传递效率低。
AI.method: 通过利用符号约束和动作的时间顺序，设计基于记忆的学习框架以快速获取和转移高层信息。
AI.result: 该方法在真实和模拟任务中比模型驱动及无模型的深度强化学习方法快一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 基于记忆的学习能有效处理状态-动作约束任务，显著优于现有强化学习方法。

title: DroNeRF: Real-time Multi-agent Drone Pose Optimization for Computing Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: DroNeRF：用于计算神经辐射场的实时多智能体无人机姿势优化
comment: To appear in 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: To appear in 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: We present a novel optimization algorithm called DroNeRF for the autonomous positioning of monocular camera drones around an object for real-time 3D reconstruction using only a few images. Neural Radiance Fields or NeRF, is a novel view synthesis technique used to generate new views of an object or scene from a set of input images. Using drones in conjunction with NeRF provides a unique and dynamic way to generate novel views of a scene, especially with limited scene capabilities of restricted movements. Our approach focuses on calculating optimized pose for individual drones while solely depending on the object geometry without using any external localization system. The unique camera positioning during the data-capturing phase significantly impacts the quality of the 3D model. To evaluate the quality of our generated novel views, we compute different perceptual metrics like the Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) and Structural Similarity Index Measure(SSIM). Our work demonstrates the benefit of using an optimal placement of various drones with limited mobility to generate perceptually better results.
summary: We present a novel optimization algorithm called DroNeRF for the autonomous positioning of monocular camera drones around an object for real-time 3D reconstruction using only a few images. Neural Radiance Fields or NeRF, is a novel view synthesis technique used to generate new views of an object or scene from a set of input images. Using drones in conjunction with NeRF provides a unique and dynamic way to generate novel views of a scene, especially with limited scene capabilities of restricted movements. Our approach focuses on calculating optimized pose for individual drones while solely depending on the object geometry without using any external localization system. The unique camera positioning during the data-capturing phase significantly impacts the quality of the 3D model. To evaluate the quality of our generated novel views, we compute different perceptual metrics like the Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) and Structural Similarity Index Measure(SSIM). Our work demonstrates the benefit of using an optimal placement of various drones with limited mobility to generate perceptually better results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为 DroNeRF 的新颖优化算法，用于将单目摄像机无人机围绕物体进行自主定位，从而仅使用少量图像即可进行实时 3D 重建。神经辐射场或 NeRF 是一种新颖的视图合成技术，用于从一组输入图像生成对象或场景的新视图。将无人机与 NeRF 结合使用提供了一种独特且动态的方式来生成场景的新颖视图，尤其是在运动受限的场景能力有限的情况下。我们的方法侧重于计算单个无人机的优化姿态，同时仅取决于物体的几何形状，而不使用任何外部定位系统。数据采集​​阶段独特的相机定位会显着影响 3D 模型的质量。为了评估我们生成的新颖视图的质量，我们计算了不同的感知指标，例如峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）。我们的工作证明了使用各种机动性有限的无人机的最佳放置位置来产生更好的感知结果的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DroNeRF的优化算法，用于在实时3D重建中自主定位单目摄像头无人机，仅需少量图像即可生成神经辐射场（NeRF）。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法依赖固定相机视角，难以动态捕捉场景。无人机可提供灵活视角，但现有方法受限于外部定位系统或移动性不足，影响3D重建质量。
AI.method: 通过优化多无人机的位姿，仅依赖目标几何信息（无需外部定位系统），结合NeRF生成新视角。数据采集阶段的相机位置显著影响模型质量，使用PSNR和SSIM等感知指标评估效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，有限移动性无人机的最优布局能生成感知质量更优的3D模型，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: DroNeRF通过自主优化无人机位姿，有效提升了NeRF在受限场景下的实时3D重建效果，验证了动态视角优化的价值。

result: 实验表明，有限移动性无人机的最优布局能生成感知质量更优的3D模型，优于传统方法。
conclusion: DroNeRF通过自主优化无人机位姿，有效提升了NeRF在受限场景下的实时3D重建效果，验证了动态视角优化的价值。
search_text: DroNeRF: Real-time Multi-agent Drone Pose Optimization for Computing Neural Radiance Fields DroNeRF：用于计算神经辐射场的实时多智能体无人机姿势优化 We present a novel optimization algorithm called DroNeRF for the autonomous positioning of monocular camera drones around an object for real-time 3D reconstruction using only a few images. Neural Radiance Fields or NeRF, is a novel view synthesis technique used to generate new views of an object or scene from a set of input images. Using drones in conjunction with NeRF provides a unique and dynamic way to generate novel views of a scene, especially with limited scene capabilities of restricted movements. Our approach focuses on calculating optimized pose for individual drones while solely depending on the object geometry without using any external localization system. The unique camera positioning during the data-capturing phase significantly impacts the quality of the 3D model. To evaluate the quality of our generated novel views, we compute different perceptual metrics like the Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) and Structural Similarity Index Measure(SSIM). Our work demonstrates the benefit of using an optimal placement of various drones with limited mobility to generate perceptually better results. 我们提出了一种名为 DroNeRF 的新颖优化算法，用于将单目摄像机无人机围绕物体进行自主定位，从而仅使用少量图像即可进行实时 3D 重建。神经辐射场或 NeRF 是一种新颖的视图合成技术，用于从一组输入图像生成对象或场景的新视图。将无人机与 NeRF 结合使用提供了一种独特且动态的方式来生成场景的新颖视图，尤其是在运动受限的场景能力有限的情况下。我们的方法侧重于计算单个无人机的优化姿态，同时仅取决于物体的几何形状，而不使用任何外部定位系统。数据采集​​阶段独特的相机定位会显着影响 3D 模型的质量。为了评估我们生成的新颖视图的质量，我们计算了不同的感知指标，例如峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）。我们的工作证明了使用各种机动性有限的无人机的最佳放置位置来产生更好的感知结果的好处。 本文提出了一种名为DroNeRF的优化算法，用于在实时3D重建中自主定位单目摄像头无人机，仅需少量图像即可生成神经辐射场（NeRF）。 Dipam Patel,Phu Pham,Aniket Bera cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.MA

title: SG-LSTM: Social Group LSTM for Robot Navigation Through Dense Crowds
title_zh: SG-LSTM：用于机器人在密集人群中导航的社交组 LSTM
comment: To appear in 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: To appear in 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: With the increasing availability and affordability of personal robots, they will no longer be confined to large corporate warehouses or factories but will instead be expected to operate in less controlled environments alongside larger groups of people. In addition to ensuring safety and efficiency, it is crucial to minimize any negative psychological impact robots may have on humans and follow unwritten social norms in these situations. Our research aims to develop a model that can predict the movements of pedestrians and perceptually-social groups in crowded environments. We introduce a new Social Group Long Short-term Memory (SG-LSTM) model that models human groups and interactions in dense environments using a socially-aware LSTM to produce more accurate trajectory predictions. Our approach enables navigation algorithms to calculate collision-free paths faster and more accurately in crowded environments. Additionally, we also release a large video dataset with labeled pedestrian groups for the broader social navigation community. We show comparisons with different metrics on different datasets (ETH, Hotel, MOT15) and different prediction approaches (LIN, LSTM, O-LSTM, S-LSTM) as well as runtime performance.
summary: With the increasing availability and affordability of personal robots, they will no longer be confined to large corporate warehouses or factories but will instead be expected to operate in less controlled environments alongside larger groups of people. In addition to ensuring safety and efficiency, it is crucial to minimize any negative psychological impact robots may have on humans and follow unwritten social norms in these situations. Our research aims to develop a model that can predict the movements of pedestrians and perceptually-social groups in crowded environments. We introduce a new Social Group Long Short-term Memory (SG-LSTM) model that models human groups and interactions in dense environments using a socially-aware LSTM to produce more accurate trajectory predictions. Our approach enables navigation algorithms to calculate collision-free paths faster and more accurately in crowded environments. Additionally, we also release a large video dataset with labeled pedestrian groups for the broader social navigation community. We show comparisons with different metrics on different datasets (ETH, Hotel, MOT15) and different prediction approaches (LIN, LSTM, O-LSTM, S-LSTM) as well as runtime performance.
abstract_zh: 随着个人机器人的可用性和可负担性不断提高，它们将不再局限于大型公司仓库或工厂，而是有望在控制较少的环境中与更多的人一起运行。除了确保安全和效率之外，最大限度地减少机器人可能对人类产生的负面心理影响并在这些情况下遵循不成文的社会规范也至关重要。我们的研究旨在开发一种模型，可以预测拥挤环境中行人和感知社会群体的运动。我们引入了一种新的社交群体长短期记忆 (SG-LSTM) 模型，该模型使用社交感知 LSTM 来模拟密集环境中的人类群体和交互，以产生更准确的轨迹预测。我们的方法使导航算法能够在拥挤的环境中更快、更准确地计算无碰撞路径。此外，我们还为更广泛的社交导航社区发布了带有标记行人群体的大型视频数据集。我们展示了不同数据集（ETH、Hotel、MOT15）和不同预测方法（LIN、LSTM、O-LSTM、S-LSTM）上的不同指标以及运行时性能的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SG-LSTM的社交群体长短期记忆模型，用于在密集人群中实现更精确的机器人导航轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 随着个人机器人进入非结构化人群环境，需解决安全、效率及减少对人类心理负面影响的问题，同时遵循社会规范。
AI.method: 设计社交感知的LSTM网络，建模行人群体互动关系，并发布包含标注人群的大型视频数据集以支持社会导航研究。
AI.result: 在ETH、Hotel、MOT15等数据集上，SG-LSTM在轨迹预测精度和实时性能上优于LIN、LSTM、O-LSTM、S-LSTM等对比方法。
AI.conclusion: SG-LSTM通过建模社会群体行为提升了机器人在密集人群中的导航能力，为社会导航领域提供了新工具和基准数据集。

title: A Threefold Review on Deep Semantic Segmentation: Efficiency-oriented, Temporal and Depth-aware design
title_zh: 深度语义分割的三重回顾：面向效率、时间和深度感知的设计
abstract: Semantic image and video segmentation stand among the most important tasks in computer vision nowadays, since they provide a complete and meaningful representation of the environment by means of a dense classification of the pixels in a given scene. Recently, Deep Learning, and more precisely Convolutional Neural Networks, have boosted semantic segmentation to a new level in terms of performance and generalization capabilities. However, designing Deep Semantic Segmentation models is a complex task, as it may involve application-dependent aspects. Particularly, when considering autonomous driving applications, the robustness-efficiency trade-off, as well as intrinsic limitations - computational/memory bounds and data-scarcity - and constraints - real-time inference - should be taken into consideration. In this respect, the use of additional data modalities, such as depth perception for reasoning on the geometry of a scene, and temporal cues from videos to explore redundancy and consistency, are promising directions yet not explored to their full potential in the literature. In this paper, we conduct a survey on the most relevant and recent advances in Deep Semantic Segmentation in the context of vision for autonomous vehicles, from three different perspectives: efficiency-oriented model development for real-time operation, RGB-Depth data integration (RGB-D semantic segmentation), and the use of temporal information from videos in temporally-aware models. Our main objective is to provide a comprehensive discussion on the main methods, advantages, limitations, results and challenges faced from each perspective, so that the reader can not only get started, but also be up to date in respect to recent advances in this exciting and challenging research field.
summary: Semantic image and video segmentation stand among the most important tasks in computer vision nowadays, since they provide a complete and meaningful representation of the environment by means of a dense classification of the pixels in a given scene. Recently, Deep Learning, and more precisely Convolutional Neural Networks, have boosted semantic segmentation to a new level in terms of performance and generalization capabilities. However, designing Deep Semantic Segmentation models is a complex task, as it may involve application-dependent aspects. In this respect, the use of additional data modalities, such as depth perception for reasoning on the geometry of a scene, and temporal cues from videos to explore redundancy and consistency, are promising directions yet not explored to their full potential in the literature. In this paper, we conduct a survey on the most relevant and recent advances in Deep Semantic Segmentation in the context of vision for autonomous vehicles, from three different perspectives: efficiency-oriented model development for real-time operation, RGB-Depth data integration (RGB-D semantic segmentation), and the use of temporal information from videos in temporally-aware models. Our main objective is to provide a comprehensive discussion on the main methods, advantages, limitations, results and challenges faced from each perspective, so that the reader can not only get started, but also be up to date in respect to recent advances in this exciting and challenging research field.
abstract_zh: 语义图像和视频分割是当今计算机视觉中最重要的任务之一，因为它们通过给定场景中像素的密集分类来提供完整且有意义的环境表示。最近，深度学习，更准确地说是卷积神经网络，在性能和泛化能力方面将语义分割提升到了一个新的水平。然而，设计深度语义分割模型是一项复杂的任务，因为它可能涉及依赖于应用程序的方面。特别是，在考虑自动驾驶应用时，应考虑鲁棒性与效率的权衡，以及内在的限制（计算/内存限制和数据稀缺）和约束（实时推理）。在这方面，使用额外的数据模式，例如对场景几何进行推理的深度感知，以及利用视频中的时间线索来探索冗余和一致性，是有希望的方向，但在文献中尚未充分发挥其潜力。在本文中，我们从三个不同的角度对自动驾驶汽车视觉背景下深度语义分割最相关和最新的进展进行了调查：面向实时操作的效率导向模型开发、RGB-深度数据集成（RGB-D 语义分割）以及在时间感知模型中使用视频中的时间信息。我们的主要目标是从各个角度对主要方法、优点、局限性、结果和面临的挑战进行全面的讨论，以便读者不仅可以入门，而且可以了解这个令人兴奋和富有挑战性的研究领域的最新进展。

AI.tldr: 本文对深度语义分割领域的最新进展进行了三方面综述，重点关注面向效率、时序信息和深度感知的设计，尤其针对自动驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶等应用场景对语义分割模型提出了实时性、鲁棒性及数据稀缺性等挑战，需综合效率、时序和深度信息以提升性能。
AI.method: 从效率导向模型设计、RGB-Depth数据融合及时空感知模型三个维度，系统梳理并分析现有方法的技术特点与局限性。
AI.result: 总结了各方向的核心方法、实验结果及未解决的挑战，为研究者提供领域内最新技术动态与研究方向参考。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合与时序建模是提升分割性能的关键，未来需进一步平衡计算效率与模型复杂度以适应实际部署需求。

In this respect, the use of additional data modalities, such as depth perception for reasoning on the geometry of a scene, and temporal cues from videos to explore redundancy and consistency, are promising directions yet not explored to their full potential in the literature. In this paper, we conduct a survey on the most relevant and recent advances in Deep Semantic Segmentation in the context of vision for autonomous vehicles, from three different perspectives: efficiency-oriented model development for real-time operation, RGB-Depth data integration (RGB-D semantic segmentation), and the use of temporal information from videos in temporally-aware models. Our main objective is to provide a comprehensive discussion on the main methods, advantages, limitations, results and challenges faced from each perspective, so that the reader can not only get started, but also be up to date in respect to recent advances in this exciting and challenging research field. 语义图像和视频分割是当今计算机视觉中最重要的任务之一，因为它们通过给定场景中像素的密集分类来提供完整且有意义的环境表示。最近，深度学习，更准确地说是卷积神经网络，在性能和泛化能力方面将语义分割提升到了一个新的水平。然而，设计深度语义分割模型是一项复杂的任务，因为它可能涉及依赖于应用程序的方面。特别是，在考虑自动驾驶应用时，应考虑鲁棒性与效率的权衡，以及内在的限制（计算/内存限制和数据稀缺）和约束（实时推理）。在这方面，使用额外的数据模式，例如对场景几何进行推理的深度感知，以及利用视频中的时间线索来探索冗余和一致性，是有希望的方向，但在文献中尚未充分发挥其潜力。在本文中，我们从三个不同的角度对自动驾驶汽车视觉背景下深度语义分割最相关和最新的进展进行了调查：面向实时操作的效率导向模型开发、RGB-深度数据集成（RGB-D 语义分割）以及在时间感知模型中使用视频中的时间信息。我们的主要目标是从各个角度对主要方法、优点、局限性、结果和面临的挑战进行全面的讨论，以便读者不仅可以入门，而且可以了解这个令人兴奋和富有挑战性的研究领域的最新进展。 本文对深度语义分割领域的最新进展进行了三方面综述，重点关注面向效率、时序信息和深度感知的设计，尤其针对自动驾驶场景。 Felipe Manfio Barbosa,Fernando Santos Osório cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Online Control Barrier Functions for Decentralized Multi-Agent Navigation
title_zh: 用于分散式多智能体导航的在线控制屏障功能
abstract: Control barrier functions (CBFs) enable guaranteed safe multi-agent navigation in the continuous domain. The resulting navigation performance, however, is highly sensitive to the underlying hyperparameters. Traditional approaches consider fixed CBFs (where parameters are tuned apriori), and hence, typically do not perform well in cluttered and highly dynamic environments: conservative parameter values can lead to inefficient agent trajectories, or even failure to reach goal positions, whereas aggressive parameter values can lead to infeasible controls. To overcome these issues, in this paper, we propose online CBFs, whereby hyperparameters are tuned in real-time, as a function of what agents perceive in their immediate neighborhood. Since the explicit relationship between CBFs and navigation performance is hard to model, we leverage reinforcement learning to learn CBF-tuning policies in a model-free manner. Because we parameterize the policies with graph neural networks (GNNs), we are able to synthesize decentralized agent controllers that adjust parameter values locally, varying the degree of conservative and aggressive behaviors across agents. Simulations as well as real-world experiments show that (i) online CBFs are capable of solving navigation scenarios that are infeasible for fixed CBFs, and (ii), that they improve navigation performance by adapting to other agents and changes in the environment.
summary: Control barrier functions (CBFs) enable guaranteed safe multi-agent navigation in the continuous domain. The resulting navigation performance, however, is highly sensitive to the underlying hyperparameters. Traditional approaches consider fixed CBFs (where parameters are tuned apriori), and hence, typically do not perform well in cluttered and highly dynamic environments: conservative parameter values can lead to inefficient agent trajectories, or even failure to reach goal positions, whereas aggressive parameter values can lead to infeasible controls. To overcome these issues, in this paper, we propose online CBFs, whereby hyperparameters are tuned in real-time, as a function of what agents perceive in their immediate neighborhood. Since the explicit relationship between CBFs and navigation performance is hard to model, we leverage reinforcement learning to learn CBF-tuning policies in a model-free manner. Because we parameterize the policies with graph neural networks (GNNs), we are able to synthesize decentralized agent controllers that adjust parameter values locally, varying the degree of conservative and aggressive behaviors across agents. Simulations as well as real-world experiments show that (i) online CBFs are capable of solving navigation scenarios that are infeasible for fixed CBFs, and (ii), that they improve navigation performance by adapting to other agents and changes in the environment.
abstract_zh: 控制屏障函数 (CBF) 可保证连续域中的安全多智能体导航。然而，最终的导航性能对底层超参数高度敏感。传统方法考虑固定 CBF（其中参数是先验调整的），因此通常在混乱和高度动态的环境中表现不佳：保守的参数值可能导致低效的智能体轨迹，甚至无法达到目标位置，而激进的参数值可能导致不可行的控制。为了克服这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了在线 CBF，其中超参数根据代理在其邻近区域的感知进行实时调整。由于 CBF 和导航性能之间的显式关系很难建模，因此我们利用强化学习以无模型的方式学习 CBF 调整策略。因为我们使用图神经网络（GNN）参数化策略，所以我们能够合成分散的代理控制器，在本地调整参数值，改变代理之间保守和激进行为的程度。模拟以及现实世界的实验表明，（i）在线 CBF 能够解决固定 CBF 无法解决的导航场景，（ii）它们通过适应其他代理和环境变化来提高导航性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在线控制屏障函数（Online CBF），通过实时调整超参数解决传统固定CBF在复杂动态环境中导航性能不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统固定参数的控制屏障函数在复杂环境中易因保守或激进的超参数设置导致轨迹低效或控制不可行，需动态调整参数以适应环境变化。
AI.method: 利用强化学习训练CBF调参策略，结合图神经网络（GNN）实现多智能体去中心化局部参数调整，根据邻域感知实时优化保守性与激进性行为。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明，在线CBF能解决固定CBF无法处理的导航场景，并通过适应其他智能体和环境变化提升导航性能。
AI.conclusion: 在线CBF结合强化学习与GNN为多智能体导航提供了去中心化解决方案，在复杂动态环境中实现了安全与效率的平衡。

authors_text: Uksang Yoo,Hanwen Zhao,Alvaro Altamirano,Wenzhen Yuan,Chen Feng
title: Toward Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Transfer Learning for Pneumatic Soft Robot 3D Proprioceptive Sensing
title_zh: 面向气动软机器人 3D 本体感知的零样本模拟到真实迁移学习
comment: 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Pneumatic soft robots present many advantages in manipulation tasks. Notably, their inherent compliance makes them safe and reliable in unstructured and fragile environments. However, full-body shape sensing for pneumatic soft robots is challenging because of their high degrees of freedom and complex deformation behaviors. Vision-based proprioception sensing methods relying on embedded cameras and deep learning provide a good solution to proprioception sensing by extracting the full-body shape information from the high-dimensional sensing data. But the current training data collection process makes it difficult for many applications. To address this challenge, we propose and demonstrate a robust sim-to-real pipeline that allows the collection of the soft robot's shape information in high-fidelity point cloud representation. The model trained on simulated data was evaluated with real internal camera images. The results show that the model performed with averaged Chamfer distance of 8.85 mm and tip position error of 10.12 mm even with external perturbation for a pneumatic soft robot with a length of 100.0 mm. We also demonstrated the sim-to-real pipeline's potential for exploring different configurations of visual patterns to improve vision-based reconstruction results. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/DeepSoRo/DeepSoRoSim2Real.
summary: Pneumatic soft robots present many advantages in manipulation tasks. Notably, their inherent compliance makes them safe and reliable in unstructured and fragile environments. However, full-body shape sensing for pneumatic soft robots is challenging because of their high degrees of freedom and complex deformation behaviors. Vision-based proprioception sensing methods relying on embedded cameras and deep learning provide a good solution to proprioception sensing by extracting the full-body shape information from the high-dimensional sensing data. But the current training data collection process makes it difficult for many applications. To address this challenge, we propose and demonstrate a robust sim-to-real pipeline that allows the collection of the soft robot's shape information in high-fidelity point cloud representation. The model trained on simulated data was evaluated with real internal camera images. The results show that the model performed with averaged Chamfer distance of 8.85 mm and tip position error of 10.12 mm even with external perturbation for a pneumatic soft robot with a length of 100.0 mm. We also demonstrated the sim-to-real pipeline's potential for exploring different configurations of visual patterns to improve vision-based reconstruction results. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/DeepSoRo/DeepSoRoSim2Real.
abstract_zh: 气动软机器人在操纵任务中具有许多优势。值得注意的是，它们固有的合规性使它们在非结构化和脆弱的环境中安全可靠。然而，气动软机器人的全身形状传感由于其高自由度和复杂的变形行为而具有挑战性。基于嵌入式摄像头和深度学习的基于视觉的本体感觉传感方法通过从高维传感数据中提取全身形状信息，为本体感觉传感提供了良好的解决方案。但目前的训练数据收集过程给许多应用带来了困难。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出并演示了一个强大的模拟到真实管道，该管道允许以高保真点云表示形式收集软机器人的形状信息。使用真实的内部摄像机图像评估基于模拟数据训练的模型。结果表明，对于长度为 100.0 mm 的气动软体机器人，即使存在外部扰动，该模型的平均倒角距离为 8.85 mm，尖端位置误差为 10.12 mm。我们还展示了模拟到真实管道探索视觉模式的不同配置以改善基于视觉的重建结果的潜力。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/DeepSoRo/DeepSoRoSim2Real 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向零样本模拟到现实迁移学习的气动软体机器人3D本体感觉感知方法。
AI.motivation: 气动软体机器人因高自由度和复杂变形行为导致全身形状感知困难，且现有视觉感知方法依赖真实数据采集成本高。
AI.method: 构建高保真点云表示的模拟到现实迁移管道，利用模拟数据训练模型并在真实内部摄像头图像上评估。
AI.result: 在100mm长度的软体机器人上实现平均Chamfer距离8.85mm、末端位置误差10.12mm，且在外部扰动下仍有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了模拟到现实迁移管道在视觉重建中的潜力，可探索不同视觉模式配置优化效果。

title: Camera-Radar Perception for Autonomous Vehicles and ADAS: Concepts, Datasets and Metrics
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车和 ADAS 的摄像头雷达感知：概念、数据集和指标
abstract: One of the main paths towards the reduction of traffic accidents is the increase in vehicle safety through driver assistance systems or even systems with a complete level of autonomy. In these types of systems, tasks such as obstacle detection and segmentation, especially the Deep Learning-based ones, play a fundamental role in scene understanding for correct and safe navigation. Besides that, the wide variety of sensors in vehicles nowadays provides a rich set of alternatives for improvement in the robustness of perception in challenging situations, such as navigation under lighting and weather adverse conditions. Despite the current focus given to the subject, the literature lacks studies on radar-based and radar-camera fusion-based perception. Hence, this work aims to carry out a study on the current scenario of camera and radar-based perception for ADAS and autonomous vehicles. Concepts and characteristics related to both sensors, as well as to their fusion, are presented. Additionally, we give an overview of the Deep Learning-based detection and segmentation tasks, and the main datasets, metrics, challenges, and open questions in vehicle perception.

In these types of systems, tasks such as obstacle detection and segmentation, especially the Deep Learning-based ones, play a fundamental role in scene understanding for correct and safe navigation. Besides that, the wide variety of sensors in vehicles nowadays provides a rich set of alternatives for improvement in the robustness of perception in challenging situations, such as navigation under lighting and weather adverse conditions. Despite the current focus given to the subject, the literature lacks studies on radar-based and radar-camera fusion-based perception. Hence, this work aims to carry out a study on the current scenario of camera and radar-based perception for ADAS and autonomous vehicles. Concepts and characteristics related to both sensors, as well as to their fusion, are presented. Additionally, we give an overview of the Deep Learning-based detection and segmentation tasks, and the main datasets, metrics, challenges, and open questions in vehicle perception.
abstract_zh: 减少交通事故的主要途径之一是通过驾驶员辅助系统甚至完全自主的系统来提高车辆安全性。在这些类型的系统中，障碍物检测和分割等任务，尤其是基于深度学习的任务，在场景理解以实现正确和安全的导航中发挥着基础作用。除此之外，当今车辆中各种各样的传感器提供了丰富的替代方案，可以提高挑战性情况下的感知鲁棒性，例如在照明和恶劣天气条件下的导航。尽管当前重点关注该主题，但文献缺乏对基于雷达和雷达相机融合的感知的研究。因此，这项工作旨在对 ADAS 和自动驾驶车辆基于摄像头和雷达的感知的当前场景进行研究。介绍了与这两种传感器及其融合相关的概念和特性。此外，我们还概述了基于深度学习的检测和分割任务，以及车辆感知中的主要数据集、指标、挑战和开放问题。

AI.tldr: 综述当前自动驾驶和ADAS中摄像头与雷达感知技术的概念、数据集及评估指标，并探讨其融合方法与挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对雷达和雷达-摄像头融合感知的系统分析，需填补该领域研究空白以推动自动驾驶安全技术发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和比较分析，系统梳理摄像头和雷达感知技术的原理、融合方法，以及深度学习在其中的应用、相关数据集和评估指标。
AI.result: 总结了摄像头与雷达感知的技术特点、融合方法，梳理了深度学习在障碍物检测与分割中的应用，列举了主流数据集和评估指标，并指出了当前技术挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 雷达与摄像头融合感知能有效提升复杂环境下的鲁棒性，但存在数据同步、标注一致性等挑战，未来需推动标准化数据集构建与跨模态融合算法研究。

title: Optimal Sparse Recovery with Decision Stumps
title_zh: 带有决策树桩的最优稀疏恢复
abstract: Decision trees are widely used for their low computational cost, good predictive performance, and ability to assess the importance of features. Though often used in practice for feature selection, the theoretical guarantees of these methods are not well understood. We here obtain a tight finite sample bound for the feature selection problem in linear regression using single-depth decision trees. We examine the statistical properties of these "decision stumps" for the recovery of the $s$ active features from $p$ total features, where $s \ll p$. Our analysis provides tight sample performance guarantees on high-dimensional sparse systems which align with the finite sample bound of $O(s \log p)$ as obtained by Lasso, improving upon previous bounds for both the median and optimal splitting criteria. Our results extend to the non-linear regime as well as arbitrary sub-Gaussian distributions, demonstrating that tree based methods attain strong feature selection properties under a wide variety of settings and further shedding light on the success of these methods in practice. As a byproduct of our analysis, we show that we can provably guarantee recovery even when the number of active features $s$ is unknown. We further validate our theoretical results and proof methodology using computational experiments.
summary: Decision trees are widely used for their low computational cost, good predictive performance, and ability to assess the importance of features. Though often used in practice for feature selection, the theoretical guarantees of these methods are not well understood. We here obtain a tight finite sample bound for the feature selection problem in linear regression using single-depth decision trees. We examine the statistical properties of these "decision stumps" for the recovery of the $s$ active features from $p$ total features, where $s \ll p$. Our analysis provides tight sample performance guarantees on high-dimensional sparse systems which align with the finite sample bound of $O(s \log p)$ as obtained by Lasso, improving upon previous bounds for both the median and optimal splitting criteria. Our results extend to the non-linear regime as well as arbitrary sub-Gaussian distributions, demonstrating that tree based methods attain strong feature selection properties under a wide variety of settings and further shedding light on the success of these methods in practice. As a byproduct of our analysis, we show that we can provably guarantee recovery even when the number of active features $s$ is unknown. We further validate our theoretical results and proof methodology using computational experiments.
abstract_zh: 决策树因其低计算成本、良好的预测性能以及评估特征重要性的能力而被广泛使用。尽管在实践中经常用于特征选择，但这些方法的理论保证尚不清楚。我们在这里使用单深度决策树获得线性回归中特征选择问题的严格有限样本界限。我们检查这些“决策树桩”的统计特性，以便从 $p$ 总特征中恢复 $s$ 活跃特征，其中 $s \ll p$。我们的分析为高维稀疏系统提供了严格的样本性能保证，该系统与 Lasso 获得的 $O(s \log p)$ 的有限样本界限一致，改进了中值和最优分割标准的先前界限。我们的结果扩展到非线性区域以及任意亚高斯分布，证明基于树的方法在各种设置下获得了强大的特征选择属性，并进一步揭示了这些方法在实践中的成功。作为我们分析的副产品，我们证明即使活动功能 $s$ 的数量未知，我们也可以保证恢复。我们使用计算实验进一步验证我们的理论结果和证明方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用单层决策树（决策桩）进行高维稀疏线性回归中的特征选择问题，提供有限样本理论保证。
AI.motivation: 尽管决策树在特征选择中广泛应用，但其理论保证尚不明确，尤其缺乏有限样本分析。
AI.method: 分析决策桩的统计特性，推导稀疏特征恢复的有限样本界，并扩展至非线性场景及子高斯分布，同时处理未知活跃特征数的情况。
AI.result: 获得与Lasso相当的O(s log p)样本界，改进了现有分割准则的理论界，验证了树方法在多种分布下的鲁棒性，并可处理未知s的场景。
AI.conclusion: 树方法在高维稀疏恢复中具有强理论保证，解释了其实际成功的原因，且方法适用于非线性及未知活跃特征数的情形。

authors_text: Mojtaba Taherisadr,Mohammad Abdullah Al Faruque,Salma Elmalaki
title: ERUDITE: Human-in-the-Loop IoT for an Adaptive Personalized Learning System
title_zh: ERUDITE：用于自适应个性化学习系统的人在环物联网
comment: It is under review in the IEEE IoT journal
comments: It is under review in the IEEE IoT journal
abstract: Thanks to the rapid growth in wearable technologies and recent advancement in machine learning and signal processing, monitoring complex human contexts becomes feasible, paving the way to develop human-in-the-loop IoT systems that naturally evolve to adapt to the human and environment state autonomously. Nevertheless, a central challenge in designing many of these IoT systems arises from the requirement to infer the human mental state, such as intention, stress, cognition load, or learning ability. While different human contexts can be inferred from the fusion of different sensor modalities that can correlate to a particular mental state, the human brain provides a richer sensor modality that gives us more insights into the required human context. This paper proposes ERUDITE, a human-in-the-loop IoT system for the learning environment that exploits recent wearable neurotechnology to decode brain signals. Through insights from concept learning theory, ERUDITE can infer the human state of learning and understand when human learning increases or declines. By quantifying human learning as an input sensory signal, ERUDITE can provide adequate personalized feedback to humans in a learning environment to enhance their learning experience. ERUDITE is evaluated across $15$ participants and showed that by using the brain signals as a sensor modality to infer the human learning state and providing personalized adaptation to the learning environment, the participants' learning performance increased on average by $26\%$. Furthermore, we showed that ERUDITE can be deployed on an edge-based prototype to evaluate its practicality and scalability.

ERUDITE is evaluated across $15$ participants and showed that by using the brain signals as a sensor modality to infer the human learning state and providing personalized adaptation to the learning environment, the participants' learning performance increased on average by $26\%$. Furthermore, we showed that ERUDITE can be deployed on an edge-based prototype to evaluate its practicality and scalability.
abstract_zh: 由于可穿戴技术的快速发展以及机器学习和信号处理的最新进展，监控复杂的人类环境变得可行，为开发人机循环物联网系统铺平了道路，该系统自然进化以自主适应人类和环境状态。然而，设计许多物联网系统的一个核心挑战来自于推断人类心理状态的要求，例如意图、压力、认知负荷或学习能力。虽然可以通过与特定心理状态相关的不同传感器模式的融合来推断不同的人类环境，但人脑提供了更丰富的传感器模式，使我们能够更深入地了解所需的人类环境。本文提出了 ERUDITE，这是一种用于学习环境的人机循环物联网系统，利用最新的可穿戴神经技术来解码大脑信号。通过概念学习理论的见解，ERUDITE 可以推断人类的学习状态，并了解人类学习何时增加或下降。通过将人类学习量化为输入感官信号，ERUDITE 可以在学习环境中为人类提供足够的个性化反馈，以增强他们的学习体验。 ERUDITE 对 15 美元的参与者进行了评估，结果表明，通过使用大脑信号作为传感器模式来推断人类学习状态并提供对学习环境的个性化适应，参与者的学习成绩平均提高了 26\%$。此外，我们还展示了 ERUDITE 可以部署在基于边缘的原型上，以评估其实用性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ERUDITE系统，通过可穿戴神经技术解码脑信号，构建人机协同的物联网学习环境，实现个性化学习反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有物联网系统难以准确推断人类学习状态，而脑信号作为更丰富的传感器模态，能提供关键认知状态信息以优化学习体验。
AI.method: 结合概念学习理论，利用脑信号量化学习状态，通过边缘计算原型实现系统部署，并基于15名参与者的实验验证效果。
AI.result: 实验显示参与者学习表现平均提升26%，证明脑信号驱动的个性化适应机制有效性。
AI.conclusion: ERUDITE通过脑信号分析实现学习环境自适应，验证了神经物联网在教育领域的可行性与实用性。

search_text: ERUDITE: Human-in-the-Loop IoT for an Adaptive Personalized Learning System ERUDITE：用于自适应个性化学习系统的人在环物联网 Thanks to the rapid growth in wearable technologies and recent advancement in machine learning and signal processing, monitoring complex human contexts becomes feasible, paving the way to develop human-in-the-loop IoT systems that naturally evolve to adapt to the human and environment state autonomously. Nevertheless, a central challenge in designing many of these IoT systems arises from the requirement to infer the human mental state, such as intention, stress, cognition load, or learning ability. While different human contexts can be inferred from the fusion of different sensor modalities that can correlate to a particular mental state, the human brain provides a richer sensor modality that gives us more insights into the required human context. This paper proposes ERUDITE, a human-in-the-loop IoT system for the learning environment that exploits recent wearable neurotechnology to decode brain signals. Through insights from concept learning theory, ERUDITE can infer the human state of learning and understand when human learning increases or declines. By quantifying human learning as an input sensory signal, ERUDITE can provide adequate personalized feedback to humans in a learning environment to enhance their learning experience. ERUDITE is evaluated across $15$ participants and showed that by using the brain signals as a sensor modality to infer the human learning state and providing personalized adaptation to the learning environment, the participants' learning performance increased on average by $26\%$. Furthermore, we showed that ERUDITE can be deployed on an edge-based prototype to evaluate its practicality and scalability. 由于可穿戴技术的快速发展以及机器学习和信号处理的最新进展，监控复杂的人类环境变得可行，为开发人机循环物联网系统铺平了道路，该系统自然进化以自主适应人类和环境状态。然而，设计许多物联网系统的一个核心挑战来自于推断人类心理状态的要求，例如意图、压力、认知负荷或学习能力。虽然可以通过与特定心理状态相关的不同传感器模式的融合来推断不同的人类环境，但人脑提供了更丰富的传感器模式，使我们能够更深入地了解所需的人类环境。本文提出了 ERUDITE，这是一种用于学习环境的人机循环物联网系统，利用最新的可穿戴神经技术来解码大脑信号。通过概念学习理论的见解，ERUDITE 可以推断人类的学习状态，并了解人类学习何时增加或下降。通过将人类学习量化为输入感官信号，ERUDITE 可以在学习环境中为人类提供足够的个性化反馈，以增强他们的学习体验。 ERUDITE 对 15 美元的参与者进行了评估，结果表明，通过使用大脑信号作为传感器模式来推断人类学习状态并提供对学习环境的个性化适应，参与者的学习成绩平均提高了 26\%$。此外，我们还展示了 ERUDITE 可以部署在基于边缘的原型上，以评估其实用性和可扩展性。 本文提出ERUDITE系统，通过可穿戴神经技术解码脑信号，构建人机协同的物联网学习环境，实现个性化学习反馈。 Mojtaba Taherisadr,Mohammad Abdullah Al Faruque,Salma Elmalaki cs.HC,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Cindy M. Nguyen,Eric R. Chan,Alexander W. Bergman,Gordon Wetzstein
title: Diffusion in the Dark: A Diffusion Model for Low-Light Text Recognition
title_zh: 黑暗中的扩散：低光文本识别的扩散模型
abstract: Capturing images is a key part of automation for high-level tasks such as scene text recognition. Low-light conditions pose a challenge for high-level perception stacks, which are often optimized on well-lit, artifact-free images. Reconstruction methods for low-light images can produce well-lit counterparts, but typically at the cost of high-frequency details critical for downstream tasks. We propose Diffusion in the Dark (DiD), a diffusion model for low-light image reconstruction for text recognition. DiD provides qualitatively competitive reconstructions with that of state-of-the-art (SOTA), while preserving high-frequency details even in extremely noisy, dark conditions. We demonstrate that DiD, without any task-specific optimization, can outperform SOTA low-light methods in low-light text recognition on real images, bolstering the potential of diffusion models to solve ill-posed inverse problems.
summary: Capturing images is a key part of automation for high-level tasks such as scene text recognition. Low-light conditions pose a challenge for high-level perception stacks, which are often optimized on well-lit, artifact-free images. Reconstruction methods for low-light images can produce well-lit counterparts, but typically at the cost of high-frequency details critical for downstream tasks. We propose Diffusion in the Dark (DiD), a diffusion model for low-light image reconstruction for text recognition. DiD provides qualitatively competitive reconstructions with that of state-of-the-art (SOTA), while preserving high-frequency details even in extremely noisy, dark conditions. We demonstrate that DiD, without any task-specific optimization, can outperform SOTA low-light methods in low-light text recognition on real images, bolstering the potential of diffusion models to solve ill-posed inverse problems.
abstract_zh: 捕获图像是场景文本识别等高级任务自动化的关键部分。低光条件对高级感知堆栈提出了挑战，这些堆栈通常在光线充足、无伪影的图像上进行优化。低光图像的重建方法可以产生明亮的对应图像，但通常会牺牲对下游任务至关重要的高频细节。我们提出了黑暗中的扩散（DiD），这是一种用于文本识别的低光图像重建的扩散模型。 DiD 提供了与最先进的 (SOTA) 相比具有质量竞争力的重建，同时即使在极其嘈杂、黑暗的条件下也能保留高频细节。我们证明，在没有任何特定于任务的优化的情况下，DiD 在真实图像的低光文本识别中可以优于 SOTA 低光方法，从而增强了扩散模型解决不适定逆问题的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DiD的扩散模型，用于解决低光照条件下文本识别的图像重建问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低光照图像重建方法在提升亮度的同时会丢失对文本识别至关重要的高频细节，导致下游任务性能下降。
AI.method: 设计Diffusion in the Dark (DiD)扩散模型，在重建低光照图像时保留高频细节，无需针对文本识别进行特定优化。
AI.result: DiD在真实场景的低光照文本识别任务中超越了现有最优方法，即使在极端噪声和暗光条件下也能保持细节。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型在解决病态逆问题（如低光照文本识别）方面展现出显著潜力，无需任务特定优化即可获得更优结果。

title: Do Prosody Transfer Models Transfer Prosody?
title_zh: 韵律迁移模型会迁移韵律吗？
comment: Accepted in ICASSP 2023, 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted in ICASSP 2023, 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Some recent models for Text-to-Speech synthesis aim to transfer the prosody of a reference utterance to the generated target synthetic speech. This is done by using a learned embedding of the reference utterance, which is used to condition speech generation. During training, the reference utterance is identical to the target utterance. Yet, during synthesis, these models are often used to transfer prosody from a reference that differs from the text or speaker being synthesized. To address this inconsistency, we propose to use a different, but prosodically-related, utterance during training too. We believe this should encourage the model to learn to transfer only those characteristics that the reference and target have in common. If prosody transfer methods do indeed transfer prosody they should be able to be trained in the way we propose. However, results show that a model trained under these conditions performs significantly worse than one trained using the target utterance as a reference. To explain this, we hypothesize that prosody transfer models do not learn a transferable representation of prosody, but rather an utterance-level representation which is highly dependent on both the reference speaker and reference text.
summary: Some recent models for Text-to-Speech synthesis aim to transfer the prosody of a reference utterance to the generated target synthetic speech. This is done by using a learned embedding of the reference utterance, which is used to condition speech generation. During training, the reference utterance is identical to the target utterance. Yet, during synthesis, these models are often used to transfer prosody from a reference that differs from the text or speaker being synthesized. To address this inconsistency, we propose to use a different, but prosodically-related, utterance during training too. We believe this should encourage the model to learn to transfer only those characteristics that the reference and target have in common. If prosody transfer methods do indeed transfer prosody they should be able to be trained in the way we propose. However, results show that a model trained under these conditions performs significantly worse than one trained using the target utterance as a reference. To explain this, we hypothesize that prosody transfer models do not learn a transferable representation of prosody, but rather an utterance-level representation which is highly dependent on both the reference speaker and reference text.
abstract_zh: 最近的一些文本到语音合成模型旨在将参考话语的韵律转移到生成的目标合成语音。这是通过使用学习到的参考话语嵌入来完成的，该嵌入用于调节语音生成。在训练期间，参考话语与目标话语相同。然而，在合成过程中，这些模型通常用于从不同于正在合成的文本或说话者的参考中传输韵律。为了解决这种不一致问题，我们建议在训练期间也使用不同但韵律相关的话语。我们认为这应该鼓励模型学习仅迁移参考和目标共有的那些特征。如果韵律迁移方法确实能够迁移韵律，那么它们应该能够按照我们建议的方式进行训练。然而，结果表明，在这些条件下训练的模型的性能明显低于使用目标话语作为参考训练的模型。为了解释这一点，我们假设韵律迁移模型不会学习韵律的可迁移表示，而是学习高度依赖于参考说话者和参考文本的话语级表示。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了韵律迁移模型是否能够真正实现韵律迁移，通过在训练中使用与目标语句不同但韵律相关的参考语句进行实验。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音合成模型在训练时使用与目标相同的参考语句，但实际应用中需迁移不同语句的韵律，存在训练与应用条件不一致的问题。
AI.method: 提出在训练阶段使用不同但韵律相关的参考语句替代目标语句，观察模型是否能有效迁移韵律特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用新方法训练的模型性能显著低于传统方法，说明模型未学习到可迁移的韵律表示。
AI.conclusion: 韵律迁移模型实际上学习的是与参考语句和说话人高度相关的语句级表示，而非可迁移的通用韵律特征。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，采用新方法训练的模型性能显著低于传统方法，说明模型未学习到可迁移的韵律表示。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 韵律迁移模型实际上学习的是与参考语句和说话人高度相关的语句级表示，而非可迁移的通用韵律特征。

tldr: 本文探讨了韵律迁移模型是否能够真正实现韵律迁移，通过在训练中使用与目标语句不同但韵律相关的参考语句进行实验。
motivation: 现有文本到语音合成模型在训练时使用与目标相同的参考语句，但实际应用中需迁移不同语句的韵律，存在训练与应用条件不一致的问题。
method: 提出在训练阶段使用不同但韵律相关的参考语句替代目标语句，观察模型是否能有效迁移韵律特征。
result: 实验表明，采用新方法训练的模型性能显著低于传统方法，说明模型未学习到可迁移的韵律表示。
conclusion: 韵律迁移模型实际上学习的是与参考语句和说话人高度相关的语句级表示，而非可迁移的通用韵律特征。
search_text: Do Prosody Transfer Models Transfer Prosody? 韵律迁移模型会迁移韵律吗？ Some recent models for Text-to-Speech synthesis aim to transfer the prosody of a reference utterance to the generated target synthetic speech. This is done by using a learned embedding of the reference utterance, which is used to condition speech generation. During training, the reference utterance is identical to the target utterance. Yet, during synthesis, these models are often used to transfer prosody from a reference that differs from the text or speaker being synthesized. To address this inconsistency, we propose to use a different, but prosodically-related, utterance during training too. We believe this should encourage the model to learn to transfer only those characteristics that the reference and target have in common. If prosody transfer methods do indeed transfer prosody they should be able to be trained in the way we propose. However, results show that a model trained under these conditions performs significantly worse than one trained using the target utterance as a reference. To explain this, we hypothesize that prosody transfer models do not learn a transferable representation of prosody, but rather an utterance-level representation which is highly dependent on both the reference speaker and reference text. 最近的一些文本到语音合成模型旨在将参考话语的韵律转移到生成的目标合成语音。这是通过使用学习到的参考话语嵌入来完成的，该嵌入用于调节语音生成。在训练期间，参考话语与目标话语相同。然而，在合成过程中，这些模型通常用于从不同于正在合成的文本或说话者的参考中传输韵律。为了解决这种不一致问题，我们建议在训练期间也使用不同但韵律相关的话语。我们认为这应该鼓励模型学习仅迁移参考和目标共有的那些特征。如果韵律迁移方法确实能够迁移韵律，那么它们应该能够按照我们建议的方式进行训练。然而，结果表明，在这些条件下训练的模型的性能明显低于使用目标话语作为参考训练的模型。为了解释这一点，我们假设韵律迁移模型不会学习韵律的可迁移表示，而是学习高度依赖于参考说话者和参考文本的话语级表示。 本文探讨了韵律迁移模型是否能够真正实现韵律迁移，通过在训练中使用与目标语句不同但韵律相关的参考语句进行实验。 Atli Thor Sigurgeirsson,Simon King cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Polynomial Time and Private Learning of Unbounded Gaussian Mixture Models
title_zh: 无界高斯混合模型的多项式时间和私有学习
abstract: We study the problem of privately estimating the parameters of $d$-dimensional Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) with $k$ components. For this, we develop a technique to reduce the problem to its non-private counterpart. This allows us to privatize existing non-private algorithms in a blackbox manner, while incurring only a small overhead in the sample complexity and running time. As the main application of our framework, we develop an $(\varepsilon, δ)$-differentially private algorithm to learn GMMs using the non-private algorithm of Moitra and Valiant [MV10] as a blackbox. Consequently, this gives the first sample complexity upper bound and first polynomial time algorithm for privately learning GMMs without any boundedness assumptions on the parameters. As part of our analysis, we prove a tight (up to a constant factor) lower bound on the total variation distance of high-dimensional Gaussians which can be of independent interest.
summary: We study the problem of privately estimating the parameters of $d$-dimensional Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) with $k$ components. For this, we develop a technique to reduce the problem to its non-private counterpart. This allows us to privatize existing non-private algorithms in a blackbox manner, while incurring only a small overhead in the sample complexity and running time. As the main application of our framework, we develop an $(\varepsilon, δ)$-differentially private algorithm to learn GMMs using the non-private algorithm of Moitra and Valiant [MV10] as a blackbox. Consequently, this gives the first sample complexity upper bound and first polynomial time algorithm for privately learning GMMs without any boundedness assumptions on the parameters. As part of our analysis, we prove a tight (up to a constant factor) lower bound on the total variation distance of high-dimensional Gaussians which can be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了私下估计具有 $k$ 个分量的 $d$ 维高斯混合模型 (GMM) 参数的问题。为此，我们开发了一种技术来将问题简化为非私有对应问题。这使我们能够以黑盒方式私有化现有的非私有算法，同时在样本复杂性和运行时间上只产生很小的开销。作为我们框架的主要应用，我们开发了一个 $(\varepsilon, δ)$ 差分私有算法来使用 Moitra 和 Valiant [MV10] 的非私有算法作为黑盒来学习 GMM。因此，这给出了用于私有学习 GMM 的第一个样本复杂度上限和第一个多项式时间算法，而无需对参数进行任何有界假设。作为我们分析的一部分，我们证明了高维高斯的总变异距离的严格（最多为常数因子）下界，这可能是独立的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在差分隐私条件下高效学习无界高斯混合模型（GMM）的方法，提出了一种将私有学习问题转化为非私有问题的技术框架。
AI.motivation: 现有私有学习GMM的算法通常依赖参数有界性假设，而实际应用中参数可能无界。本文旨在消除这一限制，提供更通用的私有学习方案。
AI.method: 通过将私有学习问题转化为非私有问题，以黑盒方式利用现有非私有算法（如Moitra和Valiant的算法），仅增加少量样本复杂度和时间开销。
AI.result: 首次提出无需参数有界性假设的差分隐私GMM学习算法，给出样本复杂度上界和多项式时间复杂度，并证明高维高斯分布的总变分距离紧下界。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了无界GMM的差分隐私学习，填补了理论空白，且其证明的高维总变分距离下界具有独立研究价值。

authors_text: Shyam Sundar Kannan,Vishnunandan L. N. Venkatesh,Revanth Krishna Senthilkumaran,Byung-Cheol Min
title: UPPLIED: UAV Path Planning for Inspection through Demonstration
title_zh: 提供：通过演示进行检查的无人机路径规划
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023), Detroit, Michigan, USA
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023), Detroit, Michigan, USA
abstract: In this paper, a new demonstration-based path-planning framework for the visual inspection of large structures using UAVs is proposed. We introduce UPPLIED: UAV Path PLanning for InspEction through Demonstration, which utilizes a demonstrated trajectory to generate a new trajectory to inspect other structures of the same kind. The demonstrated trajectory can inspect specific regions of the structure and the new trajectory generated by UPPLIED inspects similar regions in the other structure. The proposed method generates inspection points from the demonstrated trajectory and uses standardization to translate those inspection points to inspect the new structure. Finally, the position of these inspection points is optimized to refine their view. Numerous experiments were conducted with various structures and the proposed framework was able to generate inspection trajectories of various kinds for different structures based on the demonstration. The trajectories generated match with the demonstrated trajectory in geometry and at the same time inspect the regions inspected by the demonstration trajectory with minimum deviation. The experimental video of the work can be found at https://youtu.be/YqPx-cLkv04.
summary: In this paper, a new demonstration-based path-planning framework for the visual inspection of large structures using UAVs is proposed. We introduce UPPLIED: UAV Path PLanning for InspEction through Demonstration, which utilizes a demonstrated trajectory to generate a new trajectory to inspect other structures of the same kind. The demonstrated trajectory can inspect specific regions of the structure and the new trajectory generated by UPPLIED inspects similar regions in the other structure. The proposed method generates inspection points from the demonstrated trajectory and uses standardization to translate those inspection points to inspect the new structure. Finally, the position of these inspection points is optimized to refine their view. Numerous experiments were conducted with various structures and the proposed framework was able to generate inspection trajectories of various kinds for different structures based on the demonstration. The trajectories generated match with the demonstrated trajectory in geometry and at the same time inspect the regions inspected by the demonstration trajectory with minimum deviation. The experimental video of the work can be found at https://youtu.be/YqPx-cLkv04.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的基于演示的路径规划框架，用于使用无人机对大型结构进行视觉检查。我们介绍了UPPLIED：通过演示进行检查的无人机路径规划，它利用演示的轨迹生成新的轨迹来检查同类的其他结构。演示的轨迹可以检查结构的特定区域，UPPLIED 生成的新轨迹可以检查其他结构中的类似区域。所提出的方法从演示的轨迹生成检查点，并使用标准化来平移这些检查点以检查新结构。最后，优化这些检查点的位置以细化它们的视野。对各种结构进行了大量实验，所提出的框架能够根据演示生成不同结构的各种检查轨迹。生成的轨迹与演示轨迹在几何上匹配，同时以最小偏差检查演示轨迹检查的区域。该作品的实验视频可以在https://youtu.be/YqPx-cLkv04找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于演示的无人机路径规划框架UPPLIED，通过演示轨迹生成用于检查类似结构的新轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机检查大型结构时需手动规划路径，耗时且效率低，需通过演示轨迹实现自动化路径生成。
AI.method: 从演示轨迹中提取检查点，通过标准化映射到新结构，并优化检查点位置以提升视角效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能为不同结构生成多种检查轨迹，几何形状与演示轨迹匹配且偏差最小。
AI.conclusion: UPPLIED框架有效实现了基于演示的无人机路径规划，适用于同类结构的自动化检查任务。

authors_text: Francesco Fabiano,Vishal Pallagani,Marianna Bergamaschi Ganapini,Lior Horesh,Andrea Loreggia,Keerthiram Murugesan,Francesca Rossi,Biplav Srivastava
title: Fast and Slow Planning
title_zh: 快计划和慢计划
abstract: The concept of Artificial Intelligence has gained a lot of attention over the last decade. In particular, AI-based tools have been employed in several scenarios and are, by now, pervading our everyday life. Nonetheless, most of these systems lack many capabilities that we would naturally consider to be included in a notion of "intelligence". In this work, we present an architecture that, inspired by the cognitive theory known as Thinking Fast and Slow by D. Kahneman, is tasked with solving planning problems in different settings, specifically: classical and multi-agent epistemic. The system proposed is an instance of a more general AI paradigm, referred to as SOFAI (for Slow and Fast AI). SOFAI exploits multiple solving approaches, with different capabilities that characterize them as either fast or slow, and a metacognitive module to regulate them. This combination of components, which roughly reflects the human reasoning process according to D. Kahneman, allowed us to enhance the reasoning process that, in this case, is concerned with planning in two different settings. The behavior of this system is then compared to state-of-the-art solvers, showing that the newly introduced system presents better results in terms of generality, solving a wider set of problems with an acceptable trade-off between solving times and solution accuracy.
summary: The concept of Artificial Intelligence has gained a lot of attention over the last decade. In particular, AI-based tools have been employed in several scenarios and are, by now, pervading our everyday life. Nonetheless, most of these systems lack many capabilities that we would naturally consider to be included in a notion of "intelligence". In this work, we present an architecture that, inspired by the cognitive theory known as Thinking Fast and Slow by D. Kahneman, is tasked with solving planning problems in different settings, specifically: classical and multi-agent epistemic. The system proposed is an instance of a more general AI paradigm, referred to as SOFAI (for Slow and Fast AI). SOFAI exploits multiple solving approaches, with different capabilities that characterize them as either fast or slow, and a metacognitive module to regulate them. This combination of components, which roughly reflects the human reasoning process according to D. Kahneman, allowed us to enhance the reasoning process that, in this case, is concerned with planning in two different settings. The behavior of this system is then compared to state-of-the-art solvers, showing that the newly introduced system presents better results in terms of generality, solving a wider set of problems with an acceptable trade-off between solving times and solution accuracy.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的概念在过去十年中引起了广泛关注。特别是，基于人工智能的工具已经在多种场景中使用，并且现在已经渗透到我们的日常生活中。尽管如此，大多数这些系统缺乏许多我们自然会认为包含在“智能”概念中的功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种架构，该架构受到 D. Kahneman 的“快慢思考”认知理论的启发，其任务是解决不同环境下的规划问题，特别是：经典和多主体认知。所提出的系统是更通用的人工智能范式的一个实例，称为 SOFAI（慢人工智能和快人工智能）。 SOFAI 利用多种解决方法，具有将其描述为快或慢的不同功能，以及一个元认知模块来调节它们。这种组件的组合大致反映了 D. Kahneman 所说的人类推理过程，使我们能够增强推理过程，在本例中，推理过程涉及两种不同设置中的规划。然后将该系统的行为与最先进的求解器进行比较，表明新引入的系统在通用性方面呈现出更好的结果，解决了更广泛的问题，并在求解时间和求解精度之间取得了可接受的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受卡尼曼‘快与慢’认知理论启发的AI架构，用于解决经典和多智能体知识规划问题，通过结合快速和慢速求解方法及元认知模块提升规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统缺乏人类智能的某些关键能力，尤其在复杂规划任务中表现不足，需借鉴人类双模式思维机制以增强AI的通用性与适应性。
AI.method: 基于SOFAI（快慢AI）范式，设计包含快速求解（启发式）、慢速求解（精确算法）及元认知调节模块的混合架构，模拟人类直觉与逻辑推理的协同过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该系统在解决多类规划问题时，相较现有求解器展现出更优的通用性，能在求解时间与解精度间取得合理平衡。
AI.conclusion: 融合快慢思维模式与元认知调控的AI架构能有效提升规划任务的性能，验证了SOFAI范式在复杂问题求解中的可行性与优势。

search_text: Fast and Slow Planning 快计划和慢计划 The concept of Artificial Intelligence has gained a lot of attention over the last decade. In particular, AI-based tools have been employed in several scenarios and are, by now, pervading our everyday life. Nonetheless, most of these systems lack many capabilities that we would naturally consider to be included in a notion of "intelligence". In this work, we present an architecture that, inspired by the cognitive theory known as Thinking Fast and Slow by D. Kahneman, is tasked with solving planning problems in different settings, specifically: classical and multi-agent epistemic. The system proposed is an instance of a more general AI paradigm, referred to as SOFAI (for Slow and Fast AI). SOFAI exploits multiple solving approaches, with different capabilities that characterize them as either fast or slow, and a metacognitive module to regulate them. This combination of components, which roughly reflects the human reasoning process according to D. Kahneman, allowed us to enhance the reasoning process that, in this case, is concerned with planning in two different settings. The behavior of this system is then compared to state-of-the-art solvers, showing that the newly introduced system presents better results in terms of generality, solving a wider set of problems with an acceptable trade-off between solving times and solution accuracy. 人工智能的概念在过去十年中引起了广泛关注。特别是，基于人工智能的工具已经在多种场景中使用，并且现在已经渗透到我们的日常生活中。尽管如此，大多数这些系统缺乏许多我们自然会认为包含在“智能”概念中的功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种架构，该架构受到 D. authors_text: Subramanian Ramasamy,Md Safwan Mondal,Pranav A. Bhounsule
title: Solving Vehicle Routing Problem for unmanned heterogeneous vehicle systems using Asynchronous Multi-Agent Architecture (A-teams)
title_zh: 使用异步多代理架构解决无人异构车辆系统的车辆路由问题（A-teams）
comment: 8 pages, International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS) 2023
comments: 8 pages, International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS) 2023
abstract: Fast moving but power hungry unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can recharge on slow-moving unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs) to survey large areas in an effective and efficient manner. In order to solve this computationally challenging problem in a reasonable time, we created a two-level optimization heuristics. At the outer level, the UGV route is parameterized by few free parameters and at the inner level, the UAV route is solved by formulating and solving a vehicle routing problem with capacity constraints, time windows, and dropped visits. The UGV free parameters need to be optimized judiciously in order to create high quality solutions. We explore two methods for tuning the free UGV parameters: (1) a genetic algorithm, and (2) Asynchronous Multi-agent architecture (Ateams). The A-teams uses multiple agents to create, improve, and destroy solutions. The parallel asynchronous architecture enables A-teams to quickly optimize the parameters. Our results on test cases show that the A-teams produces similar solutions as genetic algorithm but with a speed up of 2-3 times.
summary: Fast moving but power hungry unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can recharge on slow-moving unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs) to survey large areas in an effective and efficient manner. In order to solve this computationally challenging problem in a reasonable time, we created a two-level optimization heuristics. At the outer level, the UGV route is parameterized by few free parameters and at the inner level, the UAV route is solved by formulating and solving a vehicle routing problem with capacity constraints, time windows, and dropped visits. The UGV free parameters need to be optimized judiciously in order to create high quality solutions. We explore two methods for tuning the free UGV parameters: (1) a genetic algorithm, and (2) Asynchronous Multi-agent architecture (Ateams). The A-teams uses multiple agents to create, improve, and destroy solutions. The parallel asynchronous architecture enables A-teams to quickly optimize the parameters. Our results on test cases show that the A-teams produces similar solutions as genetic algorithm but with a speed up of 2-3 times.
abstract_zh: 快速移动但耗电的无人机 (UAV) 可以为缓慢移动的无人地面车辆 (UGV) 充电，从而以有效且高效的方式勘测大面积区域。为了在合理的时间内解决这个计算上具有挑战性的问题，我们创建了两级优化启发式。在外层，UGV 路线由少量自由参数参数化，而在内层，无人机路线通过制定和求解具有容量约束、时间窗和下降访问的车辆路径问题来解决。需要明智地优化 UGV 免费参数，以创建高质量的解决方案。我们探索了两种调整免费 UGV 参数的方法：(1) 遗传算法，以及 (2) 异步多代理架构 (Ateams)。 A 团队使用多个代理来创建、改进和销毁解决方案。并行异步架构使A团队能够快速优化参数。我们的测试用例结果表明，A 团队产生的解决方案与遗传算法类似，但速度提高了 2-3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异构无人车辆系统（UAV和UGV）的路径规划方法，通过异步多智能体架构（A-teams）解决车辆路径问题。
AI.motivation: 无人机（UAV）续航能力有限需依赖地面车（UGV）充电，但传统算法难以高效解决此类复杂路径规划问题。
AI.method: 采用双层启发式优化：外层参数化UGV路径，内层通过容量约束、时间窗等条件求解UAV路径；对比遗传算法与A-teams多智能体架构的参数优化效果。
AI.result: A-teams在保持解质量的前提下，相比遗传算法速度提升2-3倍。
AI.conclusion: 异步多智能体架构能有效解决异构无人车辆系统的路径规划问题，兼具效率与解质量。

title: Exploring Kinodynamic Fabrics for Reactive Whole-Body Control of Underactuated Humanoid Robots
title_zh: 探索用于欠驱动人形机器人反应性全身控制的运动动力学织物
abstract: For bipedal humanoid robots to successfully operate in the real world, they must be competent at simultaneously executing multiple motion tasks while reacting to unforeseen external disturbances in real-time. We propose Kinodynamic Fabrics as an approach for the specification, solution and simultaneous execution of multiple motion tasks in real-time while being reactive to dynamism in the environment. Kinodynamic Fabrics allows for the specification of prioritized motion tasks as forced spectral semi-sprays and solves for desired robot joint accelerations at real-time frequencies. We evaluate the capabilities of Kinodynamic fabrics on diverse physically challenging whole-body control tasks with a bipedal humanoid robot both in simulation and in the real-world. Kinodynamic Fabrics outperforms the state-of-the-art Quadratic Program based whole-body controller on a variety of whole-body control tasks on run-time and reactivity metrics in our experiments. Our open-source implementation of Kinodynamic Fabrics as well as robot demonstration videos can be found at this url: https://adubredu.github.io/kinofabs.
summary: For bipedal humanoid robots to successfully operate in the real world, they must be competent at simultaneously executing multiple motion tasks while reacting to unforeseen external disturbances in real-time. We propose Kinodynamic Fabrics as an approach for the specification, solution and simultaneous execution of multiple motion tasks in real-time while being reactive to dynamism in the environment. Kinodynamic Fabrics allows for the specification of prioritized motion tasks as forced spectral semi-sprays and solves for desired robot joint accelerations at real-time frequencies. We evaluate the capabilities of Kinodynamic fabrics on diverse physically challenging whole-body control tasks with a bipedal humanoid robot both in simulation and in the real-world. Kinodynamic Fabrics outperforms the state-of-the-art Quadratic Program based whole-body controller on a variety of whole-body control tasks on run-time and reactivity metrics in our experiments. Our open-source implementation of Kinodynamic Fabrics as well as robot demonstration videos can be found at this url: https://adubredu.github.io/kinofabs.
abstract_zh: 为了让双足人形机器人在现实世界中成功运行，它们必须能够同时执行多个运动任务，同时对不可预见的外部干扰做出实时反应。我们提出 Kinodynamic Fabrics 作为一种实时指定、解决和同时执行多个运动任务的方法，同时对环境中的动态做出反应。 Kinodynamic Fabrics 允许将优先运动任务指定为强制光谱半喷雾，并在实时频率下求解所需的机器人关节加速度。我们在模拟和现实世界中使用双足人形机器人评估运动动力学织物在各种具有物理挑战性的全身控制任务中的能力。在我们的实验中，Kinodynamic Fabrics 在运行时间和反应性指标方面的各种全身控制任务上优于基于最先进的二次程序的全身控制器。我们的 Kinodynamic Fabrics 开源实现以及机器人演示视频可以在以下网址找到：https://adubredu.github.io/kinofabs。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Kinodynamic Fabrics的实时反应式全身控制方法，用于解决欠驱动人形机器人在复杂动态环境中的多任务控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有控制方法在处理动态环境中的实时多任务控制时存在反应速度不足和复杂性限制，需更高效的解决方案以应对真实世界的不确定性。
AI.method: 通过将优先级运动任务转化为forced spectral semi-sprays，并在实时频率下求解目标关节加速度，结合仿真与实际机器人测试验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在多种全身控制任务中，Kinodynamic Fabrics在运行时间和反应性指标上优于基于二次规划的最新控制器，且开源了实现代码与演示视频。
AI.conclusion: Kinodynamic Fabrics为欠驱动人形机器人提供了高效、实时的全身控制框架，适用于复杂动态环境中的多任务场景。
