search_text: Exploring Kinodynamic Fabrics for Reactive Whole-Body Control of Underactuated Humanoid Robots 探索用于欠驱动人形机器人反应性全身控制的运动动力学织物 For bipedal humanoid robots to successfully operate in the real world, they must be competent at simultaneously executing multiple motion tasks while reacting to unforeseen external disturbances in real-time. We propose Kinodynamic Fabrics as an approach for the specification, solution and simultaneous execution of multiple motion tasks in real-time while being reactive to dynamism in the environment. Kinodynamic Fabrics allows for the specification of prioritized motion tasks as forced spectral semi-sprays and solves for desired robot joint accelerations at real-time frequencies. We evaluate the capabilities of Kinodynamic fabrics on diverse physically challenging whole-body control tasks with a bipedal humanoid robot both in simulation and in the real-world. Kinodynamic Fabrics outperforms the state-of-the-art Quadratic Program based whole-body controller on a variety of whole-body control tasks on run-time and reactivity metrics in our experiments. Our open-source implementation of Kinodynamic Fabrics as well as robot demonstration videos can be found at this url: https://adubredu.github.io/kinofabs. 为了让双足人形机器人在现实世界中成功运行，它们必须能够同时执行多个运动任务，同时对不可预见的外部干扰做出实时反应。我们提出 Kinodynamic Fabrics 作为一种实时指定、解决和同时执行多个运动任务的方法，同时对环境中的动态做出反应。 Kinodynamic Fabrics 允许将优先运动任务指定为强制光谱半喷雾，并在实时频率下求解所需的机器人关节加速度。我们在模拟和现实世界中使用双足人形机器人评估运动动力学织物在各种具有物理挑战性的全身控制任务中的能力。在我们的实验中，Kinodynamic Fabrics 在运行时间和反应性指标方面的各种全身控制任务上优于基于最先进的二次程序的全身控制器。我们的 Kinodynamic Fabrics 开源实现以及机器人演示视频可以在以下网址找到：https://adubredu.github.io/kinofabs。 本文提出了一种名为Kinodynamic Fabrics的实时反应式全身控制方法，用于解决欠驱动人形机器人在复杂动态环境中的多任务控制问题。 Alphonsus Adu-Bredu,Grant Gibson,Jessy W. Grizzle cs.RO

title: CUDA: Convolution-based Unlearnable Datasets
title_zh: CUDA：基于卷积的不可学习数据集
abstract: Large-scale training of modern deep learning models heavily relies on publicly available data on the web. This potentially unauthorized usage of online data leads to concerns regarding data privacy. Recent works aim to make unlearnable data for deep learning models by adding small, specially designed noises to tackle this issue. However, these methods are vulnerable to adversarial training (AT) and/or are computationally heavy. In this work, we propose a novel, model-free, Convolution-based Unlearnable DAtaset (CUDA) generation technique. CUDA is generated using controlled class-wise convolutions with filters that are randomly generated via a private key. CUDA encourages the network to learn the relation between filters and labels rather than informative features for classifying the clean data. We develop some theoretical analysis demonstrating that CUDA can successfully poison Gaussian mixture data by reducing the clean data performance of the optimal Bayes classifier. We also empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of CUDA with various datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet-100, and Tiny-ImageNet), and architectures (ResNet-18, VGG-16, Wide ResNet-34-10, DenseNet-121, DeIT, EfficientNetV2-S, and MobileNetV2). Our experiments show that CUDA is robust to various data augmentations and training approaches such as smoothing, AT with different budgets, transfer learning, and fine-tuning. For instance, training a ResNet-18 on ImageNet-100 CUDA achieves only 8.96$\%$, 40.08$\%$, and 20.58$\%$ clean test accuracies with empirical risk minimization (ERM), $L_{\infty}$ AT, and $L_{2}$ AT, respectively. Here, ERM on the clean training data achieves a clean test accuracy of 80.66$\%$. CUDA exhibits unlearnability effect with ERM even when only a fraction of the training dataset is perturbed. Furthermore, we also show that CUDA is robust to adaptive defenses designed specifically to break it.

CUDA is generated using controlled class-wise convolutions with filters that are randomly generated via a private key. CUDA encourages the network to learn the relation between filters and labels rather than informative features for classifying the clean data. We develop some theoretical analysis demonstrating that CUDA can successfully poison Gaussian mixture data by reducing the clean data performance of the optimal Bayes classifier. We also empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of CUDA with various datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet-100, and Tiny-ImageNet), and architectures (ResNet-18, VGG-16, Wide ResNet-34-10, DenseNet-121, DeIT, EfficientNetV2-S, and MobileNetV2). Our experiments show that CUDA is robust to various data augmentations and training approaches such as smoothing, AT with different budgets, transfer learning, and fine-tuning. For instance, training a ResNet-18 on ImageNet-100 CUDA achieves only 8.96$\%$, 40.08$\%$, and 20.58$\%$ clean test accuracies with empirical risk minimization (ERM), $L_{\infty}$ AT, and $L_{2}$ AT, respectively. abstract_zh: 现代深度学习模型的大规模训练很大程度上依赖于网络上公开的数据。这种对在线数据的潜在未经授权的使用导致了对数据隐私的担忧。最近的工作旨在通过添加小的、专门设计的噪声来解决这个问题，从而为深度学习模型提供不可学习的数据。然而，这些方法容易受到对抗性训练（AT）的影响并且/或者计算量很大。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的、无模型的、基于卷积的不可学习数据集（CUDA）生成技术。 CUDA 是使用受控的分类卷积和通过私钥随机生成的过滤器生成的。 CUDA 鼓励网络学习过滤器和标签之间的关系，而不是学习用于对干净数据进行分类的信息特征。我们进行了一些理论分析，证明 CUDA 可以通过降低最佳贝叶斯分类器的干净数据性能来成功毒害高斯混合数据。我们还凭经验证明了 CUDA 在各种数据集（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet）和架构（ResNet-18、VGG-16、Wide ResNet-34-10、DenseNet-121、DeIT、EfficientNetV2-S 和 MobileNetV2）上的有效性。我们的实验表明，CUDA 对于各种数据增强和训练方法（例如平滑、不同预算的 AT、迁移学习和微调）具有鲁棒性。例如，在 ImageNet-100 CUDA 上训练 ResNet-18，使用经验风险最小化 (ERM)、$L_{\infty}$ AT 和 $L_{2}$ AT 分别仅获得 8.96$\%$、40.08$\%$ 和 20.58$\%$ 干净测试精度。在这里，干净训练数据上的 ERM 达到了 80.66$\%$ 的干净测试精度。即使只有一小部分训练数据集受到干扰，CUDA 也会通过 ERM 表现出不可学习的效果。此外，我们还表明 CUDA 对于专门为打破它而设计的自适应防御具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积的不可学习数据集（CUDA）生成方法，通过添加特殊噪声干扰深度学习模型训练，以解决数据隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习模型依赖公开数据训练，可能侵犯隐私。现有方法生成的不可学习数据易受对抗训练攻击或计算成本高，需更有效方案。
AI.method: 利用私钥生成随机卷积滤波器，通过控制类别的卷积操作生成CUDA数据，使模型学习滤波器与标签的关联而非有效特征。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、ImageNet-100等数据集上，CUDA使ResNet-18等模型的干净测试准确率从80.66%降至8.96%（ERM）、40.08%（L∞对抗训练）等，且对数据增强和防御方法具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CUDA通过理论分析和实验验证，证明其能有效降低模型性能且难以被现有防御手段破解，为数据隐私保护提供新思路。

This potentially unauthorized usage of online data leads to concerns regarding data privacy. For instance, training a ResNet-18 on ImageNet-100 CUDA achieves only 8.96$\%$, 40.08$\%$, and 20.58$\%$ clean test accuracies with empirical risk minimization (ERM), $L_{\infty}$ AT, and $L_{2}$ AT, respectively. Here, ERM on the clean training data achieves a clean test accuracy of 80.66$\%$. CUDA exhibits unlearnability effect with ERM even when only a fraction of the training dataset is perturbed. Furthermore, we also show that CUDA is robust to adaptive defenses designed specifically to break it. 现代深度学习模型的大规模训练很大程度上依赖于网络上公开的数据。这种对在线数据的潜在未经授权的使用导致了对数据隐私的担忧。最近的工作旨在通过添加小的、专门设计的噪声来解决这个问题，从而为深度学习模型提供不可学习的数据。然而，这些方法容易受到对抗性训练（AT）的影响并且/或者计算量很大。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的、无模型的、基于卷积的不可学习数据集（CUDA）生成技术。 CUDA 是使用受控的分类卷积和通过私钥随机生成的过滤器生成的。 CUDA 鼓励网络学习过滤器和标签之间的关系，而不是学习用于对干净数据进行分类的信息特征。我们进行了一些理论分析，证明 CUDA 可以通过降低最佳贝叶斯分类器的干净数据性能来成功毒害高斯混合数据。我们还凭经验证明了 CUDA 在各种数据集（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet）和架构（ResNet-18、VGG-16、Wide ResNet-34-10、DenseNet-121、DeIT、EfficientNetV2-S 和 MobileNetV2）上的有效性。我们的实验表明，CUDA 对于各种数据增强和训练方法（例如平滑、不同预算的 AT、迁移学习和微调）具有鲁棒性。例如，在 ImageNet-100 CUDA 上训练 ResNet-18，使用经验风险最小化 (ERM)、$L_{\infty}$ AT 和 $L_{2}$ AT 分别仅获得 8.96$\%$、40.08$\%$ 和 20.58$\%$ 干净测试精度。在这里，干净训练数据上的 ERM 达到了 80.66$\%$ 的干净测试精度。即使只有一小部分训练数据集受到干扰，CUDA 也会通过 ERM 表现出不可学习的效果。此外，我们还表明 CUDA 对于专门为打破它而设计的自适应防御具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于卷积的不可学习数据集（CUDA）生成方法，通过添加特殊噪声干扰深度学习模型训练，以解决数据隐私问题。 Vinu Sankar Sadasivan,Mahdi Soltanolkotabi,Soheil Feizi cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

title: A Computer Vision Enabled damage detection model with improved YOLOv5 based on Transformer Prediction Head
title_zh: 基于 Transformer Prediction Head 的改进 YOLOv5 的计算机视觉损伤检测模型
abstract: Objective:Computer vision-based up-to-date accurate damage classification and localization are of decisive importance for infrastructure monitoring, safety, and the serviceability of civil infrastructure. Current state-of-the-art deep learning (DL)-based damage detection models, however, often lack superior feature extraction capability in complex and noisy environments, limiting the development of accurate and reliable object distinction. Method: To this end, we present DenseSPH-YOLOv5, a real-time DL-based high-performance damage detection model where DenseNet blocks have been integrated with the backbone to improve in preserving and reusing critical feature information. Additionally, convolutional block attention modules (CBAM) have been implemented to improve attention performance mechanisms for strong and discriminating deep spatial feature extraction that results in superior detection under various challenging environments. Moreover, additional feature fusion layers and a Swin-Transformer Prediction Head (SPH) have been added leveraging advanced self-attention mechanism for more efficient detection of multiscale object sizes and simultaneously reducing the computational complexity. Results: Evaluating the model performance in large-scale Road Damage Dataset (RDD-2018), at a detection rate of 62.4 FPS, DenseSPH-YOLOv5 obtains a mean average precision (mAP) value of 85.25 %, F1-score of 81.18 %, and precision (P) value of 89.51 % outperforming current state-of-the-art models. Significance: The present research provides an effective and efficient damage localization model addressing the shortcoming of existing DL-based damage detection models by providing highly accurate localized bounding box prediction. Current work constitutes a step towards an accurate and robust automated damage detection system in real-time in-field applications.

Significance: The present research provides an effective and efficient damage localization model addressing the shortcoming of existing DL-based damage detection models by providing highly accurate localized bounding box prediction. Current work constitutes a step towards an accurate and robust automated damage detection system in real-time in-field applications.
abstract_zh: 目标：基于计算机视觉的最新准确损坏分类和定位对于基础设施监测、安全和民用基础设施的可用性具有决定性的重要性。然而，当前最先进的基于深度学习（DL）的损伤检测模型通常在复杂和嘈杂的环境中缺乏卓越的特征提取能力，限制了准确可靠的物体区分的发展。方法：为此，我们提出了 DenseSPH-YOLOv5，这是一种基于深度学习的实时高性能损伤检测模型，其中 DenseNet 块已与主干网集成，以改进关键特征信息的保存和重用。此外，还实施了卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）来改进注意力性能机制，以实现强大且有区别的深层空间特征提取，从而在各种具有挑战性的环境下实现出色的检测。此外，还添加了额外的特征融合层和 Swin-Transformer 预测头 (SPH)，利用先进的自注意力机制，可以更有效地检测多尺度对象尺寸，同时降低计算复杂性。结果：在大规模道路损坏数据集（RDD-2018）中评估模型性能，在检测率为 62.4 FPS 时，DenseSPH-YOLOv5 的平均精度（mAP）值为 85.25%，F1 分数为 81.18%，精度（P）值为 89.51%，优于当前最先进的模型。意义：本研究提供了一种有效且高效的损伤定位模型，通过提供高精度的局部边界框预测来解决现有基于深度学习的损伤检测模型的缺点。目前的工作向实时现场应用中准确且强大的自动损伤检测系统迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进YOLOv5和Transformer预测头的实时损伤检测模型DenseSPH-YOLOv5，用于提高基础设施监测中的损伤分类与定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习损伤检测模型在复杂噪声环境下特征提取能力不足，难以实现准确可靠的物体区分，亟需提升模型鲁棒性与检测效率。
AI.method: 将DenseNet模块集成至YOLOv5主干网络以增强特征复用，引入CBAM注意力机制优化特征提取，并通过特征融合层与Swin-Transformer预测头实现多尺度目标检测与计算复杂度降低。
AI.result: 在RDD-2018数据集上以62.4 FPS实现85.25% mAP、81.18% F1-score和89.51%精度，优于现有先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过融合密集连接与Transformer机制，在保证实时性的同时显著提升了复杂环境下损伤检测的准确性，为自动化实时监测系统提供了有效方案。

search_text: A Computer Vision Enabled damage detection model with improved YOLOv5 based on Transformer Prediction Head 基于 Transformer Prediction Head 的改进 YOLOv5 的计算机视觉损伤检测模型 Objective:Computer vision-based up-to-date accurate damage classification and localization are of decisive importance for infrastructure monitoring, safety, and the serviceability of civil infrastructure. Current state-of-the-art deep learning (DL)-based damage detection models, however, often lack superior feature extraction capability in complex and noisy environments, limiting the development of accurate and reliable object distinction. Method: To this end, we present DenseSPH-YOLOv5, a real-time DL-based high-performance damage detection model where DenseNet blocks have been integrated with the backbone to improve in preserving and reusing critical feature information. Additionally, convolutional block attention modules (CBAM) have been implemented to improve attention performance mechanisms for strong and discriminating deep spatial feature extraction that results in superior detection under various challenging environments. Moreover, additional feature fusion layers and a Swin-Transformer Prediction Head (SPH) have been added leveraging advanced self-attention mechanism for more efficient detection of multiscale object sizes and simultaneously reducing the computational complexity. Results: Evaluating the model performance in large-scale Road Damage Dataset (RDD-2018), at a detection rate of 62.4 FPS, DenseSPH-YOLOv5 obtains a mean average precision (mAP) value of 85.25 %, F1-score of 81.18 %, and precision (P) value of 89.51 % outperforming current state-of-the-art models. Significance: The present research provides an effective and efficient damage localization model addressing the shortcoming of existing DL-based damage detection models by providing highly accurate localized bounding box prediction. Current work constitutes a step towards an accurate and robust automated damage detection system in real-time in-field applications. 目标：基于计算机视觉的最新准确损坏分类和定位对于基础设施监测、安全和民用基础设施的可用性具有决定性的重要性。然而，当前最先进的基于深度学习（DL）的损伤检测模型通常在复杂和嘈杂的环境中缺乏卓越的特征提取能力，限制了准确可靠的物体区分的发展。方法：为此，我们提出了 DenseSPH-YOLOv5，这是一种基于深度学习的实时高性能损伤检测模型，其中 DenseNet 块已与主干网集成，以改进关键特征信息的保存和重用。此外，还实施了卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）来改进注意力性能机制，以实现强大且有区别的深层空间特征提取，从而在各种具有挑战性的环境下实现出色的检测。此外，还添加了额外的特征融合层和 Swin-Transformer 预测头 (SPH)，利用先进的自注意力机制，可以更有效地检测多尺度对象尺寸，同时降低计算复杂性。结果：在大规模道路损坏数据集（RDD-2018）中评估模型性能，在检测率为 62.4 FPS 时，DenseSPH-YOLOv5 的平均精度（mAP）值为 85.25%，F1 分数为 81.18%，精度（P）值为 89.51%，优于当前最先进的模型。意义：本研究提供了一种有效且高效的损伤定位模型，通过提供高精度的局部边界框预测来解决现有基于深度学习的损伤检测模型的缺点。目前的工作向实时现场应用中准确且强大的自动损伤检测系统迈出了一步。 本文提出了一种基于改进YOLOv5和Transformer预测头的实时损伤检测模型DenseSPH-YOLOv5，用于提高基础设施监测中的损伤分类与定位精度。 Arunabha M. Roy,Jayabrata Bhaduri cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG,cs.NE

title: Minimally Constrained Multi-Robot Coordination with Line-of-sight Connectivity Maintenance
title_zh: 具有视距连接维护的最小约束多机器人协调
comment: Extended version of the paper to appear in ICRA 2023, 12 pages
comments: Extended version of the paper to appear in ICRA 2023, 12 pages
abstract: In this paper, we consider a team of mobile robots executing simultaneously multiple behaviors by different subgroups, while maintaining global and subgroup line-of-sight (LOS) network connectivity that minimally constrains the original multi-robot behaviors. The LOS connectivity between pairwise robots is preserved when two robots stay within the limited communication range and their LOS remains occlusion-free from static obstacles while moving. By using control barrier functions (CBF) and minimum volume enclosing ellipsoids (MVEE), we first introduce the LOS connectivity barrier certificate (LOS-CBC) to characterize the state-dependent admissible control space for pairwise robots, from which their resulting motion will keep the two robots LOS connected over time. We then propose the Minimum Line-of-Sight Connectivity Constraint Spanning Tree (MLCCST) as a step-wise bilevel optimization framework to jointly optimize (a) the minimum set of LOS edges to actively maintain, and (b) the control revision with respect to a nominal multi-robot controller due to LOS connectivity maintenance. As proved in the theoretical analysis, this allows the robots to improvise the optimal composition of LOS-CBC control constraints that are least constraining around the nominal controllers, and at the same time enforce the global and subgroup LOS connectivity through the resulting preserved set of pairwise LOS edges. The framework thus leads to robots staying as close to their nominal behaviors, while exhibiting dynamically changing LOS-connected network topology that provides the greatest flexibility for the existing multi-robot tasks in real time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through simulations with up to 64 robots.
summary: In this paper, we consider a team of mobile robots executing simultaneously multiple behaviors by different subgroups, while maintaining global and subgroup line-of-sight (LOS) network connectivity that minimally constrains the original multi-robot behaviors. The LOS connectivity between pairwise robots is preserved when two robots stay within the limited communication range and their LOS remains occlusion-free from static obstacles while moving. By using control barrier functions (CBF) and minimum volume enclosing ellipsoids (MVEE), we first introduce the LOS connectivity barrier certificate (LOS-CBC) to characterize the state-dependent admissible control space for pairwise robots, from which their resulting motion will keep the two robots LOS connected over time. We then propose the Minimum Line-of-Sight Connectivity Constraint Spanning Tree (MLCCST) as a step-wise bilevel optimization framework to jointly optimize (a) the minimum set of LOS edges to actively maintain, and (b) the control revision with respect to a nominal multi-robot controller due to LOS connectivity maintenance. As proved in the theoretical analysis, this allows the robots to improvise the optimal composition of LOS-CBC control constraints that are least constraining around the nominal controllers, and at the same time enforce the global and subgroup LOS connectivity through the resulting preserved set of pairwise LOS edges. The framework thus leads to robots staying as close to their nominal behaviors, while exhibiting dynamically changing LOS-connected network topology that provides the greatest flexibility for the existing multi-robot tasks in real time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through simulations with up to 64 robots.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑一组移动机器人同时执行不同子组的多种行为，同时保持全局和子组视线（LOS）网络连接，最大限度地限制原始多机器人行为。当两个机器人保持在有限的通信范围内并且它们的 LOS 在移动时保持不受静态障碍物遮挡时，成对机器人之间的 LOS 连接性得以保留。通过使用控制屏障函数（CBF）和最小体积包围椭球体（MVEE），我们首先引入LOS连接屏障证书（LOS-CBC）来表征成对机器人的状态相关的允许控制空间，由此它们产生的运动将使两个机器人随着时间的推移保持LOS连接。然后，我们提出最小视距连接约束生成树（MLCCST）作为逐步双层优化框架，以联合优化（a）要主动维护的最小LOS边缘集，以及（b）由于LOS连接维护而对标称多机器人控制器进行控制修订。正如理论分析所证明的那样，这使得机器人能够即兴设计 LOS-CBC 控制约束的最佳组合，这些约束在标称控制器周围的约束最少，同时通过生成的保留的成对 LOS 边集强制执行全局和子组 LOS 连接。因此，该框架使机器人保持尽可能接近其标称行为，同时展示动态变化的 LOS 连接网络拓扑，为现有的实时多机器人任务提供最大的灵活性。我们通过对多达 64 个机器人进行模拟来证明我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多机器人系统在保持视线连接性的同时协调执行多任务的方法。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统在执行复杂任务时需维持全局及子群视线连接性，但传统方法可能过度限制机器人原始行为。
AI.method: 结合控制屏障函数（CBF）与最小体积包围椭球（MVEE），提出视线连接性屏障证书（LOS-CBC）及分层优化框架MLCCST，动态优化视线连接边集与控制策略。
AI.result: 仿真验证了该方法在最多64机器人场景下有效维持连接性，同时最小化对原始行为的约束。
AI.conclusion: 该框架使机器人在保持动态视线网络拓扑的同时，尽可能贴近原始任务轨迹，提升多机器人系统的实时任务灵活性。

authors_text: Javad Manashti,Pouyan Pirnia,Alireza Manashty,Sahar Ujan,Matthew Toews,François Duhaime
title: PSDNet: Determination of Particle Size Distributions Using Synthetic Soil Images and Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: PSDNet：使用合成土壤图像和卷积神经网络确定粒径分布
abstract: This project aimed to determine the grain size distribution of granular materials from images using convolutional neural networks. The application of ConvNet and pretrained ConvNet models, including AlexNet, SqueezeNet, GoogLeNet, InceptionV3, DenseNet201, MobileNetV2, ResNet18, ResNet50, ResNet101, Xception, InceptionResNetV2, ShuffleNet, and NASNetMobile was studied. Synthetic images of granular materials created with the discrete element code YADE were used. All the models were trained and verified with grayscale and color band datasets with image sizes ranging from 32 to 160 pixels. The proposed ConvNet model predicts the percentages of mass retained on the finest sieve, coarsest sieve, and all sieves with root-mean-square errors of 1.8 %, 3.3 %, and 2.8 %, respectively, and a coefficient of determination of 0.99. For pretrained networks, root-mean-square errors of 2.4 % and 2.8 % were obtained for the finest sieve with feature extraction and transfer learning models, respectively.
summary: This project aimed to determine the grain size distribution of granular materials from images using convolutional neural networks. The application of ConvNet and pretrained ConvNet models, including AlexNet, SqueezeNet, GoogLeNet, InceptionV3, DenseNet201, MobileNetV2, ResNet18, ResNet50, ResNet101, Xception, InceptionResNetV2, ShuffleNet, and NASNetMobile was studied. Synthetic images of granular materials created with the discrete element code YADE were used. All the models were trained and verified with grayscale and color band datasets with image sizes ranging from 32 to 160 pixels. The proposed ConvNet model predicts the percentages of mass retained on the finest sieve, coarsest sieve, and all sieves with root-mean-square errors of 1.8 %, 3.3 %, and 2.8 %, respectively, and a coefficient of determination of 0.99. For pretrained networks, root-mean-square errors of 2.4 % and 2.8 % were obtained for the finest sieve with feature extraction and transfer learning models, respectively.
abstract_zh: 该项目旨在使用卷积神经网络从图像中确定颗粒材料的粒度分布。研究了ConvNet和预训练ConvNet模型的应用，包括AlexNet、SqueezeNet、GoogLeNet、InceptionV3、DenseNet201、MobileNetV2、ResNet18、ResNet50、ResNet101、Xception、InceptionResNetV2、ShuffleNet和NASNetMobile。使用用离散元素代码 YADE 创建的颗粒材料的合成图像。所有模型均使用图像尺寸范围为 32 至 160 像素的灰度和色带数据集进行训练和验证。所提出的 ConvNet 模型预测最细筛子、最粗筛子和所有筛子上保留的质量百分比，均方根误差分别为 1.8%、3.3% 和 2.8%，确定系数为 0.99。对于预训练网络，使用特征提取和迁移学习模型的最细筛子的均方根误差分别为 2.4% 和 2.8%。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出PSDNet模型，利用合成土壤图像和卷积神经网络确定颗粒物粒径分布。
AI.motivation: 传统筛分法存在效率低、人工误差大的问题，需开发自动化图像分析方法实现粒径分布快速检测。
AI.method: 采用YADE生成合成颗粒图像，基于AlexNet等14种预训练CNN模型进行特征提取与迁移学习，对比不同模型在灰度/彩色图像上的性能表现。
AI.result: 自研ConvNet模型在细筛/粗筛/全筛保留率预测中分别达到1.8%/3.3%/2.8%的RMSE，R²达0.99；预训练模型通过迁移学习实现2.4%-2.8%的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: CNN方法可有效替代传统筛分法，合成图像训练策略与迁移学习显著提升粒径分布预测精度，为土壤颗粒分析提供新思路。

title: On the Sample Complexity of Vanilla Model-Based Offline Reinforcement Learning with Dependent Samples
title_zh: 基于 Vanilla 模型的依赖样本离线强化学习的样本复杂性
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (offline RL) considers problems where learning is performed using only previously collected samples and is helpful for the settings in which collecting new data is costly or risky. In model-based offline RL, the learner performs estimation (or optimization) using a model constructed according to the empirical transition frequencies. We analyze the sample complexity of vanilla model-based offline RL with dependent samples in the infinite-horizon discounted-reward setting. In our setting, the samples obey the dynamics of the Markov decision process and, consequently, may have interdependencies. Under no assumption of independent samples, we provide a high-probability, polynomial sample complexity bound for vanilla model-based off-policy evaluation that requires partial or uniform coverage. We extend this result to the off-policy optimization under uniform coverage. As a comparison to the model-based approach, we analyze the sample complexity of off-policy evaluation with vanilla importance sampling in the infinite-horizon setting. Finally, we provide an estimator that outperforms the sample-mean estimator for almost deterministic dynamics that are prevalent in reinforcement learning.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (offline RL) considers problems where learning is performed using only previously collected samples and is helpful for the settings in which collecting new data is costly or risky. In model-based offline RL, the learner performs estimation (or optimization) using a model constructed according to the empirical transition frequencies. We analyze the sample complexity of vanilla model-based offline RL with dependent samples in the infinite-horizon discounted-reward setting. In our setting, the samples obey the dynamics of the Markov decision process and, consequently, may have interdependencies. Under no assumption of independent samples, we provide a high-probability, polynomial sample complexity bound for vanilla model-based off-policy evaluation that requires partial or uniform coverage. We extend this result to the off-policy optimization under uniform coverage. As a comparison to the model-based approach, we analyze the sample complexity of off-policy evaluation with vanilla importance sampling in the infinite-horizon setting. Finally, we provide an estimator that outperforms the sample-mean estimator for almost deterministic dynamics that are prevalent in reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（离线 RL）考虑仅使用先前收集的样本进行学习的问题，并且对于收集新数据成本高昂或有风险的环境很有帮助。在基于模型的离线强化学习中，学习器使用根据经验转换频率构建的模型来执行估计（或优化）。我们分析了无限范围折扣奖励设置中基于普通模型的离线强化学习的样本复杂性以及相关样本。在我们的设置中，样本服从马尔可夫决策过程的动态，因此可能具有相互依赖性。在没有独立样本的假设下，我们为需要部分或均匀覆盖的基于普通模型的离策略评估提供了高概率、多项式样本复杂性界限。我们将此结果扩展到均匀覆盖下的离策略优化。作为与基于模型的方法的比较，我们分析了无限范围设置中使用普通重要性采样的离策略评估的样本复杂性。最后，我们提供了一个估计器，对于强化学习中普遍存在的几乎确定性动态，其性能优于样本均值估计器。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于模型的离线强化学习在依赖样本情况下的样本复杂度，提供了理论保证并提出改进估计器。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习在数据收集受限场景中具有重要价值，但现有方法对样本依赖性缺乏理论分析，需明确样本复杂度边界。
AI.method: 在无限时间折扣奖励框架下，通过构建经验转移模型分析样本复杂度，无需独立同分布假设，结合部分覆盖或统一覆盖条件进行理论推导。
AI.result: 获得高概率多项式样本复杂度上界，扩展至统一覆盖下的策略优化，提出优于样本均值估计器的改进方法。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析揭示了依赖样本下模型基离线强化学习的可行性，提出的估计器为实际应用提供了更优解法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文分析了基于模型的离线强化学习在依赖样本情况下的样本复杂度，提供了理论保证并提出改进估计器。

authors_text: Javad Manashti,François Duhaime,Matthew F. Toews,Pouyan Pirnia,Jn Kinsonn Telcy
title: Comparing PSDNet, pretrained networks, and traditional feature extraction for predicting the particle size distribution of granular materials from photographs
title_zh: 比较 PSDNet、预训练网络和传统特征提取，用于从照片中预测颗粒材料的粒度分布
abstract: This study aims to evaluate PSDNet, a series of convolutional neural networks (ConvNets) trained with photographs to predict the particle size distribution of granular materials. Nine traditional feature extraction methods and 15 pretrained ConvNets were also evaluated and compared. A dataset including 9600 photographs of 15 different granular materials was used. The influence of image size and color band was verified by using six image sizes between 32 and 160 pixels, and both grayscale and color images as PSDNet inputs. In addition to random training, validation, and testing datasets, a material removal method was also used to evaluate the performances of each image analysis method. With this method, each material was successively removed from the training and validation datasets and used as the testing dataset. Results show that a combination of all PSDNet color and grayscale features can lead to a root mean square error (RMSE) on the percentages passing as low as 1.8 % with a random testing dataset and 9.1% with the material removal method. For the random datasets, a combination of all traditional features, and the features extracted from InceptionResNetV2 led to RMSE on the percentages passing of 2.3 and 1.7 %, respectively.
summary: This study aims to evaluate PSDNet, a series of convolutional neural networks (ConvNets) trained with photographs to predict the particle size distribution of granular materials. Nine traditional feature extraction methods and 15 pretrained ConvNets were also evaluated and compared. A dataset including 9600 photographs of 15 different granular materials was used. The influence of image size and color band was verified by using six image sizes between 32 and 160 pixels, and both grayscale and color images as PSDNet inputs. In addition to random training, validation, and testing datasets, a material removal method was also used to evaluate the performances of each image analysis method. With this method, each material was successively removed from the training and validation datasets and used as the testing dataset. Results show that a combination of all PSDNet color and grayscale features can lead to a root mean square error (RMSE) on the percentages passing as low as 1.8 % with a random testing dataset and 9.1% with the material removal method. For the random datasets, a combination of all traditional features, and the features extracted from InceptionResNetV2 led to RMSE on the percentages passing of 2.3 and 1.7 %, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在评估 PSDNet，这是一系列用照片训练的卷积神经网络 (ConvNet)，用于预测颗粒材料的粒度分布。还评估和比较了 9 种传统特征提取方法和 15 种预训练的 ConvNet。使用的数据集包含 15 种不同颗粒材料的 9600 张照片。通过使用 32 到 160 像素之间的六种图像大小以及灰度和彩色图像作为 PSDNet 输入来验证图像大小和色带的影响。除了随机训练、验证和测试数据集之外，还使用材料去除方法来评估每种图像分析方法的性能。通过这种方法，每种材料相继从训练和验证数据集中删除并用作测试数据集。结果表明，所有 PSDNet 颜色和灰度特征的组合可导致随机测试数据集的通过百分比低至 1.8%，而材料去除方法的通过百分比则低至 9.1% 的均方根误差 (RMSE)。对于随机数据集，所有传统特征和从 InceptionResNetV2 中提取的特征的组合导致 RMSE 的通过百分比分别为 2.3% 和 1.7%。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了PSDNet、预训练网络和传统特征提取方法在从照片预测颗粒材料粒径分布中的性能。
AI.motivation: 粒径分布预测对材料科学至关重要，传统方法可能不够准确，而深度学习方法如PSDNet和预训练网络可能提供更优解。
AI.method: 使用包含9600张照片的数据集，测试六种图像尺寸和颜色通道，结合随机划分与材料移除法评估方法性能。
AI.result: PSDNet结合彩色和灰度特征在随机测试集上达到1.8% RMSE，材料移除法下为9.1%；传统特征和InceptionResNetV2分别达到2.3%和1.7%。
AI.conclusion: PSDNet在随机测试中表现最佳，预训练模型如InceptionResNetV2亦具竞争力，但材料移除法显示方法对数据依赖性较强。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文比较了PSDNet、预训练网络和传统特征提取方法在从照片预测颗粒材料粒径分布中的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 粒径分布预测对材料科学至关重要，传统方法可能不够准确，而深度学习方法如PSDNet和预训练网络可能提供更优解。
ai_content.method: 使用包含9600张照片的数据集，测试六种图像尺寸和颜色通道，结合随机划分与材料移除法评估方法性能。
ai_content.result: PSDNet结合彩色和灰度特征在随机测试集上达到1.8% RMSE，材料移除法下为9.1%；传统特征和InceptionResNetV2分别达到2.3%和1.7%。
ai_content.conclusion: PSDNet在随机测试中表现最佳，预训练模型如InceptionResNetV2亦具竞争力，但材料移除法显示方法对数据依赖性较强。

search_text: Comparing PSDNet, pretrained networks, and traditional feature extraction for predicting the particle size distribution of granular materials from photographs 比较 PSDNet、预训练网络和传统特征提取，用于从照片中预测颗粒材料的粒度分布 This study aims to evaluate PSDNet, a series of convolutional neural networks (ConvNets) trained with photographs to predict the particle size distribution of granular materials. Nine traditional feature extraction methods and 15 pretrained ConvNets were also evaluated and compared. A dataset including 9600 photographs of 15 different granular materials was used. The influence of image size and color band was verified by using six image sizes between 32 and 160 pixels, and both grayscale and color images as PSDNet inputs. In addition to random training, validation, and testing datasets, a material removal method was also used to evaluate the performances of each image analysis method. With this method, each material was successively removed from the training and validation datasets and used as the testing dataset. Results show that a combination of all PSDNet color and grayscale features can lead to a root mean square error (RMSE) on the percentages passing as low as 1.8 % with a random testing dataset and 9.1% with the material removal method. For the random datasets, a combination of all traditional features, and the features extracted from InceptionResNetV2 led to RMSE on the percentages passing of 2.3 and 1.7 %, respectively. 本研究旨在评估 PSDNet，这是一系列用照片训练的卷积神经网络 (ConvNet)，用于预测颗粒材料的粒度分布。还评估和比较了 9 种传统特征提取方法和 15 种预训练的 ConvNet。使用的数据集包含 15 种不同颗粒材料的 9600 张照片。通过使用 32 到 160 像素之间的六种图像大小以及灰度和彩色图像作为 PSDNet 输入来验证图像大小和色带的影响。除了随机训练、验证和测试数据集之外，还使用材料去除方法来评估每种图像分析方法的性能。通过这种方法，每种材料相继从训练和验证数据集中删除并用作测试数据集。结果表明，所有 PSDNet 颜色和灰度特征的组合可导致随机测试数据集的通过百分比低至 1.8%，而材料去除方法的通过百分比则低至 9.1% 的均方根误差 (RMSE)。对于随机数据集，所有传统特征和从 InceptionResNetV2 中提取的特征的组合导致 RMSE 的通过百分比分别为 2.3% 和 1.7%。 该论文比较了PSDNet、预训练网络和传统特征提取方法在从照片预测颗粒材料粒径分布中的性能。 Javad Manashti,François Duhaime,Matthew F. Toews,Pouyan Pirnia,Jn Kinsonn Telcy cs.CV

title: adaPARL: Adaptive Privacy-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Sequential-Decision Making Human-in-the-Loop Systems
title_zh: adaPARL：用于顺序决策人在环系统的自适应隐私感知强化学习
comment: This paper is accepted at CPS-IoT week (IoTDI'23)
comments: This paper is accepted at CPS-IoT week (IoTDI'23)
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) presents numerous benefits compared to rule-based approaches in various applications. Privacy concerns have grown with the widespread use of RL trained with privacy-sensitive data in IoT devices, especially for human-in-the-loop systems. On the one hand, RL methods enhance the user experience by trying to adapt to the highly dynamic nature of humans. On the other hand, trained policies can leak the user's private information. Recent attention has been drawn to designing privacy-aware RL algorithms while maintaining an acceptable system utility. A central challenge in designing privacy-aware RL, especially for human-in-the-loop systems, is that humans have intrinsic variability and their preferences and behavior evolve. The effect of one privacy leak mitigation can be different for the same human or across different humans over time. Hence, we can not design one fixed model for privacy-aware RL that fits all. To that end, we propose adaPARL, an adaptive approach for privacy-aware RL, especially for human-in-the-loop IoT systems. adaPARL provides a personalized privacy-utility trade-off depending on human behavior and preference. We validate the proposed adaPARL on two IoT applications, namely (i) Human-in-the-Loop Smart Home and (ii) Human-in-the-Loop Virtual Reality (VR) Smart Classroom. Results obtained on these two applications validate the generality of adaPARL and its ability to provide a personalized privacy-utility trade-off. On average, for the first application, adaPARL improves the utility by $57\%$ over the baseline and by $43\%$ over randomization. adaPARL also reduces the privacy leak by $23\%$ on average. For the second application, adaPARL decreases the privacy leak to $44\%$ before the utility drops by $15\%$.

Privacy concerns have grown with the widespread use of RL trained with privacy-sensitive data in IoT devices, especially for human-in-the-loop systems. To that end, we propose adaPARL, an adaptive approach for privacy-aware RL, especially for human-in-the-loop IoT systems. adaPARL provides a personalized privacy-utility trade-off depending on human behavior and preference. We validate the proposed adaPARL on two IoT applications, namely (i) Human-in-the-Loop Smart Home and (ii) Human-in-the-Loop Virtual Reality (VR) Smart Classroom. Results obtained on these two applications validate the generality of adaPARL and its ability to provide a personalized privacy-utility trade-off. On average, for the first application, adaPARL improves the utility by $57\%$ over the baseline and by $43\%$ over randomization. adaPARL also reduces the privacy leak by $23\%$ on average. For the second application, adaPARL decreases the privacy leak to $44\%$ before the utility drops by $15\%$.
abstract_zh: 与各种应用中基于规则的方法相比，强化学习 (RL) 具有许多优势。随着物联网设备中使用隐私敏感数据训练的强化学习的广泛使用，隐私问题日益严重，尤其是人机交互系统。一方面，强化学习方法通​​过尝试适应人类高度动态的本质来增强用户体验。另一方面，经过训练的策略可能会泄露用户的私人信息。最近人们开始关注设计隐私感知强化学习算法，同时保持可接受的系统实用性。设计隐私感知强化学习（尤其是人机循环系统）的一个核心挑战是，人类具​​有内在的可变性，并且他们的偏好和行为会不断变化。随着时间的推移，一项隐私泄露缓解措施对于同一个人或不同的人的效果可能会有所不同。因此，我们无法为隐私感知强化学习设计一种适合所有人的固定模型。为此，我们提出了 adaPARL，这是一种隐私感知强化学习的自适应方法，特别适用于人机交互物联网系统。 adaPARL 根据人类行为和偏好提供个性化的隐私与实用性权衡。我们在两个物联网应用程序上验证了拟议的 adaPARL，即 (i) 人在环智能家居和 (ii) 人在环虚拟现实 (VR) 智能教室。在这两个应用程序上获得的结果验证了 adaPARL 的通用性及其提供个性化隐私与实用性权衡的能力。平均而言，对于第一个应用程序，adaPARL 的效用比基线提高了 $57\%$，比随机化提高了 $43\%$。 adaPARL 还平均减少了 $23\%$ 的隐私泄露。对于第二个应用程序，adaPARL 将隐私泄漏减少到 $44\%$，然后实用程序下降 $15\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出adaPARL，一种针对人机交互物联网系统的自适应隐私感知强化学习方法，旨在平衡隐私保护与系统效用。
AI.motivation: 随着物联网设备中隐私敏感数据的广泛使用，传统强化学习方法在隐私泄露风险与系统效用之间难以取得平衡，尤其面对人类行为动态变化时缺乏个性化适应能力。
AI.method: 通过动态调整隐私-效用权衡机制，adaPARL根据用户行为模式和偏好实时优化策略，采用个性化模型适应人类行为的时变特性。
AI.result: 在智能家居和VR教室两个物联网场景中，adaPARL相比基线方法平均提升效用57%，降低隐私泄露23%；在VR场景中隐私泄露减少44%时仅损失15%效用。
AI.conclusion: adaPARL验证了自适应隐私感知强化学习在人机交互系统中的有效性，为动态隐私保护与系统性能平衡提供了可行方案。

title: Self-supervised speech representation learning for keyword-spotting with light-weight transformers
title_zh: 使用轻量级转换器进行关键字识别的自监督语音表示学习
abstract: Self-supervised speech representation learning (S3RL) is revolutionizing the way we leverage the ever-growing availability of data. While S3RL related studies typically use large models, we employ light-weight networks to comply with tight memory of compute-constrained devices. We demonstrate the effectiveness of S3RL on a keyword-spotting (KS) problem by using transformers with 330k parameters and propose a mechanism to enhance utterance-wise distinction, which proves crucial for improving performance on classification tasks. On the Google speech commands v2 dataset, the proposed method applied to the Auto-Regressive Predictive Coding S3RL led to a 1.2% accuracy improvement compared to training from scratch. On an in-house KS dataset with four different keywords, it provided 6% to 23.7% relative false accept improvement at fixed false reject rate. We argue this demonstrates the applicability of S3RL approaches to light-weight models for KS and confirms S3RL is a powerful alternative to traditional supervised learning for resource-constrained applications.
summary: Self-supervised speech representation learning (S3RL) is revolutionizing the way we leverage the ever-growing availability of data. While S3RL related studies typically use large models, we employ light-weight networks to comply with tight memory of compute-constrained devices. We demonstrate the effectiveness of S3RL on a keyword-spotting (KS) problem by using transformers with 330k parameters and propose a mechanism to enhance utterance-wise distinction, which proves crucial for improving performance on classification tasks. On the Google speech commands v2 dataset, the proposed method applied to the Auto-Regressive Predictive Coding S3RL led to a 1.2% accuracy improvement compared to training from scratch. On an in-house KS dataset with four different keywords, it provided 6% to 23.7% relative false accept improvement at fixed false reject rate. We argue this demonstrates the applicability of S3RL approaches to light-weight models for KS and confirms S3RL is a powerful alternative to traditional supervised learning for resource-constrained applications.
abstract_zh: 自监督语音表示学习 (S3RL) 正在彻底改变我们利用不断增长的数据可用性的方式。虽然 S3RL 相关研究通常使用大型模型，但我们采用轻量级网络来满足计算受限设备的严格内存要求。我们通过使用具有 330k 参数的转换器来证明 S3RL 在关键字识别 (KS) 问题上的有效性，并提出了一种增强话语区分的机制，这对于提高分类任务的性能至关重要。在 Google 语音命令 v2 数据集上，与从头开始训练相比，应用于自回归预测编码 S3RL 的所提出的方法使准确度提高了 1.2%。在具有四个不同关键字的内部 KS 数据集上，它在固定错误拒绝率下提供了 6% 至 23.7% 的相对错误接受改进。我们认为这证明了 S3RL 方法对 KS 轻量级模型的适用性，并证实 S3RL 是资源受限应用程序中传统监督学习的强大替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轻量级Transformer的自监督语音表示学习方法，用于关键词识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法依赖大模型，难以适配资源受限设备的内存和计算约束，需开发轻量化方案。
AI.method: 设计参数量为330k的轻量级Transformer模型，并引入增强utterance-wise区分度的机制，结合自回归预测编码进行自监督预训练。
AI.result: 在Google Speech Commands v2数据集上相较从头训练提升1.2%准确率；在内部四关键词数据集上实现6%-23.7%的相对假接受率下降。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习可有效适配轻量模型实现关键词识别，为资源受限场景提供传统监督学习的可行替代方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轻量级Transformer的自监督语音表示学习方法，用于关键词识别任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法依赖大模型，难以适配资源受限设备的内存和计算约束，需开发轻量化方案。

search_text: Self-supervised speech representation learning for keyword-spotting with light-weight transformers 使用轻量级转换器进行关键字识别的自监督语音表示学习 Self-supervised speech representation learning (S3RL) is revolutionizing the way we leverage the ever-growing availability of data. While S3RL related studies typically use large models, we employ light-weight networks to comply with tight memory of compute-constrained devices. We demonstrate the effectiveness of S3RL on a keyword-spotting (KS) problem by using transformers with 330k parameters and propose a mechanism to enhance utterance-wise distinction, which proves crucial for improving performance on classification tasks. On the Google speech commands v2 dataset, the proposed method applied to the Auto-Regressive Predictive Coding S3RL led to a 1.2% accuracy improvement compared to training from scratch. On an in-house KS dataset with four different keywords, it provided 6% to 23.7% relative false accept improvement at fixed false reject rate. We argue this demonstrates the applicability of S3RL approaches to light-weight models for KS and confirms S3RL is a powerful alternative to traditional supervised learning for resource-constrained applications. 自监督语音表示学习 (S3RL) 正在彻底改变我们利用不断增长的数据可用性的方式。虽然 S3RL 相关研究通常使用大型模型，但我们采用轻量级网络来满足计算受限设备的严格内存要求。我们通过使用具有 330k 参数的转换器来证明 S3RL 在关键字识别 (KS) 问题上的有效性，并提出了一种增强话语区分的机制，这对于提高分类任务的性能至关重要。在 Google 语音命令 v2 数据集上，与从头开始训练相比，应用于自回归预测编码 S3RL 的所提出的方法使准确度提高了 1.2%。在具有四个不同关键字的内部 KS 数据集上，它在固定错误拒绝率下提供了 6% 至 23.7% 的相对错误接受改进。我们认为这证明了 S3RL 方法对 KS 轻量级模型的适用性，并证实 S3RL 是资源受限应用程序中传统监督学习的强大替代方案。 本文提出一种基于轻量级Transformer的自监督语音表示学习方法，用于关键词识别任务。 Chenyang Gao,Yue Gu,Francesco Caliva,Yuzong Liu cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Lijing Zhu,Qizhen Lan,Alvaro Velasquez,Houbing Song,Acharya Kamal,Qing Tian,Shuteng Niu
title: TMHOI: Translational Model for Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: TMHOI：人与物体交互检测的转化模型
abstract: Detecting human-object interactions (HOIs) is an intricate challenge in the field of computer vision. Existing methods for HOI detection heavily rely on appearance-based features, but these may not fully capture all the essential characteristics necessary for accurate detection. To overcome these challenges, we propose an innovative graph-based approach called TMGHOI (Translational Model for Human-Object Interaction Detection). Our method effectively captures the sentiment representation of HOIs by integrating both spatial and semantic knowledge. By representing HOIs as a graph, where the interaction components serve as nodes and their spatial relationships as edges. To extract crucial spatial and semantic information, TMGHOI employs separate spatial and semantic encoders. Subsequently, these encodings are combined to construct a knowledge graph that effectively captures the sentiment representation of HOIs. Additionally, the ability to incorporate prior knowledge enhances the understanding of interactions, further boosting detection accuracy. We conducted extensive evaluations on the widely-used HICO-DET datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of TMGHOI. Our approach outperformed existing state-of-the-art graph-based methods by a significant margin, showcasing its potential as a superior solution for HOI detection. We are confident that TMGHOI has the potential to significantly improve the accuracy and efficiency of HOI detection. Its integration of spatial and semantic knowledge, along with its computational efficiency and practicality, makes it a valuable tool for researchers and practitioners in the computer vision community. As with any research, we acknowledge the importance of further exploration and evaluation on various datasets to establish the generalizability and robustness of our proposed method.
summary: Detecting human-object interactions (HOIs) is an intricate challenge in the field of computer vision. Existing methods for HOI detection heavily rely on appearance-based features, but these may not fully capture all the essential characteristics necessary for accurate detection. To overcome these challenges, we propose an innovative graph-based approach called TMGHOI (Translational Model for Human-Object Interaction Detection). Our method effectively captures the sentiment representation of HOIs by integrating both spatial and semantic knowledge. By representing HOIs as a graph, where the interaction components serve as nodes and their spatial relationships as edges. To extract crucial spatial and semantic information, TMGHOI employs separate spatial and semantic encoders. Subsequently, these encodings are combined to construct a knowledge graph that effectively captures the sentiment representation of HOIs. Additionally, the ability to incorporate prior knowledge enhances the understanding of interactions, further boosting detection accuracy. We conducted extensive evaluations on the widely-used HICO-DET datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of TMGHOI. Our approach outperformed existing state-of-the-art graph-based methods by a significant margin, showcasing its potential as a superior solution for HOI detection. We are confident that TMGHOI has the potential to significantly improve the accuracy and efficiency of HOI detection. Its integration of spatial and semantic knowledge, along with its computational efficiency and practicality, makes it a valuable tool for researchers and practitioners in the computer vision community. As with any research, we acknowledge the importance of further exploration and evaluation on various datasets to establish the generalizability and robustness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 检测人与物体交互（HOI）是计算机视觉领域的一项复杂挑战。现有的 HOI 检测方法严重依赖基于外观的特征，但这些可能无法完全捕获准确检测所需的所有基本特征。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于图的创新方法，称为 TMGHOI（人与物体交互检测的翻译模型）。我们的方法通过整合空间和语义知识，有效地捕获 HOI 的情感表示。通过将 HOI 表示为图形，其中交互组件充当节点，它们的空间关系充当边。为了提取关键的空间和语义信息，TMGHOI 采用单独的空间和语义编码器。随后，这些编码被组合起来构建一个知识图谱，该知识图谱可以有效地捕获 HOI 的情感表示。此外，结合先验知识的能力增强了对相互作用的理解，进一步提高了检测准确性。我们对广泛使用的 HICO-DET 数据集进行了广泛的评估，以证明 TMGHOI 的有效性。我们的方法明显优于现有最先进的基于图的方法，展示了其作为 HOI 检测的卓越解决方案的潜力。我们相信 TMGHOI 有潜力显着提高 HOI 检测的准确性和效率。它对空间和语义知识的集成，以及计算效率和实用性，使其成为计算机视觉社区的研究人员和从业者的宝贵工具。与任何研究一样，我们承认对各种数据集进行进一步探索和评估的重要性，以建立我们提出的方法的普遍性和稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图模型的新型方法TMGHOI，用于改进人-物交互检测，通过整合空间和语义信息提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖外观特征，难以全面捕捉交互的本质特征，需通过图模型融合空间与语义知识以提升检测准确性。
AI.method: 将交互组件表示为图节点，空间关系作为边，采用独立的空间和语义编码器提取信息，构建知识图谱以捕捉交互的语义表示。
AI.result: 在HICO-DET数据集上显著优于现有图模型方法，验证了TMGHOI在检测精度和效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: TMGHOI通过整合空间与语义知识，兼顾计算效率与实用性，为HOI检测提供了有效解决方案，需进一步验证其泛化能力。

authors_text: Brandon Clark,Alec Kerrigan,Parth Parag Kulkarni,Vicente Vivanco Cepeda,Mubarak Shah
title: Where We Are and What We're Looking At: Query Based Worldwide Image Geo-localization Using Hierarchies and Scenes
title_zh: 我们在哪里以及我们正在关注什么：使用层次结构和场景进行基于查询的全球图像地理定位
abstract: Determining the exact latitude and longitude that a photo was taken is a useful and widely applicable task, yet it remains exceptionally difficult despite the accelerated progress of other computer vision tasks. Most previous approaches have opted to learn a single representation of query images, which are then classified at different levels of geographic granularity. These approaches fail to exploit the different visual cues that give context to different hierarchies, such as the country, state, and city level. To this end, we introduce an end-to-end transformer-based architecture that exploits the relationship between different geographic levels (which we refer to as hierarchies) and the corresponding visual scene information in an image through hierarchical cross-attention. We achieve this by learning a query for each geographic hierarchy and scene type. Furthermore, we learn a separate representation for different environmental scenes, as different scenes in the same location are often defined by completely different visual features. We achieve state of the art street level accuracy on 4 standard geo-localization datasets : Im2GPS, Im2GPS3k, YFCC4k, and YFCC26k, as well as qualitatively demonstrate how our method learns different representations for different visual hierarchies and scenes, which has not been demonstrated in the previous methods. These previous testing datasets mostly consist of iconic landmarks or images taken from social media, which makes them either a memorization task, or biased towards certain places. To address this issue we introduce a much harder testing dataset, Google-World-Streets-15k, comprised of images taken from Google Streetview covering the whole planet and present state of the art results. Our code will be made available in the camera-ready version.
summary: Determining the exact latitude and longitude that a photo was taken is a useful and widely applicable task, yet it remains exceptionally difficult despite the accelerated progress of other computer vision tasks. Most previous approaches have opted to learn a single representation of query images, which are then classified at different levels of geographic granularity. These approaches fail to exploit the different visual cues that give context to different hierarchies, such as the country, state, and city level. To this end, we introduce an end-to-end transformer-based architecture that exploits the relationship between different geographic levels (which we refer to as hierarchies) and the corresponding visual scene information in an image through hierarchical cross-attention. We achieve this by learning a query for each geographic hierarchy and scene type. Furthermore, we learn a separate representation for different environmental scenes, as different scenes in the same location are often defined by completely different visual features. We achieve state of the art street level accuracy on 4 standard geo-localization datasets : Im2GPS, Im2GPS3k, YFCC4k, and YFCC26k, as well as qualitatively demonstrate how our method learns different representations for different visual hierarchies and scenes, which has not been demonstrated in the previous methods. These previous testing datasets mostly consist of iconic landmarks or images taken from social media, which makes them either a memorization task, or biased towards certain places. To address this issue we introduce a much harder testing dataset, Google-World-Streets-15k, comprised of images taken from Google Streetview covering the whole planet and present state of the art results. Our code will be made available in the camera-ready version.
abstract_zh: 确定照片拍摄的确切纬度和经度是一项有用且广泛适用的任务，但尽管其他计算机视觉任务取得了加速进展，但它仍然异常困难。以前的大多数方法都选择学习查询图像的单一表示，然后将其按不同的地理粒度级别进行分类。这些方法未能利用为不同层次结构（例如国家、州和城市级别）提供背景的不同视觉线索。为此，我们引入了一种基于端到端变压器的架构，该架构通过分层交叉注意力来利用不同地理级别（我们称为层次结构）和图像中相应的视觉场景信息之间的关系。我们通过学习每个地理层次结构和场景类型的查询来实现这一点。此外，我们学习不同环境场景的单独表示，因为同一位置的不同场景通常由完全不同的视觉特征定义。我们在 4 个标准地理定位数据集：Im2GPS、Im2GPS3k、YFCC4k 和 YFCC26k 上实现了最先进的街道级精度，并定性地演示了我们的方法如何学习不同视觉层次结构和场景的不同表示，这在以前的方法中尚未得到证明。之前的这些测试数据集大多由标志性地标或从社交媒体上拍摄的图像组成，这使得它们要么是一项记忆任务，要么偏向某些地方。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个更难的测试数据集 Google-World-Streets-15k，它由覆盖整个地球的 Google 街景图像和当前最先进的结果组成。我们的代码将在相机就绪版本中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于查询的全球图像地理定位方法，通过利用图像中的层次结构和场景信息来确定照片的精确经纬度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法未能有效利用不同地理层级（如国家、州、城市）和场景的视觉线索，且现有数据集偏向地标或社交媒体图像，导致模型记忆偏差而非真实定位能力。
AI.method: 设计了一种端到端的基于Transformer的架构，通过层级交叉注意力机制学习不同地理层级和场景类型的查询表示，并为不同环境场景学习独立的视觉特征表示。
AI.result: 在四个标准数据集（Im2GPS、Im2GPS3k、YFCC4k、YFCC26k）上达到街景级精度的最先进水平，并引入包含全球街景图像的Google-World-Streets-15k数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模地理层级与场景的视觉关联，显著提升了图像地理定位性能，且新数据集为未来研究提供了更具挑战性的基准。

search_text: Where We Are and What We're Looking At: Query Based Worldwide Image Geo-localization Using Hierarchies and Scenes 我们在哪里以及我们正在关注什么：使用层次结构和场景进行基于查询的全球图像地理定位 Determining the exact latitude and longitude that a photo was taken is a useful and widely applicable task, yet it remains exceptionally difficult despite the accelerated progress of other computer vision tasks. Most previous approaches have opted to learn a single representation of query images, which are then classified at different levels of geographic granularity. These approaches fail to exploit the different visual cues that give context to different hierarchies, such as the country, state, and city level. To this end, we introduce an end-to-end transformer-based architecture that exploits the relationship between different geographic levels (which we refer to as hierarchies) and the corresponding visual scene information in an image through hierarchical cross-attention. We achieve this by learning a query for each geographic hierarchy and scene type. Furthermore, we learn a separate representation for different environmental scenes, as different scenes in the same location are often defined by completely different visual features. We achieve state of the art street level accuracy on 4 standard geo-localization datasets : Im2GPS, Im2GPS3k, YFCC4k, and YFCC26k, as well as qualitatively demonstrate how our method learns different representations for different visual hierarchies and scenes, which has not been demonstrated in the previous methods. These previous testing datasets mostly consist of iconic landmarks or images taken from social media, which makes them either a memorization task, or biased towards certain places. To address this issue we introduce a much harder testing dataset, Google-World-Streets-15k, comprised of images taken from Google Streetview covering the whole planet and present state of the art results. Our code will be made available in the camera-ready version. 确定照片拍摄的确切纬度和经度是一项有用且广泛适用的任务，但尽管其他计算机视觉任务取得了加速进展，但它仍然异常困难。以前的大多数方法都选择学习查询图像的单一表示，然后将其按不同的地理粒度级别进行分类。这些方法未能利用为不同层次结构（例如国家、州和城市级别）提供背景的不同视觉线索。为此，我们引入了一种基于端到端变压器的架构，该架构通过分层交叉注意力来利用不同地理级别（我们称为层次结构）和图像中相应的视觉场景信息之间的关系。我们通过学习每个地理层次结构和场景类型的查询来实现这一点。此外，我们学习不同环境场景的单独表示，因为同一位置的不同场景通常由完全不同的视觉特征定义。我们在 4 个标准地理定位数据集：Im2GPS、Im2GPS3k、YFCC4k 和 YFCC26k 上实现了最先进的街道级精度，并定性地演示了我们的方法如何学习不同视觉层次结构和场景的不同表示，这在以前的方法中尚未得到证明。之前的这些测试数据集大多由标志性地标或从社交媒体上拍摄的图像组成，这使得它们要么是一项记忆任务，要么偏向某些地方。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个更难的测试数据集 Google-World-Streets-15k，它由覆盖整个地球的 Google 街景图像和当前最先进的结果组成。我们的代码将在相机就绪版本中提供。 本文提出了一种基于查询的全球图像地理定位方法，通过利用图像中的层次结构和场景信息来确定照片的精确经纬度。 Brandon Clark,Alec Kerrigan,Parth Parag Kulkarni,Vicente Vivanco Cepeda,Mubarak Shah cs.CV

authors_text: David Berthelot,Arnaud Autef,Jierui Lin,Dian Ang Yap,Shuangfei Zhai,Siyuan Hu,Daniel Zheng,Walter Talbott,Eric Gu
title: TRACT: Denoising Diffusion Models with Transitive Closure Time-Distillation
title_zh: TRACT：具有传递闭包时间蒸馏的去噪扩散模型
abstract: Denoising Diffusion models have demonstrated their proficiency for generative sampling. However, generating good samples often requires many iterations. Consequently, techniques such as binary time-distillation (BTD) have been proposed to reduce the number of network calls for a fixed architecture. In this paper, we introduce TRAnsitive Closure Time-distillation (TRACT), a new method that extends BTD. For single step diffusion,TRACT improves FID by up to 2.4x on the same architecture, and achieves new single-step Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models (DDIM) state-of-the-art FID (7.4 for ImageNet64, 3.8 for CIFAR10). Finally we tease apart the method through extended ablations. The PyTorch implementation will be released soon.
summary: Denoising Diffusion models have demonstrated their proficiency for generative sampling. However, generating good samples often requires many iterations. Consequently, techniques such as binary time-distillation (BTD) have been proposed to reduce the number of network calls for a fixed architecture. In this paper, we introduce TRAnsitive Closure Time-distillation (TRACT), a new method that extends BTD. For single step diffusion,TRACT improves FID by up to 2.4x on the same architecture, and achieves new single-step Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models (DDIM) state-of-the-art FID (7.4 for ImageNet64, 3.8 for CIFAR10). Finally we tease apart the method through extended ablations. The PyTorch implementation will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散模型已经证明了它们在生成采样方面的熟练程度。然而，生成好的样本通常需要多次迭代。因此，人们提出了诸如二进制时间蒸馏（BTD）之类的技术来减少固定架构的网络调用数量。在本文中，我们介绍了 TRAnsitive Closure Time-distillation (TRACT)，这是一种扩展 BTD 的新方法。对于单步扩散，TRACT 在相同架构上将 FID 提高了 2.4 倍，并实现了新的单步去噪扩散隐式模型 (DDIM) 最先进的 FID（ImageNet64 为 7.4，CIFAR10 为 3.8）。最后，我们通过扩展消融来梳理该方法。 PyTorch 实现将很快发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRACT方法，通过传递闭包时间蒸馏技术提升去噪扩散模型的生成效果。
AI.motivation: 去噪扩散模型生成高质量样本需大量迭代，现有二进制时间蒸馏（BTD）技术难以在减少计算量的同时保持生成质量。
AI.method: 提出基于传递闭包的时间蒸馏框架TRACT，通过扩展BTD方法优化单步扩散过程，利用传递闭包特性提升时间步长压缩效率。
AI.result: 在相同架构下单步扩散FID提升2.4倍，在ImageNet64和CIFAR10数据集上分别达到7.4和3.8的SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: TRACT通过传递闭包机制有效平衡了生成质量与计算效率，消融实验验证了方法有效性，后续将开源PyTorch实现。

title: A Light-Weight Contrastive Approach for Aligning Human Pose Sequences
title_zh: 对齐人体姿势序列的轻量级对比方法
abstract: We present a simple unsupervised method for learning an encoder mapping short 3D pose sequences into embedding vectors suitable for sequence-to-sequence alignment by dynamic time warping. Training samples consist of temporal windows of frames containing 3D body points such as mocap markers or skeleton joints. A light-weight, 3-layer encoder is trained using a contrastive loss function that encourages embedding vectors of augmented sample pairs to have cosine similarity 1, and similarity 0 with all other samples in a minibatch. When multiple scripted training sequences are available, temporal alignments inferred from an initial round of training are harvested to extract additional, cross-performance match pairs for a second phase of training to refine the encoder. In addition to being simple, the proposed method is fast to train, making it easy to adapt to new data using different marker sets or skeletal joint layouts. Experimental results illustrate ease of use, transferability, and utility of the learned embeddings for comparing and analyzing human behavior sequences.
summary: We present a simple unsupervised method for learning an encoder mapping short 3D pose sequences into embedding vectors suitable for sequence-to-sequence alignment by dynamic time warping. Training samples consist of temporal windows of frames containing 3D body points such as mocap markers or skeleton joints. A light-weight, 3-layer encoder is trained using a contrastive loss function that encourages embedding vectors of augmented sample pairs to have cosine similarity 1, and similarity 0 with all other samples in a minibatch. When multiple scripted training sequences are available, temporal alignments inferred from an initial round of training are harvested to extract additional, cross-performance match pairs for a second phase of training to refine the encoder. In addition to being simple, the proposed method is fast to train, making it easy to adapt to new data using different marker sets or skeletal joint layouts. Experimental results illustrate ease of use, transferability, and utility of the learned embeddings for comparing and analyzing human behavior sequences.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单的无监督方法，用于学习编码器，将短 3D 姿势序列映射到适合通过动态时间扭曲进行序列到序列对齐的嵌入向量。训练样本由包含 3D 身体点（例如动作捕捉标记或骨骼关节）的帧的时间窗口组成。使用对比损失函数来训练轻量级 3 层编码器，该函数鼓励增强样本对的嵌入向量与小批量中的所有其他样本具有余弦相似度 1 和相似度 0。当多个脚本训练序列可用时，从第一轮训练中推断出的时间对齐被收集，以提取额外的交叉性能匹配对，用于第二阶段的训练，以改进编码器。除了简单之外，所提出的方法训练速度也很快，可以轻松地适应使用不同标记集或骨骼关节布局的新数据。实验结果说明了学习嵌入在比较和分析人类行为序列方面的易用性、可转移性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级对比方法，用于对齐人类姿态序列。
AI.motivation: 现有方法可能复杂且难以适应不同标记集或骨骼布局，需一种简单高效的无监督学习方案。
AI.method: 使用3层编码器与对比损失函数训练，通过余弦相似度最大化增强样本对的相似性，结合动态时间规整实现序列对齐，并利用初始训练结果优化模型。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的易用性、可迁移性及在人类行为序列分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为姿态序列对齐提供了快速适应新数据的轻量级解决方案。

title: Gradient-Guided Knowledge Distillation for Object Detectors
title_zh: 目标检测器的梯度引导知识蒸馏
comment: 9 pages include references, 4 figures, and 4 tables
comments: 9 pages include references, 4 figures, and 4 tables
abstract: Deep learning models have demonstrated remarkable success in object detection, yet their complexity and computational intensity pose a barrier to deploying them in real-world applications (e.g., self-driving perception). Knowledge Distillation (KD) is an effective way to derive efficient models. However, only a small number of KD methods tackle object detection. Also, most of them focus on mimicking the plain features of the teacher model but rarely consider how the features contribute to the final detection. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for knowledge distillation in object detection, named Gradient-guided Knowledge Distillation (GKD). Our GKD uses gradient information to identify and assign more weights to features that significantly impact the detection loss, allowing the student to learn the most relevant features from the teacher. Furthermore, we present bounding-box-aware multi-grained feature imitation (BMFI) to further improve the KD performance. Experiments on the KITTI and COCO-Traffic datasets demonstrate our method's efficacy in knowledge distillation for object detection. On one-stage and two-stage detectors, our GKD-BMFI leads to an average of 5.1% and 3.8% mAP improvement, respectively, beating various state-of-the-art KD methods.
summary: Deep learning models have demonstrated remarkable success in object detection, yet their complexity and computational intensity pose a barrier to deploying them in real-world applications (e.g., self-driving perception). Knowledge Distillation (KD) is an effective way to derive efficient models. However, only a small number of KD methods tackle object detection. Also, most of them focus on mimicking the plain features of the teacher model but rarely consider how the features contribute to the final detection. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for knowledge distillation in object detection, named Gradient-guided Knowledge Distillation (GKD). Our GKD uses gradient information to identify and assign more weights to features that significantly impact the detection loss, allowing the student to learn the most relevant features from the teacher. Furthermore, we present bounding-box-aware multi-grained feature imitation (BMFI) to further improve the KD performance. Experiments on the KITTI and COCO-Traffic datasets demonstrate our method's efficacy in knowledge distillation for object detection. On one-stage and two-stage detectors, our GKD-BMFI leads to an average of 5.1% and 3.8% mAP improvement, respectively, beating various state-of-the-art KD methods.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在目标检测方面取得了显着的成功，但其复杂性和计算强度对其在现实世界应用（例如自动驾驶感知）中的部署构成了障碍。知识蒸馏（KD）是导出高效模型的有效方法。然而，只有少数 KD 方法可以解决目标检测问题。此外，他们中的大多数人专注于模仿教师模型的简单特征，但很少考虑这些特征如何对最终检测做出贡献。在本文中，我们提出了一种目标检测中知识蒸馏的新方法，称为梯度引导知识蒸馏（GKD）。我们的 GKD 使用梯度信息来识别并为显着影响检测损失的特征分配更多权重，从而使学生能够从老师那里学习最相关的特征。此外，我们提出了边界框感知多粒度特征模仿（BMFI）以进一步提高 KD 性能。 KITTI 和 COCO-Traffic 数据集上的实验证明了我们的方法在目标检测知识蒸馏方面的有效性。在一级和两级检测器上，我们的 GKD-BMFI 分别平均提高了 5.1% 和 3.8% 的 mAP，击败了各种最先进的 KD 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为梯度引导的知识蒸馏（GKD）的新方法，用于改进目标检测器的效率，并结合边界框感知的多粒度特征模仿（BMFI）进一步提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在目标检测中主要模仿教师模型的普通特征，但未考虑这些特征对最终检测结果的影响，导致效率不足。
AI.method: 通过梯度信息识别对检测损失影响显著的特征并赋予更高权重，同时引入BMFI模块进行多粒度特征模仿，增强学生模型的学习效果。
AI.result: 在KITTI和COCO-Traffic数据集上，GKD-BMFI方法分别使单阶段和两阶段检测器的mAP平均提升5.1%和3.8%，优于现有最先进的知识蒸馏方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的GKD-BMFI方法通过梯度引导和多粒度特征模仿，有效提升了目标检测器的知识蒸馏性能，验证了其在实际应用中的优越性。

Our GKD uses gradient information to identify and assign more weights to features that significantly impact the detection loss, allowing the student to learn the most relevant features from the teacher. Furthermore, we present bounding-box-aware multi-grained feature imitation (BMFI) to further improve the KD performance. Experiments on the KITTI and COCO-Traffic datasets demonstrate our method's efficacy in knowledge distillation for object detection. title: Patch of Invisibility: Naturalistic Physical Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on Object Detectors
title_zh: 隐形补丁：对物体探测器的自然物理黑盒对抗性攻击
abstract: Adversarial attacks on deep learning models have received increased attention in recent years. Work in this area has mostly focused on gradient-based techniques, so-called 'white-box' attacks, where the attacker has access to the targeted model's internal parameters; such an assumption is usually untenable in the real world. Additionally, some attacks use the entire pixel space to fool a given model, which is neither practical nor physical. To accommodate these problems we propose the BBNP algorithm (Black-Box Naturalistic Patch): a direct, black-box, naturalistic, gradient-free method that uses the learned image manifold of a pretrained, generative adversarial network (GAN) to generate naturalistic adversarial patches for object detectors. This method performs model-agnostic black-box naturalistic attacks on object detection models by relying solely on the outputs of the model. Comparing our approach against five models, five black-box and two white-box attacks, we show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results, outperforming all other tested black-box approaches.
summary: Adversarial attacks on deep learning models have received increased attention in recent years. Work in this area has mostly focused on gradient-based techniques, so-called 'white-box' attacks, where the attacker has access to the targeted model's internal parameters; such an assumption is usually untenable in the real world. Additionally, some attacks use the entire pixel space to fool a given model, which is neither practical nor physical. To accommodate these problems we propose the BBNP algorithm (Black-Box Naturalistic Patch): a direct, black-box, naturalistic, gradient-free method that uses the learned image manifold of a pretrained, generative adversarial network (GAN) to generate naturalistic adversarial patches for object detectors. This method performs model-agnostic black-box naturalistic attacks on object detection models by relying solely on the outputs of the model. Comparing our approach against five models, five black-box and two white-box attacks, we show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results, outperforming all other tested black-box approaches.
abstract_zh: 近年来，针对深度学习模型的对抗性攻击越来越受到关注。该领域的工作主要集中在基于梯度的技术，即所谓的“白盒”攻击，攻击者可以访问目标模型的内部参数；这种假设在现实世界中通常是站不住脚的。此外，一些攻击使用整个像素空间来欺骗给定的模型，这既不实用也不物理。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 BBNP 算法（黑盒自然主义补丁）：一种直接、黑盒、自然、无梯度的方法，使用预训练的生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的学习图像流形来为对象检测器生成自然对抗补丁。该方法仅依赖于模型的输出，对目标检测模型执行与模型无关的黑盒自然攻击。将我们的方法与五个模型、五个黑盒和两个白盒攻击进行比较，我们表明我们提出的方法取得了最先进的结果，优于所有其他经过测试的黑盒方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对物体检测器的黑盒对抗攻击方法，通过生成自然istic的物理补丁实现模型不可见性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击多依赖白盒条件或全像素空间，难以满足现实场景中模型参数不可见且需物理可行性的需求。
AI.method: 设计BBNP算法，利用预训练GAN生成自然istic对抗补丁，通过模型输出进行梯度-free的黑盒攻击。
AI.result: 在五种检测模型和七种攻击方法对比中，BBNP在黑盒场景下达到最先进效果，优于所有其他黑盒方法。
AI.conclusion: BBNP验证了基于GAN的自然istic物理补丁在黑盒攻击中的有效性，为现实场景的对抗攻击研究提供新方向。

title: Understanding Natural Language Understanding Systems. A Critical Analysis
title_zh: 了解自然语言理解系统。批判性分析
abstract: The development of machines that «talk like us», also known as Natural Language Understanding (NLU) systems, is the Holy Grail of Artificial Intelligence (AI), since language is the quintessence of human intelligence. The brief but intense life of NLU research in AI and Natural Language Processing (NLP) is full of ups and downs, with periods of high hopes that the Grail is finally within reach, typically followed by phases of equally deep despair and disillusion. But never has the trust that we can build «talking machines» been stronger than the one engendered by the last generation of NLU systems. But is it gold all that glitters in AI? do state-of-the-art systems possess something comparable to the human knowledge of language? Are we at the dawn of a new era, in which the Grail is finally closer to us? In fact, the latest achievements of AI systems have sparkled, or better renewed, an intense scientific debate on their true language understanding capabilities. Some defend the idea that, yes, we are on the right track, despite the limits that computational models still show. Others are instead radically skeptic and even dismissal: The present limits are not just contingent and temporary problems of NLU systems, but the sign of the intrinsic inadequacy of the epistemological and technological paradigm grounding them. This paper aims at contributing to such debate by carrying out a critical analysis of the linguistic abilities of the most recent NLU systems. I contend that they incorporate important aspects of the way language is learnt and processed by humans, but at the same time they lack key interpretive and inferential skills that it is unlikely they can attain unless they are integrated with structured knowledge and the ability to exploit it for language use.

The brief but intense life of NLU research in AI and Natural Language Processing (NLP) is full of ups and downs, with periods of high hopes that the Grail is finally within reach, typically followed by phases of equally deep despair and disillusion. But never has the trust that we can build «talking machines» been stronger than the one engendered by the last generation of NLU systems. Others are instead radically skeptic and even dismissal: The present limits are not just contingent and temporary problems of NLU systems, but the sign of the intrinsic inadequacy of the epistemological and technological paradigm grounding them. This paper aims at contributing to such debate by carrying out a critical analysis of the linguistic abilities of the most recent NLU systems. I contend that they incorporate important aspects of the way language is learnt and processed by humans, but at the same time they lack key interpretive and inferential skills that it is unlikely they can attain unless they are integrated with structured knowledge and the ability to exploit it for language use.
abstract_zh: 开发“像我们一样说话”的机器，也称为自然语言理解（NLU）系统，是人工智能（AI）的圣杯，因为语言是人类智能的精髓。人工智能和自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域的 NLU 研究短暂而紧张，充满了坎坷，人们对圣杯终于触手可及抱有很高的希望，但随后通常会经历同样深深的绝望和幻灭的阶段。但我们对能够制造出“会说话的机器”的信心从未像上一代 NLU 系统所产生的那样强烈。但人工智能领域闪闪发光的都是金子吗？最先进的系统是否拥有与人类语言知识相当的东西？我们是否正处于一个新时代的黎明，圣杯终于离我们更近了？事实上，人工智能系统的最新成就引发了或者更好地更新了关于其真实语言理解能力的激烈科学争论。一些人捍卫这样的观点：是的，尽管计算模型仍然存在局限性，但我们正走在正确的轨道上。相反，其他人则持彻底的怀疑态度，甚至不屑一顾：目前的限制不仅仅是 NLU 系统的偶然和暂时的问题，而且是支撑它们的认识论和技术范式内在不足的标志。本文旨在通过对最新 NLU 系统的语言能力进行批判性分析，为此类争论做出贡献。我认为它们包含了人类学习和处理语言方式的重要方面，但同时它们缺乏关键的解释和推理技能，除非它们与结构化知识相结合并能够利用它进行语言使用，否则它们不可能获得这些技能。

AI.tldr: 本文对最新自然语言理解（NLU）系统的语言能力进行批判性分析，探讨其是否具备接近人类语言理解的水平。
AI.motivation: 当前AI领域对NLU系统的能力存在争议，部分人认为其接近人类水平，另一部分人则认为其存在根本性缺陷，需通过批判性分析厘清真相。
AI.method: 通过回顾NLU研究历史，分析最新系统的技术特点，并对比人类语言处理机制，评估其解释与推理能力的不足。
AI.result: 最新NLU系统虽包含人类语言学习的部分特征，但缺乏关键的解释与推理能力，除非整合结构化知识否则难以达到人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 当前NLU系统尚未实现真正语言理解，需结合结构化知识与推理能力才能突破现有局限。

search_text: Understanding Natural Language Understanding Systems. A Critical Analysis 了解自然语言理解系统。批判性分析 The development of machines that «talk like us», also known as Natural Language Understanding (NLU) systems, is the Holy Grail of Artificial Intelligence (AI), since language is the quintessence of human intelligence. The brief but intense life of NLU research in AI and Natural Language Processing (NLP) is full of ups and downs, with periods of high hopes that the Grail is finally within reach, typically followed by phases of equally deep despair and disillusion. But never has the trust that we can build «talking machines» been stronger than the one engendered by the last generation of NLU systems. But is it gold all that glitters in AI? do state-of-the-art systems possess something comparable to the human knowledge of language? Are we at the dawn of a new era, in which the Grail is finally closer to us? In fact, the latest achievements of AI systems have sparkled, or better renewed, an intense scientific debate on their true language understanding capabilities. Some defend the idea that, yes, we are on the right track, despite the limits that computational models still show. Others are instead radically skeptic and even dismissal: The present limits are not just contingent and temporary problems of NLU systems, but the sign of the intrinsic inadequacy of the epistemological and technological paradigm grounding them. This paper aims at contributing to such debate by carrying out a critical analysis of the linguistic abilities of the most recent NLU systems. I contend that they incorporate important aspects of the way language is learnt and processed by humans, but at the same time they lack key interpretive and inferential skills that it is unlikely they can attain unless they are integrated with structured knowledge and the ability to exploit it for language use. 开发“像我们一样说话”的机器，也称为自然语言理解（NLU）系统，是人工智能（AI）的圣杯，因为语言是人类智能的精髓。人工智能和自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域的 NLU 研究短暂而紧张，充满了坎坷，人们对圣杯终于触手可及抱有很高的希望，但随后通常会经历同样深深的绝望和幻灭的阶段。但我们对能够制造出“会说话的机器”的信心从未像上一代 NLU 系统所产生的那样强烈。但人工智能领域闪闪发光的都是金子吗？最先进的系统是否拥有与人类语言知识相当的东西？我们是否正处于一个新时代的黎明，圣杯终于离我们更近了？事实上，人工智能系统的最新成就引发了或者更好地更新了关于其真实语言理解能力的激烈科学争论。一些人捍卫这样的观点：是的，尽管计算模型仍然存在局限性，但我们正走在正确的轨道上。相反，其他人则持彻底的怀疑态度，甚至不屑一顾：目前的限制不仅仅是 NLU 系统的偶然和暂时的问题，而且是支撑它们的认识论和技术范式内在不足的标志。本文旨在通过对最新 NLU 系统的语言能力进行批判性分析，为此类争论做出贡献。我认为它们包含了人类学习和处理语言方式的重要方面，但同时它们缺乏关键的解释和推理技能，除非它们与结构化知识相结合并能够利用它进行语言使用，否则它们不可能获得这些技能。 本文对最新自然语言理解（NLU）系统的语言能力进行批判性分析，探讨其是否具备接近人类语言理解的水平。 Alessandro Lenci cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Yihan Cao,Siyu Li,Yixin Liu,Zhiling Yan,Yutong Dai,Philip S. Yu,Lichao Sun
title: A Comprehensive Survey of AI-Generated Content (AIGC): A History of Generative AI from GAN to ChatGPT
title_zh: 人工智能生成内容 (AIGC) 的全面调查：从 GAN 到 ChatGPT 的生成式 AI 历史
abstract: Recently, ChatGPT, along with DALL-E-2 and Codex,has been gaining significant attention from society. As a result, many individuals have become interested in related resources and are seeking to uncover the background and secrets behind its impressive performance. In fact, ChatGPT and other Generative AI (GAI) techniques belong to the category of Artificial Intelligence Generated Content (AIGC), which involves the creation of digital content, such as images, music, and natural language, through AI models. The goal of AIGC is to make the content creation process more efficient and accessible, allowing for the production of high-quality content at a faster pace. AIGC is achieved by extracting and understanding intent information from instructions provided by human, and generating the content according to its knowledge and the intent information. In recent years, large-scale models have become increasingly important in AIGC as they provide better intent extraction and thus, improved generation results. With the growth of data and the size of the models, the distribution that the model can learn becomes more comprehensive and closer to reality, leading to more realistic and high-quality content generation. This survey provides a comprehensive review on the history of generative models, and basic components, recent advances in AIGC from unimodal interaction and multimodal interaction. From the perspective of unimodality, we introduce the generation tasks and relative models of text and image. From the perspective of multimodality, we introduce the cross-application between the modalities mentioned above. Finally, we discuss the existing open problems and future challenges in AIGC.

As a result, many individuals have become interested in related resources and are seeking to uncover the background and secrets behind its impressive performance. In fact, ChatGPT and other Generative AI (GAI) techniques belong to the category of Artificial Intelligence Generated Content (AIGC), which involves the creation of digital content, such as images, music, and natural language, through AI models. The goal of AIGC is to make the content creation process more efficient and accessible, allowing for the production of high-quality content at a faster pace. AIGC is achieved by extracting and understanding intent information from instructions provided by human, and generating the content according to its knowledge and the intent information. In recent years, large-scale models have become increasingly important in AIGC as they provide better intent extraction and thus, improved generation results. With the growth of data and the size of the models, the distribution that the model can learn becomes more comprehensive and closer to reality, leading to more realistic and high-quality content generation. This survey provides a comprehensive review on the history of generative models, and basic components, recent advances in AIGC from unimodal interaction and multimodal interaction. From the perspective of unimodality, we introduce the generation tasks and relative models of text and image. From the perspective of multimodality, we introduce the cross-application between the modalities mentioned above. Finally, we discuss the existing open problems and future challenges in AIGC.
abstract_zh: 最近，ChatGPT 与 DALL-E-2 和 Codex 一起受到了社会的广泛关注。因此，许多人对相关资源产生了兴趣，并试图揭开其令人印象深刻的业绩背后的背景和秘密。事实上，ChatGPT 和其他生成式人工智能 (GAI) 技术属于人工智能生成内容 (AIGC) 的范畴，涉及通过人工智能模型创建数字内容，例如图像、音乐和自然语言。 AIGC 的目标是使内容创建过程更加高效和易于访问，从而以更快的速度生产高质量的内容。 AIGC是通过从人类提供的指令中提取和理解意图信息，并根据其知识和意图信息生成内容来实现的。近年来，大规模模型在 AIGC 中变得越来越重要，因为它们提供了更好的意图提取，从而改进了生成结果。随着数据的增长和模型规模的增长，模型可以学习的分布变得更加全面、更加接近现实，从而产生更加真实和高质量的内容。本综述从单模态交互和多模态交互的角度全面回顾了生成模型的历史、基本组成、AIGC 的最新进展。我们从单峰性的角度介绍了文本和图像的生成任务和相关模型。从多模态的角度，我们介绍了上述模态之间的交叉应用。最后，我们讨论了 AIGC 现有的开放问题和未来的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了生成式AI的发展历程，从GAN到ChatGPT，分析了AIGC的核心技术、应用场景及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着ChatGPT等生成式AI技术的兴起，社会对其技术原理和应用潜力产生浓厚兴趣，亟需系统梳理AIGC的发展脉络与关键技术。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，从单模态（文本/图像生成）和多模态交互两个维度，梳理AIGC的技术演进、核心组件及跨模态应用案例，并探讨现存问题。
AI.result: 总结了AIGC技术的历史沿革、核心模型架构、多模态融合进展，并指出现阶段在意图理解、生成质量、伦理风险等方面的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: AIGC通过大规模模型显著提升了内容生成效率与质量，但需进一步解决技术瓶颈与社会影响，未来研究应聚焦跨模态一致性与可控性优化。

authors_text: Jared J. Beard,R. Michael Butts,Yu Gu
title: Feeling Optimistic? Ambiguity Attitudes for Online Decision Making
title_zh: 感觉乐观吗？在线决策的模糊态度
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 algorithms. Accepted to the 2024 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems in Abu Dhabi, UAE (Oct 14-18, 2024) \c{opyright} 2024 IEEE
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 algorithms. Accepted to the 2024 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems in Abu Dhabi, UAE (Oct 14-18, 2024) \c{opyright} 2024 IEEE
abstract: Due to the complexity of many decision making problems, tree search algorithms often have inadequate information to produce accurate transition models. This results in ambiguities (uncertainties for which there are multiple plausible models). Faced with ambiguities, robust methods have been used to produce safe solutions--often by maximizing the lower bound over the set of plausible transition models. However, they often overlook how much the representation of uncertainty can impact how a decision is made. This work introduces the Ambiguity Attitude Graph Search (AAGS), advocating for more comprehensive representations of ambiguities in decision making. Additionally, AAGS allows users to adjust their ambiguity attitude (or preference), promoting exploration and improving users' ability to control how an agent should respond when faced with a set of plausible alternatives. Simulation in a dynamic sailing environment shows how environments with high entropy transition models can lead robust methods to fail. Results further demonstrate how adjusting ambiguity attitudes better fulfills objectives while mitigating this failure mode of robust approaches. Because this approach is a generalization of the robust framework, these results further demonstrate how algorithms focused on ambiguity have applicability beyond safety-critical systems.
summary: Due to the complexity of many decision making problems, tree search algorithms often have inadequate information to produce accurate transition models. This results in ambiguities (uncertainties for which there are multiple plausible models). However, they often overlook how much the representation of uncertainty can impact how a decision is made. Additionally, AAGS allows users to adjust their ambiguity attitude (or preference), promoting exploration and improving users' ability to control how an agent should respond when faced with a set of plausible alternatives. Simulation in a dynamic sailing environment shows how environments with high entropy transition models can lead robust methods to fail. Results further demonstrate how adjusting ambiguity attitudes better fulfills objectives while mitigating this failure mode of robust approaches. Because this approach is a generalization of the robust framework, these results further demonstrate how algorithms focused on ambiguity have applicability beyond safety-critical systems.
abstract_zh: 由于许多决策问题的复杂性，树搜索算法通常没有足够的信息来生成准确的转换模型。这会导致歧义（存在多个看似合理的模型的不确定性）。面对模糊性，稳健的方法已被用来产生安全的解决方案——通常是通过最大化一组合理的转换模型的下界。然而，他们常常忽视不确定性的表现对决策的影响有多大。这项工作引入了歧义态度图搜索（AAGS），提倡更全面地表示决策中的歧义。此外，AAGS 允许用户调整他们的模糊态度（或偏好），促进探索并提高用户控制代理在面对一组看似合理的替代方案时应如何响应的能力。动态航行环境中的模拟表明，具有高熵转换模型的环境如何导致鲁棒方法失败。结果进一步证明了调整模糊态度如何更好地实现目标，同时减轻稳健方法的这种失败模式。由于这种方法是鲁棒框架的概括，因此这些结果进一步证明了专注于模糊性的算法如何在安全关键系统之外具有适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ambiguity Attitude Graph Search (AAGS)的新方法，用于在在线决策中更全面地表示和处理不确定性，允许用户调整对模糊性的态度以优化决策。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒方法在处理不确定性时仅关注安全解，忽略了不确定性表示对决策的影响，导致在高熵环境中可能失效。需引入更灵活的模糊性态度调整机制以提升决策效果。
AI.method: 通过构建Ambiguity Attitude Graph Search (AAGS)框架，将模糊性态度纳入决策模型，允许用户根据偏好调整探索与利用的平衡，扩展了鲁棒方法的适用范围。
AI.result: 在动态航海环境中，AAGS通过调整模糊性态度有效缓解了鲁棒方法的失效问题，同时提升了目标达成能力，验证了其在复杂不确定性场景中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: AAGS通过引入模糊性态度参数，为在线决策提供了更灵活的不确定性处理机制，其应用不仅限于安全关键系统，还可推广至更广泛的决策场景。
