tldr: 本文提出了一种在对抗性多机器人众包传感任务中利用机器人之间信任关系的鲁棒二元假设检验框架，以应对恶意机器人攻击。
motivation: 在多机器人协作任务中，恶意机器人可能数量超过合法机器人，且融合中心仅能获取单次噪声测量值，导致决策易受攻击。
method: 开发了两种算法：Two Stage Approach（2SA）通过信任观测估计机器人合法性，以及Adversarial Generalized Likelihood Ratio Test（A-GLRT）联合估计机器人可信度、报告策略和假设。
result: 在硬件实验中，当恶意机器人占多数时，2SA和A-GLRT将检测错误概率分别降低至30.5%和29%。
conclusion: 利用信任观测的框架能有效降低对抗环境下的检测错误率，实现鲁棒决策，即使恶意机器人占优时仍保持较高可靠性。
search_text: Exploiting Trust for Resilient Hypothesis Testing with Malicious Robots (evolved version) 利用恶意机器人的弹性假设检验信任（进化版） We develop a resilient binary hypothesis testing framework for decision making in adversarial multi-robot crowdsensing tasks. This framework exploits stochastic trust observations between robots to arrive at tractable, resilient decision making at a centralized Fusion Center (FC) even when i) there exist malicious robots in the network and their number may be larger than the number of legitimate robots, and ii) the FC uses one-shot noisy measurements from all robots. We derive two algorithms to achieve this. The first is the Two Stage Approach (2SA) that estimates the legitimacy of robots based on received trust observations, and provably minimizes the probability of detection error in the worst-case malicious attack. Here, the proportion of malicious robots is known but arbitrary. For the case of an unknown proportion of malicious robots, we develop the Adversarial Generalized Likelihood Ratio Test (A-GLRT) that uses both the reported robot measurements and trust observations to estimate the trustworthiness of robots, their reporting strategy, and the correct hypothesis simultaneously. We exploit special problem structure to show that this approach remains computationally tractable despite several unknown problem parameters. We deploy both algorithms in a hardware experiment where a group of robots conducts crowdsensing of traffic conditions on a mock-up road network similar in spirit to Google Maps, subject to a Sybil attack. We extract the trust observations for each robot from actual communication signals which provide statistical information on the uniqueness of the sender. We show that even when the malicious robots are in the majority, the FC can reduce the probability of detection error to 30.5% and 29% for the 2SA and the A-GLRT respectively. 我们开发了一个弹性二元假设检验框架，用于对抗性多机器人众感知任务中的决策。该框架利用机器人之间的随机信任观察，在集中式融合中心 (FC) 中做出易于处理、有弹性的决策，即使 i) 网络中存在恶意机器人且其数量可能大于合法机器人的数量，以及 ii) FC 使用来自所有机器人的一次性噪声测量。我们推导出两种算法来实现这一目标。第一个是两阶段方法（2SA），它根据收到的信任观察来估计机器人的合法性，并可证明最大限度地减少最坏情况恶意攻击中检测错误的概率。这里，恶意机器人的比例是已知的，但是是任意的。对于恶意机器人比例未知的情况，我们开发了对抗性广义似然比测试（A-GLRT），它使用报告的机器人测量值和信任观察来同时估计机器人的可信度、其报告策略和正确的假设。我们利用特殊的问题结构来表明，尽管存在一些未知的问题参数，但这种方法在计算上仍然易于处理。我们在硬件实验中部署了这两种算法，其中一组机器人在类似于 Google 地图的模拟道路网络上对交通状况进行群体感知，并受到 Sybil 攻击。我们从实际通信信号中提取每个机器人的信任观察结果，这些信号提供有关发送者唯一性的统计信息。我们表明，即使恶意机器人占多数，FC 也可以将 2SA 和 A-GLRT 的检测错误概率分别降低至 30.5% 和 29%。 本文提出了一种在对抗性多机器人众包传感任务中利用机器人之间信任关系的鲁棒二元假设检验框架，以应对恶意机器人攻击。 Matthew Cavorsi,Orhan Eren Akgün,Michal Yemini,Andrea Goldsmith,Stephanie Gil cs.RO

title: Flow-Based Integrated Assignment and Path-Finding for Mobile Robot Sorting Systems
title_zh: 基于流的移动机器人分拣系统集成分配和寻路
abstract: Express companies are deploying more robotic sorting systems, where mobile robots are used to sort incoming parcels by destination. In this study, we propose an integrated assignment and path-finding method for robots in such sorting systems. The method has two parts: offline and online. In the offline part, we represent the system as a traffic flow network, develop an approximate delay function using stochastic models, and solve the min-cost network flow problem. In the online part, robots are guided through the system according to the calculated optimal flow split probability. The online calculation of the method is decentralized and has linear complexity. Our method outperforms fast multi-agent path planning algorithms like prioritized planning because such algorithms lead to stochastic user equilibrium traffic assignment. In contrast, our method gives the approximated system-optimal traffic assignment. According to our simulations, our method can achieve 10%--20% higher throughput than zoning or random assignment. We also show that our method is robust even if the initial demand estimation is inaccurate.
summary: Express companies are deploying more robotic sorting systems, where mobile robots are used to sort incoming parcels by destination. In this study, we propose an integrated assignment and path-finding method for robots in such sorting systems. The method has two parts: offline and online. In the offline part, we represent the system as a traffic flow network, develop an approximate delay function using stochastic models, and solve the min-cost network flow problem. In the online part, robots are guided through the system according to the calculated optimal flow split probability. The online calculation of the method is decentralized and has linear complexity. Our method outperforms fast multi-agent path planning algorithms like prioritized planning because such algorithms lead to stochastic user equilibrium traffic assignment. In contrast, our method gives the approximated system-optimal traffic assignment. According to our simulations, our method can achieve 10%--20% higher throughput than zoning or random assignment. We also show that our method is robust even if the initial demand estimation is inaccurate.
abstract_zh: 快递公司正在部署更多的机器人分拣系统，其中移动机器人用于按目的地对传入的包裹进行分类。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种用于此类分拣系统中的机器人的集成分配和路径查找方法。该方法分为离线和在线两部分。在离线部分，我们将系统表示为交通流网络，使用随机模型开发近似延迟函数，并解决最小成本网络流问题。在在线部分，机器人根据计算出的最佳分流概率引导通过系统。该方法的在线计算是分散的并且具有线性复杂度。我们的方法优于快速多代理路径规划算法（例如优先级规划），因为此类算法会导致随机的用户均衡流量分配。相反，我们的方法给出了近似的系统最佳流量分配。根据我们的模拟，我们的方法可以实现比分区或随机分配高 10%--20% 的吞吐量。我们还表明，即使初始需求估计不准确，我们的方法也是稳健的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流量的集成分配与路径规划方法，用于优化移动机器人分拣系统的任务分配与路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有分拣系统中多机器人路径规划算法（如优先规划）易导致随机用户均衡，无法实现系统最优，且吞吐量受限。
AI.method: 离线阶段构建交通流网络模型，结合随机模型求解最小成本流问题；在线阶段通过分布式计算引导机器人按最优流量分割概率移动，算法复杂度为线性。
AI.result: 仿真显示该方法吞吐量比区域划分或随机分配高10%-20%，且对初始需求估计误差具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在系统最优性和计算效率上优于现有算法，适用于实际物流分拣场景。

authors_text: Maureen Daum,Enhao Zhang,Dong He,Stephen Mussmann,Brandon Haynes,Ranjay Krishna,Magdalena Balazinska
title: VOCALExplore: Pay-as-You-Go Video Data Exploration and Model Building [Technical Report]
title_zh: VOCALExplore：按量付费视频数据探索与模型构建【技术报告】
abstract: We introduce VOCALExplore, a system designed to support users in building domain-specific models over video datasets. VOCALExplore supports interactive labeling sessions and trains models using user-supplied labels. VOCALExplore maximizes model quality by automatically deciding how to select samples based on observed skew in the collected labels. It also selects the optimal video representations to use when training models by casting feature selection as a rising bandit problem. Finally, VOCALExplore implements optimizations to achieve low latency without sacrificing model performance. We demonstrate that VOCALExplore achieves close to the best possible model quality given candidate acquisition functions and feature extractors, and it does so with low visible latency (~1 second per iteration) and no expensive preprocessing.
summary: We introduce VOCALExplore, a system designed to support users in building domain-specific models over video datasets. VOCALExplore supports interactive labeling sessions and trains models using user-supplied labels. VOCALExplore maximizes model quality by automatically deciding how to select samples based on observed skew in the collected labels. It also selects the optimal video representations to use when training models by casting feature selection as a rising bandit problem. Finally, VOCALExplore implements optimizations to achieve low latency without sacrificing model performance. We demonstrate that VOCALExplore achieves close to the best possible model quality given candidate acquisition functions and feature extractors, and it does so with low visible latency (~1 second per iteration) and no expensive preprocessing.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 VOCALExplore，这是一个旨在支持用户在视频数据集上构建特定领域模型的系统。 VOCALExplore 支持交互式标签会话并使用用户提供的标签训练模型。 VOCALExplore 通过根据收集的标签中观察到的偏差自动决定如何选择样本，从而最大限度地提高模型质量。它还通过将特征选择视为上升的强盗问题来选择训练模型时使用的最佳视频表示。最后，VOCALExplore 实现了优化，以在不牺牲模型性能的情况下实现低延迟。我们证明了 VOCALExplore 在给定候选采集函数和特征提取器的情况下实现了接近最佳的模型质量，并且它具有较低的可见延迟（每次迭代约 1 秒）并且无需昂贵的预处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VOCALExplore系统，支持用户通过交互式标注构建视频领域模型，并通过自动样本选择和特征优化提升模型质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 视频数据标注成本高且特征选择复杂，传统方法难以平衡模型质量与交互效率，需开发支持动态优化的低延迟系统。
AI.method: 结合交互式标注、基于标签偏差的样本选择策略、将特征选择建模为上升波带问题，并通过优化实现低延迟训练。
AI.result: 在候选函数和特征提取器下接近最优模型质量，每轮迭代延迟约1秒且无需昂贵预处理。
AI.conclusion: VOCALExplore有效平衡了模型性能与交互效率，为视频数据探索提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Haotian Li,Lu Ying,Haidong Zhang,Yingcai Wu,Huamin Qu,Yun Wang
title: Notable: On-the-fly Assistant for Data Storytelling in Computational Notebooks
title_zh: 值得注意的是：在计算笔记本中讲述数据故事的即时助手
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2023)
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2023)
abstract: Computational notebooks are widely used for data analysis. Their interleaved displays of code and execution results (e.g., visualizations) are welcomed since they enable iterative analysis and preserve the exploration process. However, the communication of data findings remains challenging in computational notebooks. Users have to carefully identify useful findings from useless ones, document them with texts and visual embellishments, and then organize them in different tools. Such workflow greatly increases their workload, according to our interviews with practitioners. To address the challenge, we designed Notable to offer on-the-fly assistance for data storytelling in computational notebooks. It provides intelligent support to minimize the work of documenting and organizing data findings and diminishes the cost of switching between data exploration and storytelling. To evaluate Notable, we conducted a user study with 12 data workers. The feedback from user study participants verifies its effectiveness and usability.
summary: Computational notebooks are widely used for data analysis. Their interleaved displays of code and execution results (e.g., visualizations) are welcomed since they enable iterative analysis and preserve the exploration process. However, the communication of data findings remains challenging in computational notebooks. Users have to carefully identify useful findings from useless ones, document them with texts and visual embellishments, and then organize them in different tools. Such workflow greatly increases their workload, according to our interviews with practitioners. To address the challenge, we designed Notable to offer on-the-fly assistance for data storytelling in computational notebooks. It provides intelligent support to minimize the work of documenting and organizing data findings and diminishes the cost of switching between data exploration and storytelling. To evaluate Notable, we conducted a user study with 12 data workers. The feedback from user study participants verifies its effectiveness and usability.
abstract_zh: 计算笔记本广泛用于数据分析。它们对代码和执行结果（例如可视化）的交错显示受到欢迎，因为它们支持迭代分析并保留探索过程。然而，在计算笔记本中数据发现的交流仍然具有挑战性。用户必须仔细区分有用的发现和无用的发现，用文本和视觉装饰记录它们，然后在不同的工具中组织它们。根据我们对从业者的采访，这样的工作流程大大增加了他们的工作量。为了应对这一挑战，我们设计了 Notable，为计算笔记本中的数据讲述提供即时帮助。它提供智能支持，最大限度地减少记录和组织数据发现的工作，并降低在数据探索和讲故事之间切换的成本。为了评估 Notable，我们对 12 名数据工作者进行了一项用户研究。用户研究参与者的反馈验证了其有效性和可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Notable，一个用于计算笔记本中数据讲故事的实时辅助工具，旨在减少用户在数据发现过程中的文档和组织工作量。
AI.motivation: 计算笔记本用户需手动筛选有用数据发现并进行整理，导致工作量大且效率低，现有工具无法有效解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计Notable提供智能支持，通过实时辅助功能减少用户在数据探索与讲故事之间的切换成本及文档工作。
AI.result: 12名数据工作者的用户研究验证了Notable的有效性和可用性，表明其能显著降低用户工作负担。
AI.conclusion: Notable有效解决了计算笔记本中数据讲故事的挑战，提升了数据探索到故事呈现的效率与用户体验。

authors_text: Jiaan Wang,Yunlong Liang,Fandong Meng,Zengkui Sun,Haoxiang Shi,Zhixu Li,Jinan Xu,Jianfeng Qu,Jie Zhou
title: Is ChatGPT a Good NLG Evaluator? A Preliminary Study
title_zh: ChatGPT 是一个好的 NLG 评估器吗？初步研究
comment: Both first authors contributed equally. Technical Report, 11 pages. Accepted to the 4th New Frontiers in Summarization Workshop (NewSumm@EMNLP 2023)
comments: Both first authors contributed equally. Technical Report, 11 pages. Accepted to the 4th New Frontiers in Summarization Workshop (NewSumm@EMNLP 2023)
abstract: Recently, the emergence of ChatGPT has attracted wide attention from the computational linguistics community. Many prior studies have shown that ChatGPT achieves remarkable performance on various NLP tasks in terms of automatic evaluation metrics. However, the ability of ChatGPT to serve as an evaluation metric is still underexplored. Considering assessing the quality of natural language generation (NLG) models is an arduous task and NLG metrics notoriously show their poor correlation with human judgments, we wonder whether ChatGPT is a good NLG evaluation metric. In this report, we provide a preliminary meta-evaluation on ChatGPT to show its reliability as an NLG metric. In detail, we regard ChatGPT as a human evaluator and give task-specific (e.g., summarization) and aspect-specific (e.g., relevance) instruction to prompt ChatGPT to evaluate the generated results of NLG models. We conduct experiments on five NLG meta-evaluation datasets (including summarization, story generation and data-to-text tasks). Experimental results show that compared with previous automatic metrics, ChatGPT achieves state-of-the-art or competitive correlation with human judgments in most cases. In addition, we find that the effectiveness of the ChatGPT evaluator might be influenced by the creation method of the meta-evaluation datasets. For the meta-evaluation datasets which are created greatly depending on the reference and thus are biased, the ChatGPT evaluator might lose its effectiveness. We hope our preliminary study could prompt the emergence of a general-purposed reliable NLG metric.
summary: Recently, the emergence of ChatGPT has attracted wide attention from the computational linguistics community. Many prior studies have shown that ChatGPT achieves remarkable performance on various NLP tasks in terms of automatic evaluation metrics. However, the ability of ChatGPT to serve as an evaluation metric is still underexplored. Considering assessing the quality of natural language generation (NLG) models is an arduous task and NLG metrics notoriously show their poor correlation with human judgments, we wonder whether ChatGPT is a good NLG evaluation metric. In this report, we provide a preliminary meta-evaluation on ChatGPT to show its reliability as an NLG metric. In detail, we regard ChatGPT as a human evaluator and give task-specific (e.g., summarization) and aspect-specific (e.g., relevance) instruction to prompt ChatGPT to evaluate the generated results of NLG models. We conduct experiments on five NLG meta-evaluation datasets (including summarization, story generation and data-to-text tasks). Experimental results show that compared with previous automatic metrics, ChatGPT achieves state-of-the-art or competitive correlation with human judgments in most cases. In addition, we find that the effectiveness of the ChatGPT evaluator might be influenced by the creation method of the meta-evaluation datasets. For the meta-evaluation datasets which are created greatly depending on the reference and thus are biased, the ChatGPT evaluator might lose its effectiveness. We hope our preliminary study could prompt the emergence of a general-purposed reliable NLG metric.
abstract_zh: 最近，ChatGPT的出现引起了计算语言学界的广泛关注。先前的许多研究表明，ChatGPT 在各种 NLP 任务上在自动评估指标方面取得了显着的性能。然而，ChatGPT 作为评估指标的能力仍有待探索。考虑到评估自然语言生成（NLG）模型的质量是一项艰巨的任务，而且众所周知，NLG 指标与人类判断的相关性很差，我们想知道 ChatGPT 是否是一个好的 NLG 评估指标。在本报告中，我们对 ChatGPT 进行了初步元评估，以显示其作为 NLG 指标的可靠性。具体来说，我们将 ChatGPT 视为人类评估者，并给出特定于任务（例如，摘要）和特定方面（例如，相关性）的指令，以提示 ChatGPT 评估 NLG 模型生成的结果。我们在五个 NLG 元评估数据集（包括摘要、故事生成和数据到文本任务）上进行了实验。实验结果表明，与之前的自动指标相比，ChatGPT 在大多数情况下与人类判断实现了最先进的或竞争性的相关性。此外，我们发现 ChatGPT 评估器的有效性可能会受到元评估数据集的创建方法的影响。对于元评估数据集，这些数据集的创建很大程度上依赖于参考，因此存在偏差，ChatGPT 评估器可能会失去其有效性。我们希望我们的初步研究能够促进通用可靠的 NLG 指标的出现。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨ChatGPT作为自然语言生成（NLG）评估指标的可靠性，通过对比其与人类判断的相关性进行初步研究。
AI.motivation: 现有自动评估指标与人类判断相关性较差，而ChatGPT在NLP任务中表现优异，但其作为评估工具的能力尚未被充分验证。
AI.method: 将ChatGPT视为人类评估者，通过任务特定（如摘要）和方面特定（如相关性）指令，评估NLG模型生成结果，并在五个元评估数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: ChatGPT在多数情况下与人类判断的相关性优于传统自动指标，但数据集依赖参考文本时其效果可能下降。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT展现出作为NLG评估指标的潜力，但其有效性受数据集构建方法影响，需进一步研究以实现通用可靠评估。

A Preliminary Study ChatGPT 是一个好的 NLG 评估器吗？初步研究 Recently, the emergence of ChatGPT has attracted wide attention from the computational linguistics community. Many prior studies have shown that ChatGPT achieves remarkable performance on various NLP tasks in terms of automatic evaluation metrics. In detail, we regard ChatGPT as a human evaluator and give task-specific (e.g., summarization) and aspect-specific (e.g., relevance) instruction to prompt ChatGPT to evaluate the generated results of NLG models. We conduct experiments on five NLG meta-evaluation datasets (including summarization, story generation and data-to-text tasks). Experimental results show that compared with previous automatic metrics, ChatGPT achieves state-of-the-art or competitive correlation with human judgments in most cases. In addition, we find that the effectiveness of the ChatGPT evaluator might be influenced by the creation method of the meta-evaluation datasets. For the meta-evaluation datasets which are created greatly depending on the reference and thus are biased, the ChatGPT evaluator might lose its effectiveness. title: System Theoretic View on Uncertainties
title_zh: 关于不确定性的系统论观点
abstract: The complexity of the operating environment and required technologies for highly automated driving is unprecedented. A different type of threat to safe operation besides the fault-error-failure model by Laprie et al. arises in the form of performance limitations. We propose a system theoretic approach to handle these and derive a taxonomy based on uncertainty, i.e. lack of knowledge, as a root cause. Uncertainty is a threat to the dependability of a system, as it limits our ability to assess its dependability properties. We distinguish uncertainties by aleatory (inherent to probabilistic models), epistemic (lack of model parameter knowledge) and ontological (incompleteness of models) in order to determine strategies and methods to cope with them. Analogous to the taxonomy of Laprie et al. we cluster methods into uncertainty prevention (use of elements with well-known behavior, avoiding architectures prone to emergent behavior, restriction of operational design domain, etc.), uncertainty removal (during design time by design of experiment, etc. and after release by field observation, continuous updates, etc.), uncertainty tolerance (use of redundant architectures with diverse uncertainties, uncertainty aware deep learning, etc.) and uncertainty forecasting (estimation of residual uncertainty, etc.).
summary: The complexity of the operating environment and required technologies for highly automated driving is unprecedented. A different type of threat to safe operation besides the fault-error-failure model by Laprie et al. arises in the form of performance limitations. We propose a system theoretic approach to handle these and derive a taxonomy based on uncertainty, i.e. lack of knowledge, as a root cause. Uncertainty is a threat to the dependability of a system, as it limits our ability to assess its dependability properties. We distinguish uncertainties by aleatory (inherent to probabilistic models), epistemic (lack of model parameter knowledge) and ontological (incompleteness of models) in order to determine strategies and methods to cope with them. Analogous to the taxonomy of Laprie et al. we cluster methods into uncertainty prevention (use of elements with well-known behavior, avoiding architectures prone to emergent behavior, restriction of operational design domain, etc.), uncertainty removal (during design time by design of experiment, etc. and after release by field observation, continuous updates, etc.), uncertainty tolerance (use of redundant architectures with diverse uncertainties, uncertainty aware deep learning, etc.) and uncertainty forecasting (estimation of residual uncertainty, etc.).
abstract_zh: 高度自动化驾驶的操作环境和所需技术的复杂性是前所未有的。除了 Laprie 等人的故障-错误-故障模型之外，还有一种对安全运行的不同类型的威胁。以性能限制的形式出现。我们提出了一种系统理论方法来处理这些问题，并基于不确定性（即缺乏知识）作为根本原因得出分类法。不确定性对系统的可靠性构成威胁，因为它限制了我们评估其可靠性属性的能力。我们通过偶然（概率模型固有）、认知（缺乏模型参数知识）和本体（模型的不完整性）来区分不确定性，以确定应对它们的策略和方法。类似于 Laprie 等人的分类法。我们将方法分为不确定性预防（使用具有众所周知行为的元素、避免容易出现突发行为的架构、操作设计领域的限制等）、不确定性消除（在设计期间通过实验设计等以及在发布后通过现场观察、持续更新等）、不确定性容忍（使用具有多种不确定性的冗余架构、不确定性感知深度学习等）和不确定性预测（剩余不确定性的估计等）。

AI.tldr: 提出系统理论方法处理自动驾驶中的不确定性，并建立基于不确定性的分类法。
AI.motivation: 传统故障模型无法应对自动驾驶中的性能限制威胁，需新方法处理不确定性。
AI.method: 通过区分偶然性、认识论和本体论不确定性，提出预防、消除、容忍和预测的应对策略。
AI.result: 构建了基于不确定性的分类法，并提出应对策略以提高系统可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为应对自动驾驶不确定性提供框架，补充传统故障模型，提升系统可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出系统理论方法处理自动驾驶中的不确定性，并建立基于不确定性的分类法。
ai_content.motivation: 传统故障模型无法应对自动驾驶中的性能限制威胁，需新方法处理不确定性。
ai_content.method: 通过区分偶然性、认识论和本体论不确定性，提出预防、消除、容忍和预测的应对策略。
ai_content.result: 构建了基于不确定性的分类法，并提出应对策略以提高系统可靠性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为应对自动驾驶不确定性提供框架，补充传统故障模型，提升系统可靠性。

search_text: System Theoretic View on Uncertainties 关于不确定性的系统论观点 The complexity of the operating environment and required technologies for highly automated driving is unprecedented. A different type of threat to safe operation besides the fault-error-failure model by Laprie et al. arises in the form of performance limitations. We propose a system theoretic approach to handle these and derive a taxonomy based on uncertainty, i.e. lack of knowledge, as a root cause. Uncertainty is a threat to the dependability of a system, as it limits our ability to assess its dependability properties. We distinguish uncertainties by aleatory (inherent to probabilistic models), epistemic (lack of model parameter knowledge) and ontological (incompleteness of models) in order to determine strategies and methods to cope with them. Analogous to the taxonomy of Laprie et al. we cluster methods into uncertainty prevention (use of elements with well-known behavior, avoiding architectures prone to emergent behavior, restriction of operational design domain, etc.), uncertainty removal (during design time by design of experiment, etc. and after release by field observation, continuous updates, etc.), uncertainty tolerance (use of redundant architectures with diverse uncertainties, uncertainty aware deep learning, etc.) and uncertainty forecasting (estimation of residual uncertainty, etc.). 高度自动化驾驶的操作环境和所需技术的复杂性是前所未有的。除了 Laprie 等人的故障-错误-故障模型之外，还有一种对安全运行的不同类型的威胁。以性能限制的形式出现。我们提出了一种系统理论方法来处理这些问题，并基于不确定性（即缺乏知识）作为根本原因得出分类法。不确定性对系统的可靠性构成威胁，因为它限制了我们评估其可靠性属性的能力。我们通过偶然（概率模型固有）、认知（缺乏模型参数知识）和本体（模型的不完整性）来区分不确定性，以确定应对它们的策略和方法。类似于 Laprie 等人的分类法。我们将方法分为不确定性预防（使用具有众所周知行为的元素、避免容易出现突发行为的架构、操作设计领域的限制等）、不确定性消除（在设计期间通过实验设计等以及在发布后通过现场观察、持续更新等）、不确定性容忍（使用具有多种不确定性的冗余架构、不确定性感知深度学习等）和不确定性预测（剩余不确定性的估计等）。 提出系统理论方法处理自动驾驶中的不确定性，并建立基于不确定性的分类法。 Roman Gansch,Ahmad Adee cs.AI,eess.SY

title: Root Cause Identification for Collective Anomalies in Time Series given an Acyclic Summary Causal Graph with Loops
title_zh: 给定带循环的非循环汇总因果图的时间序列中集体异常的根本原因识别
comment: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023, Valencia, Spain
comments: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023, Valencia, Spain
abstract: This paper presents an approach for identifying the root causes of collective anomalies given observational time series and an acyclic summary causal graph which depicts an abstraction of causal relations present in a dynamic system at its normal regime. The paper first shows how the problem of root cause identification can be divided into many independent subproblems by grouping related anomalies using d-separation. Further, it shows how, under this setting, some root causes can be found directly from the graph and from the time of appearance of anomalies. Finally, it shows, how the rest of the root causes can be found by comparing direct effects in the normal and in the anomalous regime. To this end, an adjustment set for identifying direct effects is introduced. Extensive experiments conducted on both simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: This paper presents an approach for identifying the root causes of collective anomalies given observational time series and an acyclic summary causal graph which depicts an abstraction of causal relations present in a dynamic system at its normal regime. The paper first shows how the problem of root cause identification can be divided into many independent subproblems by grouping related anomalies using d-separation. Further, it shows how, under this setting, some root causes can be found directly from the graph and from the time of appearance of anomalies. Finally, it shows, how the rest of the root causes can be found by comparing direct effects in the normal and in the anomalous regime. To this end, an adjustment set for identifying direct effects is introduced. Extensive experiments conducted on both simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在给定观测时间序列和非循环总结因果图的情况下识别集体异常的根本原因的方法，该因果图描绘了正常状态下动态系统中存在的因果关系的抽象。本文首先展示了如何通过使用 d 分离对相关异常进行分组，将根本原因识别问题划分为许多独立的子问题。此外，它还显示了在此设置下如何直接从图表和异常出现的时间找到一些根本原因。最后，它展示了如何通过比较正常和异常状态下的直接影响来找到其余的根本原因。为此，引入了用于识别直接影响的调整集。在模拟和现实数据集上进行的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无环因果图的集体异常根源识别方法，通过观测时间序列和因果图结构分析动态系统的异常根源。
AI.motivation: 动态系统中集体异常的根源识别面临复杂因果关系和多变量关联的挑战，传统方法难以高效定位多源异常的根本原因。
AI.method: 通过d-分离分组相关异常，结合因果图结构直接识别部分根源，并利用调整集比较正常与异常状态下的直接效应以发现剩余根源。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在集体异常根源识别任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于因果图结构和直接效应比较的方法，为动态系统中集体异常的根源识别提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: GMCR: Graph-based Maximum Consensus Estimation for Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: GMCR：基于图的点云配准最大一致性估计
abstract: Point cloud registration is a fundamental and challenging problem for autonomous robots interacting in unstructured environments for applications such as object pose estimation, simultaneous localization and mapping, robot-sensor calibration, and so on. In global correspondence-based point cloud registration, data association is a highly brittle task and commonly produces high amounts of outliers. Failure to reject outliers can lead to errors propagating to downstream perception tasks. Maximum Consensus (MC) is a widely used technique for robust estimation, which is however known to be NP-hard. Exact methods struggle to scale to realistic problem instances, whereas high outlier rates are challenging for approximate methods. To this end, we propose Graph-based Maximum Consensus Registration (GMCR), which is highly robust to outliers and scales to realistic problem instances. We propose novel consensus functions to map the decoupled MC-objective to the graph domain, wherein we find a tight approximation to the maximum consensus set as the maximum clique. The final pose estimate is given in closed-form. We extensively evaluated our proposed GMCR on a synthetic registration benchmark, robotic object localization task, and additionally on a scan matching benchmark. Our proposed method shows high accuracy and time efficiency compared to other state-of-the-art MC methods and compares favorably to other robust registration methods.
summary: Point cloud registration is a fundamental and challenging problem for autonomous robots interacting in unstructured environments for applications such as object pose estimation, simultaneous localization and mapping, robot-sensor calibration, and so on. In global correspondence-based point cloud registration, data association is a highly brittle task and commonly produces high amounts of outliers. Failure to reject outliers can lead to errors propagating to downstream perception tasks. Maximum Consensus (MC) is a widely used technique for robust estimation, which is however known to be NP-hard. Exact methods struggle to scale to realistic problem instances, whereas high outlier rates are challenging for approximate methods. To this end, we propose Graph-based Maximum Consensus Registration (GMCR), which is highly robust to outliers and scales to realistic problem instances. We propose novel consensus functions to map the decoupled MC-objective to the graph domain, wherein we find a tight approximation to the maximum consensus set as the maximum clique. The final pose estimate is given in closed-form. We extensively evaluated our proposed GMCR on a synthetic registration benchmark, robotic object localization task, and additionally on a scan matching benchmark. Our proposed method shows high accuracy and time efficiency compared to other state-of-the-art MC methods and compares favorably to other robust registration methods.
abstract_zh: 对于在非结构化环境中交互的自主机器人来说，点云配准是一个基本且具有挑战性的问题，适用于物体姿态估计、同步定位和建图、机器人传感器校准等应用。在基于全局对应的点云配准中，数据关联是一项非常脆弱的任务，通常会产生大量异常值。未能拒绝异常值可能会导致错误传播到下游感知任务。最大一致性（MC）是一种广泛使用的鲁棒估计技术，但众所周知它是 NP 困难的。精确方法很难扩展到现实的问题实例，而高异常值率对于近似方法来说是一个挑战。为此，我们提出了基于图的最大共识注册（GMCR），它对异常值具有高度鲁棒性，并且可以扩展到现实问题实例。我们提出了新颖的共识函数，将解耦的 MC 目标映射到图域，其中我们找到了最大共识集的紧密近似作为最大团。最终的姿态估计以封闭形式给出。我们在综合配准基准、机器人对象定位任务以及扫描匹配基准上广泛评估了我们提出的 GMCR。与其他最先进的 MC 方法相比，我们提出的方法显示出较高的准确性和时间效率，并且与其他稳健的配准方法相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的最大共识估计（GMCR）方法，用于解决点云配准中的异常值问题，提升注册精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 点云配准中基于全局对应关系的方法易受异常值影响，导致后续感知任务误差传播，而现有最大共识（MC）方法在实际问题中难以兼顾鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.method: 通过构建图域共识函数，将解耦的MC目标映射到图结构中，利用最大团近似最大共识集，最终以闭式形式求解位姿估计。
AI.result: 在合成数据集、机器人目标定位及扫描匹配基准测试中，GMCR相较其他先进方法展现出更高的精度与时间效率。
AI.conclusion: GMCR通过图域建模有效提升了点云配准的鲁棒性与可扩展性，为高异常值场景提供了高效解决方案。

Our proposed method shows high accuracy and time efficiency compared to other state-of-the-art MC methods and compares favorably to other robust registration methods. 对于在非结构化环境中交互的自主机器人来说，点云配准是一个基本且具有挑战性的问题，适用于物体姿态估计、同步定位和建图、机器人传感器校准等应用。在基于全局对应的点云配准中，数据关联是一项非常脆弱的任务，通常会产生大量异常值。未能拒绝异常值可能会导致错误传播到下游感知任务。最大一致性（MC）是一种广泛使用的鲁棒估计技术，但众所周知它是 NP 困难的。精确方法很难扩展到现实的问题实例，而高异常值率对于近似方法来说是一个挑战。为此，我们提出了基于图的最大共识注册（GMCR），它对异常值具有高度鲁棒性，并且可以扩展到现实问题实例。我们提出了新颖的共识函数，将解耦的 MC 目标映射到图域，其中我们找到了最大共识集的紧密近似作为最大团。最终的姿态估计以封闭形式给出。我们在综合配准基准、机器人对象定位任务以及扫描匹配基准上广泛评估了我们提出的 GMCR。与其他最先进的 MC 方法相比，我们提出的方法显示出较高的准确性和时间效率，并且与其他稳健的配准方法相比具有优势。 本文提出了一种基于图的最大共识估计（GMCR）方法，用于解决点云配准中的异常值问题，提升注册精度与效率。 Michael Gentner,Prajval Kumar Murali,Mohsen Kaboli cs.RO

title: PyXAB -- A Python Library for $\mathcal{X}$-Armed Bandit and Online Blackbox Optimization Algorithms
title_zh: PyXAB -- 用于 $\mathcal{X}$-Armed Bandit 和在线黑盒优化算法的 Python 库
abstract: We introduce a Python open-source library for $\mathcal{X}$-armed bandit and online blackbox optimization named PyXAB. PyXAB contains the implementations for more than 10 $\mathcal{X}$-armed bandit algorithms, such as HOO, StoSOO, HCT, and the most recent works GPO and VHCT. PyXAB also provides the most commonly-used synthetic objectives to evaluate the performance of different algorithms and the various choices of the hierarchical partitions on the parameter space. The online documentation for PyXAB includes clear instructions for installation, straight-forward examples, detailed feature descriptions, and a complete reference of the API. PyXAB is released under the MIT license in order to encourage both academic and industrial usage. The library can be directly installed from PyPI with its source code available at https://github.com/WilliamLwj/PyXAB
summary: We introduce a Python open-source library for $\mathcal{X}$-armed bandit and online blackbox optimization named PyXAB. PyXAB contains the implementations for more than 10 $\mathcal{X}$-armed bandit algorithms, such as HOO, StoSOO, HCT, and the most recent works GPO and VHCT. PyXAB also provides the most commonly-used synthetic objectives to evaluate the performance of different algorithms and the various choices of the hierarchical partitions on the parameter space. The online documentation for PyXAB includes clear instructions for installation, straight-forward examples, detailed feature descriptions, and a complete reference of the API. PyXAB is released under the MIT license in order to encourage both academic and industrial usage. The library can be directly installed from PyPI with its source code available at https://github.com/WilliamLwj/PyXAB
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个用于 $\mathcal{X}$ 武装老虎机和在线黑盒优化的 Python 开源库，名为 PyXAB。 PyXAB 包含 10 多种 $\mathcal{X}$ 武装老虎机算法的实现，例如 HOO、StoSOO、HCT 以及最新的作品 GPO 和 VHCT。 PyXAB 还提供了最常用的综合目标来评估不同算法的性能以及参数空间上分层分区的各种选择。 PyXAB 的在线文档包括清晰的安装说明、简单明了的示例、详细的功能描述以及 API 的完整参考。 PyXAB 在 MIT 许可下发布，以鼓励学术和工业使用。该库可以直接从 PyPI 安装，其源代码位于 https://github.com/WilliamLwj/PyXAB

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为PyXAB的Python开源库，用于实现和评估X-armed bandit及在线黑盒优化算法。
AI.motivation: 现有X-armed bandit算法实现分散且缺乏统一工具，难以高效比较和应用，需开发标准化库以促进研究与工业应用。
AI.method: 开发包含10余种X-armed bandit算法（如HOO、GPO等）的Python库，集成合成目标函数、参数空间划分方法及详细文档，并采用MIT许可开放源代码。
AI.result: PyXAB库通过PyPI发布，提供安装指南、示例代码及API文档，支持算法性能评估，源代码在GitHub公开。
AI.conclusion: PyXAB为学术界和工业界提供了高效的X-armed bandit及在线优化算法研究与应用工具，推动相关领域发展。

authors_text: Chia-Sheng Liu,Jia-Fong Yeh,Hao Hsu,Hung-Ting Su,Ming-Sui Lee,Winston H. Hsu
title: BIRD-PCC: Bi-directional Range Image-based Deep LiDAR Point Cloud Compression
title_zh: BIRD-PCC：基于双向范围图像的深度激光雷达点云压缩
abstract: The large amount of data collected by LiDAR sensors brings the issue of LiDAR point cloud compression (PCC). Previous works on LiDAR PCC have used range image representations and followed the predictive coding paradigm to create a basic prototype of a coding framework. However, their prediction methods give an inaccurate result due to the negligence of invalid pixels in range images and the omission of future frames in the time step. Moreover, their handcrafted design of residual coding methods could not fully exploit spatial redundancy. To remedy this, we propose a coding framework BIRD-PCC. Our prediction module is aware of the coordinates of invalid pixels in range images and takes a bidirectional scheme. Also, we introduce a deep-learned residual coding module that can further exploit spatial redundancy within a residual frame. Experiments conducted on SemanticKITTI and KITTI-360 datasets show that BIRD-PCC outperforms other methods in most bitrate conditions and generalizes well to unseen environments.
summary: The large amount of data collected by LiDAR sensors brings the issue of LiDAR point cloud compression (PCC). Previous works on LiDAR PCC have used range image representations and followed the predictive coding paradigm to create a basic prototype of a coding framework. However, their prediction methods give an inaccurate result due to the negligence of invalid pixels in range images and the omission of future frames in the time step. Moreover, their handcrafted design of residual coding methods could not fully exploit spatial redundancy. To remedy this, we propose a coding framework BIRD-PCC. Our prediction module is aware of the coordinates of invalid pixels in range images and takes a bidirectional scheme. Also, we introduce a deep-learned residual coding module that can further exploit spatial redundancy within a residual frame. Experiments conducted on SemanticKITTI and KITTI-360 datasets show that BIRD-PCC outperforms other methods in most bitrate conditions and generalizes well to unseen environments.
abstract_zh: LiDAR传感器收集的大量数据带来了LiDAR点云压缩（PCC）的问题。先前有关 LiDAR PCC 的工作使用了距离图像表示，并遵循预测编码范例来创建编码框架的基本原型。然而，由于忽略了距离图像中的无效像素以及在时间步长中遗漏了未来帧，他们的预测方法给出了不准确的结果。此外，他们手工设计的残差编码方法无法充分利用空间冗余。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个编码框架 BIRD-PCC。我们的预测模块了解范围图像中无效像素的坐标，并采用双向方案。此外，我们引入了深度学习的残差编码模块，可以进一步利用残差帧内的空间冗余。在 SemanticKITTI 和 KITTI-360 数据集上进行的实验表明，BIRD-PCC 在大多数比特率条件下都优于其他方法，并且可以很好地推广到未见过的环境。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于双向范围图像的深度学习LiDAR点云压缩框架BIRD-PCC，以解决现有方法在预测准确性和空间冗余利用上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因忽略无效像素和未来帧导致预测不准确，且手工设计的残差编码未能充分挖掘空间冗余，需改进压缩效率和泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用双向预测模块处理无效像素和未来帧，并引入深度学习残差编码模块以挖掘残差帧中的空间冗余。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和KITTI-360数据集上，BIRD-PCC在多数比特率条件下优于其他方法，且能良好泛化到未见环境。
AI.conclusion: BIRD-PCC通过改进预测和残差编码方法，有效提升了点云压缩性能，验证了其在多种场景下的优越性和泛化能力。

title: DeepSeeColor: Realtime Adaptive Color Correction for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles via Deep Learning Methods
title_zh: DeepSeeColor：通过深度学习方法对自主水下航行器进行实时自适应色彩校正
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Presented at the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Presented at the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Successful applications of complex vision-based behaviours underwater have lagged behind progress in terrestrial and aerial domains. This is largely due to the degraded image quality resulting from the physical phenomena involved in underwater image formation. Spectrally-selective light attenuation drains some colors from underwater images while backscattering adds others, making it challenging to perform vision-based tasks underwater. State-of-the-art methods for underwater color correction optimize the parameters of image formation models to restore the full spectrum of color to underwater imagery. However, these methods have high computational complexity that is unfavourable for realtime use by autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs), as a result of having been primarily designed for offline color correction. Here, we present DeepSeeColor, a novel algorithm that combines a state-of-the-art underwater image formation model with the computational efficiency of deep learning frameworks. In our experiments, we show that DeepSeeColor offers comparable performance to the popular "Sea-Thru" algorithm (Akkaynak & Treibitz, 2019) while being able to rapidly process images at up to 60Hz, thus making it suitable for use onboard AUVs as a preprocessing step to enable more robust vision-based behaviours.
summary: Successful applications of complex vision-based behaviours underwater have lagged behind progress in terrestrial and aerial domains. This is largely due to the degraded image quality resulting from the physical phenomena involved in underwater image formation. Spectrally-selective light attenuation drains some colors from underwater images while backscattering adds others, making it challenging to perform vision-based tasks underwater. State-of-the-art methods for underwater color correction optimize the parameters of image formation models to restore the full spectrum of color to underwater imagery. However, these methods have high computational complexity that is unfavourable for realtime use by autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs), as a result of having been primarily designed for offline color correction. Here, we present DeepSeeColor, a novel algorithm that combines a state-of-the-art underwater image formation model with the computational efficiency of deep learning frameworks. In our experiments, we show that DeepSeeColor offers comparable performance to the popular "Sea-Thru" algorithm (Akkaynak & Treibitz, 2019) while being able to rapidly process images at up to 60Hz, thus making it suitable for use onboard AUVs as a preprocessing step to enable more robust vision-based behaviours.
abstract_zh: 水下复杂的基于视觉的行为的成功应用落后于陆地和空中领域的进展。这主要是由于水下图像形成中涉及的物理现象导致图像质量下降。光谱选择性光衰减会消耗水下图像中的一些颜色，而反向散射会增加其他颜色，这使得在水下执行基于视觉的任务变得具有挑战性。最先进的水下色彩校正方法可优化图像形成模型的参数，以恢复水下图像的全光谱色彩。然而，这些方法的计算复杂度很高，不利于自主水下航行器（AUV）的实时使用，因为这些方法主要是为离线色彩校正而设计的。在这里，我们介绍 DeepSeeColor，这是一种新颖的算法，它将最先进的水下图像形成模型与深度学习框架的计算效率相结合。在我们的实验中，我们表明 DeepSeeColor 提供与流行的“Sea-Thru”算法（Akkaynak & Treibitz，2019）相当的性能，同时能够以高达 60Hz 的频率快速处理图像，从而使其适合使用机载 AUV 作为预处理步骤，以实现更强大的基于视觉的行为。

AI.tldr: 开发适用于自主水下机器人的实时自适应颜色校正算法
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像颜色校正方法计算复杂度高，难以满足自主水下机器人（AUV）的实时性需求
AI.method: 结合先进水下图像形成模型与深度学习框架，提升计算效率
AI.result: 实验显示其性能与Sea-Thru相当，且能以60Hz处理图像，适合AUV实时应用
AI.conclusion: DeepSeeColor有效解决实时颜色校正问题，提升AUV视觉任务的可行性

search_text: DeepSeeColor: Realtime Adaptive Color Correction for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles via Deep Learning Methods DeepSeeColor：通过深度学习方法对自主水下航行器进行实时自适应色彩校正 Successful applications of complex vision-based behaviours underwater have lagged behind progress in terrestrial and aerial domains. This is largely due to the degraded image quality resulting from the physical phenomena involved in underwater image formation. Spectrally-selective light attenuation drains some colors from underwater images while backscattering adds others, making it challenging to perform vision-based tasks underwater. State-of-the-art methods for underwater color correction optimize the parameters of image formation models to restore the full spectrum of color to underwater imagery. However, these methods have high computational complexity that is unfavourable for realtime use by autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs), as a result of having been primarily designed for offline color correction. Here, we present DeepSeeColor, a novel algorithm that combines a state-of-the-art underwater image formation model with the computational efficiency of deep learning frameworks. In our experiments, we show that DeepSeeColor offers comparable performance to the popular "Sea-Thru" algorithm (Akkaynak & Treibitz, 2019) while being able to rapidly process images at up to 60Hz, thus making it suitable for use onboard AUVs as a preprocessing step to enable more robust vision-based behaviours. 水下复杂的基于视觉的行为的成功应用落后于陆地和空中领域的进展。这主要是由于水下图像形成中涉及的物理现象导致图像质量下降。光谱选择性光衰减会消耗水下图像中的一些颜色，而反向散射会增加其他颜色，这使得在水下执行基于视觉的任务变得具有挑战性。最先进的水下色彩校正方法可优化图像形成模型的参数，以恢复水下图像的全光谱色彩。然而，这些方法的计算复杂度很高，不利于自主水下航行器（AUV）的实时使用，因为这些方法主要是为离线色彩校正而设计的。在这里，我们介绍 DeepSeeColor，这是一种新颖的算法，它将最先进的水下图像形成模型与深度学习框架的计算效率相结合。在我们的实验中，我们表明 DeepSeeColor 提供与流行的“Sea-Thru”算法（Akkaynak & Treibitz，2019）相当的性能，同时能够以高达 60Hz 的频率快速处理图像，从而使其适合使用机载 AUV 作为预处理步骤，以实现更强大的基于视觉的行为。 开发适用于自主水下机器人的实时自适应颜色校正算法 Stewart Jamieson,Jonathan P. How,Yogesh Girdhar cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Cross-Tool and Cross-Behavior Perceptual Knowledge Transfer for Grounded Object Recognition
title_zh: 用于接地物体识别的跨工具和跨行为感知知识转移
comment: Under review for 2024 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), May 13 to 17, 2024, Yokohama, Japan
comments: Under review for 2024 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), May 13 to 17, 2024, Yokohama, Japan
abstract: Humans learn about objects via interaction and using multiple perceptions, such as vision, sound, and touch. While vision can provide information about an object's appearance, non-visual sensors, such as audio and haptics, can provide information about its intrinsic properties, such as weight, temperature, hardness, and the object's sound. Using tools to interact with objects can reveal additional object properties that are otherwise hidden (e.g., knives and spoons can be used to examine the properties of food, including its texture and consistency). Robots can use tools to interact with objects and gather information about their implicit properties via non-visual sensors. However, a robot's model for recognizing objects using a tool-mediated behavior does not generalize to a new tool or behavior due to differing observed data distributions. To address this challenge, we propose a framework to enable robots to transfer implicit knowledge about granular objects across different tools and behaviors. The proposed approach learns a shared latent space from multiple robots' contexts produced by respective sensory data while interacting with objects using tools. We collected a dataset using a UR5 robot that performed 5,400 interactions using 6 tools and 6 behaviors on 15 granular objects and tested our method on cross-tool and cross-behavioral transfer tasks. Our results show the less experienced target robot can benefit from the experience gained from the source robot and perform recognition on a set of novel objects. We have released the code, datasets, and additional results: https://github.com/gtatiya/Tool-Knowledge-Transfer.
summary: Humans learn about objects via interaction and using multiple perceptions, such as vision, sound, and touch. While vision can provide information about an object's appearance, non-visual sensors, such as audio and haptics, can provide information about its intrinsic properties, such as weight, temperature, hardness, and the object's sound. Using tools to interact with objects can reveal additional object properties that are otherwise hidden (e.g., knives and spoons can be used to examine the properties of food, including its texture and consistency). Robots can use tools to interact with objects and gather information about their implicit properties via non-visual sensors. However, a robot's model for recognizing objects using a tool-mediated behavior does not generalize to a new tool or behavior due to differing observed data distributions. To address this challenge, we propose a framework to enable robots to transfer implicit knowledge about granular objects across different tools and behaviors. The proposed approach learns a shared latent space from multiple robots' contexts produced by respective sensory data while interacting with objects using tools. We collected a dataset using a UR5 robot that performed 5,400 interactions using 6 tools and 6 behaviors on 15 granular objects and tested our method on cross-tool and cross-behavioral transfer tasks. Our results show the less experienced target robot can benefit from the experience gained from the source robot and perform recognition on a set of novel objects. We have released the code, datasets, and additional results: https://github.com/gtatiya/Tool-Knowledge-Transfer.
abstract_zh: 人类通过交互和使用视觉、声音和触觉等多种感知来了解物体。视觉可以提供有关物体外观的信息，而非视觉传感器（例如音频和触觉）可以提供有关其内在属性的信息，例如重量、温度、硬度和物体的声音。使用工具与物体交互可以揭示其他隐藏的物体属性（例如，刀和勺子可用于检查食物的属性，包括其质地和稠度）。机器人可以使用工具与物体交互，并通过非视觉传感器收集有关其隐式属性的信息。然而，由于观察到的数据分布不同，使用工具介导的行为来识别物体的机器人模型并不能推广到新的工具或行为。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个框架，使机器人能够跨不同的工具和行为传递有关颗粒对象的隐式知识。所提出的方法从多个机器人的上下文中学习共享的潜在空间，该多个机器人的上下文是在使用工具与对象交互时由各自的感官数据产生的。我们使用 UR5 机器人收集了一个数据集，该机器人使用 6 种工具和 6 种行为对 15 个颗粒对象执行了 5,400 次交互，并在跨工具和跨行为转移任务上测试了我们的方法。我们的结果表明，经验较少的目标机器人可以从源机器人获得的经验中受益，并对一组新物体进行识别。我们已经发布了代码、数据集和其他结果：https://github.com/gtatiya/Tool-Knowledge-Transfer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨工具和跨行为的感知知识迁移框架，用于实现基于工具交互的物体识别。
AI.motivation: 人类通过多种感知方式（如视觉、听觉和触觉）来学习物体的属性。然而，机器人在使用工具与物体交互时，其模型往往无法泛化到新的工具或行为，因此需要一种方法来实现跨工具和跨行为的知识迁移。
AI.method: 该方法通过学习多个机器人在使用不同工具和行为与物体交互时的共享潜在空间，实现感知知识的跨工具和跨行为迁移。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，未经验的机器人可以通过从源机器人获取的经验，在新的物体上实现有效的识别。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人在不同工具和行为之间迁移感知知识提供了有效的方法，并在实际数据集上验证了其有效性。

title: Decoupling Skill Learning from Robotic Control for Generalizable Object Manipulation
title_zh: 将技能学习与机器人控制解耦以实现通用对象操作
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Recent works in robotic manipulation through reinforcement learning (RL) or imitation learning (IL) have shown potential for tackling a range of tasks e.g., opening a drawer or a cupboard. However, these techniques generalize poorly to unseen objects. We conjecture that this is due to the high-dimensional action space for joint control. In this paper, we take an alternative approach and separate the task of learning 'what to do' from 'how to do it' i.e., whole-body control. We pose the RL problem as one of determining the skill dynamics for a disembodied virtual manipulator interacting with articulated objects. The whole-body robotic kinematic control is optimized to execute the high-dimensional joint motion to reach the goals in the workspace. It does so by solving a quadratic programming (QP) model with robotic singularity and kinematic constraints. Our experiments on manipulating complex articulated objects show that the proposed approach is more generalizable to unseen objects with large intra-class variations, outperforming previous approaches. The evaluation results indicate that our approach generates more compliant robotic motion and outperforms the pure RL and IL baselines in task success rates. Additional information and videos are available at https://kl-research.github.io/decoupskill
summary: Recent works in robotic manipulation through reinforcement learning (RL) or imitation learning (IL) have shown potential for tackling a range of tasks e.g., opening a drawer or a cupboard. However, these techniques generalize poorly to unseen objects. We conjecture that this is due to the high-dimensional action space for joint control. In this paper, we take an alternative approach and separate the task of learning 'what to do' from 'how to do it' i.e., whole-body control. We pose the RL problem as one of determining the skill dynamics for a disembodied virtual manipulator interacting with articulated objects. The whole-body robotic kinematic control is optimized to execute the high-dimensional joint motion to reach the goals in the workspace. It does so by solving a quadratic programming (QP) model with robotic singularity and kinematic constraints. Our experiments on manipulating complex articulated objects show that the proposed approach is more generalizable to unseen objects with large intra-class variations, outperforming previous approaches. The evaluation results indicate that our approach generates more compliant robotic motion and outperforms the pure RL and IL baselines in task success rates. Additional information and videos are available at https://kl-research.github.io/decoupskill
abstract_zh: 最近通过强化学习（RL）或模仿学习（IL）进行机器人操作的研究已经显示出解决一系列任务的潜力，例如打开抽屉或橱柜。然而，这些技术对于看不见的物体的推广效果很差。我们推测这是由于联合控制的高维动作空间所致。在本文中，我们采取了另一种方法，将学习“做什么”的任务与“如何做”（即全身控制）分开。我们将强化学习问题视为确定与铰接物体交互的无形虚拟操纵器的技能动态问题之一。机器人全身运动学控制经过优化，可以执行高维关节运动，以达到工作空间中的目标。它通过求解具有机器人奇点和运动学约束的二次规划 (QP) 模型来实现这一点。我们操纵复杂铰接对象的实验表明，所提出的方法对于具有较大类内变化的看不见的对象更具有通用性，优于以前的方法。评估结果表明，我们的方法可以生成更顺从的机器人运动，并且在任务成功率方面优于纯 RL 和 IL 基线。更多信息和视频请访问 https://kl-research.github.io/decoupskill

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将技能学习与机器人控制解耦的方法，以提高对复杂物体操作的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习或模仿学习的机器人操作方法在面对未见过的物体时泛化能力差，主要受限于高维动作空间的关节控制问题。
AI.method: 通过分离'做什么'与'怎么做'的任务，使用强化学习学习虚拟机械臂的技能动态，结合二次规划模型优化全身运动控制以满足运动学约束。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在处理具有大类内变化的复杂物体时泛化性更优，任务成功率超过纯强化学习和模仿学习基线，并生成更顺从的机械运动。
AI.conclusion: 解耦技能学习与控制的方法能有效提升机器人操作的泛化性，为复杂物体交互提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Decoupling Skill Learning from Robotic Control for Generalizable Object Manipulation 将技能学习与机器人控制解耦以实现通用对象操作 Recent works in robotic manipulation through reinforcement learning (RL) or imitation learning (IL) have shown potential for tackling a range of tasks e.g., opening a drawer or a cupboard. However, these techniques generalize poorly to unseen objects. We conjecture that this is due to the high-dimensional action space for joint control. In this paper, we take an alternative approach and separate the task of learning 'what to do' from 'how to do it' i.e., whole-body control. We pose the RL problem as one of determining the skill dynamics for a disembodied virtual manipulator interacting with articulated objects. The whole-body robotic kinematic control is optimized to execute the high-dimensional joint motion to reach the goals in the workspace. It does so by solving a quadratic programming (QP) model with robotic singularity and kinematic constraints. Our experiments on manipulating complex articulated objects show that the proposed approach is more generalizable to unseen objects with large intra-class variations, outperforming previous approaches. The evaluation results indicate that our approach generates more compliant robotic motion and outperforms the pure RL and IL baselines in task success rates. Additional information and videos are available at https://kl-research.github.io/decoupskill 最近通过强化学习（RL）或模仿学习（IL）进行机器人操作的研究已经显示出解决一系列任务的潜力，例如打开抽屉或橱柜。然而，这些技术对于看不见的物体的推广效果很差。我们推测这是由于联合控制的高维动作空间所致。在本文中，我们采取了另一种方法，将学习“做什么”的任务与“如何做”（即全身控制）分开。我们将强化学习问题视为确定与铰接物体交互的无形虚拟操纵器的技能动态问题之一。机器人全身运动学控制经过优化，可以执行高维关节运动，以达到工作空间中的目标。它通过求解具有机器人奇点和运动学约束的二次规划 (QP) 模型来实现这一点。我们操纵复杂铰接对象的实验表明，所提出的方法对于具有较大类内变化的看不见的对象更具有通用性，优于以前的方法。评估结果表明，我们的方法可以生成更顺从的机器人运动，并且在任务成功率方面优于纯 RL 和 IL 基线。更多信息和视频请访问 https://kl-research.github.io/decoupskill 本文提出了一种将技能学习与机器人控制解耦的方法，以提高对复杂物体操作的泛化能力。 Kai Lu,Bo Yang,Bing Wang,Andrew Markham cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Exploration via Epistemic Value Estimation
title_zh: 通过认知价值估计进行探索
abstract: How to efficiently explore in reinforcement learning is an open problem. Many exploration algorithms employ the epistemic uncertainty of their own value predictions -- for instance to compute an exploration bonus or upper confidence bound. Unfortunately the required uncertainty is difficult to estimate in general with function approximation. We propose epistemic value estimation (EVE): a recipe that is compatible with sequential decision making and with neural network function approximators. It equips agents with a tractable posterior over all their parameters from which epistemic value uncertainty can be computed efficiently. We use the recipe to derive an epistemic Q-Learning agent and observe competitive performance on a series of benchmarks. Experiments confirm that the EVE recipe facilitates efficient exploration in hard exploration tasks.
summary: How to efficiently explore in reinforcement learning is an open problem. Many exploration algorithms employ the epistemic uncertainty of their own value predictions -- for instance to compute an exploration bonus or upper confidence bound. Unfortunately the required uncertainty is difficult to estimate in general with function approximation. We propose epistemic value estimation (EVE): a recipe that is compatible with sequential decision making and with neural network function approximators. It equips agents with a tractable posterior over all their parameters from which epistemic value uncertainty can be computed efficiently. We use the recipe to derive an epistemic Q-Learning agent and observe competitive performance on a series of benchmarks. Experiments confirm that the EVE recipe facilitates efficient exploration in hard exploration tasks.
abstract_zh: 如何有效地探索强化学习是一个悬而未决的问题。许多探索算法利用其自身价值预测的认知不确定性——例如计算探索奖励或置信上限。不幸的是，通常很难用函数近似来估计所需的不确定性。我们提出认知价值估计（EVE）：一种与顺序决策和神经网络函数逼近器兼容的方法。它为智能体配备了所有参数的易于处理的后验，从中可以有效地计算认知值的不确定性。我们使用该配方来推导认知 Q-Learning 代理，并观察一系列基准的竞争表现。实验证实，EVE 配方有助于在困难的探索任务中进行高效的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EVE的方法，用于在强化学习中通过估计认识价值不确定性来解决高效探索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有探索算法依赖于价值预测的认识不确定性，但使用函数近似时难以有效估计该不确定性，导致探索效率低下。
AI.method: EVE方法通过为智能体参数构建可处理的后验分布，直接计算认识价值不确定性，并将其应用于Q-Learning框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于EVE的智能体在多个基准测试中表现优异，尤其在困难探索任务中展现出高效探索能力。
AI.conclusion: EVE提供了一种兼容神经网络和顺序决策的不确定性估计方案，为强化学习中的探索问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: One-4-All: Neural Potential Fields for Embodied Navigation
title_zh: 一-四-全：具身导航的神经势场
comment: Sacha Morin and Miguel Saavedra-Ruiz contributed equally. Accepted to the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots (IROS 2023)
comments: Sacha Morin and Miguel Saavedra-Ruiz contributed equally. Accepted to the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots (IROS 2023)
abstract: A fundamental task in robotics is to navigate between two locations. In particular, real-world navigation can require long-horizon planning using high-dimensional RGB images, which poses a substantial challenge for end-to-end learning-based approaches. Current semi-parametric methods instead achieve long-horizon navigation by combining learned modules with a topological memory of the environment, often represented as a graph over previously collected images. However, using these graphs in practice requires tuning a number of pruning heuristics. These heuristics are necessary to avoid spurious edges, limit runtime memory usage and maintain reasonably fast graph queries in large environments. In this work, we present One-4-All (O4A), a method leveraging self-supervised and manifold learning to obtain a graph-free, end-to-end navigation pipeline in which the goal is specified as an image. Navigation is achieved by greedily minimizing a potential function defined continuously over image embeddings. Our system is trained offline on non-expert exploration sequences of RGB data and controls, and does not require any depth or pose measurements. We show that O4A can reach long-range goals in 8 simulated Gibson indoor environments and that resulting embeddings are topologically similar to ground truth maps, even if no pose is observed. We further demonstrate successful real-world navigation using a Jackal UGV platform.
summary: A fundamental task in robotics is to navigate between two locations. In particular, real-world navigation can require long-horizon planning using high-dimensional RGB images, which poses a substantial challenge for end-to-end learning-based approaches. Current semi-parametric methods instead achieve long-horizon navigation by combining learned modules with a topological memory of the environment, often represented as a graph over previously collected images. However, using these graphs in practice requires tuning a number of pruning heuristics. These heuristics are necessary to avoid spurious edges, limit runtime memory usage and maintain reasonably fast graph queries in large environments. In this work, we present One-4-All (O4A), a method leveraging self-supervised and manifold learning to obtain a graph-free, end-to-end navigation pipeline in which the goal is specified as an image. Navigation is achieved by greedily minimizing a potential function defined continuously over image embeddings. Our system is trained offline on non-expert exploration sequences of RGB data and controls, and does not require any depth or pose measurements. We show that O4A can reach long-range goals in 8 simulated Gibson indoor environments and that resulting embeddings are topologically similar to ground truth maps, even if no pose is observed. We further demonstrate successful real-world navigation using a Jackal UGV platform.
abstract_zh: 机器人技术的一项基本任务是在两个位置之间导航。特别是，现实世界的导航可能需要使用高维 RGB 图像进行长视野规划，这对基于端到端学习的方法提出了巨大的挑战。目前的半参数方法通过将学习的模块与环境的拓扑记忆相结合来实现长视野导航，通常表示为先前收集的图像上的图形。然而，在实践中使用这些图需要调整一些修剪启发法。这些启发式对于避免虚假边缘、限制运行时内存使用以及在大型环境中保持相当快速的图形查询是必要的。在这项工作中，我们提出了 One-4-All (O4A)，这是一种利用自监督和流形学习来获得无图、端到端导航管道的方法，其中目标被指定为图像。导航是通过贪婪地最小化在图像嵌入上连续定义的势函数来实现的。我们的系统在 RGB 数据和控件的非专家探索序列上进行离线训练，并且不需要任何深度或姿势测量。我们证明，O4A 可以在 8 个模拟吉布森室内环境中实现远程目标，并且即使没有观察到姿势，所得嵌入在拓扑上也与地面实况图相似。我们进一步展示了使用 Jackal UGV 平台成功的现实世界导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需拓扑图结构的端到端机器人导航方法，通过神经势场实现基于图像的长期路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法依赖复杂拓扑图和剪枝启发式规则，导致参数调优困难且难以适应大环境。需开发更简洁的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 提出O4A方法，结合自监督学习与流形学习，通过连续图像嵌入空间中的势函数梯度下降实现导航，无需深度或姿态信息。
AI.result: 在8个Gibson模拟环境和Jackal UGV平台验证了方法有效性，生成的嵌入空间与真实地图具有拓扑一致性。
AI.conclusion: O4A证明了无需拓扑图的端到端导航可行性，为具身导航提供了新的神经势场解决方案方向。

title: Disturbance Estimation for High-Degree-of-Freedom Euler-Lagrangian Systems Using Sliding Mode Observer without Matching Conditions
title_zh: 无匹配条件的滑模观测器高自由度欧拉拉格朗日系统的扰动估计
abstract: This paper proposes a novel observer-based disturbance estimation method for high degree-of-freedom Euler-Lagrangian systems using an unknown input-output (UIO) sliding mode observer (SMO). Different from the previous SMO methods, this approach does not assume the matching condition of the disturbances. Besides, compared to the conventional disturbance estimation methods, the proposed method does not require the calculation of the inverse inertia matrices and accurate measurement of system velocities. This advantage resolves the concerns of heavy computational load and amplified noise for practical problems like external torque estimation of high degree-of-freedom manipulators in safe human-robot collaboration. We achieve this by defining a novel linearized model for the Euler-Lagrangian system and designing a sliding-mode-based disturbance observer. The estimation precision of the observer is ensured by the Lyapunov-based stability proof and the equivalent control theory of sliding mode. At the end of this paper, the method is implemented on a seven-degree-of-freedom robot manipulator, and the experimental results confirm its decent performance and potential to be applied in practice.
summary: This paper proposes a novel observer-based disturbance estimation method for high degree-of-freedom Euler-Lagrangian systems using an unknown input-output (UIO) sliding mode observer (SMO). Different from the previous SMO methods, this approach does not assume the matching condition of the disturbances. Besides, compared to the conventional disturbance estimation methods, the proposed method does not require the calculation of the inverse inertia matrices and accurate measurement of system velocities. This advantage resolves the concerns of heavy computational load and amplified noise for practical problems like external torque estimation of high degree-of-freedom manipulators in safe human-robot collaboration. We achieve this by defining a novel linearized model for the Euler-Lagrangian system and designing a sliding-mode-based disturbance observer. The estimation precision of the observer is ensured by the Lyapunov-based stability proof and the equivalent control theory of sliding mode. At the end of this paper, the method is implemented on a seven-degree-of-freedom robot manipulator, and the experimental results confirm its decent performance and potential to be applied in practice.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于观测器的新型扰动估计方法，用于使用未知输入输出（UIO）滑模观测器（SMO）的高自由度欧拉拉格朗日系统。与以往的SMO方法不同，该方法没有假设扰动的匹配条件。此外，与传统的扰动估计方法相比，该方法不需要计算逆惯性矩阵和精确测量系统速度。这一优势解决了安全人机协作中高自由度机械臂的外部扭矩估计等实际问题中计算量大和噪声放大的问题。我们通过为欧拉-拉格朗日系统定义一个新颖的线性化模型并设计一个基于滑模的扰动观测器来实现这一目标。基于Lyapunov的稳定性证明和滑模等效控制理论保证了观测器的估计精度。本文最后将该方法在七自由度机器人机械臂上实现，实验结果证实了该方法良好的性能和实际应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需匹配条件的滑模观测器方法，用于高自由度欧拉-拉格朗日系统的扰动估计。
AI.motivation: 传统滑模观测器方法依赖匹配条件且需计算惯性矩阵逆和精确速度测量，导致计算负担重和噪声放大问题。
AI.method: 通过定义欧拉-拉格朗日系统的新型线性化模型，并设计基于滑模的扰动观测器，结合李雅普诺夫稳定性证明和滑模等效控制理论确保估计精度。
AI.result: 在七自由度机械臂上实施该方法，实验结果验证了其良好性能和实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需匹配条件和惯性矩阵逆计算，有效解决了高自由度系统扰动估计中的计算和噪声问题，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Disturbance Estimation for High-Degree-of-Freedom Euler-Lagrangian Systems Using Sliding Mode Observer without Matching Conditions 无匹配条件的滑模观测器高自由度欧拉拉格朗日系统的扰动估计 This paper proposes a novel observer-based disturbance estimation method for high degree-of-freedom Euler-Lagrangian systems using an unknown input-output (UIO) sliding mode observer (SMO). Different from the previous SMO methods, this approach does not assume the matching condition of the disturbances. Besides, compared to the conventional disturbance estimation methods, the proposed method does not require the calculation of the inverse inertia matrices and accurate measurement of system velocities. This advantage resolves the concerns of heavy computational load and amplified noise for practical problems like external torque estimation of high degree-of-freedom manipulators in safe human-robot collaboration. We achieve this by defining a novel linearized model for the Euler-Lagrangian system and designing a sliding-mode-based disturbance observer. The estimation precision of the observer is ensured by the Lyapunov-based stability proof and the equivalent control theory of sliding mode. At the end of this paper, the method is implemented on a seven-degree-of-freedom robot manipulator, and the experimental results confirm its decent performance and potential to be applied in practice. 本文提出了一种基于观测器的新型扰动估计方法，用于使用未知输入输出（UIO）滑模观测器（SMO）的高自由度欧拉拉格朗日系统。与以往的SMO方法不同，该方法没有假设扰动的匹配条件。此外，与传统的扰动估计方法相比，该方法不需要计算逆惯性矩阵和精确测量系统速度。这一优势解决了安全人机协作中高自由度机械臂的外部扭矩估计等实际问题中计算量大和噪声放大的问题。我们通过为欧拉-拉格朗日系统定义一个新颖的线性化模型并设计一个基于滑模的扰动观测器来实现这一目标。基于Lyapunov的稳定性证明和滑模等效控制理论保证了观测器的估计精度。本文最后将该方法在七自由度机器人机械臂上实现，实验结果证实了该方法良好的性能和实际应用的潜力。 本文提出了一种无需匹配条件的滑模观测器方法，用于高自由度欧拉-拉格朗日系统的扰动估计。 Zengjie Zhang,Dirk Wollherr cs.RO,eess.SY

title: ELODIN: Naming Concepts in Embedding Spaces
title_zh: ELODIN：嵌入空间中的命名概念
comment: Added quantitative data, fixed formatting issues
comments: Added quantitative data, fixed formatting issues
abstract: Despite recent advancements, the field of text-to-image synthesis still suffers from lack of fine-grained control. Using only text, it remains challenging to deal with issues such as concept coherence and concept contamination. We propose a method to enhance control by generating specific concepts that can be reused throughout multiple images, effectively expanding natural language with new words that can be combined much like a painter's palette. Unlike previous contributions, our method does not copy visuals from input data and can generate concepts through text alone. We perform a set of comparisons that finds our method to be a significant improvement over text-only prompts.
summary: Despite recent advancements, the field of text-to-image synthesis still suffers from lack of fine-grained control. Using only text, it remains challenging to deal with issues such as concept coherence and concept contamination. We propose a method to enhance control by generating specific concepts that can be reused throughout multiple images, effectively expanding natural language with new words that can be combined much like a painter's palette. Unlike previous contributions, our method does not copy visuals from input data and can generate concepts through text alone. We perform a set of comparisons that finds our method to be a significant improvement over text-only prompts.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近取得了进展，文本到图像合成领域仍然缺乏细粒度的控制。仅使用文本来处理概念一致性和概念污染等问题仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了一种方法来增强控制，通过生成可以在多个图像中重复使用的特定概念，使用可以像画家的调色板一样组合的新单词有效地扩展自然语言。与之前的贡献不同，我们的方法不会从输入数据中复制视觉效果，并且可以仅通过文本生成概念。我们进行了一系列比较，发现我们的方法比纯文本提示有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELODIN方法，通过在嵌入空间中生成可复用的文本概念，提升文本到图像合成的细粒度控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像合成技术存在概念不一致和污染问题，难以实现精确的细粒度控制。
AI.method: 通过纯文本生成可组合的新概念，扩展自然语言词汇库，无需复制输入数据的视觉内容。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在概念控制和生成质量上显著优于传统纯文本提示方法。
AI.conclusion: ELODIN为文本到图像合成提供了新的可控性范式，推动了概念级生成技术的发展。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Wenbo Xu,Yunpeng Zhang,Yi Wei,Xu Chi,Yun Ye,Dalong Du,Jiwen Lu,Xingang Wang
title: OpenOccupancy: A Large Scale Benchmark for Surrounding Semantic Occupancy Perception
title_zh: OpenOccupancy：周围语义占用感知的大规模基准
abstract: Semantic occupancy perception is essential for autonomous driving, as automated vehicles require a fine-grained perception of the 3D urban structures. However, existing relevant benchmarks lack diversity in urban scenes, and they only evaluate front-view predictions. Towards a comprehensive benchmarking of surrounding perception algorithms, we propose OpenOccupancy, which is the first surrounding semantic occupancy perception benchmark. In the OpenOccupancy benchmark, we extend the large-scale nuScenes dataset with dense semantic occupancy annotations. Previous annotations rely on LiDAR points superimposition, where some occupancy labels are missed due to sparse LiDAR channels. To mitigate the problem, we introduce the Augmenting And Purifying (AAP) pipeline to ~2x densify the annotations, where ~4000 human hours are involved in the labeling process. Besides, camera-based, LiDAR-based and multi-modal baselines are established for the OpenOccupancy benchmark. Furthermore, considering the complexity of surrounding occupancy perception lies in the computational burden of high-resolution 3D predictions, we propose the Cascade Occupancy Network (CONet) to refine the coarse prediction, which relatively enhances the performance by ~30% than the baseline. We hope the OpenOccupancy benchmark will boost the development of surrounding occupancy perception algorithms.
summary: Semantic occupancy perception is essential for autonomous driving, as automated vehicles require a fine-grained perception of the 3D urban structures. However, existing relevant benchmarks lack diversity in urban scenes, and they only evaluate front-view predictions. Towards a comprehensive benchmarking of surrounding perception algorithms, we propose OpenOccupancy, which is the first surrounding semantic occupancy perception benchmark. In the OpenOccupancy benchmark, we extend the large-scale nuScenes dataset with dense semantic occupancy annotations. Previous annotations rely on LiDAR points superimposition, where some occupancy labels are missed due to sparse LiDAR channels. To mitigate the problem, we introduce the Augmenting And Purifying (AAP) pipeline to ~2x densify the annotations, where ~4000 human hours are involved in the labeling process. Besides, camera-based, LiDAR-based and multi-modal baselines are established for the OpenOccupancy benchmark. Furthermore, considering the complexity of surrounding occupancy perception lies in the computational burden of high-resolution 3D predictions, we propose the Cascade Occupancy Network (CONet) to refine the coarse prediction, which relatively enhances the performance by ~30% than the baseline. We hope the OpenOccupancy benchmark will boost the development of surrounding occupancy perception algorithms.
abstract_zh: 语义占用感知对于自动驾驶至关重要，因为自动驾驶车辆需要对 3D 城市结构进行细粒度感知。然而，现有的相关基准缺乏城市场景的多样性，并且仅评估前视图预测。为了对周围感知算法进行全面的基准测试，我们提出了 OpenOccupancy，这是第一个周围语义占用感知基准测试。在 OpenOccupancy 基准测试中，我们使用密集的语义占用注释扩展了大规模 nuScenes 数据集。以前的注释依赖于激光雷达点叠加，由于激光雷达通道稀疏，一些占用标签被遗漏。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了增强和纯化 (AAP) 管道，将注释密度提高约 2 倍，其中标记过程涉及约 4000 个小时。此外，还为 OpenOccupancy 基准建立了基于摄像头、基于激光雷达和多模态的基线。此外，考虑到周围占用感知的复杂性在于高分辨率 3D 预测的计算负担，我们提出级联占用网络（CONet）来细化粗略预测，这比基线相对提高了约 30% 的性能。我们希望 OpenOccupancy 基准测试能够促进周围占用感知算法的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenOccupancy，首个面向周围语义占用感知的大型基准，扩展了nuScenes数据集并引入AAP标注流程及CONet网络以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏城市场景多样性且仅评估前视预测，难以全面评估周围感知算法，需建立更完善的基准以推动算法发展。
AI.method: 通过AAP流程（结合人工标注与数据增强）将nuScenes数据集标注密度提升2倍，并设计Cascade Occupancy Network（CONet）优化高分辨率3D预测计算负担。
AI.result: AAP流程耗时4000小时完成标注，CONet相较基线模型性能提升约30%，基准包含相机、激光雷达及多模态算法基线。
AI.conclusion: OpenOccupancy基准为周围语义占用感知研究提供新方向，有望加速自动驾驶场景理解算法的创新与优化。

Besides, camera-based, LiDAR-based and multi-modal baselines are established for the OpenOccupancy benchmark. We hope the OpenOccupancy benchmark will boost the development of surrounding occupancy perception algorithms. 语义占用感知对于自动驾驶至关重要，因为自动驾驶车辆需要对 3D 城市结构进行细粒度感知。然而，现有的相关基准缺乏城市场景的多样性，并且仅评估前视图预测。为了对周围感知算法进行全面的基准测试，我们提出了 OpenOccupancy，这是第一个周围语义占用感知基准测试。在 OpenOccupancy 基准测试中，我们使用密集的语义占用注释扩展了大规模 nuScenes 数据集。以前的注释依赖于激光雷达点叠加，由于激光雷达通道稀疏，一些占用标签被遗漏。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了增强和纯化 (AAP) 管道，将注释密度提高约 2 倍，其中标记过程涉及约 4000 个小时。此外，还为 OpenOccupancy 基准建立了基于摄像头、基于激光雷达和多模态的基线。此外，考虑到周围占用感知的复杂性在于高分辨率 3D 预测的计算负担，我们提出级联占用网络（CONet）来细化粗略预测，这比基线相对提高了约 30% 的性能。我们希望 OpenOccupancy 基准测试能够促进周围占用感知算法的发展。 本文提出OpenOccupancy，首个面向周围语义占用感知的大型基准，扩展了nuScenes数据集并引入AAP标注流程及CONet网络以提升性能。 Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Wenbo Xu,Yunpeng Zhang,Yi Wei,Xu Chi,Yun Ye,Dalong Du,Jiwen Lu,Xingang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhimeng Zhang,Zhipeng Hu,Wenjin Deng,Changjie Fan,Tangjie Lv,Yu Ding
title: DINet: Deformation Inpainting Network for Realistic Face Visually Dubbing on High Resolution Video
title_zh: DINet：用于高分辨率视频上真实面部视觉配音的变形修复网络
abstract: For few-shot learning, it is still a critical challenge to realize photo-realistic face visually dubbing on high-resolution videos. Previous works fail to generate high-fidelity dubbing results. To address the above problem, this paper proposes a Deformation Inpainting Network (DINet) for high-resolution face visually dubbing. Different from previous works relying on multiple up-sample layers to directly generate pixels from latent embeddings, DINet performs spatial deformation on feature maps of reference images to better preserve high-frequency textural details. Specifically, DINet consists of one deformation part and one inpainting part. In the first part, five reference facial images adaptively perform spatial deformation to create deformed feature maps encoding mouth shapes at each frame, in order to align with the input driving audio and also the head poses of the input source images. In the second part, to produce face visually dubbing, a feature decoder is responsible for adaptively incorporating mouth movements from the deformed feature maps and other attributes (i.e., head pose and upper facial expression) from the source feature maps together. Finally, DINet achieves face visually dubbing with rich textural details. We conduct qualitative and quantitative comparisons to validate our DINet on high-resolution videos. The experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art works.
summary: For few-shot learning, it is still a critical challenge to realize photo-realistic face visually dubbing on high-resolution videos. Previous works fail to generate high-fidelity dubbing results. To address the above problem, this paper proposes a Deformation Inpainting Network (DINet) for high-resolution face visually dubbing. Different from previous works relying on multiple up-sample layers to directly generate pixels from latent embeddings, DINet performs spatial deformation on feature maps of reference images to better preserve high-frequency textural details. Specifically, DINet consists of one deformation part and one inpainting part. In the first part, five reference facial images adaptively perform spatial deformation to create deformed feature maps encoding mouth shapes at each frame, in order to align with the input driving audio and also the head poses of the input source images. In the second part, to produce face visually dubbing, a feature decoder is responsible for adaptively incorporating mouth movements from the deformed feature maps and other attributes (i.e., head pose and upper facial expression) from the source feature maps together. Finally, DINet achieves face visually dubbing with rich textural details. We conduct qualitative and quantitative comparisons to validate our DINet on high-resolution videos. The experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art works.
abstract_zh: 对于少镜头学习来说，在高分辨率视频上实现逼真的人脸视觉配音仍然是一个严峻的挑战。以往的作品未能产生高保真的配音效果。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种用于高分辨率人脸视觉配音的变形修复网络（DINet）。与之前依赖多个上采样层直接从潜在嵌入生成像素的工作不同，DINet 对参考图像的特征图进行空间变形，以更好地保留高频纹理细节。具体来说，DINet由1个变形部分和1个修复部分组成。在第一部分中，五个参考面部图像自适应地执行空间变形，以创建编码每帧嘴部形状的变形特征图，以便与输入驱动音频以及输入源图像的头部姿势对齐。在第二部分中，为了产生面部视觉配音，特征解码器负责自适应地将来自变形特征图的嘴部运动和来自源特征图的其他属性（即头部姿势和上面部表情）合并在一起。最后，DINet实现了具有丰富纹理细节的人脸视觉配音。我们进行定性和定量比较，以在高分辨率视频上验证我们的 DINet。实验结果表明我们的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DINet网络，用于在高分辨率视频中实现逼真的面部视觉配音。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高分辨率视频上生成高保真面部视觉配音效果不足，需解决纹理细节保留与动作对齐问题。
AI.method: DINet包含变形模块和补全模块：变形模块通过五帧参考图像自适应生成编码口型的变形特征图；补全模块融合变形特征图的口部运动与源图像的头部姿态及面部表情特征。
AI.result: 在高分辨率视频数据集上，DINet在视觉质量和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DINet通过特征空间变形与多属性融合策略，有效提升了高分辨率视频面部视觉配音的逼真度。

authors_text: Adam N. McCaughan,Bakhrom G. Oripov,Natesh Ganesh,Sae Woo Nam,Andrew Dienstfrey,Sonia M. Buckley
title: Multiplexed gradient descent: Fast online training of modern datasets on hardware neural networks without backpropagation
title_zh: 多重梯度下降：在硬件神经网络上快速在线训练现代数据集，无需反向传播
abstract: We present multiplexed gradient descent (MGD), a gradient descent framework designed to easily train analog or digital neural networks in hardware. MGD utilizes zero-order optimization techniques for online training of hardware neural networks. We demonstrate its ability to train neural networks on modern machine learning datasets, including CIFAR-10 and Fashion-MNIST, and compare its performance to backpropagation. Assuming realistic timescales and hardware parameters, our results indicate that these optimization techniques can train a network on emerging hardware platforms orders of magnitude faster than the wall-clock time of training via backpropagation on a standard GPU, even in the presence of imperfect weight updates or device-to-device variations in the hardware. We additionally describe how it can be applied to existing hardware as part of chip-in-the-loop training, or integrated directly at the hardware level. Crucially, the MGD framework is highly flexible, and its gradient descent process can be optimized to compensate for specific hardware limitations such as slow parameter-update speeds or limited input bandwidth.
summary: We present multiplexed gradient descent (MGD), a gradient descent framework designed to easily train analog or digital neural networks in hardware. MGD utilizes zero-order optimization techniques for online training of hardware neural networks. We demonstrate its ability to train neural networks on modern machine learning datasets, including CIFAR-10 and Fashion-MNIST, and compare its performance to backpropagation. Assuming realistic timescales and hardware parameters, our results indicate that these optimization techniques can train a network on emerging hardware platforms orders of magnitude faster than the wall-clock time of training via backpropagation on a standard GPU, even in the presence of imperfect weight updates or device-to-device variations in the hardware. We additionally describe how it can be applied to existing hardware as part of chip-in-the-loop training, or integrated directly at the hardware level. Crucially, the MGD framework is highly flexible, and its gradient descent process can be optimized to compensate for specific hardware limitations such as slow parameter-update speeds or limited input bandwidth.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了多路复用梯度下降（MGD），这是一种梯度下降框架，旨在轻松地在硬件中训练模拟或数字神经网络。 MGD 利用零阶优化技术进行硬件神经网络的在线训练。我们展示了它在现代机器学习数据集（包括 CIFAR-10 和 Fashion-MNIST）上训练神经网络的能力，并将其性能与反向传播进行比较。假设现实的时间尺度和硬件参数，我们的结果表明，即使在硬件中存在不完美的权重更新或设备间差异的情况下，这些优化技术也可以在新兴硬件平台上训练网络，其速度比通过标准 GPU 上的反向传播进行训练的挂钟时间要快几个数量级。我们还描述了如何将其作为芯片在环训练的一部分应用于现有硬件，或直接在硬件级别集成。至关重要的是，MGD 框架高度灵活，并且可以优化其梯度下降过程，以补偿特定的硬件限制，例如参数更新速度慢或输入带宽有限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需反向传播的在线训练框架——多路梯度下降（MGD），用于在硬件神经网络上高效训练现代数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播在硬件神经网络中面临参数更新延迟、设备差异等限制，需开发适应硬件特性的新型优化方法。
AI.method: 基于零阶优化技术的多路梯度下降（MGD）框架，通过灵活调整梯度下降过程补偿硬件限制，支持芯片在环训练或硬件级集成。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和Fashion-MNIST数据集上，MGD在现实硬件参数下比GPU反向传播快多个数量级，且对硬件不完美特性具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MGD框架为硬件神经网络提供了高效、灵活的训练方案，可显著加速新兴硬件平台的模型训练过程。
