authors_text: Anne Kathrine Petersen Bach,Trine Munch Nørgaard,Jens Christian Brok,Niels van Berkel
title: "If I Had All the Time in the World": Ophthalmologists' Perceptions of Anchoring Bias Mitigation in Clinical AI Support
title_zh: “如果我有世界上所有的时间”：眼科医生对临床人工智能支持中锚定偏差缓解的看法
abstract: Clinical needs and technological advances have resulted in increased use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in clinical decision support. However, such support can introduce new and amplify existing cognitive biases. Through contextual inquiry and interviews, we set out to understand the use of an existing AI support system by ophthalmologists. We identified concerns regarding anchoring bias and a misunderstanding of the AI's capabilities. Following, we evaluated clinicians' perceptions of three bias mitigation strategies as integrated into their existing decision support system. While clinicians recognised the danger of anchoring bias, we identified a concern around the impact of bias mitigation on procedure time. Our participants were divided in their expectations of any positive impact on diagnostic accuracy, stemming from varying reliance on the decision support. Our results provide insights into the challenges of integrating bias mitigation into AI decision support.
summary: Clinical needs and technological advances have resulted in increased use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in clinical decision support. However, such support can introduce new and amplify existing cognitive biases. Through contextual inquiry and interviews, we set out to understand the use of an existing AI support system by ophthalmologists. We identified concerns regarding anchoring bias and a misunderstanding of the AI's capabilities. Following, we evaluated clinicians' perceptions of three bias mitigation strategies as integrated into their existing decision support system. While clinicians recognised the danger of anchoring bias, we identified a concern around the impact of bias mitigation on procedure time. Our participants were divided in their expectations of any positive impact on diagnostic accuracy, stemming from varying reliance on the decision support. Our results provide insights into the challenges of integrating bias mitigation into AI decision support.
abstract_zh: 临床需求和技术进步导致人工智能 (AI) 在临床决策支持中的使用增加。然而，这种支持可能会引入新的认知偏差并放大现有的认知偏差。通过情境调查和访谈，我们着手了解眼科医生对现有人工智能支持系统的使用情况。我们发现了对锚定偏见和对人工智能能力的误解的担忧。接下来，我们评估了临床医生对整合到现有决策支持系统中的三种偏见缓解策略的看法。虽然临床医生认识到锚定偏见的危险，但我们也担心减轻偏见对手术时间的影响。由于对决策支持的依赖程度不同，我们的参与者对诊断准确性产生积极影响的期望存在分歧。我们的研究结果让我们深入了解将偏见缓解整合到人工智能决策支持中所面临的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了眼科医生在使用AI辅助诊断时对锚定偏差缓解策略的看法及面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在临床决策中的应用增加，认知偏差（如锚定偏差）可能被引入或放大，需了解医生对缓解策略的看法以优化AI系统。
AI.method: 通过情境调查和访谈，分析眼科医生对现有AI系统的使用情况，并评估三种偏差缓解策略的整合效果。
AI.result: 医生虽认可锚定偏差的风险，但担忧缓解策略会增加流程时间，且对诊断准确性的提升效果存在分歧。
AI.conclusion: 整合偏差缓解策略需平衡流程效率与诊断准确性，需进一步研究以优化AI临床支持系统。

search_text: "If I Had All the Time in the World": Ophthalmologists' Perceptions of Anchoring Bias Mitigation in Clinical AI Support “如果我有世界上所有的时间”：眼科医生对临床人工智能支持中锚定偏差缓解的看法 Clinical needs and technological advances have resulted in increased use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in clinical decision support. However, such support can introduce new and amplify existing cognitive biases. Through contextual inquiry and interviews, we set out to understand the use of an existing AI support system by ophthalmologists. We identified concerns regarding anchoring bias and a misunderstanding of the AI's capabilities. Following, we evaluated clinicians' perceptions of three bias mitigation strategies as integrated into their existing decision support system. While clinicians recognised the danger of anchoring bias, we identified a concern around the impact of bias mitigation on procedure time. Our participants were divided in their expectations of any positive impact on diagnostic accuracy, stemming from varying reliance on the decision support. Our results provide insights into the challenges of integrating bias mitigation into AI decision support. 临床需求和技术进步导致人工智能 (AI) 在临床决策支持中的使用增加。然而，这种支持可能会引入新的认知偏差并放大现有的认知偏差。通过情境调查和访谈，我们着手了解眼科医生对现有人工智能支持系统的使用情况。我们发现了对锚定偏见和对人工智能能力的误解的担忧。接下来，我们评估了临床医生对整合到现有决策支持系统中的三种偏见缓解策略的看法。虽然临床医生认识到锚定偏见的危险，但我们也担心减轻偏见对手术时间的影响。由于对决策支持的依赖程度不同，我们的参与者对诊断准确性产生积极影响的期望存在分歧。我们的研究结果让我们深入了解将偏见缓解整合到人工智能决策支持中所面临的挑战。 本文研究了眼科医生在使用AI辅助诊断时对锚定偏差缓解策略的看法及面临的挑战。 Anne Kathrine Petersen Bach,Trine Munch Nørgaard,Jens Christian Brok,Niels van Berkel cs.HC

authors_text: Jaewon Lee,Injae Kim,Hwan Heo,Hyunwoo J. Kim
title: Semantic-aware Occlusion Filtering Neural Radiance Fields in the Wild
title_zh: 语义感知遮挡过滤野外神经辐射场
abstract: We present a learning framework for reconstructing neural scene representations from a small number of unconstrained tourist photos. Since each image contains transient occluders, decomposing the static and transient components is necessary to construct radiance fields with such in-the-wild photographs where existing methods require a lot of training data. We introduce SF-NeRF, aiming to disentangle those two components with only a few images given, which exploits semantic information without any supervision. The proposed method contains an occlusion filtering module that predicts the transient color and its opacity for each pixel, which enables the NeRF model to solely learn the static scene representation. This filtering module learns the transient phenomena guided by pixel-wise semantic features obtained by a trainable image encoder that can be trained across multiple scenes to learn the prior of transient objects. Furthermore, we present two techniques to prevent ambiguous decomposition and noisy results of the filtering module. We demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art novel view synthesis methods on Phototourism dataset in a few-shot setting.
summary: We present a learning framework for reconstructing neural scene representations from a small number of unconstrained tourist photos. Since each image contains transient occluders, decomposing the static and transient components is necessary to construct radiance fields with such in-the-wild photographs where existing methods require a lot of training data. We introduce SF-NeRF, aiming to disentangle those two components with only a few images given, which exploits semantic information without any supervision. The proposed method contains an occlusion filtering module that predicts the transient color and its opacity for each pixel, which enables the NeRF model to solely learn the static scene representation. This filtering module learns the transient phenomena guided by pixel-wise semantic features obtained by a trainable image encoder that can be trained across multiple scenes to learn the prior of transient objects. Furthermore, we present two techniques to prevent ambiguous decomposition and noisy results of the filtering module. We demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art novel view synthesis methods on Phototourism dataset in a few-shot setting.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个学习框架，用于从少量不受约束的旅游照片中重建神经场景表示。由于每个图像都包含瞬态遮挡物，因此需要分解静态和瞬态分量才能使用此类野外照片构建辐射场，而现有方法需要大量训练数据。我们引入 SF-NeRF，旨在仅用给出的少量图像来解开这两个组件，它在没有任何监督的情况下利用语义信息。该方法包含一个遮挡过滤模块，可以预测每个像素的瞬态颜色及其不透明度，这使得 NeRF 模型能够单独学习静态场景表示。该过滤模块学习由可训练图像编码器获得的逐像素语义特征引导的瞬态现象，该编码器可以跨多个场景进行训练以学习瞬态对象的先验。此外，我们提出了两种技术来防止过滤模块的模糊分解和噪声结果。我们证明，我们的方法在几次拍摄设置中优于摄影旅游数据集上最先进的新颖视图合成方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从少量非受限游客照片中重建神经场景表示的学习框架，通过分离静态和动态遮挡物来构建辐射场。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理真实场景照片时需大量训练数据且难以处理动态遮挡物，需开发一种无需监督即可利用语义信息分离静态与动态成分的方法。
AI.method: 引入SF-NeRF框架，包含语义感知的遮挡过滤模块，通过可训练图像编码器获取像素级语义特征，预测动态颜色与透明度，使NeRF仅学习静态场景，并采用两项技术减少分解模糊性与噪声。
AI.result: 在Phototourism数据集的少样本设置中，该方法优于现有最先进的新视角合成方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义信息有效处理真实场景中的遮挡问题，为少样本神经辐射场研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: William Trung Le,Chulmin Bang,Philippine Cordelle,Daniel Markel,Phuc Felix Nguyen-Tan,Houda Bahig,Samuel Kadoury
title: Comparing 3D deformations between longitudinal daily CBCT acquisitions using CNN for head and neck radiotherapy toxicity prediction
title_zh: 使用 CNN 比较每日纵向 CBCT 采集之间的 3D 变形，用于头颈部放射治疗毒性预测
abstract: Adaptive radiotherapy is a growing field of study in cancer treatment due to it's objective in sparing healthy tissue. The standard of care in several institutions includes longitudinal cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) acquisitions to monitor changes, but have yet to be used to improve tumor control while managing side-effects. The aim of this study is to demonstrate the clinical value of pre-treatment CBCT acquired daily during radiation therapy treatment for head and neck cancers for the downstream task of predicting severe toxicity occurrence: reactive feeding tube (NG), hospitalization and radionecrosis. For this, we propose a deformable 3D classification pipeline that includes a component analyzing the Jacobian matrix of the deformation between planning CT and longitudinal CBCT, as well as clinical data. The model is based on a multi-branch 3D residual convolutional neural network, while the CT to CBCT registration is based on a pair of VoxelMorph architectures. Accuracies of 85.8% and 75.3% was found for radionecrosis and hospitalization, respectively, with similar performance as early as after the first week of treatment. For NG tube risk, performance improves with increasing the timing of the CBCT fraction, reaching 83.1% after the $5_{th}$ week of treatment.
summary: Adaptive radiotherapy is a growing field of study in cancer treatment due to it's objective in sparing healthy tissue. The standard of care in several institutions includes longitudinal cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) acquisitions to monitor changes, but have yet to be used to improve tumor control while managing side-effects. The aim of this study is to demonstrate the clinical value of pre-treatment CBCT acquired daily during radiation therapy treatment for head and neck cancers for the downstream task of predicting severe toxicity occurrence: reactive feeding tube (NG), hospitalization and radionecrosis. For this, we propose a deformable 3D classification pipeline that includes a component analyzing the Jacobian matrix of the deformation between planning CT and longitudinal CBCT, as well as clinical data. The model is based on a multi-branch 3D residual convolutional neural network, while the CT to CBCT registration is based on a pair of VoxelMorph architectures. Accuracies of 85.8% and 75.3% was found for radionecrosis and hospitalization, respectively, with similar performance as early as after the first week of treatment. For NG tube risk, performance improves with increasing the timing of the CBCT fraction, reaching 83.1% after the $5_{th}$ week of treatment.
abstract_zh: 适应性放射治疗是癌症治疗中一个不断发展的研究领域，因为它的目标是保护健康组织。一些机构的护理标准包括使用纵向锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 来监测变化，但尚未用于在管理副作用的同时改善肿瘤控制。本研究的目的是证明头颈癌放射治疗期间每天采集的治疗前 CBCT 对于预测严重毒性发生的下游任务：反应性饲管 (NG)、住院和放射性坏死的临床价值。为此，我们提出了一种可变形 3D 分类流程，其中包括一个分析计划 CT 和纵向 CBCT 之间变形的雅可比矩阵以及临床数据的组件。该模型基于多分支 3D 残差卷积神经网络，而 CT 到 CBCT 配准基于一对 VoxelMorph 架构。放射性坏死和住院治疗的准确率分别为 85.8% 和 75.3%，早在治疗第一周后就具有相似的表现。对于 NG 管风险，随着 CBCT 分数时间的增加，表现会有所改善，在治疗 5_{th}$ 周后达到 83.1%。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用卷积神经网络（CNN）比较头颈癌放疗过程中每日锥形束CT（CBCT）的3D形变，以预测严重毒性反应。
AI.motivation: 自适应放疗旨在保护健康组织，但现有方法尚未有效利用纵向CBCT数据预测副作用，需改进肿瘤控制与副作用管理。
AI.method: 设计可变形3D分类框架，结合规划CT与纵向CBCT间的形变雅可比矩阵分析及临床数据，采用多分支3D残差CNN与VoxelMorph注册模型。
AI.result: 预测放射性坏死和住院的准确率分别为85.8%和75.3%，第5周后鼻胃管风险预测准确率达83.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能早期有效预测毒性反应，为放疗适应性调整提供临床依据。

search_text: Comparing 3D deformations between longitudinal daily CBCT acquisitions using CNN for head and neck radiotherapy toxicity prediction 使用 CNN 比较每日纵向 CBCT 采集之间的 3D 变形，用于头颈部放射治疗毒性预测 Adaptive radiotherapy is a growing field of study in cancer treatment due to it's objective in sparing healthy tissue. The standard of care in several institutions includes longitudinal cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) acquisitions to monitor changes, but have yet to be used to improve tumor control while managing side-effects. The aim of this study is to demonstrate the clinical value of pre-treatment CBCT acquired daily during radiation therapy treatment for head and neck cancers for the downstream task of predicting severe toxicity occurrence: reactive feeding tube (NG), hospitalization and radionecrosis. For this, we propose a deformable 3D classification pipeline that includes a component analyzing the Jacobian matrix of the deformation between planning CT and longitudinal CBCT, as well as clinical data. The model is based on a multi-branch 3D residual convolutional neural network, while the CT to CBCT registration is based on a pair of VoxelMorph architectures. Accuracies of 85.8% and 75.3% was found for radionecrosis and hospitalization, respectively, with similar performance as early as after the first week of treatment. For NG tube risk, performance improves with increasing the timing of the CBCT fraction, reaching 83.1% after the $5_{th}$ week of treatment. 适应性放射治疗是癌症治疗中一个不断发展的研究领域，因为它的目标是保护健康组织。一些机构的护理标准包括使用纵向锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 来监测变化，但尚未用于在管理副作用的同时改善肿瘤控制。本研究的目的是证明头颈癌放射治疗期间每天采集的治疗前 CBCT 对于预测严重毒性发生的下游任务：反应性饲管 (NG)、住院和放射性坏死的临床价值。为此，我们提出了一种可变形 3D 分类流程，其中包括一个分析计划 CT 和纵向 CBCT 之间变形的雅可比矩阵以及临床数据的组件。该模型基于多分支 3D 残差卷积神经网络，而 CT 到 CBCT 配准基于一对 VoxelMorph 架构。放射性坏死和住院治疗的准确率分别为 85.8% 和 75.3%，早在治疗第一周后就具有相似的表现。对于 NG 管风险，随着 CBCT 分数时间的增加，表现会有所改善，在治疗 5_{th}$ 周后达到 83.1%。 该论文提出利用卷积神经网络（CNN）比较头颈癌放疗过程中每日锥形束CT（CBCT）的3D形变，以预测严重毒性反应。 William Trung Le,Chulmin Bang,Philippine Cordelle,Daniel Markel,Phuc Felix Nguyen-Tan,Houda Bahig,Samuel Kadoury cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Fahai Zhong,Mingliang Xue,Jian Zhang,Fan Zhang,Rui Ban,Oliver Deussen,Yunhai Wang
title: Force-Directed Graph Layouts Revisited: A New Force Based on the T-Distribution
title_zh: 重新审视力导向图布局：基于 T 分布的新力
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: In this paper, we propose the t-FDP model, a force-directed placement method based on a novel bounded short-range force (t-force) defined by Student's t-distribution. Our formulation is flexible, exerts limited repulsive forces for nearby nodes and can be adapted separately in its short- and long-range effects. Using such forces in force-directed graph layouts yields better neighborhood preservation than current methods, while maintaining low stress errors. Our efficient implementation using a Fast Fourier Transform is one order of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art methods and two orders faster on the GPU, enabling us to perform parameter tuning by globally and locally adjusting the t-force in real-time for complex graphs. We demonstrate the quality of our approach by numerical evaluation against state-of-the-art approaches and extensions for interactive exploration.
summary: In this paper, we propose the t-FDP model, a force-directed placement method based on a novel bounded short-range force (t-force) defined by Student's t-distribution. Our formulation is flexible, exerts limited repulsive forces for nearby nodes and can be adapted separately in its short- and long-range effects. Using such forces in force-directed graph layouts yields better neighborhood preservation than current methods, while maintaining low stress errors. Our efficient implementation using a Fast Fourier Transform is one order of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art methods and two orders faster on the GPU, enabling us to perform parameter tuning by globally and locally adjusting the t-force in real-time for complex graphs. We demonstrate the quality of our approach by numerical evaluation against state-of-the-art approaches and extensions for interactive exploration.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 t-FDP 模型，这是一种基于由学生 t 分布定义的新型有界短程力（t 力）的力导向放置方法。我们的公式很灵活，对附近节点施加有限的排斥力，并且可以单独调整其短期和长期影响。在力导向图布局中使用此类力可以比当前方法产生更好的邻域保留，同时保持较低的应力误差。我们使用快速傅里叶变换的高效实现比最先进的方法快一个数量级，在 GPU 上快两个数量级，使我们能够通过全局和局部实时调整复杂图形的 t-force 来执行参数调整。我们通过针对最先进的方法和交互式探索的扩展的数值评估来展示我们方法的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Student's t分布的新型短程力模型t-FDP，改进力导向图布局算法的性能与效果。
AI.motivation: 现有力导向布局方法在保持邻近节点结构和计算效率之间存在矛盾，需探索更优的力模型与计算方案。
AI.method: 定义由t分布衍生的短程排斥力，结合FFT加速计算，并通过GPU并行优化实现实时参数调整。
AI.result: 相较现有方法提速10倍（GPU下达100倍），保持更低应力误差且显著提升邻域结构保真度。
AI.conclusion: t-FDP模型在计算效率与布局质量上均优于现有技术，为复杂图的实时交互探索提供新方案。

title: Cops and Robbers on Multi-Layer Graphs
title_zh: 多层图上的警察和强盗
comment: 30 pages, 6 figures. Latest version contains a strengthening of Theorem 6.2
comments: 30 pages, 6 figures. Latest version contains a strengthening of Theorem 6.2
abstract: We generalise the popular cops and robbers game to multi-layer graphs, where each cop and the robber are restricted to a single layer (or set of edges). We show that initial intuition about the best way to allocate cops to layers is not always correct, and prove that the multi-layer cop number is neither bounded from above nor below by any increasing function of the cop numbers of the individual layers. We determine that it is NP-hard to decide if $k$ cops are sufficient to catch the robber, even if every cop layer is a tree and a set of isolated vertices. However, we give a polynomial time algorithm to determine if $k$ cops can win when the robber layer is a tree. Additionally, we investigate a question of worst-case divisions of a simple graph into layers: given a simple graph $G$, what is the maximum number of cops required to catch a robber over all multi-layer graphs where each edge of $G$ is in at least one layer and all layers are connected? For cliques, suitably dense random graphs, and graphs of bounded treewidth, we determine this parameter up to multiplicative constants. Lastly we consider a multi-layer variant of Meyniel's conjecture, and show the existence of an infinite family of graphs whose multi-layer cop number is bounded from below by a constant times $n / \log n$, where $n$ is the number of vertices in the graph.
summary: We generalise the popular cops and robbers game to multi-layer graphs, where each cop and the robber are restricted to a single layer (or set of edges). We show that initial intuition about the best way to allocate cops to layers is not always correct, and prove that the multi-layer cop number is neither bounded from above nor below by any increasing function of the cop numbers of the individual layers. We determine that it is NP-hard to decide if $k$ cops are sufficient to catch the robber, even if every cop layer is a tree and a set of isolated vertices. However, we give a polynomial time algorithm to determine if $k$ cops can win when the robber layer is a tree. Additionally, we investigate a question of worst-case divisions of a simple graph into layers: given a simple graph $G$, what is the maximum number of cops required to catch a robber over all multi-layer graphs where each edge of $G$ is in at least one layer and all layers are connected? For cliques, suitably dense random graphs, and graphs of bounded treewidth, we determine this parameter up to multiplicative constants. Lastly we consider a multi-layer variant of Meyniel's conjecture, and show the existence of an infinite family of graphs whose multi-layer cop number is bounded from below by a constant times $n / \log n$, where $n$ is the number of vertices in the graph.
abstract_zh: 我们将流行的警察和强盗游戏推广到多层图，其中每个警察和强盗都被限制在单个层（或一组边）。我们表明，关于将 cop 分配给层的最佳方式的最初直觉并不总是正确的，并证明多层 cop 数量既不受各个层的 cop 数量的任何递增函数的上下限制。我们确定，即使每个警察层都是一棵树和一组孤立的顶点，决定 $k$ 个警察是否足以抓住强盗也是 NP 困难的。然而，我们给出了一个多项式时间算法来确定当强盗层是一棵树时 $k$ 个警察是否可以获胜。此外，我们研究了一个简单图分层的最坏情况问题：给定一个简单图 $G$，在所有多层图上抓到强盗所需的最大警察数量是多少，其中 $G$ 的每条边至少在一层中，并且所有层都相连？对于派系、适当密集的随机图和有界树宽的图，我们确定该参数直至乘法常数。最后，我们考虑 Meyniel 猜想的多层变体，并证明存在无限族图，其多层警察数从下到上由常数乘以 $n / \log n$ 界定，其中 $n$ 是图中的顶点数。

AI.tldr: 将经典的'警察与强盗'游戏扩展到多层图结构，研究多层图中警察与强盗的追捕策略及复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统'警察与强盗'游戏在单层图中已被广泛研究，但现实网络常具有多层结构，需探索多层图中游戏的策略与复杂性差异。
AI.method: 理论分析与计算复杂性证明，结合图论中的树结构、随机图及树宽等工具，设计多项式算法并分析最坏情况划分。
AI.result: 证明多层图的警察数不受单层图警察数的上下界限制，判定k警察是否足够为NP难；当强盗层为树时存在多项式算法；对完全图、稠密随机图等确定了多层警察数的常数倍界。
AI.conclusion: 多层图结构显著增加了游戏的复杂性，部分场景可高效求解，但普遍情况仍具挑战性，为网络防御等应用提供了理论参考。

Additionally, we investigate a question of worst-case divisions of a simple graph into layers: given a simple graph $G$, what is the maximum number of cops required to catch a robber over all multi-layer graphs where each edge of $G$ is in at least one layer and all layers are connected? For cliques, suitably dense random graphs, and graphs of bounded treewidth, we determine this parameter up to multiplicative constants. Lastly we consider a multi-layer variant of Meyniel's conjecture, and show the existence of an infinite family of graphs whose multi-layer cop number is bounded from below by a constant times $n / \log n$, where $n$ is the number of vertices in the graph. 我们将流行的警察和强盗游戏推广到多层图，其中每个警察和强盗都被限制在单个层（或一组边）。我们表明，关于将 cop 分配给层的最佳方式的最初直觉并不总是正确的，并证明多层 cop 数量既不受各个层的 cop 数量的任何递增函数的上下限制。我们确定，即使每个警察层都是一棵树和一组孤立的顶点，决定 $k$ 个警察是否足以抓住强盗也是 NP 困难的。然而，我们给出了一个多项式时间算法来确定当强盗层是一棵树时 $k$ 个警察是否可以获胜。此外，我们研究了一个简单图分层的最坏情况问题：给定一个简单图 $G$，在所有多层图上抓到强盗所需的最大警察数量是多少，其中 $G$ 的每条边至少在一层中，并且所有层都相连？对于派系、适当密集的随机图和有界树宽的图，我们确定该参数直至乘法常数。最后，我们考虑 Meyniel 猜想的多层变体，并证明存在无限族图，其多层警察数从下到上由常数乘以 $n / \log n$ 界定，其中 $n$ 是图中的顶点数。 将经典的'警察与强盗'游戏扩展到多层图结构，研究多层图中警察与强盗的追捕策略及复杂性。 Jessica Enright,Kitty Meeks,William Pettersson,John Sylvester math.CO,cs.DM,cs.DS

title: An End-to-End Approach for Online Decision Mining and Decision Drift Analysis in Process-Aware Information Systems: Extended Version
title_zh: 过程感知信息系统中在线决策挖掘和决策漂移分析的端到端方法：扩展版本
abstract: Decision mining enables the discovery of decision rules from event logs or streams, and constitutes an important part of in-depth analysis and optimisation of business processes. So far, decision mining has been merely applied in an ex-post way resulting in a snapshot of decision rules for the given chunk of log data. Online decision mining, by contrast, enables continuous monitoring of decision rule evolution and decision drift. Hence this paper presents an end-to-end approach for the discovery as well as monitoring of decision points and the corresponding decision rules during runtime, bridging the gap between online control flow discovery and decision mining. The approach provides automatic decision support for process-aware information systems with efficient decision drift discovery and monitoring. For monitoring, not only the performance, in terms of accuracy, of decision rules is taken into account, but also the occurrence of data elements and changes in branching frequency. The paper provides two algorithms, which are evaluated on four synthetic and one real-life data set, showing feasibility and applicability of the approach. Overall, the approach fosters the understanding of decisions in business processes and hence contributes to an improved human-process interaction.
summary: Decision mining enables the discovery of decision rules from event logs or streams, and constitutes an important part of in-depth analysis and optimisation of business processes. So far, decision mining has been merely applied in an ex-post way resulting in a snapshot of decision rules for the given chunk of log data. Online decision mining, by contrast, enables continuous monitoring of decision rule evolution and decision drift. Hence this paper presents an end-to-end approach for the discovery as well as monitoring of decision points and the corresponding decision rules during runtime, bridging the gap between online control flow discovery and decision mining. The approach provides automatic decision support for process-aware information systems with efficient decision drift discovery and monitoring. For monitoring, not only the performance, in terms of accuracy, of decision rules is taken into account, but also the occurrence of data elements and changes in branching frequency. The paper provides two algorithms, which are evaluated on four synthetic and one real-life data set, showing feasibility and applicability of the approach. Overall, the approach fosters the understanding of decisions in business processes and hence contributes to an improved human-process interaction.
abstract_zh: 决策挖掘能够从事件日志或流中发现决策规则，是业务流程深度分析和优化的重要组成部分。到目前为止，决策挖掘仅以事后方式应用，从而生成给定日志数据块的​​决策规则快照。相比之下，在线决策挖掘可以持续监控决策规则演变和决策漂移。因此，本文提出了一种端到端的方法，用于在运行时发现和监控决策点和相应的决策规则，弥合在线控制流发现和决策挖掘之间的差距。该方法通过高效的决策漂移发现和监控，为流程感知信息系统提供自动决策支持。对于监控，不仅考虑决策规则的准确性方面的性能，而且还考虑数据元素的出现和分支频率的变化。本文提供了两种算法，并在四个合成数据集和一个现实数据集上进行了评估，显示了该方法的可行性和适用性。总体而言，该方法促进了对业务流程中决策的理解，从而有助于改善人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的在线决策挖掘与决策漂移分析方法，用于流程感知信息系统，实现实时监控与决策支持。
AI.motivation: 传统决策挖掘仅支持事后分析，无法实时监测决策规则演变，而在线方法可动态捕捉决策漂移，优化业务流程并提升人机交互效率。
AI.method: 设计了两个算法，结合在线控制流发现与决策挖掘，综合评估决策规则准确性、数据元素变化及分支频率波动，实现运行时决策点与规则的持续监控。
AI.result: 在四个合成数据集和一个真实场景中验证方法可行性，证明其能有效检测决策漂移，提升对业务流程决策的理解与优化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了在线控制流发现与决策挖掘间的空白，为流程系统提供自动化决策支持，促进业务流程的动态优化与人机协同。

authors_text: Yogesh Girdhar,Nathan McGuire,Levi Cai,Stewart Jamieson,Seth McCammon,Brian Claus,John E. San Soucie,Jessica E. Todd,T. Aran Mooney
title: CUREE: A Curious Underwater Robot for Ecosystem Exploration
title_zh: CUREE：用于生态系统探索的好奇水下机器人
abstract: The current approach to exploring and monitoring complex underwater ecosystems, such as coral reefs, is to conduct surveys using diver-held or static cameras, or deploying sensor buoys. These approaches often fail to capture the full variation and complexity of interactions between different reef organisms and their habitat. The CUREE platform presented in this paper provides a unique set of capabilities in the form of robot behaviors and perception algorithms to enable scientists to explore different aspects of an ecosystem. Examples of these capabilities include low-altitude visual surveys, soundscape surveys, habitat characterization, and animal following. We demonstrate these capabilities by describing two field deployments on coral reefs in the US Virgin Islands. In the first deployment, we show that CUREE can identify the preferred habitat type of snapping shrimp in a reef through a combination of a visual survey, habitat characterization, and a soundscape survey. In the second deployment, we demonstrate CUREE's ability to follow arbitrary animals by separately following a barracuda and stingray for several minutes each in midwater and benthic environments, respectively.
summary: The current approach to exploring and monitoring complex underwater ecosystems, such as coral reefs, is to conduct surveys using diver-held or static cameras, or deploying sensor buoys. These approaches often fail to capture the full variation and complexity of interactions between different reef organisms and their habitat. The CUREE platform presented in this paper provides a unique set of capabilities in the form of robot behaviors and perception algorithms to enable scientists to explore different aspects of an ecosystem. Examples of these capabilities include low-altitude visual surveys, soundscape surveys, habitat characterization, and animal following. We demonstrate these capabilities by describing two field deployments on coral reefs in the US Virgin Islands. In the first deployment, we show that CUREE can identify the preferred habitat type of snapping shrimp in a reef through a combination of a visual survey, habitat characterization, and a soundscape survey. In the second deployment, we demonstrate CUREE's ability to follow arbitrary animals by separately following a barracuda and stingray for several minutes each in midwater and benthic environments, respectively.
abstract_zh: 目前探索和监测珊瑚礁等复杂水下生态系统的方法是使用潜水员手持或静态相机或部署传感器浮标进行调查。这些方法通常无法捕捉不同珊瑚礁生物与其栖息地之间相互作用的完整变化和复杂性。本文介绍的 CUREE 平台以机器人行为和感知算法的形式提供了一组独特的功能，使科学家能够探索生态系统的不同方面。这些功能的示例包括低空目视调查、声景调查、栖息地特征描述和动物跟踪。我们通过描述美属维尔京群岛珊瑚礁上的两次现场部署来展示这些功能。在第一次部署中，我们表明 CUREE 可以通过视觉调查、栖息地特征和声景调查的结合来识别珊瑚礁中鳄虾的首选栖息地类型。在第二次部署中，我们通过分别在中水和底栖环境中分别跟踪梭鱼和黄貂鱼几分钟，展示了 CUREE 跟踪任意动物的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为CUREE的水下机器人平台，用于通过视觉、声音景观和栖息地分析等能力探索复杂水下生态系统。
AI.motivation: 传统水下生态监测方法（如潜水员手持相机或传感器浮标）无法全面捕捉珊瑚礁等生态系统中生物与环境的复杂互动。
AI.method: 开发具备低空视觉巡检、声音景观分析、栖息地特征提取和动物追踪能力的CUREE机器人，并在美属维尔京群岛珊瑚礁进行两次实地部署验证。
AI.result: 首次部署通过多模态数据确定了 snapping shrimp 的栖息地偏好，第二次部署展示了机器人在不同环境中追踪 barracuda 和 stingray 的能力。
AI.conclusion: CUREE 通过自主感知与行为算法，为水下生态系统的多维度研究提供了新的技术手段。

title: Learning Position From Vehicle Vibration Using an Inertial Measurement Unit
title_zh: 使用惯性测量单元从车辆振动中学习位置
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to vehicle positioning that operates without reliance on the global navigation satellite system (GNSS). Traditional GNSS approaches are vulnerable to interference in certain environments, rendering them unreliable in situations such as urban canyons, under flyovers, or in low reception areas. This study proposes a vehicle positioning method based on learning the road signature from accelerometer and gyroscope measurements obtained by an inertial measurement unit (IMU) sensor. In our approach, the route is divided into segments, each with a distinct signature that the IMU can detect through the vibrations of a vehicle in response to subtle changes in the road surface. The study presents two different data-driven methods for learning the road segment from IMU measurements. One method is based on convolutional neural networks and the other on ensemble random forest applied to handcrafted features. Additionally, the authors present an algorithm to deduce the position of a vehicle in real-time using the learned road segment. The approach was applied in two positioning tasks: (i) a car along a 6[km] route in a dense urban area; (ii) an e-scooter on a 1[km] route that combined road and pavement surfaces. The mean error between the proposed method's position and the ground truth was approximately 50[m] for the car and 30[m] for the e-scooter. Compared to a solution based on time integration of the IMU measurements, the proposed approach has a mean error of more than 5 times better for e-scooters and 20 times better for cars.
summary: This paper presents a novel approach to vehicle positioning that operates without reliance on the global navigation satellite system (GNSS). Traditional GNSS approaches are vulnerable to interference in certain environments, rendering them unreliable in situations such as urban canyons, under flyovers, or in low reception areas. This study proposes a vehicle positioning method based on learning the road signature from accelerometer and gyroscope measurements obtained by an inertial measurement unit (IMU) sensor. In our approach, the route is divided into segments, each with a distinct signature that the IMU can detect through the vibrations of a vehicle in response to subtle changes in the road surface. The study presents two different data-driven methods for learning the road segment from IMU measurements. One method is based on convolutional neural networks and the other on ensemble random forest applied to handcrafted features. Additionally, the authors present an algorithm to deduce the position of a vehicle in real-time using the learned road segment. The approach was applied in two positioning tasks: (i) a car along a 6[km] route in a dense urban area; (ii) an e-scooter on a 1[km] route that combined road and pavement surfaces. The mean error between the proposed method's position and the ground truth was approximately 50[m] for the car and 30[m] for the e-scooter. Compared to a solution based on time integration of the IMU measurements, the proposed approach has a mean error of more than 5 times better for e-scooters and 20 times better for cars.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种不依赖全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）的车辆定位新方法。传统的 GNSS 方法在某些环境中容易受到干扰，导致它们在城市峡谷、立交桥下或接收信号较差的区域等情况下不可靠。本研究提出了一种基于从惯性测量单元（IMU）传感器获得的加速度计和陀螺仪测量中学习道路特征的车辆定位方法。在我们的方法中，路线被分为多个部分，每个部分都有一个独特的特征，IMU 可以通过车辆的振动来检测，以响应路面的细微变化。该研究提出了两种不同的数据驱动方法，用于从 IMU 测量中了解路段。一种方法基于卷积神经网络，另一种方法基于应用于手工特征的集成随机森林。此外，作者提出了一种算法，可以使用学习到的路段实时推断车辆的位置。该方法应用于两个定位任务：(i) 一辆汽车在人口稠密的城市地区沿 6[km] 路线行驶； (ii) 一辆电动滑板车行驶在 1[公里] 的路线上，该路线结合了道路和人行道表面。汽车所提出的方法的位置与地面实况之间的平均误差约为 50[m]，电动滑板车约为 30[m]。与基于 IMU 测量时间积分的解决方案相比，所提出的方法的平均误差对于电动踏板车来说要好 5 倍以上，对于汽车来说要好 20 倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）的车辆定位方法，通过惯性测量单元（IMU）学习道路振动特征实现定位。
AI.motivation: 传统GNSS在城市峡谷、隧道等场景下易受干扰，导致定位不可靠，需开发无需GNSS的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于IMU的加速度计和陀螺仪数据，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）和集成随机森林两种方法学习道路分段特征，并设计实时定位算法。
AI.result: 在6公里城市道路和1公里混合路面测试中，汽车定位误差约50米，电动滑板车误差约30米，较传统IMU积分方法分别提升20倍和5倍精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无GNSS环境下有效，但定位误差仍较大，需进一步优化特征提取与匹配算法。

authors_text: Jiafu Wu,Mufeng Yao,Dong Wu,Mingmin Chi,Baokun Wang,Ruofan Wu,Xin Fu,Changhua Meng,Weiqiang Wang
title: DEDGAT: Dual Embedding of Directed Graph Attention Networks for Detecting Financial Risk
title_zh: DEDGAT：用于检测金融风险的有向图注意网络的双重嵌入
abstract: Graph representation plays an important role in the field of financial risk control, where the relationship among users can be constructed in a graph manner. In practical scenarios, the relationships between nodes in risk control tasks are bidirectional, e.g., merchants having both revenue and expense behaviors. Graph neural networks designed for undirected graphs usually aggregate discriminative node or edge representations with an attention strategy, but cannot fully exploit the out-degree information when used for the tasks built on directed graph, which leads to the problem of a directional bias. To tackle this problem, we propose a Directed Graph ATtention network called DGAT, which explicitly takes out-degree into attention calculation. In addition to having directional requirements, the same node might have different representations of its input and output, and thus we further propose a dual embedding of DGAT, referred to as DEDGAT. Specifically, DEDGAT assigns in-degree and out-degree representations to each node and uses these two embeddings to calculate the attention weights of in-degree and out-degree nodes, respectively. Experiments performed on the benchmark datasets show that DGAT and DEDGAT obtain better classification performance compared to undirected GAT. Also,the visualization results demonstrate that our methods can fully use both in-degree and out-degree information.
summary: Graph representation plays an important role in the field of financial risk control, where the relationship among users can be constructed in a graph manner. In practical scenarios, the relationships between nodes in risk control tasks are bidirectional, e.g., merchants having both revenue and expense behaviors. Graph neural networks designed for undirected graphs usually aggregate discriminative node or edge representations with an attention strategy, but cannot fully exploit the out-degree information when used for the tasks built on directed graph, which leads to the problem of a directional bias. To tackle this problem, we propose a Directed Graph ATtention network called DGAT, which explicitly takes out-degree into attention calculation. In addition to having directional requirements, the same node might have different representations of its input and output, and thus we further propose a dual embedding of DGAT, referred to as DEDGAT. Specifically, DEDGAT assigns in-degree and out-degree representations to each node and uses these two embeddings to calculate the attention weights of in-degree and out-degree nodes, respectively. Experiments performed on the benchmark datasets show that DGAT and DEDGAT obtain better classification performance compared to undirected GAT. Also,the visualization results demonstrate that our methods can fully use both in-degree and out-degree information.
abstract_zh: 图表示在金融风控领域发挥着重要作用，可以通过图的方式构建用户之间的关系。在实际场景中，风控任务中的节点之间的关系是双向的，例如商户同时具有收入和支出行为。为无向图设计的图神经网络通常通过注意策略聚合有判别性的节点或边表示，但在用于基于有向图的任务时无法充分利用出度信息，从而导致方向偏差问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 DGAT 的有向图注意力网络，它明确地将出度纳入注意力计算中。除了具有方向性要求外，同一节点的输入和输出可能有不同的表示，因此我们进一步提出了 DGAT 的双重嵌入，简称为 DEDGAT。具体来说，DEDGAT 为每个节点分配入度和出度表示，并使用这两个嵌入分别计算入度和出度节点的注意力权重。在基准数据集上进行的实验表明，与无向 GAT 相比，DGAT 和 DEDGAT 获得了更好的分类性能。此外，可视化结果表明我们的方法可以充分利用入度和出度信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEDGAT方法，通过双嵌入有向图注意力网络解决金融风控中因忽略方向性导致的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统无向图神经网络处理有向图时无法充分利用出度信息，导致方向偏差，影响金融风险检测效果。
AI.method: 设计DGAT显式纳入出度信息计算注意力，进一步提出DEDGAT为每个节点分配入度和出度双嵌入，分别计算注意力权重。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上分类性能优于无向GAT，可视化结果验证了方法能有效利用双向度信息。
AI.conclusion: DEDGAT通过双嵌入机制充分挖掘有向图的双向度特征，显著提升金融风险检测效果。

title: FFT-based Dynamic Token Mixer for Vision
title_zh: 基于 FFT 的视觉动态令牌混合器
comment: The 38th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'24)
comments: The 38th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'24)
abstract: Multi-head-self-attention (MHSA)-equipped models have achieved notable performance in computer vision. Their computational complexity is proportional to quadratic numbers of pixels in input feature maps, resulting in slow processing, especially when dealing with high-resolution images. New types of token-mixer are proposed as an alternative to MHSA to circumvent this problem: an FFT-based token-mixer involves global operations similar to MHSA but with lower computational complexity. However, despite its attractive properties, the FFT-based token-mixer has not been carefully examined in terms of its compatibility with the rapidly evolving MetaFormer architecture. Here, we propose a novel token-mixer called Dynamic Filter and novel image recognition models, DFFormer and CDFFormer, to close the gaps above. The results of image classification and downstream tasks, analysis, and visualization show that our models are helpful. Notably, their throughput and memory efficiency when dealing with high-resolution image recognition is remarkable. Our results indicate that Dynamic Filter is one of the token-mixer options that should be seriously considered. The code is available at https://github.com/okojoalg/dfformer
summary: Multi-head-self-attention (MHSA)-equipped models have achieved notable performance in computer vision. Their computational complexity is proportional to quadratic numbers of pixels in input feature maps, resulting in slow processing, especially when dealing with high-resolution images. New types of token-mixer are proposed as an alternative to MHSA to circumvent this problem: an FFT-based token-mixer involves global operations similar to MHSA but with lower computational complexity. However, despite its attractive properties, the FFT-based token-mixer has not been carefully examined in terms of its compatibility with the rapidly evolving MetaFormer architecture. Here, we propose a novel token-mixer called Dynamic Filter and novel image recognition models, DFFormer and CDFFormer, to close the gaps above. The results of image classification and downstream tasks, analysis, and visualization show that our models are helpful. Notably, their throughput and memory efficiency when dealing with high-resolution image recognition is remarkable. Our results indicate that Dynamic Filter is one of the token-mixer options that should be seriously considered. The code is available at https://github.com/okojoalg/dfformer
abstract_zh: 配备多头自注意力（MHSA）的模型在计算机视觉领域取得了显着的性能。它们的计算复杂度与输入特征图中像素的二次方数量成正比，导致处理速度缓慢，尤其是在处理高分辨率图像时。新型令牌混合器被提出作为 MHSA 的替代方案来规避这个问题：基于 FFT 的令牌混合器涉及与 MHSA 类似的全局操作，但计算复杂度较低。然而，尽管具有吸引人的特性，基于 FFT 的令牌混合器在与快速发展的 MetaFormer 架构的兼容性方面尚未经过仔细检查。在这里，我们提出了一种称为动态过滤器的新颖令牌混合器和新颖的图像识别模型 DFFormer 和 CDFFormer，以弥补上述差距。图像分类和下游任务、分析和可视化的结果表明我们的模型是有帮助的。值得注意的是，它们在处理高分辨率图像识别时的吞吐量和内存效率非常显着。我们的结果表明动态过滤器是应该认真考虑的令牌混合器选项之一。代码可在 https://github.com/okojoalg/dfformer 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于FFT的动态令牌混合器DFFormer和CDFFormer，用于改进视觉任务中的高分辨率图像处理效率。
AI.motivation: 多头自注意力（MHSA）模型在视觉任务中计算复杂度高，处理高分辨率图像时效率低下，需寻找更高效的令牌混合替代方案。
AI.method: 设计动态滤波器作为新型令牌混合器，结合FFT实现全局操作，构建DFFormer和CDFFormer模型以优化计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，模型在图像分类和下游任务中表现优异，尤其在高分辨率图像处理时具有显著的吞吐量和内存效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 动态滤波器作为令牌混合器的有效方案，值得在视觉模型中进一步研究和应用。

search_text: FFT-based Dynamic Token Mixer for Vision 基于 FFT 的视觉动态令牌混合器 Multi-head-self-attention (MHSA)-equipped models have achieved notable performance in computer vision. Their computational complexity is proportional to quadratic numbers of pixels in input feature maps, resulting in slow processing, especially when dealing with high-resolution images. New types of token-mixer are proposed as an alternative to MHSA to circumvent this problem: an FFT-based token-mixer involves global operations similar to MHSA but with lower computational complexity. However, despite its attractive properties, the FFT-based token-mixer has not been carefully examined in terms of its compatibility with the rapidly evolving MetaFormer architecture. Here, we propose a novel token-mixer called Dynamic Filter and novel image recognition models, DFFormer and CDFFormer, to close the gaps above. The results of image classification and downstream tasks, analysis, and visualization show that our models are helpful. Notably, their throughput and memory efficiency when dealing with high-resolution image recognition is remarkable. Our results indicate that Dynamic Filter is one of the token-mixer options that should be seriously considered. The code is available at https://github.com/okojoalg/dfformer 配备多头自注意力（MHSA）的模型在计算机视觉领域取得了显着的性能。它们的计算复杂度与输入特征图中像素的二次方数量成正比，导致处理速度缓慢，尤其是在处理高分辨率图像时。新型令牌混合器被提出作为 MHSA 的替代方案来规避这个问题：基于 FFT 的令牌混合器涉及与 MHSA 类似的全局操作，但计算复杂度较低。然而，尽管具有吸引人的特性，基于 FFT 的令牌混合器在与快速发展的 MetaFormer 架构的兼容性方面尚未经过仔细检查。在这里，我们提出了一种称为动态过滤器的新颖令牌混合器和新颖的图像识别模型 DFFormer 和 CDFFormer，以弥补上述差距。图像分类和下游任务、分析和可视化的结果表明我们的模型是有帮助的。值得注意的是，它们在处理高分辨率图像识别时的吞吐量和内存效率非常显着。我们的结果表明动态过滤器是应该认真考虑的令牌混合器选项之一。代码可在 https://github.com/okojoalg/dfformer 获取 本文提出基于FFT的动态令牌混合器DFFormer和CDFFormer，用于改进视觉任务中的高分辨率图像处理效率。 Yuki Tatsunami,Masato Taki cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: M. Salman Shaukat,J. -C. Põder,Sebastian Bader,Thomas Kirste
title: Towards Measuring Ethicality of an Intelligent Assistive System
title_zh: 衡量智能辅助系统的道德性
comment: In the 1st AITHICS workshop (Artificial Intelligence and Ethics) held at 44th German Conference on Artificial Intelligence (KI-2021)
comments: In the 1st AITHICS workshop (Artificial Intelligence and Ethics) held at 44th German Conference on Artificial Intelligence (KI-2021)
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) based assistive systems, so called intelligent assistive technology (IAT) are becoming increasingly ubiquitous by each day. IAT helps people in improving their quality of life by providing intelligent assistance based on the provided data. A few examples of such IATs include self-driving cars, robot assistants and smart-health management solutions. However, the presence of such autonomous entities poses ethical challenges concerning the stakeholders involved in using these systems. There is a lack of research when it comes to analysing how such IAT adheres to provided ethical regulations due to ethical, logistic and cost issues associated with such an analysis. In the light of the above-mentioned problem statement and issues, we present a method to measure the ethicality of an assistive system. To perform this task, we utilised our simulation tool that focuses on modelling navigation and assistance of Persons with Dementia (PwD) in indoor environments. By utilising this tool, we analyse how well different assistive strategies adhere to provided ethical regulations such as autonomy, justice and beneficence of the stakeholders.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) based assistive systems, so called intelligent assistive technology (IAT) are becoming increasingly ubiquitous by each day. IAT helps people in improving their quality of life by providing intelligent assistance based on the provided data. A few examples of such IATs include self-driving cars, robot assistants and smart-health management solutions. However, the presence of such autonomous entities poses ethical challenges concerning the stakeholders involved in using these systems. There is a lack of research when it comes to analysing how such IAT adheres to provided ethical regulations due to ethical, logistic and cost issues associated with such an analysis. In the light of the above-mentioned problem statement and issues, we present a method to measure the ethicality of an assistive system. To perform this task, we utilised our simulation tool that focuses on modelling navigation and assistance of Persons with Dementia (PwD) in indoor environments. By utilising this tool, we analyse how well different assistive strategies adhere to provided ethical regulations such as autonomy, justice and beneficence of the stakeholders.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能 (AI) 的辅助系统，即所谓的智能辅助技术 (IAT)，每天都变得越来越普遍。 IAT 根据所提供的数据提供智能帮助，帮助人们提高生活质量。此类 IAT 的一些例子包括自动驾驶汽车、机器人助手和智能健康管理解决方案。然而，此类自治实体的存在对参与使用这些系统的利益相关者提出了道德挑战。由于与此类分析相关的道德、后勤和成本问题，在分析此类 IAT 如何遵守所提供的道德法规时缺乏研究。根据上述问题陈述和问题，我们提出了一种衡量辅助系统道德性的方法。为了执行此任务，我们利用了模拟工具，该工具专注于对室内环境中痴呆症患者 (PwD) 的导航和帮助进行建模。通过利用这个工具，我们分析不同的辅助策略遵守所提供的道德规范（例如利益相关者的自主性、正义和仁慈）的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种测量智能辅助系统伦理性的方法，通过模拟工具分析不同辅助策略对利益相关者的伦理规范遵守情况。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对智能辅助技术（IAT）伦理合规性的系统分析，因伦理、物流和成本等问题难以开展实际评估。
AI.method: 利用针对失智症患者室内导航与辅助的模拟工具，量化分析不同辅助策略在自主性、公平性和仁慈性等伦理准则下的表现。
AI.result: 通过模拟实验验证了该方法可有效评估辅助策略的伦理合规性，识别出符合伦理规范的策略特征。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为智能辅助系统的伦理评估提供了可操作的量化框架，有助于指导更符合伦理规范的技术开发。

title: Mental state attribution to educational robots: an experience with children in primary school
title_zh: 教育机器人的心理状态归因：小学儿童的经历
comment: In Joint Proceedings of the ACM IUI 2023 Workshops. Sydney, Australia
comments: In Joint Proceedings of the ACM IUI 2023 Workshops. Sydney, Australia
abstract: The work presented in this paper was carried out in the context of the project Girls and boys: one day at university promoted by the City of Turin together with the University of Turin. We were responsible for two educational activities on robotics and coding hosted at the Computer Science Department, which made one of its laboratories available for this kind of lesson. At the conclusion of the lab's sessions, children compiled the Attribution of Mental State (AMS) questionnaire, which is a measure of mental states that participants attribute to robots, namely the user's perception of the robot's mental qualities as compared to humans. We distributed the questionnaires both to children attending the educational robotics lab and to children performing coding activities. Results show that the first group attributed higher mental qualities to the robots, compared to the attribution given by children that did not have a direct experience with a robot.
summary: The work presented in this paper was carried out in the context of the project Girls and boys: one day at university promoted by the City of Turin together with the University of Turin. We were responsible for two educational activities on robotics and coding hosted at the Computer Science Department, which made one of its laboratories available for this kind of lesson. At the conclusion of the lab's sessions, children compiled the Attribution of Mental State (AMS) questionnaire, which is a measure of mental states that participants attribute to robots, namely the user's perception of the robot's mental qualities as compared to humans. We distributed the questionnaires both to children attending the educational robotics lab and to children performing coding activities. Results show that the first group attributed higher mental qualities to the robots, compared to the attribution given by children that did not have a direct experience with a robot.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍的工作是在都灵市与都灵大学共同推动的“女孩和男孩：大学的一天”项目的背景下进行的。我们负责计算机科学系主办的两项关于机器人和编码的教育活动，该系为其实验室之一提供了此类课程。在实验室会议结束时，孩子们编制了心理状态归因（AMS）调查问卷，该问卷是参与者归因于机器人的心理状态的衡量标准，即用户对机器人与人类相比的心理素质的看法。我们向参加教育机器人实验室的孩子和进行编码活动的孩子分发了调查问卷。结果显示，与没有直接接触机器人经验的孩子相比，第一组孩子认为机器人具有更高的心理素质。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了小学生在参与教育机器人活动后对机器人心理状态的归因情况。
AI.motivation: 探索儿童通过直接与教育机器人互动后，是否会产生类似人类的心理状态归因，以促进教育机器人在教学中的应用。
AI.method: 通过AMS问卷调查，对比参与机器人实验室活动和编程活动的儿童对机器人心理特质的归因差异。
AI.result: 直接接触机器人的儿童比仅参与编程活动的儿童更倾向于赋予机器人较高的心理特质。
AI.conclusion: 直接操作教育机器人能显著影响儿童对机器人心理状态的归因，表明实践体验在塑造人机交互认知中的重要性。

result: 直接接触机器人的儿童比仅参与编程活动的儿童更倾向于赋予机器人较高的心理特质。
conclusion: 直接操作教育机器人能显著影响儿童对机器人心理状态的归因，表明实践体验在塑造人机交互认知中的重要性。
search_text: Mental state attribution to educational robots: an experience with children in primary school 教育机器人的心理状态归因：小学儿童的经历 The work presented in this paper was carried out in the context of the project Girls and boys: one day at university promoted by the City of Turin together with the University of Turin. We were responsible for two educational activities on robotics and coding hosted at the Computer Science Department, which made one of its laboratories available for this kind of lesson. At the conclusion of the lab's sessions, children compiled the Attribution of Mental State (AMS) questionnaire, which is a measure of mental states that participants attribute to robots, namely the user's perception of the robot's mental qualities as compared to humans. We distributed the questionnaires both to children attending the educational robotics lab and to children performing coding activities. Results show that the first group attributed higher mental qualities to the robots, compared to the attribution given by children that did not have a direct experience with a robot. 本文介绍的工作是在都灵市与都灵大学共同推动的“女孩和男孩：大学的一天”项目的背景下进行的。我们负责计算机科学系主办的两项关于机器人和编码的教育活动，该系为其实验室之一提供了此类课程。在实验室会议结束时，孩子们编制了心理状态归因（AMS）调查问卷，该问卷是参与者归因于机器人的心理状态的衡量标准，即用户对机器人与人类相比的心理素质的看法。我们向参加教育机器人实验室的孩子和进行编码活动的孩子分发了调查问卷。结果显示，与没有直接接触机器人经验的孩子相比，第一组孩子认为机器人具有更高的心理素质。 该论文研究了小学生在参与教育机器人活动后对机器人心理状态的归因情况。 Cristina Gena,Sara Capecchi cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Ziqiang Zhang,Long Zhou,Chengyi Wang,Sanyuan Chen,Yu Wu,Shujie Liu,Zhuo Chen,Yanqing Liu,Huaming Wang,Jinyu Li,Lei He,Sheng Zhao,Furu Wei
title: Speak Foreign Languages with Your Own Voice: Cross-Lingual Neural Codec Language Modeling
title_zh: 用自己的声音说外语：跨语言神经编解码器语言建模
comment: We encourage readers to listen to the audio samples on our demo page: \url{https://aka.ms/vallex}
comments: We encourage readers to listen to the audio samples on our demo page: \url{https://aka.ms/vallex}
abstract: We propose a cross-lingual neural codec language model, VALL-E X, for cross-lingual speech synthesis. Specifically, we extend VALL-E and train a multi-lingual conditional codec language model to predict the acoustic token sequences of the target language speech by using both the source language speech and the target language text as prompts. VALL-E X inherits strong in-context learning capabilities and can be applied for zero-shot cross-lingual text-to-speech synthesis and zero-shot speech-to-speech translation tasks. Experimental results show that it can generate high-quality speech in the target language via just one speech utterance in the source language as a prompt while preserving the unseen speaker's voice, emotion, and acoustic environment. Moreover, VALL-E X effectively alleviates the foreign accent problems, which can be controlled by a language ID. Audio samples are available at \url{https://aka.ms/vallex}.
summary: We propose a cross-lingual neural codec language model, VALL-E X, for cross-lingual speech synthesis. Specifically, we extend VALL-E and train a multi-lingual conditional codec language model to predict the acoustic token sequences of the target language speech by using both the source language speech and the target language text as prompts. VALL-E X inherits strong in-context learning capabilities and can be applied for zero-shot cross-lingual text-to-speech synthesis and zero-shot speech-to-speech translation tasks. Experimental results show that it can generate high-quality speech in the target language via just one speech utterance in the source language as a prompt while preserving the unseen speaker's voice, emotion, and acoustic environment. Moreover, VALL-E X effectively alleviates the foreign accent problems, which can be controlled by a language ID. Audio samples are available at \url{https://aka.ms/vallex}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种跨语言神经编解码器语言模型 VALL-E X，用于跨语言语音合成。具体来说，我们扩展了VALL-E并训练多语言条件编解码器语言模型，以使用源语言语音和目标语言文本作为提示来预测目标语言语音的声学标记序列。 VALL-E X继承了强大的上下文学习能力，可应用于零样本跨语言文本到语音合成和零样本语音到语音翻译任务。实验结果表明，仅通过源语言的一段语音作为提示，即可生成高质量的目标语言语音，同时保留未见过的说话人的声音、情感和声学环境。而且，VALL-E X有效缓解了外语口音问题，可以通过语言ID来控制。音频样本可在 \url{https://aka.ms/vallex} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨语言神经编解码语言模型VALL-E X，通过源语言语音和目标语言文本作为提示，生成目标语言的高质量语音，同时保留说话人声音和情感。
AI.motivation: 解决跨语言语音合成中数据稀缺、口音问题及零样本适应性差的挑战，实现无需平行语料的零样本文本到语音合成与语音到语音翻译。
AI.method: 扩展VALL-E模型，构建多语言条件编解码语言模型，利用源语言语音与目标语言文本联合提示预测目标语言声学token序列，并通过语言ID控制口音。
AI.result: 仅需一个源语言语音提示即可生成高质量目标语言语音，保留未见说话人声音、情感及环境信息，有效缓解口音问题。
AI.conclusion: VALL-E X在跨语言语音合成与翻译任务中表现优异，为低资源语言场景提供实用解决方案，验证了编解码语言模型在零样本跨语言任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Jack W Barker,Neelanjan Bhowmik,Yona Falinie A Gaus,Toby P Breckon
title: Robust Semi-Supervised Anomaly Detection via Adversarially Learned Continuous Noise Corruption
title_zh: 通过对抗性学习的连续噪声腐蚀进行鲁棒的半监督异常检测
comment: 18th International Conference on Computer Vision Theory and Applications
comments: 18th International Conference on Computer Vision Theory and Applications
abstract: Anomaly detection is the task of recognising novel samples which deviate significantly from pre-establishednormality. Abnormal classes are not present during training meaning that models must learn effective rep-resentations solely across normal class data samples. Deep Autoencoders (AE) have been widely used foranomaly detection tasks, but suffer from overfitting to a null identity function. To address this problem, weimplement a training scheme applied to a Denoising Autoencoder (DAE) which introduces an efficient methodof producing Adversarially Learned Continuous Noise (ALCN) to maximally globally corrupt the input priorto denoising. Prior methods have applied similar approaches of adversarial training to increase the robustnessof DAE, however they exhibit limitations such as slow inference speed reducing their real-world applicabilityor producing generalised obfuscation which is more trivial to denoise. We show through rigorous evaluationthat our ALCN method of regularisation during training improves AUC performance during inference whileremaining efficient over both classical, leave-one-out novelty detection tasks with the variations-: 9 (normal)vs. 1 (abnormal) & 1 (normal) vs. 9 (abnormal); MNIST - AUCavg: 0.890 & 0.989, CIFAR-10 - AUCavg: 0.670& 0.742, in addition to challenging real-world anomaly detection tasks: industrial inspection (MVTEC-AD -AUCavg: 0.780) and plant disease detection (Plant Village - AUC: 0.770) when compared to prior approaches.
summary: Anomaly detection is the task of recognising novel samples which deviate significantly from pre-establishednormality. Abnormal classes are not present during training meaning that models must learn effective rep-resentations solely across normal class data samples. Deep Autoencoders (AE) have been widely used foranomaly detection tasks, but suffer from overfitting to a null identity function. To address this problem, weimplement a training scheme applied to a Denoising Autoencoder (DAE) which introduces an efficient methodof producing Adversarially Learned Continuous Noise (ALCN) to maximally globally corrupt the input priorto denoising. Prior methods have applied similar approaches of adversarial training to increase the robustnessof DAE, however they exhibit limitations such as slow inference speed reducing their real-world applicabilityor producing generalised obfuscation which is more trivial to denoise. We show through rigorous evaluationthat our ALCN method of regularisation during training improves AUC performance during inference whileremaining efficient over both classical, leave-one-out novelty detection tasks with the variations-: 9 (normal)vs. 1 (abnormal) & 1 (normal) vs. 9 (abnormal); MNIST - AUCavg: 0.890 & 0.989, CIFAR-10 - AUCavg: 0.670& 0.742, in addition to challenging real-world anomaly detection tasks: industrial inspection (MVTEC-AD -AUCavg: 0.780) and plant disease detection (Plant Village - AUC: 0.770) when compared to prior approaches.
abstract_zh: 异常检测是识别与预先建立的正态性显着偏差的新样本的任务。训练期间不存在异常类，这意味着模型必须仅在正常类数据样本中学习有效的表示。深度自编码器 (AE) 已广泛用于异常检测任务，但存在对空身份函数的过度拟合问题。为了解决这个问题，我们实施了一种应用于去噪自动编码器（DAE）的训练方案，该方案引入了一种产生对抗学习连续噪声（ALCN）的有效方法，以在去噪之前最大程度地全局破坏输入。先前的方法已经应用了类似的对抗训练方法来提高 DAE 的鲁棒性，但是它们表现出局限性，例如推理速度慢，降低了它们在现实世界中的适用性，或者产生了对去噪来说更微不足道的广义混淆。我们通过严格的评估表明，我们的 ALCN 训练过程中的正则化方法提高了推理过程中的 AUC 性能，同时在经典的留一新颖性检测任务中保持高效，其变化如下：9（正常）与 9（正常）相比。 1（异常）&1（正常）vs. 9（异常）；与之前的方法相比，MNIST - AUCavg：0.890 和 0.989，CIFAR-10 - AUCavg：0.670 和 0.742，除了具有挑战性的现实世界异常检测任务：工业检查（MVTEC-AD -AUCavg：0.780）和植物病害检测（Plant Village - AUC：0.770）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过对抗学习连续噪声污染的鲁棒半监督异常检测方法，提升去噪自编码器在无异常类训练下的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统深度自编码器易过拟合恒等函数，现有对抗训练方法存在推理速度慢或去噪简单化问题，需更高效的正则化方案。
AI.method: 设计对抗学习连续噪声（ALCN）机制，在训练阶段对输入进行全局最大污染后再去噪，通过对抗过程生成复杂噪声提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MNIST（AUCavg: 0.890/0.989）、CIFAR-10（0.670/0.742）、工业检测（MVTEC-AD: 0.780）和植物病害检测（Plant Village: 0.770）任务中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ALCN方法通过高效噪声污染机制，在保持推理效率的同时显著提升异常检测性能，适用于多种现实场景。

We show through rigorous evaluationthat our ALCN method of regularisation during training improves AUC performance during inference whileremaining efficient over both classical, leave-one-out novelty detection tasks with the variations-: 9 (normal)vs. 1 (abnormal) & 1 (normal) vs. 9 (abnormal); MNIST - AUCavg: 0.890 & 0.989, CIFAR-10 - AUCavg: 0.670& 0.742, in addition to challenging real-world anomaly detection tasks: industrial inspection (MVTEC-AD -AUCavg: 0.780) and plant disease detection (Plant Village - AUC: 0.770) when compared to prior approaches. 异常检测是识别与预先建立的正态性显着偏差的新样本的任务。训练期间不存在异常类，这意味着模型必须仅在正常类数据样本中学习有效的表示。深度自编码器 (AE) 已广泛用于异常检测任务，但存在对空身份函数的过度拟合问题。为了解决这个问题，我们实施了一种应用于去噪自动编码器（DAE）的训练方案，该方案引入了一种产生对抗学习连续噪声（ALCN）的有效方法，以在去噪之前最大程度地全局破坏输入。先前的方法已经应用了类似的对抗训练方法来提高 DAE 的鲁棒性，但是它们表现出局限性，例如推理速度慢，降低了它们在现实世界中的适用性，或者产生了对去噪来说更微不足道的广义混淆。我们通过严格的评估表明，我们的 ALCN 训练过程中的正则化方法提高了推理过程中的 AUC 性能，同时在经典的留一新颖性检测任务中保持高效，其变化如下：9（正常）与 9（正常）相比。 1（异常）&1（正常）vs. 9（异常）；与之前的方法相比，MNIST - AUCavg：0.890 和 0.989，CIFAR-10 - AUCavg：0.670 和 0.742，除了具有挑战性的现实世界异常检测任务：工业检查（MVTEC-AD -AUCavg：0.780）和植物病害检测（Plant Village - AUC：0.770）。 本文提出一种通过对抗学习连续噪声污染的鲁棒半监督异常检测方法，提升去噪自编码器在无异常类训练下的表现。 Jack W Barker,Neelanjan Bhowmik,Yona Falinie A Gaus,Toby P Breckon cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wen Zhang,Yushan Zhu,Mingyang Chen,Yuxia Geng,Yufeng Huang,Yajing Xu,Wenting Song,Huajun Chen
title: Structure Pretraining and Prompt Tuning for Knowledge Graph Transfer
title_zh: 知识图谱迁移的结构预训练和快速调整
abstract: Knowledge graphs (KG) are essential background knowledge providers in many tasks. When designing models for KG-related tasks, one of the key tasks is to devise the Knowledge Representation and Fusion (KRF) module that learns the representation of elements from KGs and fuses them with task representations. While due to the difference of KGs and perspectives to be considered during fusion across tasks, duplicate and ad hoc KRF modules design are conducted among tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel knowledge graph pretraining model KGTransformer that could serve as a uniform KRF module in diverse KG-related tasks. We pretrain KGTransformer with three self-supervised tasks with sampled sub-graphs as input. For utilization, we propose a general prompt-tuning mechanism regarding task data as a triple prompt to allow flexible interactions between task KGs and task data. We evaluate pretrained KGTransformer on three tasks, triple classification, zero-shot image classification, and question answering. KGTransformer consistently achieves better results than specifically designed task models. Through experiments, we justify that the pretrained KGTransformer could be used off the shelf as a general and effective KRF module across KG-related tasks. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/zjukg/KGTransformer.
summary: Knowledge graphs (KG) are essential background knowledge providers in many tasks. When designing models for KG-related tasks, one of the key tasks is to devise the Knowledge Representation and Fusion (KRF) module that learns the representation of elements from KGs and fuses them with task representations. While due to the difference of KGs and perspectives to be considered during fusion across tasks, duplicate and ad hoc KRF modules design are conducted among tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel knowledge graph pretraining model KGTransformer that could serve as a uniform KRF module in diverse KG-related tasks. We pretrain KGTransformer with three self-supervised tasks with sampled sub-graphs as input. For utilization, we propose a general prompt-tuning mechanism regarding task data as a triple prompt to allow flexible interactions between task KGs and task data. We evaluate pretrained KGTransformer on three tasks, triple classification, zero-shot image classification, and question answering. KGTransformer consistently achieves better results than specifically designed task models. Through experiments, we justify that the pretrained KGTransformer could be used off the shelf as a general and effective KRF module across KG-related tasks. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/zjukg/KGTransformer.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）是许多任务中必不可少的背景知识提供者。在设计知识图谱相关任务的模型时，关键任务之一是设计知识表示和融合（KRF）模块，该模块从知识图谱中学习元素的表示并将其与任务表示融合。而由于跨任务融合时要考虑的KG和视角的不同，任务之间会进行重复和临时的KRF模块设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的知识图预训练模型 KGTransformer，它可以在各种 KG 相关任务中充当统一的 KRF 模块。我们使用三个自监督任务来预训练 KGTransformer，并以采样子图作为输入。为了利用，我们提出了一种将任务数据作为三重提示的通用提示调整机制，以允许任务知识图谱和任务数据之间灵活的交互。我们在三重分类、零样本图像分类和问题回答这三个任务上评估预训练的 KGTransformer。 KGTransformer 始终比专门设计的任务模型取得更好的结果。通过实验，我们证明预训练的 KGTransformer 可以作为现成的跨 KG 相关任务的通用且有效的 KRF 模块使用。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/zjukg/KGTransformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为KGTransformer的知识图谱预训练模型，旨在作为统一的知识表示与融合（KRF）模块，适用于多种知识图谱相关任务。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱相关任务中，知识表示与融合模块设计重复且任务特定，缺乏通用性，导致开发效率低下。
AI.method: 通过三个自监督任务预训练KGTransformer，使用采样的子图作为输入，并提出基于任务数据的三元组提示调优机制，实现任务KG与数据的灵活交互。
AI.result: 在三元组分类、零样本图像分类和问答任务中，KGTransformer均优于专门设计的任务模型，验证了其通用有效性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练的KGTransformer可作为即插即用的通用KRF模块，适用于多种知识图谱相关任务，减少重复设计。

title: A survey on automated detection and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs in microscopic blood cells
title_zh: 急性白血病和显微血细胞中白细胞的自动检测和分类研究
abstract: Leukemia (blood cancer) is an unusual spread of White Blood Cells or Leukocytes (WBCs) in the bone marrow and blood. Pathologists can diagnose leukemia by looking at a person's blood sample under a microscope. They identify and categorize leukemia by counting various blood cells and morphological features. This technique is time-consuming for the prediction of leukemia. The pathologist's professional skills and experiences may be affecting this procedure, too. In computer vision, traditional machine learning and deep learning techniques are practical roadmaps that increase the accuracy and speed in diagnosing and classifying medical images such as microscopic blood cells. This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of the detection and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs in the microscopic blood cells. First, we have divided the previous works into six categories based on the output of the models. Then, we describe various steps of detection and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs, including Data Augmentation, Preprocessing, Segmentation, Feature Extraction, Feature Selection (Reduction), Classification, and focus on classification step in the methods. Finally, we divide automated detection and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs into three categories, including traditional, Deep Neural Network (DNN), and mixture (traditional and DNN) methods based on the type of classifier in the classification step and analyze them. The results of this study show that in the diagnosis and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs, the Support Vector Machine (SVM) classifier in traditional machine learning models and Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) classifier in deep learning models have widely employed. The performance metrics of the models that use these classifiers compared to the others model are higher.
summary: Leukemia (blood cancer) is an unusual spread of White Blood Cells or Leukocytes (WBCs) in the bone marrow and blood. Pathologists can diagnose leukemia by looking at a person's blood sample under a microscope. They identify and categorize leukemia by counting various blood cells and morphological features. This technique is time-consuming for the prediction of leukemia. The pathologist's professional skills and experiences may be affecting this procedure, too. In computer vision, traditional machine learning and deep learning techniques are practical roadmaps that increase the accuracy and speed in diagnosing and classifying medical images such as microscopic blood cells. This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of the detection and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs in the microscopic blood cells. First, we have divided the previous works into six categories based on the output of the models. Then, we describe various steps of detection and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs, including Data Augmentation, Preprocessing, Segmentation, Feature Extraction, Feature Selection (Reduction), Classification, and focus on classification step in the methods. Finally, we divide automated detection and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs into three categories, including traditional, Deep Neural Network (DNN), and mixture (traditional and DNN) methods based on the type of classifier in the classification step and analyze them. The results of this study show that in the diagnosis and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs, the Support Vector Machine (SVM) classifier in traditional machine learning models and Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) classifier in deep learning models have widely employed. The performance metrics of the models that use these classifiers compared to the others model are higher.
abstract_zh: 白血病（血癌）是白细胞或白细胞 (WBC) 在骨髓和血液中的异常扩散。病理学家可以通过在显微镜下观察人的血液样本来诊断白血病。他们通过计算各种血细胞和形态特征来识别和分类白血病。该技术对于白血病的预测非常耗时。病理学家的专业技能和经验也可能会影响这一过程。在计算机视觉中，传统的机器学习和深度学习技术是实用的路线图，可以提高诊断和分类医学图像（例如显微血细胞）的准确性和速度。本文对显微镜下血细胞中急性白血病和白细胞的检测和分类进行了全面分析。首先，我们根据模型的输出将之前的工作分为六类。然后，我们描述了急性白血病和白细胞的检测和分类的各个步骤，包括数据增强、预处理、分割、特征提取、特征选择（减少）、分类，并重点关注方法中的分类步骤。最后，我们根据分类步骤中分类器的类型将急性白血病和白细胞的自动检测和分类分为传统、深度神经网络（DNN）和混合（传统和DNN）方法三类并进行分析。本研究结果表明，在急性白血病和白细胞的诊断和分类中，传统机器学习模型中的支持向量机（SVM）分类器和深度学习模型中的卷积神经网络（CNN）分类器得到了广泛的应用。与其他模型相比，使用这些分类器的模型的性能指标更高。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用传统机器学习和深度学习技术对显微镜下血液细胞中的急性白血病和白细胞进行自动化检测与分类的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统病理学家依赖显微镜人工诊断急性白血病存在耗时且易受主观因素影响的问题，需通过自动化技术提高诊断效率与准确性。
AI.method: 将现有研究按模型输出分类为六类，系统描述数据增强、预处理、分割、特征提取等步骤，并按分类器类型将方法划分为传统、深度神经网络（DNN）及混合方法三类进行分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，传统机器学习中的支持向量机（SVM）和深度学习中的卷积神经网络（CNN）分类器在诊断性能指标上优于其他模型。
AI.conclusion: SVM与CNN在急性白血病和白细胞分类中表现突出，混合方法可能进一步提升效果，需结合具体场景选择技术路线。

The results of this study show that in the diagnosis and classification of acute leukemia and WBCs, the Support Vector Machine (SVM) classifier in traditional machine learning models and Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) classifier in deep learning models have widely employed. The performance metrics of the models that use these classifiers compared to the others model are higher. 白血病（血癌）是白细胞或白细胞 (WBC) 在骨髓和血液中的异常扩散。病理学家可以通过在显微镜下观察人的血液样本来诊断白血病。他们通过计算各种血细胞和形态特征来识别和分类白血病。该技术对于白血病的预测非常耗时。病理学家的专业技能和经验也可能会影响这一过程。在计算机视觉中，传统的机器学习和深度学习技术是实用的路线图，可以提高诊断和分类医学图像（例如显微血细胞）的准确性和速度。本文对显微镜下血细胞中急性白血病和白细胞的检测和分类进行了全面分析。首先，我们根据模型的输出将之前的工作分为六类。然后，我们描述了急性白血病和白细胞的检测和分类的各个步骤，包括数据增强、预处理、分割、特征提取、特征选择（减少）、分类，并重点关注方法中的分类步骤。最后，我们根据分类步骤中分类器的类型将急性白血病和白细胞的自动检测和分类分为传统、深度神经网络（DNN）和混合（传统和DNN）方法三类并进行分析。本研究结果表明，在急性白血病和白细胞的诊断和分类中，传统机器学习模型中的支持向量机（SVM）分类器和深度学习模型中的卷积神经网络（CNN）分类器得到了广泛的应用。与其他模型相比，使用这些分类器的模型的性能指标更高。 本文综述了利用传统机器学习和深度学习技术对显微镜下血液细胞中的急性白血病和白细胞进行自动化检测与分类的方法。 Mohammad Zolfaghari,Hedieh Sajedi cs.CV

authors_text: Hugo Laurençon,Lucile Saulnier,Thomas Wang,Christopher Akiki,Albert Villanova del Moral,Teven Le Scao,Leandro Von Werra,Chenghao Mou,Eduardo González Ponferrada,Huu Nguyen,Jörg Frohberg,Mario Šaško,Quentin Lhoest,Angelina McMillan-Major,Gerard Dupont,Stella Biderman,Anna Rogers,Loubna Ben allal,Francesco De Toni,Giada Pistilli,Olivier Nguyen,Somaieh Nikpoor,Maraim Masoud,Pierre Colombo,Javier de la Rosa, et al. (29 additional authors not shown)
title: The BigScience ROOTS Corpus: A 1.6TB Composite Multilingual Dataset
title_zh: BigScience ROOTS 语料库：1.6TB 复合多语言数据集
abstract: As language models grow ever larger, the need for large-scale high-quality text datasets has never been more pressing, especially in multilingual settings. The BigScience workshop, a 1-year international and multidisciplinary initiative, was formed with the goal of researching and training large language models as a values-driven undertaking, putting issues of ethics, harm, and governance in the foreground. This paper documents the data creation and curation efforts undertaken by BigScience to assemble the Responsible Open-science Open-collaboration Text Sources (ROOTS) corpus, a 1.6TB dataset spanning 59 languages that was used to train the 176-billion-parameter BigScience Large Open-science Open-access Multilingual (BLOOM) language model. We further release a large initial subset of the corpus and analyses thereof, and hope to empower large-scale monolingual and multilingual modeling projects with both the data and the processing tools, as well as stimulate research around this large multilingual corpus.
summary: As language models grow ever larger, the need for large-scale high-quality text datasets has never been more pressing, especially in multilingual settings. The BigScience workshop, a 1-year international and multidisciplinary initiative, was formed with the goal of researching and training large language models as a values-driven undertaking, putting issues of ethics, harm, and governance in the foreground. This paper documents the data creation and curation efforts undertaken by BigScience to assemble the Responsible Open-science Open-collaboration Text Sources (ROOTS) corpus, a 1.6TB dataset spanning 59 languages that was used to train the 176-billion-parameter BigScience Large Open-science Open-access Multilingual (BLOOM) language model. We further release a large initial subset of the corpus and analyses thereof, and hope to empower large-scale monolingual and multilingual modeling projects with both the data and the processing tools, as well as stimulate research around this large multilingual corpus.
abstract_zh: 随着语言模型变得越来越大，对大规模高质量文本数据集的需求从未如此迫切，尤其是在多语言环境中。 BigScience 研讨会是一项为期一年的国际多学科倡议，其成立的目标是将大型语言模型作为一项价值驱动的事业进行研究和培训，并将伦理、伤害和治理问题放在首位。本文记录了 BigScience 为组装负责任的开放科学开放协作文本源 (ROOTS) 语料库而进行的数据创建和管理工作，这是一个涵盖 59 种语言的 1.6TB 数据集，用于训练具有 1760 亿参数的 BigScience 大型开放科学开放多语言 (BLOOM) 语言模型。我们进一步发布了大型语料库的初始子集及其分析，并希望为大规模单语和多语言建模项目提供数据和处理工具，并刺激围绕这个大型多语言语料库的研究。

AI.tldr: 介绍BigScience团队创建的ROOTS多语言语料库，用于训练大型语言模型BLOOM，并分享数据集和分析工具
AI.motivation: 为训练大型多语言模型提供高质量数据集，同时确保伦理和治理标准
AI.method: 通过多源数据收集、清洗、过滤及处理工具开发，构建涵盖59种语言的1.6TB语料库
AI.result: 发布1.6TB多语言语料库及分析工具，支持多语言模型训练与研究
AI.conclusion: 通过公开数据集和工具，推动多语言模型研究，强调伦理治理的重要性

authors_text: Hongfei Liu,Zhao Kang,Lizong Zhang,Ling Tian,Fujun Hua
title: Document-level Relation Extraction with Cross-sentence Reasoning Graph
title_zh: 使用跨句推理图进行文档级关系提取
comment: This paper is accepted by PAKDD 2023
comments: This paper is accepted by PAKDD 2023
abstract: Relation extraction (RE) has recently moved from the sentence-level to document-level, which requires aggregating document information and using entities and mentions for reasoning. Existing works put entity nodes and mention nodes with similar representations in a document-level graph, whose complex edges may incur redundant information. Furthermore, existing studies only focus on entity-level reasoning paths without considering global interactions among entities cross-sentence. To these ends, we propose a novel document-level RE model with a GRaph information Aggregation and Cross-sentence Reasoning network (GRACR). Specifically, a simplified document-level graph is constructed to model the semantic information of all mentions and sentences in a document, and an entity-level graph is designed to explore relations of long-distance cross-sentence entity pairs. Experimental results show that GRACR achieves excellent performance on two public datasets of document-level RE. It is especially effective in extracting potential relations of cross-sentence entity pairs. Our code is available at https://github.com/UESTC-LHF/GRACR.
summary: Relation extraction (RE) has recently moved from the sentence-level to document-level, which requires aggregating document information and using entities and mentions for reasoning. Existing works put entity nodes and mention nodes with similar representations in a document-level graph, whose complex edges may incur redundant information. Furthermore, existing studies only focus on entity-level reasoning paths without considering global interactions among entities cross-sentence. To these ends, we propose a novel document-level RE model with a GRaph information Aggregation and Cross-sentence Reasoning network (GRACR). Specifically, a simplified document-level graph is constructed to model the semantic information of all mentions and sentences in a document, and an entity-level graph is designed to explore relations of long-distance cross-sentence entity pairs. Experimental results show that GRACR achieves excellent performance on two public datasets of document-level RE. It is especially effective in extracting potential relations of cross-sentence entity pairs. Our code is available at https://github.com/UESTC-LHF/GRACR.
abstract_zh: 关系提取（RE）最近已从句子级别转移到文档级别，这需要聚合文档信息并使用实体和提及进行推理。现有的工作将具有相似表示的实体节点和提及节点放在文档级图中，其复杂的边可能会产生冗余信息。此外，现有研究仅关注实体级推理路径，而没有考虑实体跨句子之间的全局交互。为此，我们提出了一种带有 GRaph 信息聚合和跨句推理网络（GRACR）的新型文档级 RE 模型。具体来说，构建一个简化的文档级图来对文档中所有提及和句子的语义信息进行建模，并设计一个实体级图来探索长距离跨句子实体对的关系。实验结果表明，GRACR 在文档级 RE 的两个公共数据集上取得了优异的性能。它在提取跨句实体对的潜在关系方面特别有效。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/UEESTC-LHF/GRACR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图信息聚合与跨句推理的文档级关系抽取模型GRACR，旨在解决跨句实体关系提取中的冗余信息和全局交互不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文档级关系抽取方法在图结构中存在冗余信息，且未充分考虑跨句实体间的全局交互，导致长距离关系抽取效果不佳。
AI.method: 构建简化文档级图建模提及与句子语义，设计实体级图探索跨句长距离实体关系，通过图信息聚合与跨句推理机制实现多粒度语义交互。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上取得优异性能，尤其在跨句实体关系抽取任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: GRACR通过双图结构与跨句推理有效提升了文档级关系抽取能力，为复杂文档中的实体关系建模提供了新思路。

Existing works put entity nodes and mention nodes with similar representations in a document-level graph, whose complex edges may incur redundant information. Furthermore, existing studies only focus on entity-level reasoning paths without considering global interactions among entities cross-sentence. To these ends, we propose a novel document-level RE model with a GRaph information Aggregation and Cross-sentence Reasoning network (GRACR). Specifically, a simplified document-level graph is constructed to model the semantic information of all mentions and sentences in a document, and an entity-level graph is designed to explore relations of long-distance cross-sentence entity pairs. Experimental results show that GRACR achieves excellent performance on two public datasets of document-level RE. It is especially effective in extracting potential relations of cross-sentence entity pairs. authors_text: Neng Wang,Chenghao Shi,Ruibin Guo,Huimin Lu,Zhiqiang Zheng,Xieyuanli Chen
title: InsMOS: Instance-Aware Moving Object Segmentation in LiDAR Data
title_zh: InsMOS：LiDAR 数据中的实例感知移动对象分割
abstract: Identifying moving objects is a crucial capability for autonomous navigation, consistent map generation, and future trajectory prediction of objects. In this paper, we propose a novel network that addresses the challenge of segmenting moving objects in 3D LiDAR scans. Our approach not only predicts point-wise moving labels but also detects instance information of main traffic participants. Such a design helps determine which instances are actually moving and which ones are temporarily static in the current scene. Our method exploits a sequence of point clouds as input and quantifies them into 4D voxels. We use 4D sparse convolutions to extract motion features from the 4D voxels and inject them into the current scan. Then, we extract spatio-temporal features from the current scan for instance detection and feature fusion. Finally, we design an upsample fusion module to output point-wise labels by fusing the spatio-temporal features and predicted instance information. We evaluated our approach on the LiDAR-MOS benchmark based on SemanticKITTI and achieved better moving object segmentation performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach in integrating instance information for moving object segmentation. Furthermore, our method shows superior performance on the Apollo dataset with a pre-trained model on SemanticKITTI, indicating that our method generalizes well in different scenes.The code and pre-trained models of our method will be released at https://github.com/nubot-nudt/InsMOS.
summary: Identifying moving objects is a crucial capability for autonomous navigation, consistent map generation, and future trajectory prediction of objects. Finally, we design an upsample fusion module to output point-wise labels by fusing the spatio-temporal features and predicted instance information. We evaluated our approach on the LiDAR-MOS benchmark based on SemanticKITTI and achieved better moving object segmentation performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach in integrating instance information for moving object segmentation. Furthermore, our method shows superior performance on the Apollo dataset with a pre-trained model on SemanticKITTI, indicating that our method generalizes well in different scenes.The code and pre-trained models of our method will be released at https://github.com/nubot-nudt/InsMOS.
abstract_zh: 识别移动物体是自主导航、一致地图生成和物体未来轨迹预测的关键能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的网络，可以解决 3D LiDAR 扫描中分割移动物体的挑战。我们的方法不仅可以预测逐点移动标签，还可以检测主要流量参与者的实例信息。这样的设计有助于确定当前场景中哪些实例实际上正在移动，哪些实例暂时静止。我们的方法利用一系列点云作为输入，并将它们量化为 4D 体素。我们使用 4D 稀疏卷积从 4D 体素中提取运动特征并将其注入当前扫描中。然后，我们从当前扫描中提取时空特征，用于实例检测和特征融合。最后，我们设计了一个上采样融合模块，通过融合时空特征和预测实例信息来输出逐点标签。我们在基于 SemanticKITTI 的 LiDAR-MOS 基准上评估了我们的方法，与最先进的方法相比，取得了更好的移动对象分割性能，证明了我们的方法在集成实例信息以进行移动对象分割方面的有效性。此外，我们的方法在 SemanticKITTI 上预训练的模型在 Apollo 数据集上显示出优越的性能，表明我们的方法在不同场景中具有良好的泛化能力。我们方法的代码和预训练模型将在 https://github.com/nubot-nudt/InsMOS 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为InsMOS的新网络，用于在LiDAR数据中进行实例感知的移动物体分割。
AI.motivation: 识别移动物体对于自动驾驶导航、生成一致的地图以及预测物体未来轨迹至关重要。现有的方法在处理LiDAR数据中的移动物体分割时存在不足，尤其是在实例信息的整合方面。
AI.method: 该方法利用点云序列作为输入，并将其量化为4D体素。通过4D稀疏卷积提取运动特征，并将其注入当前扫描中。接着，从当前扫描中提取时空特征用于实例检测和特征融合。最后，设计了一个上采样融合模块，通过融合时空特征和预测的实例信息输出点级标签。
AI.result: 在基于SemanticKITTI的LiDAR-MOS基准测试中，该方法在移动物体分割性能上优于现有方法，并在Apollo数据集上表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: InsMOS方法通过整合实例信息有效提升了移动物体分割性能，并且在不同场景中表现出良好的泛化能力。
