search_text: Environment Transformer and Policy Optimization for Model-Based Offline Reinforcement Learning 基于模型的离线强化学习的环境转换器和策略优化 Interacting with the actual environment to acquire data is often costly and time-consuming in robotic tasks. Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) provides a feasible solution. On the one hand, it eliminates the requirements of interaction with the actual environment. On the other hand, it learns the transition dynamics and reward function from the offline datasets and generates simulated rollouts to accelerate training. Previous model-based offline RL methods adopt probabilistic ensemble neural networks (NN) to model aleatoric uncertainty and epistemic uncertainty. However, this results in an exponential increase in training time and computing resource requirements. Furthermore, these methods are easily disturbed by the accumulative errors of the environment dynamics models when simulating long-term rollouts. To solve the above problems, we propose an uncertainty-aware sequence modeling architecture called Environment Transformer. It models the probability distribution of the environment dynamics and reward function to capture aleatoric uncertainty and treats epistemic uncertainty as a learnable noise parameter. Benefiting from the accurate modeling of the transition dynamics and reward function, Environment Transformer can be combined with arbitrary planning, dynamics programming, or policy optimization algorithms for offline RL. In this case, we perform Conservative Q-Learning (CQL) to learn a conservative Q-function. Through simulation experiments, we demonstrate that our method achieves or exceeds state-of-the-art performance in widely studied offline RL benchmarks. Moreover, we show that Environment Transformer's simulated rollout quality, sample efficiency, and long-term rollout simulation capability are superior to those of previous model-based offline RL methods. 在机器人任务中，与实际环境交互来获取数据通常成本高昂且耗时。基于模型的离线强化学习（RL）提供了一种可行的解决方案。一方面，它消除了与实际环境交互的要求。另一方面，它从离线数据集中学习转换动态和奖励函数，并生成模拟推出以加速训练。先前基于模型的离线强化学习方法采用概率集成神经网络（NN）来模拟任意不确定性和认知不确定性。然而，这会导致训练时间和计算资源需求呈指数增长。此外，这些方法在模拟长期部署时很容易受到环境动力学模型累积误差的干扰。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种称为环境转换器的不确定性感知序列建模架构。它对环境动态和奖励函数的概率分布进行建模，以捕获任意不确定性，并将认知不确定性视为可学习的噪声参数。受益于过渡动力学和奖励函数的精确建模，Environment Transformer 可以与离线 RL 的任意规划、动态规划或策略优化算法相结合。在这种情况下，我们执行保守 Q 学习 (CQL) 来学习保守 Q 函数。通过模拟实验，我们证明我们的方法在广泛研究的离线 RL 基准测试中达到或超过了最先进的性能。此外，我们还表明，Environment Transformer 的模拟 rollout 质量、样本效率和长期 rollout 模拟能力优于之前基于模型的离线 RL 方法。 本文提出一种基于环境转换器的模型驱动离线强化学习方法，通过捕捉不确定性并结合保守Q学习优化策略，提升离线数据下的学习效率和长期模拟能力。 Pengqin Wang,Meixin Zhu,Shaojie Shen cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Multiscale Tensor Decomposition and Rendering Equation Encoding for View Synthesis
title_zh: 用于视图合成的多尺度张量分解和渲染方程编码
abstract: Rendering novel views from captured multi-view images has made considerable progress since the emergence of the neural radiance field. This paper aims to further advance the quality of view synthesis by proposing a novel approach dubbed the neural radiance feature field (NRFF). We first propose a multiscale tensor decomposition scheme to organize learnable features so as to represent scenes from coarse to fine scales. We demonstrate many benefits of the proposed multiscale representation, including more accurate scene shape and appearance reconstruction, and faster convergence compared with the single-scale representation. Instead of encoding view directions to model view-dependent effects, we further propose to encode the rendering equation in the feature space by employing the anisotropic spherical Gaussian mixture predicted from the proposed multiscale representation. The proposed NRFF improves state-of-the-art rendering results by over 1 dB in PSNR on both the NeRF and NSVF synthetic datasets. A significant improvement has also been observed on the real-world Tanks & Temples dataset. Code can be found at https://github.com/imkanghan/nrff.
summary: Rendering novel views from captured multi-view images has made considerable progress since the emergence of the neural radiance field. This paper aims to further advance the quality of view synthesis by proposing a novel approach dubbed the neural radiance feature field (NRFF). We first propose a multiscale tensor decomposition scheme to organize learnable features so as to represent scenes from coarse to fine scales. We demonstrate many benefits of the proposed multiscale representation, including more accurate scene shape and appearance reconstruction, and faster convergence compared with the single-scale representation. Instead of encoding view directions to model view-dependent effects, we further propose to encode the rendering equation in the feature space by employing the anisotropic spherical Gaussian mixture predicted from the proposed multiscale representation. The proposed NRFF improves state-of-the-art rendering results by over 1 dB in PSNR on both the NeRF and NSVF synthetic datasets. A significant improvement has also been observed on the real-world Tanks & Temples dataset. Code can be found at https://github.com/imkanghan/nrff.
abstract_zh: 自从神经辐射场出现以来，从捕获的多视图图像中渲染新颖的视图已经取得了长足的进步。本文旨在通过提出一种称为神经辐射特征场（NRFF）的新方法来进一步提高视图合成的质量。我们首先提出了一种多尺度张量分解方案来组织可学习的特征，从而表示从粗尺度到精细尺度的场景。我们展示了所提出的多尺度表示的许多好处，包括更准确的场景形状和外观重建，以及与单尺度表示相比更快的收敛。我们进一步建议通过使用从所提出的多尺度表示预测的各向异性球形高斯混合来编码特征空间中的渲染方程，而不是编码视图方向来建模依赖于视图的效果。所提出的 NRFF 在 NeRF 和 NSVF 合成数据集上将 PSNR 的最先进渲染结果提高了 1 dB 以上。在现实世界的 Tanks & Temples 数据集上也观察到了显着的改进。代码可以在 https://github.com/imkanghan/nrff 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为神经辐射特征场（NRFF）的新方法，用于提升视图合成的质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经辐射场（NeRF）在视图合成方面取得了显著进展，但在场景形状和外观重建的准确性以及收敛速度上仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 本文首先提出了一种多尺度张量分解方案，以组织可学习的特征，从粗到细表示场景。此外，通过在特征空间中编码渲染方程，使用从多尺度表示中预测的各向异性球形高斯混合体，以模拟视图依赖效应。
AI.result: 在NeRF和NSVF合成数据集上，NRFF方法在PSNR指标上比现有方法提升了超过1 dB。在真实世界Tanks & Temples数据集上也观察到了显著的改进。
AI.conclusion: NRFF方法通过多尺度特征表示和渲染方程编码有效提升了视图合成的质量，具有良好的应用前景。

title: Long Distance GNSS-Denied Visual Inertial Navigation for Autonomous Fixed Wing Unmanned Air Vehicles: SO(3) Manifold Filter based on Virtual Vision Sensor
title_zh: 自主固定翼无人机长距离 GNSS 遮挡视觉惯性导航：基于虚拟视觉传感器的 SO(3) 流形滤波器
comment: 27 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.13242
comments: 27 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.13242
abstract: This article proposes a visual inertial navigation algorithm intended to diminish the horizontal position drift experienced by autonomous fixed wing UAVs (Unmanned Air Vehicles) in the absence of GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite System) signals. In addition to accelerometers, gyroscopes, and magnetometers, the proposed navigation filter relies on the accurate incremental displacement outputs generated by a VO (Visual Odometry) system, denoted here as a Virtual Vision Sensor or VVS, which relies on images of the Earth surface taken by an onboard camera and is itself assisted by the filter inertial estimations. Although not a full replacement for a GNSS receiver since its position observations are relative instead of absolute, the proposed system enables major reductions in the GNSS-Denied attitude and position estimation errors. In order to minimize the accumulation of errors in the absence of absolute observations, the filter is implemented in the manifold of rigid body rotations or SO (3). Stochastic high fidelity simulations of two representative scenarios involving the loss of GNSS signals are employed to evaluate the results. The authors release the C++ implementation of both the visual inertial navigation filter and the high fidelity simulation as open-source software.
summary: This article proposes a visual inertial navigation algorithm intended to diminish the horizontal position drift experienced by autonomous fixed wing UAVs (Unmanned Air Vehicles) in the absence of GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite System) signals. In addition to accelerometers, gyroscopes, and magnetometers, the proposed navigation filter relies on the accurate incremental displacement outputs generated by a VO (Visual Odometry) system, denoted here as a Virtual Vision Sensor or VVS, which relies on images of the Earth surface taken by an onboard camera and is itself assisted by the filter inertial estimations. Although not a full replacement for a GNSS receiver since its position observations are relative instead of absolute, the proposed system enables major reductions in the GNSS-Denied attitude and position estimation errors. In order to minimize the accumulation of errors in the absence of absolute observations, the filter is implemented in the manifold of rigid body rotations or SO (3). Stochastic high fidelity simulations of two representative scenarios involving the loss of GNSS signals are employed to evaluate the results. The authors release the C++ implementation of both the visual inertial navigation filter and the high fidelity simulation as open-source software.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种视觉惯性导航算法，旨在减少自主固定翼无人机在没有 GNSS（全球导航卫星系统）信号的情况下所经历的水平位置漂移。除了加速度计、陀螺仪和磁力计之外，所提出的导航滤波器还依赖于 VO（视觉里程计）系统生成的精确增量位移输出，该系统在此表示为虚拟视觉传感器或 VVS，该系统依赖于机载摄像机拍摄的地球表面图像，并且本身由滤波器惯性估计辅助。虽然由于其位置观测是相对的而不是绝对的，所以不能完全替代 GNSS 接收器，但所提出的系统可以大大减少 GNSS-Denied 姿态和位置估计误差。为了在没有绝对观测值的情况下最大限度地减少误差累积，滤波器在刚体旋转流形或 SO (3) 中实现。采用涉及 GNSS 信号丢失的两种代表性场景的随机高保真度模拟来评估结果。作者将视觉惯性导航滤波器和高保真模拟的 C++ 实现作为开源软件发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟视觉传感器的视觉惯性导航算法，用于在无GNSS信号环境下减少固定翼无人机的水平位置漂移。
AI.motivation: 在无GNSS信号时，固定翼无人机依赖惯性导航易产生位置和姿态误差，需通过视觉信息辅助修正。
AI.method: 结合惯性测量单元（IMU）与视觉里程计（VO）数据，采用SO(3)流形滤波器处理旋转信息，利用虚拟视觉传感器（VVS）提供相对位姿观测。
AI.result: 高保真仿真显示该方法显著降低了无GNSS环境下的导航误差，且开源了C++实现代码。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SO(3)流形滤波框架有效融合多源信息，为长距离无GNSS导航提供了高鲁棒性解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟视觉传感器的视觉惯性导航算法，用于在无GNSS信号环境下减少固定翼无人机的水平位置漂移。
motivation: 在无GNSS信号时，固定翼无人机依赖惯性导航易产生位置和姿态误差，需通过视觉信息辅助修正。
method: 结合惯性测量单元（IMU）与视觉里程计（VO）数据，采用SO(3)流形滤波器处理旋转信息，利用虚拟视觉传感器（VVS）提供相对位姿观测。
result: 高保真仿真显示该方法显著降低了无GNSS环境下的导航误差，且开源了C++实现代码。
conclusion: 提出的SO(3)流形滤波框架有效融合多源信息，为长距离无GNSS导航提供了高鲁棒性解决方案。
search_text: Long Distance GNSS-Denied Visual Inertial Navigation for Autonomous Fixed Wing Unmanned Air Vehicles: SO(3) Manifold Filter based on Virtual Vision Sensor 自主固定翼无人机长距离 GNSS 遮挡视觉惯性导航：基于虚拟视觉传感器的 SO(3) 流形滤波器 This article proposes a visual inertial navigation algorithm intended to diminish the horizontal position drift experienced by autonomous fixed wing UAVs (Unmanned Air Vehicles) in the absence of GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite System) signals. In addition to accelerometers, gyroscopes, and magnetometers, the proposed navigation filter relies on the accurate incremental displacement outputs generated by a VO (Visual Odometry) system, denoted here as a Virtual Vision Sensor or VVS, which relies on images of the Earth surface taken by an onboard camera and is itself assisted by the filter inertial estimations. Although not a full replacement for a GNSS receiver since its position observations are relative instead of absolute, the proposed system enables major reductions in the GNSS-Denied attitude and position estimation errors. In order to minimize the accumulation of errors in the absence of absolute observations, the filter is implemented in the manifold of rigid body rotations or SO (3). Stochastic high fidelity simulations of two representative scenarios involving the loss of GNSS signals are employed to evaluate the results. The authors release the C++ implementation of both the visual inertial navigation filter and the high fidelity simulation as open-source software. 本文提出了一种视觉惯性导航算法，旨在减少自主固定翼无人机在没有 GNSS（全球导航卫星系统）信号的情况下所经历的水平位置漂移。除了加速度计、陀螺仪和磁力计之外，所提出的导航滤波器还依赖于 VO（视觉里程计）系统生成的精确增量位移输出，该系统在此表示为虚拟视觉传感器或 VVS，该系统依赖于机载摄像机拍摄的地球表面图像，并且本身由滤波器惯性估计辅助。虽然由于其位置观测是相对的而不是绝对的，所以不能完全替代 GNSS 接收器，但所提出的系统可以大大减少 GNSS-Denied 姿态和位置估计误差。为了在没有绝对观测值的情况下最大限度地减少误差累积，滤波器在刚体旋转流形或 SO (3) 中实现。采用涉及 GNSS 信号丢失的两种代表性场景的随机高保真度模拟来评估结果。作者将视觉惯性导航滤波器和高保真模拟的 C++ 实现作为开源软件发布。 本文提出了一种基于虚拟视觉传感器的视觉惯性导航算法，用于在无GNSS信号环境下减少固定翼无人机的水平位置漂移。 Eduardo Gallo,Antonio Barrientos cs.RO

authors_text: Jiacheng Li,Longhui Wei,ZongYuan Zhan,Xin He,Siliang Tang,Qi Tian,Yueting Zhuang
title: Lformer: Text-to-Image Generation with L-shape Block Parallel Decoding
title_zh: Lformer：使用 L 形块并行解码生成文本到图像
abstract: Generative transformers have shown their superiority in synthesizing high-fidelity and high-resolution images, such as good diversity and training stability. However, they suffer from the problem of slow generation since they need to generate a long token sequence autoregressively. To better accelerate the generative transformers while keeping good generation quality, we propose Lformer, a semi-autoregressive text-to-image generation model. Lformer firstly encodes an image into $h{\times}h$ discrete tokens, then divides these tokens into $h$ mirrored L-shape blocks from the top left to the bottom right and decodes the tokens in a block parallelly in each step. Lformer predicts the area adjacent to the previous context like autoregressive models thus it is more stable while accelerating. By leveraging the 2D structure of image tokens, Lformer achieves faster speed than the existing transformer-based methods while keeping good generation quality. Moreover, the pretrained Lformer can edit images without the requirement for finetuning. We can roll back to the early steps for regeneration or edit the image with a bounding box and a text prompt.
summary: Generative transformers have shown their superiority in synthesizing high-fidelity and high-resolution images, such as good diversity and training stability. However, they suffer from the problem of slow generation since they need to generate a long token sequence autoregressively. To better accelerate the generative transformers while keeping good generation quality, we propose Lformer, a semi-autoregressive text-to-image generation model. Lformer firstly encodes an image into $h{\times}h$ discrete tokens, then divides these tokens into $h$ mirrored L-shape blocks from the top left to the bottom right and decodes the tokens in a block parallelly in each step. Lformer predicts the area adjacent to the previous context like autoregressive models thus it is more stable while accelerating. By leveraging the 2D structure of image tokens, Lformer achieves faster speed than the existing transformer-based methods while keeping good generation quality. Moreover, the pretrained Lformer can edit images without the requirement for finetuning. We can roll back to the early steps for regeneration or edit the image with a bounding box and a text prompt.
abstract_zh: 生成变压器在合成高保真和高分辨率图像方面表现出了其优越性，例如良好的多样性和训练稳定性。然而，它们存在生成速度慢的问题，因为它们需要自回归生成长令牌序列。为了更好地加速生成变压器，同时保持良好的生成质量，我们提出了 Lformer，一种半自回归文本到图像生成模型。 Lformer 首先将图像编码为 $h{\times}h$ 个离散 token，然后将这些 token 从左上到右下划分为 $h$ 个镜像 L 形块，并在每一步中并行解码块中的 token。 Lformer 像自回归模型一样预测与先前上下文相邻的区域，因此在加速时更加稳定。通过利用图像令牌的 2D 结构，Lformer 实现了比现有基于 Transformer 的方法更快的速度，同时保持良好的生成质量。此外，经过预训练的 Lformer 可以编辑图像，无需进行微调。我们可以回滚到早期的重新生成步骤，或者使用边界框和文本提示编辑图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lformer模型，通过L形分块并行解码加速文本到图像生成，同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式Transformer模型虽能生成高质量图像，但因需自回归生成长序列导致速度缓慢。
AI.method: 将图像编码为h×h离散标记，划分为h个镜像L形块，按块并行解码，并预测前文相邻区域以保持稳定性。
AI.result: 相比现有方法速度更快且保持生成质量，预训练模型可直接进行图像编辑（无需微调）。
AI.conclusion: Lformer通过二维结构利用实现高效生成与编辑，为文本到图像生成提供新思路。

title: External Camera-based Mobile Robot Pose Estimation for Collaborative Perception with Smart Edge Sensors
title_zh: 基于外部摄像头的移动机器人姿态估计，用于与智能边缘传感器的协作感知
abstract: We present an approach for estimating a mobile robot's pose w.r.t. the allocentric coordinates of a network of static cameras using multi-view RGB images. The images are processed online, locally on smart edge sensors by deep neural networks to detect the robot and estimate 2D keypoints defined at distinctive positions of the 3D robot model. Robot keypoint detections are synchronized and fused on a central backend, where the robot's pose is estimated via multi-view minimization of reprojection errors. Through the pose estimation from external cameras, the robot's localization can be initialized in an allocentric map from a completely unknown state (kidnapped robot problem) and robustly tracked over time. We conduct a series of experiments evaluating the accuracy and robustness of the camera-based pose estimation compared to the robot's internal navigation stack, showing that our camera-based method achieves pose errors below 3 cm and 1° and does not drift over time, as the robot is localized allocentrically. With the robot's pose precisely estimated, its observations can be fused into the allocentric scene model. We show a real-world application, where observations from mobile robot and static smart edge sensors are fused to collaboratively build a 3D semantic map of a $\sim$240 m$^2$ indoor environment.
summary: We present an approach for estimating a mobile robot's pose w.r.t. the allocentric coordinates of a network of static cameras using multi-view RGB images. The images are processed online, locally on smart edge sensors by deep neural networks to detect the robot and estimate 2D keypoints defined at distinctive positions of the 3D robot model. Robot keypoint detections are synchronized and fused on a central backend, where the robot's pose is estimated via multi-view minimization of reprojection errors. Through the pose estimation from external cameras, the robot's localization can be initialized in an allocentric map from a completely unknown state (kidnapped robot problem) and robustly tracked over time. We conduct a series of experiments evaluating the accuracy and robustness of the camera-based pose estimation compared to the robot's internal navigation stack, showing that our camera-based method achieves pose errors below 3 cm and 1° and does not drift over time, as the robot is localized allocentrically. With the robot's pose precisely estimated, its observations can be fused into the allocentric scene model. We show a real-world application, where observations from mobile robot and static smart edge sensors are fused to collaboratively build a 3D semantic map of a $\sim$240 m$^2$ indoor environment.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种估计移动机器人姿态的方法。使用多视图 RGB 图像的静态摄像机网络的异心坐标。这些图像通过深度神经网络在智能边缘传感器上进行本地在线处理，以检测机器人并估计在 3D 机器人模型的独特位置定义的 2D 关键点。机器人关键点检测在中央后端进行同步和融合，其中通过多视图重投影误差最小化来估计机器人的姿态。通过外部摄像机的位姿估计，机器人的定位可以在完全未知的状态（被绑架的机器人问题）的异中心地图中初始化，并随着时间的推移进行稳健的跟踪。我们进行了一系列实验，评估基于相机的位姿估计与机器人内部导航堆栈相比的准确性和鲁棒性，结果表明，我们基于相机的方法实现了低于 3 厘米和 1° 的位姿误差，并且不会随时间漂移，因为机器人是异中心定位的。通过精确估计机器人的姿态，其观察结果可以融合到异心场景模型中。我们展示了一个真实世界的应用程序，其中移动机器人和静态智能边缘传感器的观察结果被融合在一起，协作构建 $\sim$240 m$^2$ 室内环境的 3D 语义图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于外部摄像头的移动机器人位姿估计方法，通过多视角RGB图像与智能边缘传感器协作实现分配坐标系下的定位与地图构建。
AI.motivation: 解决移动机器人被绑架问题（完全未知状态初始化）及传统导航堆栈定位漂移问题，提升协作感知场景下的定位精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用智能边缘传感器部署的深度神经网络实时检测机器人并估计2D关键点，通过多视角重投影误差最小化在中心后端融合数据实现位姿估计。
AI.result: 位姿估计误差低于3cm和1°，无长期漂移，成功在240㎡室内环境中融合机器人与静态传感器观测构建三维语义地图。
AI.conclusion: 外部摄像头协同智能边缘传感器可实现高精度分配坐标系定位，为协作式三维语义地图构建提供可靠基础。

With the robot's pose precisely estimated, its observations can be fused into the allocentric scene model. We show a real-world application, where observations from mobile robot and static smart edge sensors are fused to collaboratively build a 3D semantic map of a $\sim$240 m$^2$ indoor environment. 我们提出了一种估计移动机器人姿态的方法。使用多视图 RGB 图像的静态摄像机网络的异心坐标。这些图像通过深度神经网络在智能边缘传感器上进行本地在线处理，以检测机器人并估计在 3D 机器人模型的独特位置定义的 2D 关键点。机器人关键点检测在中央后端进行同步和融合，其中通过多视图重投影误差最小化来估计机器人的姿态。通过外部摄像机的位姿估计，机器人的定位可以在完全未知的状态（被绑架的机器人问题）的异中心地图中初始化，并随着时间的推移进行稳健的跟踪。我们进行了一系列实验，评估基于相机的位姿估计与机器人内部导航堆栈相比的准确性和鲁棒性，结果表明，我们基于相机的方法实现了低于 3 厘米和 1° 的位姿误差，并且不会随时间漂移，因为机器人是异中心定位的。通过精确估计机器人的姿态，其观察结果可以融合到异心场景模型中。我们展示了一个真实世界的应用程序，其中移动机器人和静态智能边缘传感器的观察结果被融合在一起，协作构建 $\sim$240 m$^2$ 室内环境的 3D 语义图。 本文提出一种基于外部摄像头的移动机器人位姿估计方法，通过多视角RGB图像与智能边缘传感器协作实现分配坐标系下的定位与地图构建。 Simon Bultmann,Raphael Memmesheimer,Sven Behnke cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Tamara G. Grossmann,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Orietta Da Rold
title: Hidden Knowledge: Mathematical Methods for the Extraction of the Fingerprint of Medieval Paper from Digital Images
title_zh: 隐藏的知识：从数字图像中提取中世纪纸张指纹的数学方法
abstract: Medieval paper, a handmade product, is made with a mould which leaves an indelible imprint on the sheet of paper. This imprint includes chain lines, laid lines and watermarks which are often visible on the sheet. Extracting these features allows the identification of paper stock and gives information about chronology, localisation and movement of books and people. Most computational work for feature extraction of paper analysis has so far focused on radiography or transmitted light images. While these imaging methods provide clear visualisation for the features of interest, they are expensive and time consuming in their acquisition and not feasible for smaller institutions. However, reflected light images of medieval paper manuscripts are abundant and possibly cheaper in their acquisition. In this paper, we propose algorithms to detect and extract the laid and chain lines from reflected light images. We tackle the main drawback of reflected light images, that is, the low contrast attenuation of lines and intensity jumps due to noise and degradation, by employing the spectral total variation decomposition and develop methods for subsequent line extraction. Our results clearly demonstrate the feasibility of using reflected light images in paper analysis. This work enables the feature extraction for paper manuscripts that have otherwise not been analysed due to a lack of appropriate images. We also open the door for paper stock identification at scale.
summary: Medieval paper, a handmade product, is made with a mould which leaves an indelible imprint on the sheet of paper. This imprint includes chain lines, laid lines and watermarks which are often visible on the sheet. Extracting these features allows the identification of paper stock and gives information about chronology, localisation and movement of books and people. However, reflected light images of medieval paper manuscripts are abundant and possibly cheaper in their acquisition. In this paper, we propose algorithms to detect and extract the laid and chain lines from reflected light images. We tackle the main drawback of reflected light images, that is, the low contrast attenuation of lines and intensity jumps due to noise and degradation, by employing the spectral total variation decomposition and develop methods for subsequent line extraction. Our results clearly demonstrate the feasibility of using reflected light images in paper analysis. This work enables the feature extraction for paper manuscripts that have otherwise not been analysed due to a lack of appropriate images. We also open the door for paper stock identification at scale.
abstract_zh: 中世纪的纸张是一种手工制品，是用模具制成的，在纸张上留下不可磨灭的印记。该印记包括在纸张上经常可见的链线、直纹线和水印。提取这些特征可以识别纸质，并提供有关书籍和人员的时间顺序、定位和移动的信息。迄今为止，纸张分析特征提取的大多数计算工作都集中在放射线照相或透射光图像上。虽然这些成像方法为感兴趣的特征提供了清晰的可视化，但它们的获取成本昂贵且耗时，并且对于较小的机构来说不可行。然而，中世纪纸质手稿的反射光图像非常丰富，而且获取起来可能更便宜。在本文中，我们提出了从反射光图像中检测和提取直纹线和链线的算法。我们通过采用光谱全变分分解来解决反射光图像的主要缺点，即线的对比度衰减低以及由于噪声和退化而导致的强度跳跃，并开发了后续线提取的方法。我们的结果清楚地证明了在纸张分析中使用反射光图像的可行性。这项工作可以对由于缺乏适当图像而未进行分析的纸质手稿进行特征提取。我们还为大规模纸材识别打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从中世纪手稿的反射光图像中提取铺线和链线的算法，以替代传统昂贵的透射光成像方法。
AI.motivation: 传统透射光或X射线成像方法成本高且难以普及，而反射光图像资源丰富且获取成本低，但存在对比度低和噪声干扰的问题。
AI.method: 采用谱总变分分解技术处理反射光图像的低对比度和噪声，开发后续线条提取方法。
AI.result: 实验验证了反射光图像在纸张分析中的可行性，使此前因缺乏合适图像而无法分析的手稿得以研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模纸张原料鉴定提供了新途径，推动了纸张特征分析的普及化应用。

authors_text: Kota Nakamura,Yasuko Matsubara,Koki Kawabata,Yuhei Umeda,Yuichiro Wada,Yasushi Sakurai
title: Fast and Multi-aspect Mining of Complex Time-stamped Event Streams
title_zh: 复杂时间戳事件流的快速、多方面挖掘
abstract: Given a huge, online stream of time-evolving events with multiple attributes, such as online shopping logs: (item, price, brand, time), and local mobility activities: (pick-up and drop-off locations, time), how can we summarize large, dynamic high-order tensor streams? How can we see any hidden patterns, rules, and anomalies? Our answer is to focus on two types of patterns, i.e., ''regimes'' and ''components'', for which we present CubeScope, an efficient and effective method over high-order tensor streams. Specifically, it identifies any sudden discontinuity and recognizes distinct dynamical patterns, ''regimes'' (e.g., weekday/weekend/holiday patterns). In each regime, it also performs multi-way summarization for all attributes (e.g., item, price, brand, and time) and discovers hidden ''components'' representing latent groups (e.g., item/brand groups) and their relationship. Thanks to its concise but effective summarization, CubeScope can also detect the sudden appearance of anomalies and identify the types of anomalies that occur in practice. Our proposed method has the following properties: (a) Effective: it captures dynamical multi-aspect patterns, i.e., regimes and components, and statistically summarizes all the events; (b) General: it is practical for successful application to data compression, pattern discovery, and anomaly detection on various types of tensor streams; (c) Scalable: our algorithm does not depend on the length of the data stream and its dimensionality. Extensive experiments on real datasets demonstrate that CubeScope finds meaningful patterns and anomalies correctly, and consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods as regards accuracy and execution speed.
summary: Given a huge, online stream of time-evolving events with multiple attributes, such as online shopping logs: (item, price, brand, time), and local mobility activities: (pick-up and drop-off locations, time), how can we summarize large, dynamic high-order tensor streams? How can we see any hidden patterns, rules, and anomalies? Our answer is to focus on two types of patterns, i.e., ''regimes'' and ''components'', for which we present CubeScope, an efficient and effective method over high-order tensor streams. Specifically, it identifies any sudden discontinuity and recognizes distinct dynamical patterns, ''regimes'' (e.g., weekday/weekend/holiday patterns). In each regime, it also performs multi-way summarization for all attributes (e.g., item, price, brand, and time) and discovers hidden ''components'' representing latent groups (e.g., item/brand groups) and their relationship. Thanks to its concise but effective summarization, CubeScope can also detect the sudden appearance of anomalies and identify the types of anomalies that occur in practice. Our proposed method has the following properties: (a) Effective: it captures dynamical multi-aspect patterns, i.e., regimes and components, and statistically summarizes all the events; (b) General: it is practical for successful application to data compression, pattern discovery, and anomaly detection on various types of tensor streams; (c) Scalable: our algorithm does not depend on the length of the data stream and its dimensionality. Extensive experiments on real datasets demonstrate that CubeScope finds meaningful patterns and anomalies correctly, and consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods as regards accuracy and execution speed.
abstract_zh: 给定具有多个属性的巨大在线时间演变事件流，例如在线购物日志：（商品、价格、品牌、时间）和本地出行活动：（上下车地点、时间），我们如何总结大型动态高阶张量流？我们如何才能看到任何隐藏的模式、规则和异常现象？我们的答案是关注两种类型的模式，即“制度”和“组件”，为此我们提出了 CubeScope，这是一种针对高阶张量流的高效且有效的方法。具体来说，它可以识别任何突然的不连续性并识别不同的动态模式、“状态”（例如，工作日/周末/假日模式）。在每个机制中，它还对所有属性（例如，商品、价格、品牌和时间）执行多路汇总，并发现代表潜在组（例如，商品/品牌组）及其关系的隐藏“组件”。由于其简洁而有效的概括，CubeScope还可以检测突然出现的异常并识别实践中发生的异常类型。我们提出的方法具有以下属性：（a）有效：它捕获动态多方面模式，即制度和组成部分，并对所有事件进行统计总结； (b) 一般性：对于成功应用于各种类型张量流的数据压缩、模式发现和异常检测是实用的； (c) 可扩展：我们的算法不依赖于数据流的长度及其维度。对真实数据集的大量实验表明，CubeScope 可以正确发现有意义的模式和异常，并且在准确性和执行速度方面始终优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效方法CubeScope，用于动态高阶张量流的多方面模式挖掘与异常检测
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理大规模动态高阶张量流，无法高效挖掘多属性事件中的模式与异常
AI.method: 提出CubeScope方法，通过识别regimes和components进行多维总结，实现动态张量流的高效模式挖掘与异常检测
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了CubeScope的有效性，准确性和速度均优于现有先进方法
AI.conclusion: CubeScope在动态张量流分析中表现出高效、通用和可扩展性，适用于多种实际场景

title: Guiding Pseudo-labels with Uncertainty Estimation for Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 通过不确定性估计指导伪标签以实现无源无监督域适应
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
comments: To be published in Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
abstract: Standard Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods assume the availability of both source and target data during the adaptation. In this work, we investigate Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA), a specific case of UDA where a model is adapted to a target domain without access to source data. We propose a novel approach for the SF-UDA setting based on a loss reweighting strategy that brings robustness against the noise that inevitably affects the pseudo-labels. The classification loss is reweighted based on the reliability of the pseudo-labels that is measured by estimating their uncertainty. Guided by such reweighting strategy, the pseudo-labels are progressively refined by aggregating knowledge from neighbouring samples. Furthermore, a self-supervised contrastive framework is leveraged as a target space regulariser to enhance such knowledge aggregation. A novel negative pairs exclusion strategy is proposed to identify and exclude negative pairs made of samples sharing the same class, even in presence of some noise in the pseudo-labels. Our method outperforms previous methods on three major benchmarks by a large margin. We set the new SF-UDA state-of-the-art on VisDA-C and DomainNet with a performance gain of +1.8% on both benchmarks and on PACS with +12.3% in the single-source setting and +6.6% in multi-target adaptation. Additional analyses demonstrate that the proposed approach is robust to the noise, which results in significantly more accurate pseudo-labels compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Standard Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods assume the availability of both source and target data during the adaptation. In this work, we investigate Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA), a specific case of UDA where a model is adapted to a target domain without access to source data. We propose a novel approach for the SF-UDA setting based on a loss reweighting strategy that brings robustness against the noise that inevitably affects the pseudo-labels. The classification loss is reweighted based on the reliability of the pseudo-labels that is measured by estimating their uncertainty. Guided by such reweighting strategy, the pseudo-labels are progressively refined by aggregating knowledge from neighbouring samples. Furthermore, a self-supervised contrastive framework is leveraged as a target space regulariser to enhance such knowledge aggregation. A novel negative pairs exclusion strategy is proposed to identify and exclude negative pairs made of samples sharing the same class, even in presence of some noise in the pseudo-labels. Our method outperforms previous methods on three major benchmarks by a large margin. We set the new SF-UDA state-of-the-art on VisDA-C and DomainNet with a performance gain of +1.8% on both benchmarks and on PACS with +12.3% in the single-source setting and +6.6% in multi-target adaptation. Additional analyses demonstrate that the proposed approach is robust to the noise, which results in significantly more accurate pseudo-labels compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 标准无监督域适应 (UDA) 方法假设源数据和目标数据在适应过程中均可用。在这项工作中，我们研究了无源无监督域适应（SF-UDA），这是 UDA 的一种特定情况，其中模型无需访问源数据即可适应目标域。我们提出了一种基于损失重新加权策略的 SF-UDA 设置的新颖方法，该方法针对不可避免地影响伪标签的噪声带来了鲁棒性。分类损失根据伪标签的可靠性重新加权，伪标签的可靠性是通过估计伪标签的不确定性来衡量的。在这种重新加权策略的指导下，通过聚合相邻样本的知识来逐步细化伪标签。此外，利用自监督对比框架作为目标空间正则器来增强这种知识聚合。提出了一种新颖的负对排除策略来识别和排除由共享同一类的样本组成的负对，即使伪标签中存在一些噪声。我们的方法在三个主要基准上大大优于以前的方法。我们在 VisDA-C 和 DomainNet 上设置了最新的 SF-UDA，在两个基准测试中性能提升了 +1.8%，在 PACS 上，单源设置中的性能提升了 +12.3%，多目标适应的性能提升了 +6.6%。额外的分析表明，所提出的方法对噪声具有鲁棒性，与最先进的方法相比，这会产生更准确的伪标签。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无源数据的领域自适应（SF-UDA）问题，提出基于不确定性估计的伪标签引导方法以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应（UDA）依赖源数据，而源免费UDA（SF-UDA）在无源数据情况下易受伪标签噪声影响，需提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过不确定性估计对伪标签进行动态加权，结合邻域样本知识聚合与自监督对比框架，提出负样本排除策略以减少伪标签噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在VisDA-C、DomainNet和PACS基准测试中分别取得+1.8%、+12.3%和+6.6%的性能提升，刷新SF-UDA领域SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过不确定性驱动的伪标签优化和噪声鲁棒性设计，显著提升了源免费领域自适应的准确率与稳定性。

search_text: Guiding Pseudo-labels with Uncertainty Estimation for Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 通过不确定性估计指导伪标签以实现无源无监督域适应 Standard Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods assume the availability of both source and target data during the adaptation. In this work, we investigate Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA), a specific case of UDA where a model is adapted to a target domain without access to source data. We propose a novel approach for the SF-UDA setting based on a loss reweighting strategy that brings robustness against the noise that inevitably affects the pseudo-labels. The classification loss is reweighted based on the reliability of the pseudo-labels that is measured by estimating their uncertainty. Guided by such reweighting strategy, the pseudo-labels are progressively refined by aggregating knowledge from neighbouring samples. Furthermore, a self-supervised contrastive framework is leveraged as a target space regulariser to enhance such knowledge aggregation. A novel negative pairs exclusion strategy is proposed to identify and exclude negative pairs made of samples sharing the same class, even in presence of some noise in the pseudo-labels. Our method outperforms previous methods on three major benchmarks by a large margin. We set the new SF-UDA state-of-the-art on VisDA-C and DomainNet with a performance gain of +1.8% on both benchmarks and on PACS with +12.3% in the single-source setting and +6.6% in multi-target adaptation. Additional analyses demonstrate that the proposed approach is robust to the noise, which results in significantly more accurate pseudo-labels compared to state-of-the-art approaches. 标准无监督域适应 (UDA) 方法假设源数据和目标数据在适应过程中均可用。在这项工作中，我们研究了无源无监督域适应（SF-UDA），这是 UDA 的一种特定情况，其中模型无需访问源数据即可适应目标域。我们提出了一种基于损失重新加权策略的 SF-UDA 设置的新颖方法，该方法针对不可避免地影响伪标签的噪声带来了鲁棒性。分类损失根据伪标签的可靠性重新加权，伪标签的可靠性是通过估计伪标签的不确定性来衡量的。在这种重新加权策略的指导下，通过聚合相邻样本的知识来逐步细化伪标签。此外，利用自监督对比框架作为目标空间正则器来增强这种知识聚合。提出了一种新颖的负对排除策略来识别和排除由共享同一类的样本组成的负对，即使伪标签中存在一些噪声。我们的方法在三个主要基准上大大优于以前的方法。我们在 VisDA-C 和 DomainNet 上设置了最新的 SF-UDA，在两个基准测试中性能提升了 +1.8%，在 PACS 上，单源设置中的性能提升了 +12.3%，多目标适应的性能提升了 +6.6%。额外的分析表明，所提出的方法对噪声具有鲁棒性，与最先进的方法相比，这会产生更准确的伪标签。 本文研究无源数据的领域自适应（SF-UDA）问题，提出基于不确定性估计的伪标签引导方法以提升模型性能。 Mattia Litrico,Alessio Del Bue,Pietro Morerio cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hai Ci,Mickel Liu,Xuehai Pan,Fangwei Zhong,Yizhou Wang
title: Proactive Multi-Camera Collaboration For 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 主动多摄像头协作进行 3D 人体姿势估计
abstract: This paper presents a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) scheme for proactive Multi-Camera Collaboration in 3D Human Pose Estimation in dynamic human crowds. Traditional fixed-viewpoint multi-camera solutions for human motion capture (MoCap) are limited in capture space and susceptible to dynamic occlusions. Active camera approaches proactively control camera poses to find optimal viewpoints for 3D reconstruction. However, current methods still face challenges with credit assignment and environment dynamics. To address these issues, our proposed method introduces a novel Collaborative Triangulation Contribution Reward (CTCR) that improves convergence and alleviates multi-agent credit assignment issues resulting from using 3D reconstruction accuracy as the shared reward. Additionally, we jointly train our model with multiple world dynamics learning tasks to better capture environment dynamics and encourage anticipatory behaviors for occlusion avoidance. We evaluate our proposed method in four photo-realistic UE4 environments to ensure validity and generalizability. Empirical results show that our method outperforms fixed and active baselines in various scenarios with different numbers of cameras and humans.
summary: This paper presents a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) scheme for proactive Multi-Camera Collaboration in 3D Human Pose Estimation in dynamic human crowds. Traditional fixed-viewpoint multi-camera solutions for human motion capture (MoCap) are limited in capture space and susceptible to dynamic occlusions. Active camera approaches proactively control camera poses to find optimal viewpoints for 3D reconstruction. However, current methods still face challenges with credit assignment and environment dynamics. To address these issues, our proposed method introduces a novel Collaborative Triangulation Contribution Reward (CTCR) that improves convergence and alleviates multi-agent credit assignment issues resulting from using 3D reconstruction accuracy as the shared reward. Additionally, we jointly train our model with multiple world dynamics learning tasks to better capture environment dynamics and encourage anticipatory behaviors for occlusion avoidance. We evaluate our proposed method in four photo-realistic UE4 environments to ensure validity and generalizability. Empirical results show that our method outperforms fixed and active baselines in various scenarios with different numbers of cameras and humans.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 方案，用于在动态人群中进行 3D 人体姿势估计中的主动多摄像头协作。用于人体动作捕捉 (MoCap) 的传统固定视点多摄像头解决方案的捕捉空间有限，并且容易受到动态遮挡的影响。主动相机方法主动控制相机姿势，以找到 3D 重建的最佳视点。然而，当前的方法仍然面临信用分配和环境动态的挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出的方法引入了一种新颖的协作三角测量贡献奖励（CTCR），它可以提高收敛性并减轻由于使用 3D 重建精度作为共享奖励而导致的多智能体信用分配问题。此外，我们通过多个世界动态学习任务联合训练我们的模型，以更好地捕获环境动态并鼓励避免遮挡的预期行为。我们在四种逼真的 UE4 环境中评估我们提出的方法，以确保有效性和通用性。经验结果表明，在具有不同数量的摄像机和人员的各种场景中，我们的方法优于固定基线和活动基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体强化学习的主动多摄像头协作方法，用于动态人群中的3D人体姿态估计，以克服传统固定视角系统的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统固定视角多摄像头系统存在捕捉空间有限和动态遮挡问题，而现有主动摄像头方法在信用分配和环境动态建模方面仍面临挑战，需提升多摄像头协作的效率和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出协作三角测量贡献奖励（CTCR）机制，结合多世界动态学习任务，通过强化学习优化摄像头协作策略，提升遮挡规避和3D重建精度。
AI.result: 在四个高保真UE4环境中测试，方法在不同摄像头和人数场景下均优于固定视角和主动摄像头基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多摄像头协作中的信用分配问题，通过动态环境学习提升了遮挡规避能力，在多种场景下均表现出优越的3D姿态估计性能。

title: Graph Neural Networks in Vision-Language Image Understanding: A Survey
title_zh: 视觉语言图像理解中的图神经网络：一项调查
abstract: 2D image understanding is a complex problem within computer vision, but it holds the key to providing human-level scene comprehension. It goes further than identifying the objects in an image, and instead, it attempts to understand the scene. Solutions to this problem form the underpinning of a range of tasks, including image captioning, visual question answering (VQA), and image retrieval. Graphs provide a natural way to represent the relational arrangement between objects in an image, and thus, in recent years graph neural networks (GNNs) have become a standard component of many 2D image understanding pipelines, becoming a core architectural component, especially in the VQA group of tasks. In this survey, we review this rapidly evolving field and we provide a taxonomy of graph types used in 2D image understanding approaches, a comprehensive list of the GNN models used in this domain, and a roadmap of future potential developments. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive survey that covers image captioning, visual question answering, and image retrieval techniques that focus on using GNNs as the main part of their architecture.
summary: 2D image understanding is a complex problem within computer vision, but it holds the key to providing human-level scene comprehension. It goes further than identifying the objects in an image, and instead, it attempts to understand the scene. Solutions to this problem form the underpinning of a range of tasks, including image captioning, visual question answering (VQA), and image retrieval. Graphs provide a natural way to represent the relational arrangement between objects in an image, and thus, in recent years graph neural networks (GNNs) have become a standard component of many 2D image understanding pipelines, becoming a core architectural component, especially in the VQA group of tasks. In this survey, we review this rapidly evolving field and we provide a taxonomy of graph types used in 2D image understanding approaches, a comprehensive list of the GNN models used in this domain, and a roadmap of future potential developments. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive survey that covers image captioning, visual question answering, and image retrieval techniques that focus on using GNNs as the main part of their architecture.
abstract_zh: 2D 图像理解是计算机视觉中的一个复杂问题，但它是提供人类级别的场景理解的关键。它不仅仅是识别图像中的对象，而是尝试理解场景。该问题的解决方案构成了一系列任务的基础，包括图像字幕、视觉问答 (VQA) 和图像检索。图提供了一种自然的方式来表示图像中对象之间的关系排列，因此，近年来图神经网络（GNN）已成为许多 2D 图像理解管道的标准组件，成为核心架构组件，尤其是在 VQA 任务组中。在本次调查中，我们回顾了这个快速发展的领域，并提供了 2D 图像理解方法中使用的图形类型的分类、该领域中使用的 GNN 模型的完整列表以及未来潜在发展的路线图。据我们所知，这是第一个全面的调查，涵盖图像字幕、视觉问答和图像检索技术，重点是使用 GNN 作为其架构的主要部分。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图神经网络（GNN）在视觉语言图像理解领域的应用，涵盖图像描述、视觉问答和图像检索等任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理复杂场景中的对象关系，而GNN能有效建模图像中对象间的交互，成为提升场景理解能力的关键技术。
AI.method: 通过分类图类型、梳理GNN模型体系并分析典型应用，构建领域知识框架，总结技术演进路线。
AI.result: 首次系统性总结GNN在三大核心任务中的应用，提出图结构分类标准，梳理代表性模型并预测未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: GNN显著提升了视觉语言任务的性能，但需进一步解决模型可扩展性、跨模态对齐等挑战。

authors_text: Finn Behrendt,Debayan Bhattacharya,Julia Krüger,Roland Opfer,Alexander Schlaefer
title: Patched Diffusion Models for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Brain MRI
title_zh: 用于脑 MRI 中无监督异常检测的修补扩散模型
comment: Accepted full paper at the MIDL23 conference
comments: Accepted full paper at the MIDL23 conference
abstract: The use of supervised deep learning techniques to detect pathologies in brain MRI scans can be challenging due to the diversity of brain anatomy and the need for annotated data sets. An alternative approach is to use unsupervised anomaly detection, which only requires sample-level labels of healthy brains to create a reference representation. This reference representation can then be compared to unhealthy brain anatomy in a pixel-wise manner to identify abnormalities. To accomplish this, generative models are needed to create anatomically consistent MRI scans of healthy brains. While recent diffusion models have shown promise in this task, accurately generating the complex structure of the human brain remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose a method that reformulates the generation task of diffusion models as a patch-based estimation of healthy brain anatomy, using spatial context to guide and improve reconstruction. We evaluate our approach on data of tumors and multiple sclerosis lesions and demonstrate a relative improvement of 25.1% compared to existing baselines.
summary: The use of supervised deep learning techniques to detect pathologies in brain MRI scans can be challenging due to the diversity of brain anatomy and the need for annotated data sets. An alternative approach is to use unsupervised anomaly detection, which only requires sample-level labels of healthy brains to create a reference representation. This reference representation can then be compared to unhealthy brain anatomy in a pixel-wise manner to identify abnormalities. To accomplish this, generative models are needed to create anatomically consistent MRI scans of healthy brains. While recent diffusion models have shown promise in this task, accurately generating the complex structure of the human brain remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose a method that reformulates the generation task of diffusion models as a patch-based estimation of healthy brain anatomy, using spatial context to guide and improve reconstruction. We evaluate our approach on data of tumors and multiple sclerosis lesions and demonstrate a relative improvement of 25.1% compared to existing baselines.
abstract_zh: 由于大脑解剖结构的多样性以及对注释数据集的需求，使用监督深度学习技术来检测大脑 MRI 扫描中的病理情况可能具有挑战性。另一种方法是使用无监督异常检测，只需要健康大脑的样本级标签即可创建参考表示。然后可以以像素方式将该参考表示与不健康的大脑解剖结构进行比较，以识别异常情况。为了实现这一目标，需要生成模型来创建健康大脑的解剖学上一致的 MRI 扫描。虽然最近的扩散模型在这项任务中显示出了希望，但准确生成人脑的复杂结构仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法，将扩散模型的生成任务重新表述为健康大脑解剖结构的基于补丁的估计，使用空间上下文来指导和改进重建。我们根据肿瘤和多发性硬化症病变的数据评估了我们的方法，并证明与现有基线相比，相对改善了 25.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于补丁的扩散模型方法，用于脑部MRI的无监督异常检测。
AI.motivation: 监督学习方法因需要标注数据且脑部解剖结构复杂而受限，无监督异常检测可仅依赖健康样本进行异常识别。
AI.method: 将扩散模型的生成任务重构为基于空间上下文的健康脑部补丁估计，通过像素级比较提升重建质量。
AI.result: 在肿瘤和多发性硬化症数据集上相较现有方法提升25.1%的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过补丁级空间引导有效生成健康脑部结构，显著提升了无监督异常检测效果。

title: Deep Learning for Inertial Positioning: A Survey
title_zh: 用于惯性定位的深度学习：调查
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
abstract: Inertial sensors are widely utilized in smartphones, drones, robots, and IoT devices, playing a crucial role in enabling ubiquitous and reliable localization. Inertial sensor-based positioning is essential in various applications, including personal navigation, location-based security, and human-device interaction. However, low-cost MEMS inertial sensors' measurements are inevitably corrupted by various error sources, leading to unbounded drifts when integrated doubly in traditional inertial navigation algorithms, subjecting inertial positioning to the problem of error drifts. In recent years, with the rapid increase in sensor data and computational power, deep learning techniques have been developed, sparking significant research into addressing the problem of inertial positioning. Relevant literature in this field spans across mobile computing, robotics, and machine learning. In this article, we provide a comprehensive review of deep learning-based inertial positioning and its applications in tracking pedestrians, drones, vehicles, and robots. We connect efforts from different fields and discuss how deep learning can be applied to address issues such as sensor calibration, positioning error drift reduction, and multi-sensor fusion. This article aims to attract readers from various backgrounds, including researchers and practitioners interested in the potential of deep learning-based techniques to solve inertial positioning problems. Our review demonstrates the exciting possibilities that deep learning brings to the table and provides a roadmap for future research in this field.
summary: Inertial sensors are widely utilized in smartphones, drones, robots, and IoT devices, playing a crucial role in enabling ubiquitous and reliable localization. Inertial sensor-based positioning is essential in various applications, including personal navigation, location-based security, and human-device interaction. However, low-cost MEMS inertial sensors' measurements are inevitably corrupted by various error sources, leading to unbounded drifts when integrated doubly in traditional inertial navigation algorithms, subjecting inertial positioning to the problem of error drifts. In recent years, with the rapid increase in sensor data and computational power, deep learning techniques have been developed, sparking significant research into addressing the problem of inertial positioning. Relevant literature in this field spans across mobile computing, robotics, and machine learning. In this article, we provide a comprehensive review of deep learning-based inertial positioning and its applications in tracking pedestrians, drones, vehicles, and robots. We connect efforts from different fields and discuss how deep learning can be applied to address issues such as sensor calibration, positioning error drift reduction, and multi-sensor fusion. This article aims to attract readers from various backgrounds, including researchers and practitioners interested in the potential of deep learning-based techniques to solve inertial positioning problems. Our review demonstrates the exciting possibilities that deep learning brings to the table and provides a roadmap for future research in this field.
abstract_zh: 惯性传感器广泛应用于智能手机、无人机、机器人和物联网设备，在实现无处不在且可靠的定位方面发挥着至关重要的作用。基于惯性传感器的定位在个人导航、基于位置的安全和人机交互等各种应用中至关重要。然而，低成本MEMS惯性传感器的测量不可避免地会受到各种误差源的影响，在传统惯性导航算法中双重集成时会导致无界漂移，从而使惯性定位面临误差漂移的问题。近年来，随着传感器数据和计算能力的快速增长，深度学习技术得到发展，引发了解决惯性定位问题的重要研究。该领域的相关文献涵盖移动计算、机器人技术和机器学习。在本文中，我们全面回顾了基于深度学习的惯性定位及其在跟踪行人、无人机、车辆和机器人方面的应用。我们将不同领域的努力联系起来，讨论如何应用深度学习来解决传感器校准、定位误差漂移减少和多传感器融合等问题。本文旨在吸引来自不同背景的读者，包括对基于深度学习的技术解决惯性定位问题的潜力感兴趣的研究人员和从业者。我们的评论展示了深度学习带来的令人兴奋的可能性，并为该领域的未来研究提供了路线图。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的惯性定位技术及其在行人、无人机、车辆和机器人等领域的应用。
AI.motivation: 低成本MEMS惯性传感器存在误差漂移问题，传统导航算法难以有效解决，需借助深度学习技术提升定位精度。
AI.method: 通过跨领域文献综述，分析深度学习在传感器校准、误差漂移抑制及多传感器融合中的应用方法。
AI.result: 展示了深度学习在惯性定位中的潜力，并为未来研究提供了技术路线图。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为解决惯性定位误差漂移问题提供了新思路，后续需进一步探索跨领域技术融合与实际应用优化。

result: 展示了深度学习在惯性定位中的潜力，并为未来研究提供了技术路线图。
conclusion: 深度学习为解决惯性定位误差漂移问题提供了新思路，后续需进一步探索跨领域技术融合与实际应用优化。
search_text: Deep Learning for Inertial Positioning: A Survey 用于惯性定位的深度学习：调查 Inertial sensors are widely utilized in smartphones, drones, robots, and IoT devices, playing a crucial role in enabling ubiquitous and reliable localization. Inertial sensor-based positioning is essential in various applications, including personal navigation, location-based security, and human-device interaction. However, low-cost MEMS inertial sensors' measurements are inevitably corrupted by various error sources, leading to unbounded drifts when integrated doubly in traditional inertial navigation algorithms, subjecting inertial positioning to the problem of error drifts. In recent years, with the rapid increase in sensor data and computational power, deep learning techniques have been developed, sparking significant research into addressing the problem of inertial positioning. Relevant literature in this field spans across mobile computing, robotics, and machine learning. In this article, we provide a comprehensive review of deep learning-based inertial positioning and its applications in tracking pedestrians, drones, vehicles, and robots. We connect efforts from different fields and discuss how deep learning can be applied to address issues such as sensor calibration, positioning error drift reduction, and multi-sensor fusion. This article aims to attract readers from various backgrounds, including researchers and practitioners interested in the potential of deep learning-based techniques to solve inertial positioning problems. Our review demonstrates the exciting possibilities that deep learning brings to the table and provides a roadmap for future research in this field. 惯性传感器广泛应用于智能手机、无人机、机器人和物联网设备，在实现无处不在且可靠的定位方面发挥着至关重要的作用。基于惯性传感器的定位在个人导航、基于位置的安全和人机交互等各种应用中至关重要。然而，低成本MEMS惯性传感器的测量不可避免地会受到各种误差源的影响，在传统惯性导航算法中双重集成时会导致无界漂移，从而使惯性定位面临误差漂移的问题。近年来，随着传感器数据和计算能力的快速增长，深度学习技术得到发展，引发了解决惯性定位问题的重要研究。该领域的相关文献涵盖移动计算、机器人技术和机器学习。在本文中，我们全面回顾了基于深度学习的惯性定位及其在跟踪行人、无人机、车辆和机器人方面的应用。我们将不同领域的努力联系起来，讨论如何应用深度学习来解决传感器校准、定位误差漂移减少和多传感器融合等问题。本文旨在吸引来自不同背景的读者，包括对基于深度学习的技术解决惯性定位问题的潜力感兴趣的研究人员和从业者。我们的评论展示了深度学习带来的令人兴奋的可能性，并为该领域的未来研究提供了路线图。 本文综述了基于深度学习的惯性定位技术及其在行人、无人机、车辆和机器人等领域的应用。 Changhao Chen,Xianfei Pan cs.RO,cs.CV

title: DLT: Conditioned layout generation with Joint Discrete-Continuous Diffusion Layout Transformer
title_zh: DLT：使用联合离散连续扩散布局变压器生成条件布局
abstract: Generating visual layouts is an essential ingredient of graphic design. The ability to condition layout generation on a partial subset of component attributes is critical to real-world applications that involve user interaction. Recently, diffusion models have demonstrated high-quality generative performances in various domains. However, it is unclear how to apply diffusion models to the natural representation of layouts which consists of a mix of discrete (class) and continuous (location, size) attributes. To address the conditioning layout generation problem, we introduce DLT, a joint discrete-continuous diffusion model. DLT is a transformer-based model which has a flexible conditioning mechanism that allows for conditioning on any given subset of all the layout component classes, locations, and sizes. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art generative models on various layout generation datasets with respect to different metrics and conditioning settings. Additionally, we validate the effectiveness of our proposed conditioning mechanism and the joint continuous-diffusion process. This joint process can be incorporated into a wide range of mixed discrete-continuous generative tasks.
summary: Generating visual layouts is an essential ingredient of graphic design. The ability to condition layout generation on a partial subset of component attributes is critical to real-world applications that involve user interaction. Recently, diffusion models have demonstrated high-quality generative performances in various domains. However, it is unclear how to apply diffusion models to the natural representation of layouts which consists of a mix of discrete (class) and continuous (location, size) attributes. To address the conditioning layout generation problem, we introduce DLT, a joint discrete-continuous diffusion model. DLT is a transformer-based model which has a flexible conditioning mechanism that allows for conditioning on any given subset of all the layout component classes, locations, and sizes. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art generative models on various layout generation datasets with respect to different metrics and conditioning settings. Additionally, we validate the effectiveness of our proposed conditioning mechanism and the joint continuous-diffusion process. This joint process can be incorporated into a wide range of mixed discrete-continuous generative tasks.
abstract_zh: 生成视觉布局是图形设计的重要组成部分。根据组件属性的部分子集来调节布局生成的能力对于涉及用户交互的实际应用程序至关重要。最近，扩散模型在各个领域都表现出了高质量的生成性能。然而，目前尚不清楚如何将扩散模型应用于布局的自然表示，该布局由离散（类）和连续（位置、大小）属性的混合组成。为了解决条件布局生成问题，我们引入了 DLT，一种联合离散连续扩散模型。 DLT 是一种基于变压器的模型，具有灵活的调节机制，允许对所有布局组件类、位置和大小的任何给定子集进行调节。我们的方法在不同的指标和条件设置方面优于各种布局生成数据集上最先进的生成模型。此外，我们验证了我们提出的调节机制和联合连续扩散过程的有效性。这种联合过程可以合并到各种混合离散连续生成任务中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DLT的联合离散-连续扩散布局变换器模型，用于条件化视觉布局生成，能够处理混合离散和连续属性的布局。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型难以处理包含离散（类别）和连续（位置、尺寸）属性的布局生成任务，且实际应用中需要根据部分组件属性进行条件生成。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构设计DLT模型，采用灵活的条件机制，支持对布局组件类别、位置和尺寸的任意子集进行条件控制，并结合离散-连续联合扩散过程。
AI.result: 在多个布局生成数据集上，DLT在不同指标和条件设置下均优于现有生成模型，验证了条件机制和联合扩散过程的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DLT为混合离散-连续生成任务提供了有效解决方案，其联合扩散框架具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Zeroth-Order Optimization Meets Human Feedback: Provable Learning via Ranking Oracles
title_zh: 零阶优化满足人类反馈：通过排名预言进行可证明的学习
abstract: In this study, we delve into an emerging optimization challenge involving a black-box objective function that can only be gauged via a ranking oracle-a situation frequently encountered in real-world scenarios, especially when the function is evaluated by human judges. Such challenge is inspired from Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF), an approach recently employed to enhance the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) using human guidance. We introduce ZO-RankSGD, an innovative zeroth-order optimization algorithm designed to tackle this optimization problem, accompanied by theoretical assurances. Our algorithm utilizes a novel rank-based random estimator to determine the descent direction and guarantees convergence to a stationary point. Moreover, ZO-RankSGD is readily applicable to policy optimization problems in Reinforcement Learning (RL), particularly when only ranking oracles for the episode reward are available. Last but not least, we demonstrate the effectiveness of ZO-RankSGD in a novel application: improving the quality of images generated by a diffusion generative model with human ranking feedback. Throughout experiments, we found that ZO-RankSGD can significantly enhance the detail of generated images with only a few rounds of human feedback. Overall, our work advances the field of zeroth-order optimization by addressing the problem of optimizing functions with only ranking feedback, and offers a new and effective approach for aligning Artificial Intelligence (AI) with human intentions.
summary: In this study, we delve into an emerging optimization challenge involving a black-box objective function that can only be gauged via a ranking oracle-a situation frequently encountered in real-world scenarios, especially when the function is evaluated by human judges. Such challenge is inspired from Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF), an approach recently employed to enhance the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) using human guidance. We introduce ZO-RankSGD, an innovative zeroth-order optimization algorithm designed to tackle this optimization problem, accompanied by theoretical assurances. Our algorithm utilizes a novel rank-based random estimator to determine the descent direction and guarantees convergence to a stationary point. Moreover, ZO-RankSGD is readily applicable to policy optimization problems in Reinforcement Learning (RL), particularly when only ranking oracles for the episode reward are available. Last but not least, we demonstrate the effectiveness of ZO-RankSGD in a novel application: improving the quality of images generated by a diffusion generative model with human ranking feedback. Throughout experiments, we found that ZO-RankSGD can significantly enhance the detail of generated images with only a few rounds of human feedback. Overall, our work advances the field of zeroth-order optimization by addressing the problem of optimizing functions with only ranking feedback, and offers a new and effective approach for aligning Artificial Intelligence (AI) with human intentions.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们深入研究了一个新兴的优化挑战，涉及只能通过排名预言机来衡量的黑盒目标函数——这种情况在现实场景中经常遇到，特别是当函数由人类法官评估时。此类挑战的灵感来自人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF)，这是一种最近采用的方法，用于使用人类指导来增强大型语言模型 (LLM) 的性能。我们引入了 ZO-RankSGD，这是一种创新的零阶优化算法，旨在解决该优化问题，并附有理论保证。我们的算法利用一种新颖的基于排序的随机估计器来确定下降方向并保证收敛到驻点。此外，ZO-RankSGD 很容易适用于强化学习 (RL) 中的策略优化问题，特别是当只有情节奖励的排名预言机可用时。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们在一个新颖的应用程序中展示了 ZO-RankSGD 的有效性：通过人类排名反馈提高扩散生成模型生成的图像的质量。在整个实验中，我们发现 ZO-RankSGD 只需几轮人类反馈就可以显着增强生成图像的细节。总体而言，我们的工作通过解决仅使用排名反馈来优化函数的问题，推进了零阶优化领域的发展，并为使人工智能（AI）与人类意图保持一致提供了一种新的有效方法。

AI.tldr: 提出ZO-RankSGD算法解决仅通过排序预言机评估的黑箱优化问题，并应用于强化学习和图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法依赖梯度信息，但实际中目标函数常无法直接获取梯度（如需人类反馈评估），需开发无需显式梯度的优化方法。
AI.method: 设计ZO-RankSGD算法，利用排序随机估计器替代梯度，通过比较样本对的排名确定下降方向，并提供收敛性理论保证。
AI.result: 在图像生成任务中，仅需少量人类反馈即可显著提升生成细节；算法适用于强化学习策略优化，验证了排序反馈的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 推动零阶优化领域发展，为依赖排序反馈的AI系统提供理论保障与实用优化框架。

Last but not least, we demonstrate the effectiveness of ZO-RankSGD in a novel application: improving the quality of images generated by a diffusion generative model with human ranking feedback. Throughout experiments, we found that ZO-RankSGD can significantly enhance the detail of generated images with only a few rounds of human feedback. Overall, our work advances the field of zeroth-order optimization by addressing the problem of optimizing functions with only ranking feedback, and offers a new and effective approach for aligning Artificial Intelligence (AI) with human intentions. 在这项研究中，我们深入研究了一个新兴的优化挑战，涉及只能通过排名预言机来衡量的黑盒目标函数——这种情况在现实场景中经常遇到，特别是当函数由人类法官评估时。此类挑战的灵感来自人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF)，这是一种最近采用的方法，用于使用人类指导来增强大型语言模型 (LLM) 的性能。我们引入了 ZO-RankSGD，这是一种创新的零阶优化算法，旨在解决该优化问题，并附有理论保证。我们的算法利用一种新颖的基于排序的随机估计器来确定下降方向并保证收敛到驻点。此外，ZO-RankSGD 很容易适用于强化学习 (RL) 中的策略优化问题，特别是当只有情节奖励的排名预言机可用时。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们在一个新颖的应用程序中展示了 ZO-RankSGD 的有效性：通过人类排名反馈提高扩散生成模型生成的图像的质量。在整个实验中，我们发现 ZO-RankSGD 只需几轮人类反馈就可以显着增强生成图像的细节。总体而言，我们的工作通过解决仅使用排名反馈来优化函数的问题，推进了零阶优化领域的发展，并为使人工智能（AI）与人类意图保持一致提供了一种新的有效方法。 提出ZO-RankSGD算法解决仅通过排序预言机评估的黑箱优化问题，并应用于强化学习和图像生成。 Zhiwei Tang,Dmitry Rybin,Tsung-Hui Chang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Graph Decision Transformer
title_zh: 图决策转换器
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) is a challenging task, whose objective is to learn policies from static trajectory data without interacting with the environment. Recently, offline RL has been viewed as a sequence modeling problem, where an agent generates a sequence of subsequent actions based on a set of static transition experiences. However, existing approaches that use transformers to attend to all tokens naively can overlook the dependencies between different tokens and limit long-term dependency learning. In this paper, we propose the Graph Decision Transformer (GDT), a novel offline RL approach that models the input sequence into a causal graph to capture potential dependencies between fundamentally different concepts and facilitate temporal and causal relationship learning. GDT uses a graph transformer to process the graph inputs with relation-enhanced mechanisms, and an optional sequence transformer to handle fine-grained spatial information in visual tasks. Our experiments show that GDT matches or surpasses the performance of state-of-the-art offline RL methods on image-based Atari and OpenAI Gym.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) is a challenging task, whose objective is to learn policies from static trajectory data without interacting with the environment. Recently, offline RL has been viewed as a sequence modeling problem, where an agent generates a sequence of subsequent actions based on a set of static transition experiences. However, existing approaches that use transformers to attend to all tokens naively can overlook the dependencies between different tokens and limit long-term dependency learning. In this paper, we propose the Graph Decision Transformer (GDT), a novel offline RL approach that models the input sequence into a causal graph to capture potential dependencies between fundamentally different concepts and facilitate temporal and causal relationship learning. GDT uses a graph transformer to process the graph inputs with relation-enhanced mechanisms, and an optional sequence transformer to handle fine-grained spatial information in visual tasks. Our experiments show that GDT matches or surpasses the performance of state-of-the-art offline RL methods on image-based Atari and OpenAI Gym.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）是一项具有挑战性的任务，其目标是在不与环境交互的情况下从静态轨迹数据中学习策略。最近，离线强化学习被视为序列建模问题，其中代理根据一组静态转换经验生成一系列后续动作。然而，使用转换器来处理所有令牌的现有方法可能会忽略不同令牌之间的依赖关系并限制长期依赖学习。在本文中，我们提出了图决策变换器（GDT），这是一种新颖的离线强化学习方法，它将输入序列建模为因果图，以捕获根本不同的概念之间的潜在依赖关系，并促进时间和因果关系学习。 GDT 使用图形转换器通过关系增强机制来处理图形输入，并使用可选的序列转换器来处理视觉任务中的细粒度空间信息。我们的实验表明，GDT 在基于图像的 Atari 和 OpenAI Gym 上的性能可与最先进的离线 RL 方法相媲美或超过。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图结构的决策Transformer（GDT），用于解决离线强化学习中序列依赖关系建模的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的方法在处理离线强化学习任务时，难以有效捕捉不同概念间的潜在依赖关系及长期时间依赖性，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 通过将输入序列建模为因果图，利用图Transformer捕捉概念间潜在依赖，并结合可选的序列Transformer处理视觉任务中的细粒度空间信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，GDT在图像相关的Atari和OpenAI Gym基准测试中达到或超越了当前最先进的离线强化学习方法性能。
AI.conclusion: GDT通过因果图建模与关系增强机制，有效提升了离线强化学习中长期依赖和跨概念关系的建模能力，为相关研究提供了新思路。

title: At Your Fingertips: Extracting Piano Fingering Instructions from Videos
title_zh: 触手可及：从视频中提取钢琴指法指令
abstract: Piano fingering -- knowing which finger to use to play each note in a musical piece, is a hard and important skill to master when learning to play the piano. While some sheet music is available with expert-annotated fingering information, most pieces lack this information, and people often resort to learning the fingering from demonstrations in online videos. We consider the AI task of automating the extraction of fingering information from videos. This is a non-trivial task as fingers are often occluded by other fingers, and it is often not clear from the video which of the keys were pressed, requiring the synchronization of hand position information and knowledge about the notes that were played. We show how to perform this task with high-accuracy using a combination of deep-learning modules, including a GAN-based approach for fine-tuning on out-of-domain data. We extract the fingering information with an f1 score of 97\%. We run the resulting system on 90 videos, resulting in high-quality piano fingering information of 150K notes, the largest available dataset of piano-fingering to date.
summary: Piano fingering -- knowing which finger to use to play each note in a musical piece, is a hard and important skill to master when learning to play the piano. While some sheet music is available with expert-annotated fingering information, most pieces lack this information, and people often resort to learning the fingering from demonstrations in online videos. We consider the AI task of automating the extraction of fingering information from videos. This is a non-trivial task as fingers are often occluded by other fingers, and it is often not clear from the video which of the keys were pressed, requiring the synchronization of hand position information and knowledge about the notes that were played. We show how to perform this task with high-accuracy using a combination of deep-learning modules, including a GAN-based approach for fine-tuning on out-of-domain data. We extract the fingering information with an f1 score of 97\%. We run the resulting system on 90 videos, resulting in high-quality piano fingering information of 150K notes, the largest available dataset of piano-fingering to date.
abstract_zh: 钢琴指法——知道用哪个手指来弹奏乐曲中的每个音符，是学习弹钢琴时需要掌握的一项艰巨而重要的技能。虽然某些乐谱带有专家注释的指法信息，但大多数乐曲都缺乏此信息，人们经常通过在线视频中的演示来学习指法。我们考虑从视频中自动提取指法信息的人工智能任务。这是一项艰巨的任务，因为手指经常被其他手指遮挡，并且从视频中通常不清楚按下了哪个键，需要同步手部位置信息和有关所弹奏音符的知识。我们展示了如何使用深度学习模块的组合来高精度地执行此任务，包括基于 GAN 的方法来对域外数据进行微调。我们提取 f1 分数为 97% 的指法信息。我们在 90 个视频上运行生成的系统，产生 150K 音符的高质量钢琴指法信息，这是迄今为止最大的可用钢琴指法数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从钢琴演奏视频中自动提取指法信息的AI方法。
AI.motivation: 现有乐谱中指法标注不完整，学习者依赖视频学习，但手动提取指法信息效率低且困难，需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合GAN微调和深度学习模块，同步手部位置与音符信息以提取指法。
AI.result: 系统在90个视频中提取出15万音符的指法信息，F1分数达97%，为最大规模数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提取指法信息，生成当前最大规模数据集，推动钢琴教学与AI研究。

title: Complete Log Concavity of Coverage-Like Functions
title_zh: 类覆盖函数的完全对数凹性
abstract: We introduce an expressive subclass of non-negative almost submodular set functions, called strongly 2-coverage functions which include coverage and (sums of) matroid rank functions, and prove that the homogenization of the generating polynomial of any such function is completely log-concave, taking a step towards characterizing the coefficients of (homogeneous) completely log-concave polynomials. As a consequence we obtain that the "level sets" of any such function form an ultra-log concave sequence.
summary: We introduce an expressive subclass of non-negative almost submodular set functions, called strongly 2-coverage functions which include coverage and (sums of) matroid rank functions, and prove that the homogenization of the generating polynomial of any such function is completely log-concave, taking a step towards characterizing the coefficients of (homogeneous) completely log-concave polynomials. As a consequence we obtain that the "level sets" of any such function form an ultra-log concave sequence.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了非负几乎子模集合函数的表达子类，称为强2-覆盖函数，其中包括覆盖率和拟阵秩函数（和），并证明任何此类函数的生成多项式的齐质化是完全对数凹的，朝着表征（齐次）完全对数凹多项式的系数迈出了一步。结果，我们得到任何此类函数的“水平集”形成超对数凹序列。

AI.tldr: 本文引入强2-覆盖函数子类，证明其生成多项式齐次化后具有完全对数凹性，并推导其水平集的超对数凹序列性质。
AI.motivation: 为扩展覆盖函数与矩阵秩函数的理论边界，探索其在组合优化等领域的应用潜力，推进对完全对数凹多项式系数结构的理解。
AI.method: 通过定义强2-覆盖函数的子类，结合生成多项式齐次化技术，运用对数凹性分析工具进行理论证明。
AI.result: 证明强2-覆盖函数生成多项式的齐次化完全对数凹性，并确立其水平集构成超对数凹序列。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为完全对数凹多项式的系数表征提供了新视角，深化了对覆盖类函数组合性质的理论认知。

motivation: 为扩展覆盖函数与矩阵秩函数的理论边界，探索其在组合优化等领域的应用潜力，推进对完全对数凹多项式系数结构的理解。
method: 通过定义强2-覆盖函数的子类，结合生成多项式齐次化技术，运用对数凹性分析工具进行理论证明。

search_text: Complete Log Concavity of Coverage-Like Functions 类覆盖函数的完全对数凹性 We introduce an expressive subclass of non-negative almost submodular set functions, called strongly 2-coverage functions which include coverage and (sums of) matroid rank functions, and prove that the homogenization of the generating polynomial of any such function is completely log-concave, taking a step towards characterizing the coefficients of (homogeneous) completely log-concave polynomials. As a consequence we obtain that the "level sets" of any such function form an ultra-log concave sequence. 我们引入了非负几乎子模集合函数的表达子类，称为强2-覆盖函数，其中包括覆盖率和拟阵秩函数（和），并证明任何此类函数的生成多项式的齐质化是完全对数凹的，朝着表征（齐次）完全对数凹多项式的系数迈出了一步。结果，我们得到任何此类函数的“水平集”形成超对数凹序列。 本文引入强2-覆盖函数子类，证明其生成多项式齐次化后具有完全对数凹性，并推导其水平集的超对数凹序列性质。 Dorna Abdolazimi,Shayan Oveis Gharan math.CO,cs.DM,cs.DS

authors_text: Kai Pfeiffer,Yuze Jia,Mingsheng Yin,Akshaj Kumar Veldanda,Yaqi Hu,Amee Trivedi,Jeff Zhang,Siddharth Garg,Elza Erkip,Sundeep Rangan,Ludovic Righetti
title: Path Planning Under Uncertainty to Localize mmWave Sources
title_zh: 不确定性下的路径规划以定位毫米波源
abstract: In this paper, we study a navigation problem where a mobile robot needs to locate a mmWave wireless signal. Using the directionality properties of the signal, we propose an estimation and path planning algorithm that can efficiently navigate in cluttered indoor environments. We formulate Extended Kalman filters for emitter location estimation in cases where the signal is received in line-of-sight or after reflections. We then propose to plan motion trajectories based on belief-space dynamics in order to minimize the uncertainty of the position estimates. The associated non-linear optimization problem is solved by a state-of-the-art constrained iLQR solver. In particular, we propose a method that can handle a large number of obstacles (~300) with reasonable computation times. We validate the approach in an extensive set of simulations. We show that our estimators can help increase navigation success rate and that planning to reduce estimation uncertainty can improve the overall task completion speed.
summary: In this paper, we study a navigation problem where a mobile robot needs to locate a mmWave wireless signal. Using the directionality properties of the signal, we propose an estimation and path planning algorithm that can efficiently navigate in cluttered indoor environments. We formulate Extended Kalman filters for emitter location estimation in cases where the signal is received in line-of-sight or after reflections. We then propose to plan motion trajectories based on belief-space dynamics in order to minimize the uncertainty of the position estimates. The associated non-linear optimization problem is solved by a state-of-the-art constrained iLQR solver. In particular, we propose a method that can handle a large number of obstacles (~300) with reasonable computation times. We validate the approach in an extensive set of simulations. We show that our estimators can help increase navigation success rate and that planning to reduce estimation uncertainty can improve the overall task completion speed.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了移动机器人需要定位毫米波无线信号的导航问题。利用信号的方向性特性，我们提出了一种估计和路径规划算法，可以在杂乱的室内环境中有效地导航。我们制定了扩展卡尔曼滤波器，用于在视线内或反射后接收信号的情况下估计发射器位置。然后，我们建议基于置信空间动力学来规划运动轨迹，以最大限度地减少位置估计的不确定性。相关的非线性优化问题由最先进的约束 iLQR 求解器解决。特别是，我们提出了一种可以以合理的计算时间处理大量障碍物（~300）的方法。我们通过大量模拟验证了该方法。我们表明，我们的估计器可以帮助提高导航成功率，并且减少估计不确定性的计划可以提高整体任务完成速度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在复杂室内环境中，通过路径规划定位毫米波信号源的导航问题。
AI.motivation: 毫米波信号具有方向性，但在复杂环境中易受障碍物影响，传统方法难以高效定位。
AI.method: 结合扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）估计信号源位置，并基于信念空间动态规划路径，采用约束iLQR求解器优化轨迹。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明，该方法能有效处理300个障碍物，提升导航成功率和任务完成速度。
AI.conclusion: 通过减少估计不确定性进行路径规划，可显著提高毫米波信号源定位的效率和鲁棒性。

title: Multi-Dimensional and Multi-Scale Modeling for Speech Separation Optimized by Discriminative Learning
title_zh: 通过判别学习优化语音分离的多维多尺度建模
abstract: Transformer has shown advanced performance in speech separation, benefiting from its ability to capture global features. However, capturing local features and channel information of audio sequences in speech separation is equally important. In this paper, we present a novel approach named Intra-SE-Conformer and Inter-Transformer (ISCIT) for speech separation. Specifically, we design a new network SE-Conformer that can model audio sequences in multiple dimensions and scales, and apply it to the dual-path speech separation framework. Furthermore, we propose Multi-Block Feature Aggregation to improve the separation effect by selectively utilizing information from the intermediate blocks of the separation network. Meanwhile, we propose a speaker similarity discriminative loss to optimize the speech separation model to address the problem of poor performance when speakers have similar voices. Experimental results on the benchmark datasets WSJ0-2mix and WHAM! show that ISCIT can achieve state-of-the-art results.
summary: Transformer has shown advanced performance in speech separation, benefiting from its ability to capture global features. However, capturing local features and channel information of audio sequences in speech separation is equally important. In this paper, we present a novel approach named Intra-SE-Conformer and Inter-Transformer (ISCIT) for speech separation. Specifically, we design a new network SE-Conformer that can model audio sequences in multiple dimensions and scales, and apply it to the dual-path speech separation framework. Furthermore, we propose Multi-Block Feature Aggregation to improve the separation effect by selectively utilizing information from the intermediate blocks of the separation network. Meanwhile, we propose a speaker similarity discriminative loss to optimize the speech separation model to address the problem of poor performance when speakers have similar voices. Experimental results on the benchmark datasets WSJ0-2mix and WHAM! show that ISCIT can achieve state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: Transformer 在语音分离方面表现出了先进的性能，这得益于其捕获全局特征的能力。然而，在语音分离中捕获音频序列的局部特征和通道信息同样重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Intra-SE-Conformer 和 Inter-Transformer (ISCIT) 的语音分离新方法。具体来说，我们设计了一个新的网络 SE-Conformer，可以对多个维度和尺度的音频序列进行建模，并将其应用于双路语音分离框架。此外，我们提出多块特征聚合，通过选择性地利用分离网络中间块的信息来提高分离效果。同时，我们提出了说话人相似度判别损失来优化语音分离模型，以解决说话人声音相似时性能不佳的问题。基准数据集 WSJ0-2mix 和 WHAM! 上的实验结果表明 ISCIT 可以取得最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多维多尺度建模和判别学习优化的语音分离方法ISCIT，以提升复杂场景下的分离效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在语音分离中表现出色，但其对局部特征和通道信息的建模不足，且在说话人声线相似时性能下降，需改进局部建模与判别能力。
AI.method: 设计SE-Conformer网络实现多维多尺度建模，结合双路径框架与多块特征聚合技术，并引入说话人相似性判别损失函数优化模型。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-2mix和WHAM!基准数据集上达到最先进水平，尤其在相似声线场景下性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度建模与判别学习的结合有效提升了语音分离效果，为处理复杂声学场景提供了新思路。

title: A Multi-Stage Triple-Path Method for Speech Separation in Noisy and Reverberant Environments
title_zh: 噪声和混响环境中语音分离的多级三路径方法
abstract: In noisy and reverberant environments, the performance of deep learning-based speech separation methods drops dramatically because previous methods are not designed and optimized for such situations. To address this issue, we propose a multi-stage end-to-end learning method that decouples the difficult speech separation problem in noisy and reverberant environments into three sub-problems: speech denoising, separation, and de-reverberation. The probability and speed of searching for the optimal solution of the speech separation model are improved by reducing the solution space. Moreover, since the channel information of the audio sequence in the time domain is crucial for speech separation, we propose a triple-path structure capable of modeling the channel dimension of audio sequences. Experimental results show that the proposed multi-stage triple-path method can improve the performance of speech separation models at the cost of little model parameter increment.
summary: In noisy and reverberant environments, the performance of deep learning-based speech separation methods drops dramatically because previous methods are not designed and optimized for such situations. To address this issue, we propose a multi-stage end-to-end learning method that decouples the difficult speech separation problem in noisy and reverberant environments into three sub-problems: speech denoising, separation, and de-reverberation. The probability and speed of searching for the optimal solution of the speech separation model are improved by reducing the solution space. Moreover, since the channel information of the audio sequence in the time domain is crucial for speech separation, we propose a triple-path structure capable of modeling the channel dimension of audio sequences. Experimental results show that the proposed multi-stage triple-path method can improve the performance of speech separation models at the cost of little model parameter increment.
abstract_zh: 在嘈杂和混响的环境中，基于深度学习的语音分离方法的性能急剧下降，因为以前的方法没有针对这种情况进行设计和优化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种多阶段端到端学习方法，将噪声和混响环境中困难的语音分离问题解耦为三个子问题：语音去噪、分离和去混响。通过减小解空间，提高了语音分离模型搜索最优解的概率和速度。此外，由于时域中音频序列的通道信息对于语音分离至关重要，因此我们提出了一种能够对音频序列的通道维度进行建模的三路径结构。实验结果表明，所提出的多阶段三路径方法能够以较小的模型参数增量为代价提高语音分离模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段三路径方法，用于解决噪声和混响环境下的语音分离问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习语音分离方法在噪声和混响环境下性能显著下降，需设计更适应复杂环境的解决方案。
AI.method: 将语音分离问题分解为降噪、分离和去混响三个子任务，并设计三路径结构建模音频通道维度信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持少量参数增量的前提下，有效提升了噪声和混响环境下的语音分离性能。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段三路径方法通过解耦子问题和通道建模，在复杂声学环境下实现了更优的语音分离效果。
