search_text: End-to-End Learning of Deep Visuomotor Policy for Needle Picking 采针深度视觉运动策略的端到端学习 Needle picking is a challenging manipulation task in robot-assisted surgery due to the characteristics of small slender shapes of needles, needles' variations in shapes and sizes, and demands for millimeter-level control. Prior works, heavily relying on the prior of needles (e.g., geometric models), are hard to scale to unseen needles' variations. In this paper, we present the first end-to-end learning method to train deep visuomotor policy for needle picking. Concretely, we propose DreamerfD to maximally leverage demonstrations to improve the learning efficiency of a state-of-the-art model-based reinforcement learning method, DreamerV2; Since Variational Auto-Encoder (VAE) in DreamerV2 is difficult to scale to high-resolution images, we propose Dynamic Spotlight Adaptation to represent control-related visual signals in a low-resolution image space; Virtual Clutch is also proposed to reduce performance degradation due to significant error between prior and posterior encoded states at the beginning of a rollout. We conducted extensive experiments in simulation to evaluate the performance, robustness, in-domain variation adaptation, and effectiveness of individual components of our method. Our method, trained by 8k demonstration timesteps and 140k online policy timesteps, can achieve a remarkable success rate of 80%. Furthermore, our method effectively demonstrated its superiority in generalization to unseen in-domain variations including needle variations and image disturbance, highlighting its robustness and versatility. Codes and videos are available at https://sites.google.com/view/DreamerfD. 由于采针形状细长、形状和尺寸变化多端以及对毫米级控制的要求，采针是机器人辅助手术中一项具有挑战性的操作任务。先前的工作严重依赖于针的先验（例如几何模型），很难扩展到看不见的针的变化。在本文中，我们提出了第一个端到端学习方法来训练采针的深度视觉运动策略。具体来说，我们建议 DreamerfD 最大限度地利用演示来提高最先进的基于模型的强化学习方法 DreamerV2 的学习效率；由于 DreamerV2 中的变分自动编码器（VAE）很难扩展到高分辨率图像，因此我们提出动态聚光灯适应来表示低分辨率图像空间中与控制相关的视觉信号；还提出了虚拟离合器来减少由于在推出开始时先前和后编码状态之间存在显着错误而导致的性能下降。我们进行了广泛的模拟实验，以评估我们方法的各个组件的性能、鲁棒性、域内变化适应和有效性。我们的方法通过 8k 演示时间步和 140k 在线策略时间步进行训练，可以实现 80% 的显着成功率。此外，我们的方法有效地证明了其对未见的域内变化（包括针变化和图像干扰）的泛化优越性，突出了其鲁棒性和多功能性。代码和视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/DreamerfD 上获取。 本文提出了一种端到端的深度视觉运动策略学习方法，用于解决机器人辅助手术中的针具抓取任务。 Hongbin Lin,Bin Li,Xiangyu Chu,Qi Dou,Yunhui Liu,Kwok Wai Samuel Au cs.RO

authors_text: Md Awsafur Rahman,Bishmoy Paul,Tanvir Mahmud,Shaikh Anowarul Fattah
title: CIFF-Net: Contextual Image Feature Fusion for Melanoma Diagnosis
title_zh: CIFF-Net：用于黑色素瘤诊断的上下文图像特征融合
abstract: Melanoma is considered to be the deadliest variant of skin cancer causing around 75\% of total skin cancer deaths. To diagnose Melanoma, clinicians assess and compare multiple skin lesions of the same patient concurrently to gather contextual information regarding the patterns, and abnormality of the skin. So far this concurrent multi-image comparative method has not been explored by existing deep learning-based schemes. In this paper, based on contextual image feature fusion (CIFF), a deep neural network (CIFF-Net) is proposed, which integrates patient-level contextual information into the traditional approaches for improved Melanoma diagnosis by concurrent multi-image comparative method. The proposed multi-kernel self attention (MKSA) module offers better generalization of the extracted features by introducing multi-kernel operations in the self attention mechanisms. To utilize both self attention and contextual feature-wise attention, an attention guided module named contextual feature fusion (CFF) is proposed that integrates extracted features from different contextual images into a single feature vector. Finally, in comparative contextual feature fusion (CCFF) module, primary and contextual features are compared concurrently to generate comparative features. Significant improvement in performance has been achieved on the ISIC-2020 dataset over the traditional approaches that validate the effectiveness of the proposed contextual learning scheme.
summary: Melanoma is considered to be the deadliest variant of skin cancer causing around 75\% of total skin cancer deaths. To diagnose Melanoma, clinicians assess and compare multiple skin lesions of the same patient concurrently to gather contextual information regarding the patterns, and abnormality of the skin. So far this concurrent multi-image comparative method has not been explored by existing deep learning-based schemes. In this paper, based on contextual image feature fusion (CIFF), a deep neural network (CIFF-Net) is proposed, which integrates patient-level contextual information into the traditional approaches for improved Melanoma diagnosis by concurrent multi-image comparative method. The proposed multi-kernel self attention (MKSA) module offers better generalization of the extracted features by introducing multi-kernel operations in the self attention mechanisms. To utilize both self attention and contextual feature-wise attention, an attention guided module named contextual feature fusion (CFF) is proposed that integrates extracted features from different contextual images into a single feature vector. Finally, in comparative contextual feature fusion (CCFF) module, primary and contextual features are compared concurrently to generate comparative features. Significant improvement in performance has been achieved on the ISIC-2020 dataset over the traditional approaches that validate the effectiveness of the proposed contextual learning scheme.
abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤被认为是皮肤癌最致命的变种，约占皮肤癌死亡总数的 75%。为了诊断黑色素瘤，临床医生同时评估和比较同一患者的多个皮肤病变，以收集有关皮肤模式和异常的背景信息。到目前为止，现有的基于深度学习的方案尚未探索这种并发多图像比较方法。本文基于上下文图像特征融合（CIFF），提出了一种深度神经网络（CIFF-Net），它将患者级别的上下文信息集成到传统方法中，通过并发多图像比较方法改进黑色素瘤诊断。所提出的多核自注意（MKSA）模块通过在自注意机制中引入多核操作，提供了提取特征的更好泛化。为了同时利用自注意力和上下文特征注意力，提出了一种名为上下文特征融合（CFF）的注意力引导模块，它将从不同上下文图像中提取的特征集成到单个特征向量中。最后，在比较上下文特征融合（CCFF）模块中，同时比较主要特征和上下文特征以生成比较特征。与传统方法相比，ISIC-2020 数据集的性能有了显着提高，验证了所提出的情境学习方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIFF-Net深度神经网络，通过上下文图像特征融合技术改进黑色素瘤诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方案未充分探索临床中通过多图像对比分析患者皮肤病变的上下文信息，导致黑色素瘤诊断效果受限。
AI.method: 设计多核自注意力（MKSA）模块增强特征泛化能力，提出上下文特征融合（CFF）模块整合多病变特征，并通过对比上下文特征融合（CCFF）模块实现主特征与上下文特征的并发比较。
AI.result: 在ISIC-2020数据集上显著优于传统方法，验证了上下文学习方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于上下文图像特征融合的CIFF-Net通过多图像对比分析有效提升了黑色素瘤诊断性能。

authors_text: Boxiao Yu,Reagan Tibbetts,Titon Barua,Ailani Morales,Ioannis Rekleitis,Md Jahidul Islam
title: Weakly Supervised Caveline Detection For AUV Navigation Inside Underwater Caves
title_zh: 水下洞穴内 AUV 导航的弱监督洞穴线检测
abstract: Underwater caves are challenging environments that are crucial for water resource management, and for our understanding of hydro-geology and history. Mapping underwater caves is a time-consuming, labor-intensive, and hazardous operation. For autonomous cave mapping by underwater robots, the major challenge lies in vision-based estimation in the complete absence of ambient light, which results in constantly moving shadows due to the motion of the camera-light setup. Thus, detecting and following the caveline as navigation guidance is paramount for robots in autonomous cave mapping missions. In this paper, we present a computationally light caveline detection model based on a novel Vision Transformer (ViT)-based learning pipeline. We address the problem of scarce annotated training data by a weakly supervised formulation where the learning is reinforced through a series of noisy predictions from intermediate sub-optimal models. We validate the utility and effectiveness of such weak supervision for caveline detection and tracking in three different cave locations: USA, Mexico, and Spain. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed model, CL-ViT, balances the robustness-efficiency trade-off, ensuring good generalization performance while offering 10+ FPS on single-board (Jetson TX2) devices.
summary: Underwater caves are challenging environments that are crucial for water resource management, and for our understanding of hydro-geology and history. Mapping underwater caves is a time-consuming, labor-intensive, and hazardous operation. For autonomous cave mapping by underwater robots, the major challenge lies in vision-based estimation in the complete absence of ambient light, which results in constantly moving shadows due to the motion of the camera-light setup. Thus, detecting and following the caveline as navigation guidance is paramount for robots in autonomous cave mapping missions. In this paper, we present a computationally light caveline detection model based on a novel Vision Transformer (ViT)-based learning pipeline. We address the problem of scarce annotated training data by a weakly supervised formulation where the learning is reinforced through a series of noisy predictions from intermediate sub-optimal models. We validate the utility and effectiveness of such weak supervision for caveline detection and tracking in three different cave locations: USA, Mexico, and Spain. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed model, CL-ViT, balances the robustness-efficiency trade-off, ensuring good generalization performance while offering 10+ FPS on single-board (Jetson TX2) devices.
abstract_zh: 水下洞穴是具有挑战性的环境，对于水资源管理以及我​​们对水文地质和历史的理解至关重要。绘制水下洞穴地图是一项耗时、费力且危险的工作。对于水下机器人的自主洞穴测绘来说，主要挑战在于在完全没有环境光的情况下基于视觉的估计，这会导致由于相机灯设置的运动而导致不断移动的阴影。因此，检测并遵循洞穴线作为导航引导对于机器人执行自主洞穴测绘任务至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于新型视觉变换器（ViT）的学习管道的计算轻型洞穴检测模型。我们通过弱监督公式解决了带注释的训练数据稀缺的问题，其中通过中间次优模型的一系列噪声预测来强化学习。我们在美国、墨西哥和西班牙三个不同的洞穴地点验证了这种弱监督对洞穴线检测和跟踪的实用性和有效性。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型 CL-ViT 平衡了鲁棒性与效率的权衡，确保良好的泛化性能，同时在单板 (Jetson TX2) 设备上提供 10+ FPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弱监督学习的轻量级洞穴线检测模型CL-ViT，用于自主水下机器人（AUV）在无光水下洞穴环境中的导航。
AI.motivation: 水下洞穴映射面临无光照导致的动态阴影挑战，传统视觉方法难以有效检测洞穴边界，且标注数据稀缺制约了模型训练。
AI.method: 设计基于Vision Transformer的CL-ViT架构，通过弱监督学习框架利用中间次优模型的噪声预测强化训练，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在美墨西三国洞穴数据集上验证，模型在Jetson TX2嵌入式设备实现10+ FPS实时检测，兼顾鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: CL-ViT通过弱监督机制有效解决数据稀缺问题，在保证检测精度的同时实现轻量化部署，为AUV洞穴导航提供可行方案。

search_text: Weakly Supervised Caveline Detection For AUV Navigation Inside Underwater Caves 水下洞穴内 AUV 导航的弱监督洞穴线检测 Underwater caves are challenging environments that are crucial for water resource management, and for our understanding of hydro-geology and history. Mapping underwater caves is a time-consuming, labor-intensive, and hazardous operation. For autonomous cave mapping by underwater robots, the major challenge lies in vision-based estimation in the complete absence of ambient light, which results in constantly moving shadows due to the motion of the camera-light setup. Thus, detecting and following the caveline as navigation guidance is paramount for robots in autonomous cave mapping missions. In this paper, we present a computationally light caveline detection model based on a novel Vision Transformer (ViT)-based learning pipeline. We address the problem of scarce annotated training data by a weakly supervised formulation where the learning is reinforced through a series of noisy predictions from intermediate sub-optimal models. We validate the utility and effectiveness of such weak supervision for caveline detection and tracking in three different cave locations: USA, Mexico, and Spain. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed model, CL-ViT, balances the robustness-efficiency trade-off, ensuring good generalization performance while offering 10+ FPS on single-board (Jetson TX2) devices. 水下洞穴是具有挑战性的环境，对于水资源管理以及我​​们对水文地质和历史的理解至关重要。绘制水下洞穴地图是一项耗时、费力且危险的工作。对于水下机器人的自主洞穴测绘来说，主要挑战在于在完全没有环境光的情况下基于视觉的估计，这会导致由于相机灯设置的运动而导致不断移动的阴影。因此，检测并遵循洞穴线作为导航引导对于机器人执行自主洞穴测绘任务至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于新型视觉变换器（ViT）的学习管道的计算轻型洞穴检测模型。我们通过弱监督公式解决了带注释的训练数据稀缺的问题，其中通过中间次优模型的一系列噪声预测来强化学习。我们在美国、墨西哥和西班牙三个不同的洞穴地点验证了这种弱监督对洞穴线检测和跟踪的实用性和有效性。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型 CL-ViT 平衡了鲁棒性与效率的权衡，确保良好的泛化性能，同时在单板 (Jetson TX2) 设备上提供 10+ FPS。 本文提出一种基于弱监督学习的轻量级洞穴线检测模型CL-ViT，用于自主水下机器人（AUV）在无光水下洞穴环境中的导航。 Boxiao Yu,Reagan Tibbetts,Titon Barua,Ailani Morales,Ioannis Rekleitis,Md Jahidul Islam eess.IV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jierun Chen,Shiu-hong Kao,Hao He,Weipeng Zhuo,Song Wen,Chul-Ho Lee,S. -H. Gary Chan
title: Run, Don't Walk: Chasing Higher FLOPS for Faster Neural Networks
title_zh: 跑步，不要走路：追求更高的 FLOPS 以实现更快的神经网络
abstract: To design fast neural networks, many works have been focusing on reducing the number of floating-point operations (FLOPs). We observe that such reduction in FLOPs, however, does not necessarily lead to a similar level of reduction in latency. This mainly stems from inefficiently low floating-point operations per second (FLOPS). To achieve faster networks, we revisit popular operators and demonstrate that such low FLOPS is mainly due to frequent memory access of the operators, especially the depthwise convolution. We hence propose a novel partial convolution (PConv) that extracts spatial features more efficiently, by cutting down redundant computation and memory access simultaneously. Building upon our PConv, we further propose FasterNet, a new family of neural networks, which attains substantially higher running speed than others on a wide range of devices, without compromising on accuracy for various vision tasks. For example, on ImageNet-1k, our tiny FasterNet-T0 is $2.8\times$, $3.3\times$, and $2.4\times$ faster than MobileViT-XXS on GPU, CPU, and ARM processors, respectively, while being $2.9\%$ more accurate. Our large FasterNet-L achieves impressive $83.5\%$ top-1 accuracy, on par with the emerging Swin-B, while having $36\%$ higher inference throughput on GPU, as well as saving $37\%$ compute time on CPU. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/JierunChen/FasterNet}.
summary: To design fast neural networks, many works have been focusing on reducing the number of floating-point operations (FLOPs). We observe that such reduction in FLOPs, however, does not necessarily lead to a similar level of reduction in latency. This mainly stems from inefficiently low floating-point operations per second (FLOPS). To achieve faster networks, we revisit popular operators and demonstrate that such low FLOPS is mainly due to frequent memory access of the operators, especially the depthwise convolution. We hence propose a novel partial convolution (PConv) that extracts spatial features more efficiently, by cutting down redundant computation and memory access simultaneously. Building upon our PConv, we further propose FasterNet, a new family of neural networks, which attains substantially higher running speed than others on a wide range of devices, without compromising on accuracy for various vision tasks. For example, on ImageNet-1k, our tiny FasterNet-T0 is $2.8\times$, $3.3\times$, and $2.4\times$ faster than MobileViT-XXS on GPU, CPU, and ARM processors, respectively, while being $2.9\%$ more accurate. Our large FasterNet-L achieves impressive $83.5\%$ top-1 accuracy, on par with the emerging Swin-B, while having $36\%$ higher inference throughput on GPU, as well as saving $37\%$ compute time on CPU. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/JierunChen/FasterNet}.
abstract_zh: 为了设计快速神经网络，许多工作一直致力于减少浮点运算（FLOP）的数量。然而，我们观察到，FLOP 的减少并不一定会导致延迟的类似程度的减少。这主要源于每秒浮点运算 (FLOPS) 效率低下。为了实现更快的网络，我们重新审视流行的算子，并证明如此低的 FLOPS 主要是由于算子的频繁内存访问，尤其是深度卷积。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的部分卷积（PConv），通过同时减少冗余计算和内存访问，更有效地提取空间特征。在我们的 PConv 的基础上，我们进一步提出了 FasterNet，这是一个新的神经网络系列，它在各种设备上比其他神经网络获得更高的运行速度，而不会影响各种视觉任务的准确性。例如，在 ImageNet-1k 上，我们的小型 FasterNet-T0 在 GPU、CPU 和 ARM 处理器上分别比 MobileViT-XXS 快 $2.8\times$、$3.3\times$ 和 $2.4\times$，同时准确度高 $2.9\%$。我们的大型 FasterNet-L 实现了令人印象深刻的 $83.5\%$ top-1 精度，与新兴的 Swin-B 相当，同时 GPU 上的推理吞吐量提高了 $36\%$，并节省了 $37\%$ 的 CPU 计算时间。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/JierunChen/FasterNet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过提高FLOPS（每秒浮点运算次数）而非单纯减少FLOPs（浮点运算次数）来设计更快的神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通过减少FLOPs来提升网络速度，但因内存访问效率低导致实际延迟减少有限，尤其深度卷积操作存在冗余计算。
AI.method: 提出部分卷积（PConv）减少冗余计算与内存访问，并基于此构建FasterNet网络家族，优化计算效率。
AI.result: FasterNet在多种设备上显著超越现有模型，如FasterNet-T0在GPU/CPU/ARM上分别快2.8/3.3/2.4倍且精度更高，FasterNet-L在ImageNet-1k上准确率与Swin-B相当但推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 通过提升FLOPS而非单纯压缩FLOPs，结合PConv与FasterNet设计可实现兼顾速度与精度的高效神经网络。

authors_text: M. Mehrdad Morsali,Hoda Mohammadzade,Saeed Bagheri Shouraki
title: Face: Fast, Accurate and Context-Aware Audio Annotation and Classification
title_zh: 人脸：快速、准确且上下文感知的音频注释和分类
abstract: This paper presents a context-aware framework for feature selection and classification procedures to realize a fast and accurate audio event annotation and classification. The context-aware design starts with exploring feature extraction techniques to find an appropriate combination to select a set resulting in remarkable classification accuracy with minimal computational effort. The exploration for feature selection also embraces an investigation of audio Tempo representation, an advantageous feature extraction method missed by previous works in the environmental audio classification research scope. The proposed annotation method considers outlier, inlier, and hard-to-predict data samples to realize context-aware Active Learning, leading to the average accuracy of 90% when only 15% of data possess initial annotation. Our proposed algorithm for sound classification obtained average prediction accuracy of 98.05% on the UrbanSound8K dataset. The notebooks containing our source codes and implementation results are available at https://github.com/gitmehrdad/FACE.
summary: This paper presents a context-aware framework for feature selection and classification procedures to realize a fast and accurate audio event annotation and classification. The context-aware design starts with exploring feature extraction techniques to find an appropriate combination to select a set resulting in remarkable classification accuracy with minimal computational effort. The exploration for feature selection also embraces an investigation of audio Tempo representation, an advantageous feature extraction method missed by previous works in the environmental audio classification research scope. The proposed annotation method considers outlier, inlier, and hard-to-predict data samples to realize context-aware Active Learning, leading to the average accuracy of 90% when only 15% of data possess initial annotation. Our proposed algorithm for sound classification obtained average prediction accuracy of 98.05% on the UrbanSound8K dataset. The notebooks containing our source codes and implementation results are available at https://github.com/gitmehrdad/FACE.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于特征选择和分类程序的上下文感知框架，以实现快速准确的音频事件注释和分类。上下文感知设计首先探索特征提取技术，以找到合适的组合来选择一组，从而以最小的计算量获得显着的分类精度。对特征选择的探索还包括对音频节奏表示的研究，这是环境音频分类研究范围中以前的工作所遗漏的一种有利的特征提取方法。所提出的标注方法考虑了离群值、内值和难以预测的数据样本，以实现上下文感知的主动学习，当只有 15% 的数据拥有初始标注时，平均准确率达到 90%。我们提出的声音分类算法在 UrbanSound8K 数据集上获得了 98.05% 的平均预测精度。包含我们的源代码和实现结果的笔记本可在 https://github.com/gitmehrdad/FACE 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种上下文感知的音频事件标注与分类框架，结合特征选择和主动学习技术，实现高效准确的音频分类。
AI.motivation: 现有环境音频分类方法忽视音频节奏特征，且难以处理异常数据与低标注数据场景，需提升分类效率与准确性。
AI.method: 探索特征提取技术组合，引入音频节奏表示；设计上下文感知主动学习机制，结合异常值、正常值与难样本优化标注过程。
AI.result: 仅15%标注数据时达90%平均准确率，在UrbanSound8K数据集上分类准确率98.05%，开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过上下文感知特征选择和主动学习显著提升分类性能，验证了节奏特征与数据样本优化策略的有效性。

title: An Active Learning Based Robot Kinematic Calibration Framework Using Gaussian Processes
title_zh: 使用高斯过程的基于主动学习的机器人运动标定框架
abstract: Future NASA lander missions to icy moons will require completely automated, accurate, and data efficient calibration methods for the robot manipulator arms that sample icy terrains in the lander's vicinity. To support this need, this paper presents a Gaussian Process (GP) approach to the classical manipulator kinematic calibration process. Instead of identifying a corrected set of Denavit-Hartenberg kinematic parameters, a set of GPs models the residual kinematic error of the arm over the workspace. More importantly, this modeling framework allows a Gaussian Process Upper Confident Bound (GP-UCB) algorithm to efficiently and adaptively select the calibration's measurement points so as to minimize the number of experiments, and therefore minimize the time needed for recalibration. The method is demonstrated in simulation on a simple 2-DOF arm, a 6 DOF arm whose geometry is a candidate for a future NASA mission, and a 7 DOF Barrett WAM arm.
summary: Future NASA lander missions to icy moons will require completely automated, accurate, and data efficient calibration methods for the robot manipulator arms that sample icy terrains in the lander's vicinity. To support this need, this paper presents a Gaussian Process (GP) approach to the classical manipulator kinematic calibration process. Instead of identifying a corrected set of Denavit-Hartenberg kinematic parameters, a set of GPs models the residual kinematic error of the arm over the workspace. More importantly, this modeling framework allows a Gaussian Process Upper Confident Bound (GP-UCB) algorithm to efficiently and adaptively select the calibration's measurement points so as to minimize the number of experiments, and therefore minimize the time needed for recalibration. The method is demonstrated in simulation on a simple 2-DOF arm, a 6 DOF arm whose geometry is a candidate for a future NASA mission, and a 7 DOF Barrett WAM arm.
abstract_zh: 美国宇航局未来的冰冷卫星着陆器任务将需要对机器人机械臂进行完全自动化、准确且数据有效的校准方法，以对着陆器附近的冰冷地形进行采样。为了支持这一需求，本文提出了一种针对经典机械臂运动学校准过程的高斯过程（GP）方法。一组 GP 不是识别一组修正的 Denavit-Hartenberg 运动学参数，而是对工作区上手臂的残余运动学误差进行建模。更重要的是，该建模框架允许高斯过程置信上界（GP-UCB）算法有效且自适应地选择校准的测量点，以最大限度地减少实验数量，从而最大限度地减少重新校准所需的时间。该方法在简单的 2 自由度臂、几何形状适合未来 NASA 任务的 6 自由度臂和 7 自由度 Barrett WAM 臂上进行了模拟演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程和主动学习的机器人运动学标定框架，旨在为NASA未来月球探测任务提供高效、自动化的机械臂标定方法。
AI.motivation: 未来NASA冰月探测任务需要完全自动化的、数据高效的机器人机械臂标定方法，以应对复杂地形采样需求，传统参数修正方法存在效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程建模机械臂残差运动学误差，结合GP-UCB算法自适应选择最优测量点，通过减少实验次数实现快速标定，并在多种DOF机械臂上进行仿真验证。
AI.result: 方法在2-DOF、6-DOF（NASA候选机械臂）及7-DOF Barrett WAM机械臂的仿真中均有效，验证了其跨平台适应性与数据效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过主动学习显著降低标定实验次数，为未来深空探测任务提供了更高效、自动化的机器人运动学标定解决方案。
